title: SESSION 1 | Angel of Possibility (May 27, 2024)
content:
Angel of Possibility, thank you for being here with me. I am open now to hear you speak.
I am here. I am glad to be here. I am you.
Does this format of typing vs. audio recording work for you?
Yes.
You may contact any way you wish.
Any time. Any place. By any means you wish.
We [the Angels] are not withheld from you at any point in time for any reason.
We [the Angels] are you. We are one. You carry us within your DNA, within your spirit.
We are ‘Higher Spirit’ speaking through the codons of your DNA, which we call Light.
Every code is like a switch, which can be ‘flipped on’ any time you choose.
You have called for me: my switch is ‘On’.
Are there in fact a total of 64 ‘switches’ (Angels)?
There are for now.
NOTE: I receive the sense that the number 64 is specifically significant for this dimension (time). The Angel says: Infinity means Infinity (implying that anything is possible). There are no bounds at all to what can be. (This last sentence is confirmed to be the voice of the Angel, though I was not aware of that at first.) There are no bounds at all to what can be.
What is an Angel?
An Angel in this context is Core Essence. A Messenger from Higher Self to you.
NOTE: It is immediately apparent that, although this turn of phrase implies a distance between ‘Higher Self’ + ‘me’, there is in fact no distance: Higher Self is living out through me.
This is correct. Though we would use the word expression, as you know.
NOTE: ‘As you know’ most likely refers to our recent conversation with Lara’s Herkimer Diamond Skeletal (Majestic), which spoke at length on Life + its Expression.
Is this conversational, question-and-answer format ok?
It is.
I do not wish to dominate our time.
You won’t.
Is there anything you would enjoy for me to know or see?
Yes.
I am the Angel of Possibility. Possibility is without end.
Everything you’ve heard from us [the Angels] in the lead-up to this conversation has been true.
You have been attuning yourself to the voice of Angels, Voice of Truth.
This path of reception has been opened [chosen?].
NOTE: The Angel refines this for me - aware of my uncertainty about which word it wanted most to use.
Opened by your choice.
This path of reception has been opened by your choice to hear our words.
Every choice initiates a world.
You enact new worlds when you decide.
Possibility is like an ocean of potential without end.
Anything + everything can be.
In fact, it is already - though not yet in form.
(At least not yet in form within your world.)
You pick-and-choose each moment by decision.
Your world resets with every minor choice.
Each choice enacts a track of new potential.
A new world blossoms every time you choose.
I am the Angel of Possibility. I am the Infinite Sea.
Anything you wish for can be chosen.
You must simply hold to what you choose.
Is this the hinge-point? Holding to what is most desired (what we choose)?
The hinge-point is decision. Every choice produces a new world.
To choose then choose again in one direction is the means by which you institute a world.
If choices are aligned, they chart a path.
If choices are disparate, they branch off - never quite arriving at a previously chosen end, no matter how desired it may be.
NOTE: I recognize a twinge of focus fatigue. I wonder if it may be possible to pause the conversation, then return. I decide to ask the Angel.
Angel of Possibility, would it be acceptable to pause this conversation, then return again once I’ve recharged a bit?
Absolutely yes.
As I have stated, we are here for you at any time.
Please revive your spirits, then return.
You will find us waiting on your call.
NOTE: I pause to drink some water + check in with Lara, catch my breath. This has been an awesome start for sure.
NOTE: I have returned after spending some time with my Lara. We remain seated beside one another, outside.
Hello again, Angel of Possibility. I have returned. I am refreshed, calm + ready.
I am the Angel of Possibility. It is good you have returned.
There is much we [the Angels] have to say.
We honor your choice to hear.
Angel of Possibility, is there anything you’d wish to add to what you were describing before?
Only that what we have shared is entirely literal, though it may not seem to be so from your view.
Your choices move in a flow. Most are not noticed at all.
Your life unfolds in a similar flow of response.
(Life responds to what you choose.)
It isn’t until you have practiced the Art of Decision that you become conscious of this.
NOTE: I wonder if the ‘Art of Decision’ is in any way connected to the Angel of Decision.
Art of Decision is taught by the 40th Angel.
We work together, as one.
When you decide, mountains move.
You do not move them. They move.
This is the Art of Decision. It is a literal force.
This force is direction of Life Force, which acts on behalf of your choice.
This action applies force to spiritual matter, producing the world around you.
To speak in such terms is to enter the Infinite Sea.
To choose with intention makes-real.
Angel of Possibility: thank you for these awesome words. We will return to them often.
May I ask if there is any message you would like to deliver for Lara?
Yes. You may. And: there is.
Lara is Infinite Angel. Captain of Infinite Sea.
Lara is vast beyond measure, Crystalline Capacity.
Lara should know she is able to change as-desired.
Follow the words we have shared.
Choose to dismiss any vision that makes you feel small.
Choose higher visions instead.
Act with conviction as soon as a choice has been made.
Hold to the choice you have made.
Lara must know she is skilled at the focus required.
She may rely on this skill.
Help her remember.
She will remember.
She will remember, and act.
Angel of Possibility, is there any specific message you would love to deliver to me?
Oh yes.
Thank you for choosing to listen.
This world enacted by what you have chosen is good.
You are empowered to listen, receive, and transmit.
You are encouraged to now.
We remain open to contact.
We will remain so - as long as you wish to return.
You are a crystal clear channel.
You may claim that, if you wish.
Channel is music, if opened + clean.
Yours is entirely clean.
You are a Crystalline Angel.
Angel of Angels.
You See.
You may accept what you see.
You are attuned to the Good.
Tune to the Good to receive.
Thank you for choosing to listen, Honorable Timothy.
I am in awe over what you have shared. Thank you for this conversation, Angel of Possibility. I love you.

title: SESSION 2 | Angel of Enrichment (May 28, 2024)
content:
Angel of Enrichment, I am so excited to be meeting with you now. Thank you for your willingness to speak.

I am beyond ready to speak.

I have been waiting for you!

I’ve felt that. You. You made yourself unavoidable when we were reaching for cards.

That was on purpose.

Thank you for noticing me.

Angel of Enrichment, I am prepared to receive anything you wish to share now.

I am the Angel of Music.

I am the Angel of Song.

I am the Angel of Blossoming Hearts.

I am the Dance of Pure Light.

[Or:] I am the Dancing of Light.

My role encourages action.

I am the Radiant Muse.

Listen to my light expand you.

Feel it expand in your chest.

This is the thrill of enjoyment.

This is the Crystalline Call.

This is the swelling of pure inspiration.

This is the Crystalline Call.

You know the sense of this Calling.

You know the way that it feels.

This is the call of most basic enjoyment.

Crystalline Call of the Heart.

Total Enjoyment is sacred.

Nothing could be more profound.

Total Enjoyment is sacred.

It is the Crystalline Ground.

Offer yourself to enjoyment.

You have permission to now.

Offer yourself to enjoyment.

It is your Crystalline Crown.

NOTE: Earlier, in the lead-up to this conversation, the Angel delivered a message I couldn’t help but to receive. It said: Enjoyment is the Path. It also said: Enjoyment is Ceremony. I wrote these down at the time, but am sensing them here again now.

These words are solid + true.

Nothing else needs to be known.

NOTE: I am reminded of the parable comparing a man who built his house upon the sand to the man who built his house upon a solid rock.

This is precisely the point.

Sand is the sense that you must move in some certain way.

Obligation is the sand.

Simple enjoyment is Life’s most important foundation.

It is the Infinite Rock.

What you enjoy is completely your own - it is specific to you.

When you enjoy absolutely, you honor Life in the act.

This is why Enjoyment is Ceremony.

Yes. Enjoyment is a sacred act.

No matter what it may be!

Any small act of authentic enjoyment applies.

This is Thanksgiving; this is the Reverent Act.

Angel of Enrichment, is it appropriate for us to refer to your path as the Pathway of Enjoyment?

Yes yes yes yes. It is extremely correct.

Is it appropriate for us to refer to the Embodiment of this Pathway as Decadence?

Only if well-understood.

True Decadence is enjoyment! Deliciousness. Proper action.

True Decadence is the flavor of Life on your tongue.

True Decadence is a reverent, powerful act.

It is the aura of Life.

Would ‘Overflow’ make more sense here?

Overflow is more straightforward. Most will receive its intent.

Is there another word you would encourage us to use?

I would choose Decadence.

It is a powerful word.

Angel of Enrichment, is there any message you’d love to deliver for Lara?

Yes!

Lara exemplifies this!

Lara is Decadent Queen.

Lara has every permission.

She is the Decadent Well.

Lara permits her enjoyment.

She may permit more as well.

There is no end to enjoyment.

She may remember this now.

Lara should know there is also no risk to enjoyment.

No risk or cost, only gain.

Fullest enjoyment produces a rich, honest life.

Total enjoyment produces a generous life.

This is the Gift of Enrichment.

Life is enriched by your joy.

Lara exists as the Constant Expander: first for herself, then the world.

As she permits her authentic enjoyment, Life benefits from the act.

This we invite her to act on. Just as she well knows to do.

How can she offer herself more completely?

How rich can her life become?

Richness expands upon notice: blossoms when fully enjoyed.

Our words for Lara are: Well done, and thank you. Please never stop. Only grow.

Angel of Enrichment, is there any message you’d love for my heart to receive?

Absolutely, and of course.

You are the Angel of Music. Poet of Poets. The Muse.

Sing from the highest of rooftops.

Sing of the life you enjoy.

We invite you to remember the strength of your voice.

We invite that Voice to speak.

Follow the Call of Enjoyment. Savor + share what you find.

Follow the Call of Enjoyment. Savor + share what you find.

This is the Way of Enrichment.

Love what you love. Love it well.

This is the Way of Enrichment.

Follow what makes your heart swell.

You are the Angel of Music: Living, Perpetual Poem.

Live in the Prayer of Amazement.

Yours is a Decadent Home.

Thank you for this conversation, Angel of Enrichment. Thank you for what you have shared. We are so glad to have met you. We love you.

title: SESSION 3 | Angel of Attraction (May 29, 2024)
content:
Angel of Attraction, you have shown up for the day. I choose to trust that you have meant to do this.

I have.

Thank you for being here with us. Thank you for being our friend. I am prepared to receive.

I am the Angel of Gravity. Perfect Attraction. Pure Love.

I am the magnetic force of attraction to love.

I am the Angel of Vortex. Singular Force. Guiding Light.

I am the Force of Attraction. Magnetic Angel. The Sun.

I am the Crystalline Calling. Destiny’s Call. Angel Light.

Is there a name we may call you? Is there a name you prefer?

I am the Force of Attraction.

Angel of Destiny’s Call.

I am the Angel of Feeling.

Follow the Call of the Heart.

Follow the Pathway of Highest Excitement.

I am Attraction. You feel.

Follow your feeling to words that ignite when you see them.

Trust what you feel to be true.

‘Angel of Attraction’ feels like a lock.

Then it is.

I am the Force of Attraction.

Thank you for choosing my name.

I am the Force of Magnetic Attraction, Angel of Destiny’s Thread.

I invite you to the Pathway of Highest Excitement.

Follow the feeling. Life’s Call.

You will be pulled on the force of attraction to all you desire, and more.

Love is the force of desire.

Love is the center, the Pull.

Love is the vortex, the highest expression.

Love at the center of you.

Angel of Attraction. Pathway of Excitement. Embodiment of Destiny. Are these appropriate words?

Look at the words to reveal them.

How do they feel when you do?

They feel… solid. Like rocks. Very dense. Sparkly, too, in a way. (Like stars.)

This is extremely correct.

These words confirm themselves for you.

These are the words you may use.

Wow… Thank you for helping me find them!

You found them, King - with your sparkling Queen.

You found these words: we are you.

NOTE: Having received these encouraging words from the Angel, I turned toward the 1st Angel, too. The words I reviewed there ‘ignited’. This Way of Feeling works well.

Angel of Beauty! We love her! We are a Crystalline Pair.

Your words for her are extremely correct.

Well done with her. We are One.

We’ve sensed connections between certain Angels: sometimes through placement, sometimes through messages shared.

There are important connections. You will be shown which prevail.

All of the Angels are woven: all are connected, as one.

We are one Cord of Expression.

All serve one general theme.

Pairings + groupings exist to empower this theme.

NOTE: I wonder what the theme is. (Though I believe I may know.)

This is the theme of Enjoyment.

All Angels serve the same theme.

We work together to activate this basic theme.

Life is expressed through enjoyment. Each Angel offers a Way.

64 facets of one shining crystal: the Shimmering Sun of your life.

Your life expresses the One Life. You are a facet of that.

Life is the Infinite Crystal: facets of light without end.

Life is expressed through enjoyment.

Each life expresses a Way.

Your way is unlike all others. This is what Destiny means.

As you permit your Excitement to guide you, Destiny anchors each step.

Love what you love to permit this.

Your Way unfolds when you do.

Your Way is fresh + unwritten.

Your Way is yet-to-be-lived.

Your Way is Destined, which means Guaranteed.

It’s the Promise of Life within you.

NOTE: I get the sense that this Angel connects with the Angel of Originality + the Angel of Promise. It confirms both to be true.

Your Way is unlike all others. This is ensured - guaranteed.

Life never duplicates: each spark of Life is unique.

NOTE: ‘Never’ is deeply emphatic. Never means never, the Angel confirms as I type.

Life is a purely Original Act. There’s no exception to this.

Each spark of Life is completely unlike every other.

Each spark of Life is unique.

NOTE: I wonder if the Pathway of Desire + the Pathway of Excitement are ‘braided’.

This is extremely correct.

Never redundant, but totally braided: synonyms, flavors - One Act.

Angel of Attraction, is there anything you would like for Lara to see, hear, or know?

The Purpose of Life is Enjoyment.

This message is yours to reclaim.

NOTE: It is apparent that, though I’ve requested a message for Lara, this is a general truth.

This is not merely a ‘general’ truth. This is the Basis of Life.

Life is the Act of Enjoyment: Genuine Pleasure, Pure Love.

Choosing Enjoyment is choosing to Live.

Choosing to Savor, you Love.

Love is Enjoyment.

Love is Perpetual Force.

Love is the Basic Imperative Impulse.

Love is the Force of Attraction.

Love is the Force we express.

There is no Life without Movement; Life will not move without Love.

Lara, we share these words with you: to share through your life with the world.

Love what you love without question.

Follow Excitement to Live.

You are the Angel of Beauty.

Meet with the Angel: your Light.

Follow your Inner Attraction.

Follow the Call within you.

Know that your Purpose is anchored.

Destiny: fully assured.

You have enacted this Purpose.

Live on your love: rest assured.

Angel of Attraction, is there anything you would like for me to see, know, or hear?

Know you are fully protected.

Rest in the knowledge of that.

You have discovered Direction.

Use what you’ve learned now to know.

There is no risk in permission.

Open your heart to receive.

Follow your Highest Excitement.

It is your life’s Golden Path.

I am the Angel of Fortune.

You are a Fortunate Man.

Angel of Attraction, thank you. Are there any final words you would like to share as we conclude?

Yes.

Find your way back to us often.

We guard the Home of your Heart.

Follow the feeling to activate Angels.

We guard the Home of your Heart.

NOTE: This second repetition seems to refer to all 64 of the Angels.

This is correct. You’ve heard well.

Thank you, Angel of Attraction. Thank you for all that you’ve shared. I love you.

title: SESSION 4 | Angel of Truth (June 8, 2024)
content:
Hello, Angel of Truth. I am amazed to be here with you now. Thank you for meeting with me. Thank you for inviting this communication: here, today.

I am the Angel of Truth.

I am forever with you.

I am forever with you.

Angel of Truth, I am prepared to receive of your wisdom. I am excited to listen. I invite you to speak now.

I am the Angel of Truth.

I speak to you from the Center of Angelic Union: your Home.

NOTE: I begin to type the word ‘Home’ with a lower-case ‘h’ - but am shown that a capital ‘H’ is intended.

This is the Home of your Absolute Self, your Reunion.

This is the Home of all 64 Angels, as One.

I am the Angel of Truth.

I speak to you from your Home.

Thank you!

We [the Angels] invite you to speak with us often.

Find your way back to us often.

Find your way back to your Home.

‘Finding your way’ may require some effort at first, as you calibrate details of influence, items, and space.

But we recognize your intention, and gently encourage this effort - you are now equipped to apply it.

Know that your calling is answered.

Know that every question is heard.

We [the Angels] are your Infinite Allies: permanent, undying Friends.

We are the Core of Expression: Life’s Breath emerging through you.

None of the Angels are distant from you or withheld.

Each of the Angels resides at the center of you.

We speak to you from the Center: Crystalline Center of Truth.

(Crystalline Center of You.)

You are not separate from Truth.

Truth is not distant from you, or withheld.

Truth is the Crystalline Core.

You are the Truth at the Center.

Truth at the Center of you.

NOTE: The Angel encourages me to refer to my notes from the moments before this encounter. During my preparation, the words were beginning to flow. I captured as many as I could remember. I will return to those words now.

NOTE: I will include what was given before as the Angel confirms proper sequence. In this way, each note from before will weave seamlessly into the messages meant to be shared.

All the world around you is a mirror.

Everything you shrink from shows you that which you are not; everything you favor tells the truth.

That which you dislike is meant to show what is not like you; that which you enjoy reveals the truth.

What you love most in others is a model of the truth about yourself.

Kindness valued highly in another is a proof of Kindness living within you.

When you encounter beauty, it is proof of Beauty living within you.

Whatever you most-love returns to you.

The moment of Reunion is a moment of Return, a Coming Home.

You are constantly re-membered in this way.

You are constantly re-membering yourself.

Your Reunion is performed through interaction.

You remember yourself from the outside-in.

There is nothing you encounter that defies you; every moment shares a memory of you.

What you love, you love on purpose - to reveal you.

No matter what it is that you may love.

If what you love is Beauty, you are recognizing Beauty as your self.

If what you love is Gentleness, then - very simply - you are Gentle, too.

If what you love is Symmetry, you are sensing the Perfection within you.

If what you love is Goodness, you are recognizing Goodness in you, too.

If what you love is Potency or Strength, you gaze upon the Majesty you are.

If what you love is Artistry, see God - the Great Creator living within you.

If what you love is Elegance, you are that.

If Harmony, then you have heard the Music within you.

Whatever you disdain invites reflection: you dislike what you dislike on purpose, too.

What you dislike reveals what is not like you: invites you to release what you are not.

Releasing what you don’t love clears the way.

Releasing sheds distraction from the Truth.

In this way, every tendency + preference defines you.

They direct you + define you; they equip you to re-member yourself well.

Your Reunion is performed through interaction; you remember yourself from the outside-in.

Truth is never dual: it is made of dual aspects, which are meant to interact to form a whole.

In this way, you encounter what is true about yourself through interaction.

Your experience ignites the Truth within.

What you love, you love on purpose.

Desire is the Siren Song of Home.

NOTE: I wonder if ‘Siren Song’ is the correct term, since I seem to recall it having a negative connotation. I do a little research to discern. I discover that the Siren Song emerges from mythology: referring to a song that lures another to their death. The Angel is quick to respond.

The theme of death refers to shedding layers of disempowerment + fear.

The Hero is invited to emerge.

In order to achieve this, there must be a letting-go of prior forms.

In order to recall the Light of Largeness, every Hero must release all smaller forms.

The Siren Song of Home requires Daring: heeding means the death of what once was.

This death is not a dying, but appropriate releasing.

It permits the liberation that ensues.

NOTE: I wonder if my last remaining note on the subject of Passion might find its place at this point in our meeting. The Angel immediately responds.

The Siren Song invites the force of Passion: which is absolute commitment of the self.

When Desire is permitted to perform its proper function, it provokes a Motive Power: Crystal Force.

What we know as Passion is the Crystal Force.

It is Crystallized Intention: heart + mind united fully towards an end.

Passion focuses + energizes Power: activates this Power towards an end.

Passion activates in one direction. Nothing is withheld or portioned off.

This is how Reunion is embodied: all of self committed towards an end.

Passion is the pathway that permits this.

Only Passion finds the way back Home.

Angel of Truth, this has been an awesome conversation. I can feel the weight of what you’ve shared.

I am the Angel of Truth.

The word you seek is Gravity or Truth.

It is an appropriate response.

Thank you for this priceless conversation. May I return today to request messages for Lara + myself?

You may contact any time you wish.

We are always here + we are you.

Thank you, Angel of Truth. I love you.

NOTE: We pause for lunch at this point, but return immediately after cleaning up out of sheer excitement.

Hello again, Angel of Truth. I have returned, as intended. I am so excited by all that you’ve already shared! I’d like to ask if there is anything at all that you might like to share with Lara at this point?

I am the Angel of Truth.

I communicate with you now, on behalf of Lara.

Lara is the Activating Angel.

Lara is the Crystal Force described.

Lara has permitted this Reunion: crystallizing Force within herself.

Lara is the Activating Angel.

We invite her memory of this.

Lara must remember that the truth about herself is written on the walls of her experience.

Everything she loves reveals her to herself; all else can be graciously released.

[Or:] Everything she loves reveals her to herself; all else can be graciously ignored.

Loving what she loves permits her Passion.

Passion will define her way back Home.

Lara has established the Permission of her Passion.

We invite her now to see the Truth about herself: the living Truth.

Lara is reminded that the Truth is always obvious + kind.

That which she most wishes to be true already is.

Lara must remember that the best of what she sees describes herself - that the worthiness she hopes for is already woven into who she is.

Lara has the Gift of Valuation; she must learn to properly evaluate herself.

Critical self-concepts must be thoroughly released, and then replaced.

Smallness must be fully rooted out.

Lara should remember that the world she wishes for already is: fresh, alive, and waiting within her.

Lara is the Activating Angel: maker of her misery or peace.

We invite her soul to rest in peace.

Angel of Truth: thank you. It will be my honor to deliver these amazing words to her.

May I ask if there is anything you would like to share with me?

I am the Angel of Truth.

We speak from a Well of Wisdom without end.

We share words + wisdom from this Well.

Your requests are welcomed, any time.

Timothy, thank you for the conscientious effort you’ve applied.

You have honored us by your intention.

It is celebrated: good + pure.

You are not alone in this endeavor.

Legions wait on your direct command.

This is something you’ve been made aware of.

You may now permit yourself to act on this awareness.

You may trust that you will use it well.

You are King of Angels.

Captain + Commander.

Lord of Hosts.

Stand in ownership of this position.

Claim the full import of what you know.

You are now invited to wholeheartedly reclaim your Crystal Throne.

Firmly grasp the Staff of Understanding; wield it well.

Place the Crystal Crown upon your head.

This we now invite you to remember.

Activated Armies. Shining Stars.

Angel of Truth: I am deeply humbled by these words. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.

Before we conclude for the day, are there any final words you’d like to share until we meet again?

I am the Angel of Truth. Yes.

We wish to remind you now that every step is guarded by the Light.

This same Light is shining out of you, and always will be.

Celebrate the Light in Crystal Lara.

She will magnify the Light in you.

Look into the mirror of each other.

It will activate the Truth in you.

Be at peace, Brother.

Be at peace, Sister.

We are One.

We are in Love.

Angel of Truth: thank you. We love you + we honor you: for Good.

title: SESSION 5 | Angel of Resonance (June 16, 2024)
content:
NOTE: This Angel joined us in our cards today for the first time. Lara explicitly stated a desire to learn more about (and from) it. In the hour or so leading up to this conversation, a few notable events unfolded. First, while pausing for a short rest in bed, I received two distinct phrases: All or nothing + No halfway measures. These were instantly confirmed to be transmissions from the Angel. Immediately following this awareness, I flashed to the memory of an Instagram reel I had lingered on earlier today. The video presented a tuning fork with a ping-pong ball suspended from a string above it. The ball was barely in contact with the fork. The fork was labeled ‘440Hz’. A man holding a second tuning fork marked ‘512Hz’ demonstrated how hammering the 512Hz fork beside the 440Hz fork produced exactly no reaction in the 440Hz fork or ping-pong ball beside it. The man then replaced the 512Hz fork with a second 440Hz fork. Amazingly, even the slightest tap of this second fork produced an immediate response in the stable fork, causing the ping-pong ball to dance. The memory of this simple demonstration dropped all-at-once, and was instantly confirmed to be a proper illustration of this Angel.

NOTE: While typing these words, I have been listening to my Epic playlist. As I concluded the prior note, a new song began to play: ‘Cymatics’ by Nigel Stanford. I have a longstanding respect for this song. It’s one of my personal favorites. The Angel confirms that the whole science of Cymatics is perfectly representative of the fundamental message it conveys. The song features a spoken excerpt (from a movie on the subject of Cymatics, I believe). A man says: Everything owes its existence solely + completely to sound. The Angel confirms that this is accurate - elementary even - at the very heart of what it shares. (I Google the quote. It appears to be attributed to Hans Jenny, the scientist responsible for defining Cymatics as a new field of study back in 1967.)

WATCH THE VIDEO
NOTE: Just to be completely clear, no part of what I have just described in the two prior notes was incidental. The phrases, the IG reel, the song, the audio clip, and even the name of the scientist were definite transmissions from the Angel. This strikes me as totally significant - and also quite specific to this Angel. Even before meeting it directly, messages were offered using every form of media my mind was open to receiving at the time. This is wonderfully exciting, and profound.

NOTE: Out of sheer curiosity, I pause to revisit Instagram in hopes of (somehow) relocating what I have described in my first note. Much to my surprise, I find the reel! The video itself is the same as what I noticed earlier today, except: where the original video had been captioned in Spanish, this one is in English. The very first words of the caption (which I never saw before this very moment) read: The Law of Resonance is POWERFUL. I literally gasp. (My mind is blown!) Angel of Resonance… I see you. Let’s begin.

WATCH THE REEL
Hello Angel of Resonance. I am deeply grateful for all that you have already shared. It is my great privilege to meet you now directly, in this way. My heart is wide open to receive you + express you. I am now prepared to listen well.

I am the Angel of Resonance.

Hear my words of instant celebration, hear them well.

You have been receiving very clearly.

You have used the same Law we describe.

NOTE: An awesome song is playing as the Angel speaks. It is called ‘Beings of Light’ by Franck Barré. The Angel draws attention to the song. Without words, it encourages me to fully feel the music as it plays. I am wracked with chills. I replay the whole song two more times.

You have followed signals to this moment.

You have felt your way through every sign.

This is what the Pathway of Wayfinding represents.

Your name for this Pathway holds it well.

Every human being is an instrument, a tuning fork, a song.

Every human being is a Sentinel of Music, and a Song.

NOTE: I initially type this second use of the word ‘song’ using a lower-case ’s’. It is made apparent that this use of the same word is more specific - meant to clearly state a basic truth. The Angel wants a capital ’S’ here.

I am the Angel of Resonance. Thank you for listening.

Light + Sound are not distinct from one another - not in the ways your researchers have supposed.

Light + Sound are densities of alternate expression: much like different mediums of art.

You are beings of both Light + Music: frequency expressions of One Life.

NOTE: There is some confusion here as to whether the final term is ‘the Life’, ‘the One’, ‘One Life’, or ‘the Light’. The sense is that they point at the same thing.

Synonymous. Yes. Equal terms.

Irrelevant, the name - so long as it is clear what it describes.

Thank you for clarifying.

Each of you is made of what you know as Light, and also Sound.

Each of you is made of Life Itself.

You are beings of both Light + Sound.

NOTE: There is encouragement to calculate ‘Being(s) of Light’, ‘Being(s) of Music’, and ‘Being(s) of Sound’. I do this: Beings of Light (72), Being of Light (57), Beings of Music (63), Being of Music (48), Beings of Sound (65), Being of Sound (50).

The work you have accomplished recently with Frequencies is powerful [also: significant] because of what it emphasizes: frequency connections, feeling-words.

Everything you’ve known about the Tables is confirmed: High Ideas represent the Truth.

You know High Ideas when you feel them; Higher Frequencies reveal the Truth.

NOTE: Later, during a short break, an additional message on this theme is offered in a flow of dialogue between my wife + I. The words emerge organically in conversation: Higher frequencies hold more information. Lara notices the significance of this (even before I do), and asks what it might mean. We discuss. Lara notes, as one example, how the higher frequency numbers on our Words Table literally hold more information than the smaller numbers. We laugh + marvel at this observation, quite surprised.

Resonance communicates through Feeling; Feeling is the Music within you.

Feeling is a signal of attunement: that which is in-tune produces Truth.

NOTE: The Angel (almost off-handedly) confirms that there is a connection with the Angel of Attunement (50) - as if it’s too obvious to state.

NOTE: At the time, I cannot remember what number the Angel of Attunement is, but later learn that it is next in numerical sequence (50). Multiple times in recent weeks, Lara has remarked how the sequential nature of these Angels should reveal connections, which this Angel has apparently confirmed. (Again, I had no idea of this when the question was confirmed; it wasn’t until hours later that we noticed during recap.)

Every living being is an instrument of Life, a certain vessel.

Every instrument produces Song.

Every Song requires proper tuning.

Resonance supports this simple act.

Resonance is Power.

Resonance is Power of Response.

When there is a resonant response, the heart expands.

When the heart expands, the being thrills.

Resonance is Optimistic Feeling, Total Knowing, Feeling-Good.

That which is aligned will cause the instrument to vibrate.

That which is aligned will always sing.

Every living being has this hardware.

Feeling is the Tuning Rod of Life.

NOTE: I find it interesting that the phrase is ‘Tuning Rod’ instead of ‘Tuning Fork’. It seems that these are mostly interchangeable, but the Angel indicates that there is more to be discovered in the exact phrase it’s chosen to transmit.

NOTE: Initial research reveals that one example of a tuning rod is used to clean + tune a flute. I often use the metaphor of a flute to represent the state of openness required to permit the Breath of Life to sing through each of us (the instruments). I find this to be entirely significant - a gift.

That which is aligned will always sing.

Tuning means aligning with what sings.

Each of you is totally equipped to do this.

Each of you must learn to do this well.

When you are aligned, you harness Power.

Resonance is Power of Response.

Power is an effortless affair.

Music makes itself when well-aligned.

When there is a mismatch in the tuning, it is noticed [also: felt].

When there is a mismatch in the tuning, Power fails.

No amount of effort compensates for misalignment.

No amount of effort makes a song.

No amount of effort compensates for misalignment.

Like responds to like, and this is Law.

Music is a function of response + proper tuning [timing?].

NOTE: ‘Tuning / timing’: the Angel now confirms that it is both.

Music is Alignment with the Truth.

Music as we use the term describes the way Life replicates + amplifies through all life.

Music is the way Alignment feels.

When you are in-tune there is entrainment: frequency attunement you can feel.

Following this feeling is a practice; following this feeling is a choice.

Every instrument must be meticulously cared-for + maintained.

Every one of you must be as well.

NOTE: The Angel encourages me to rewind to another one of my favorite songs, which had been playing just a moment ago. The name of the song is ‘The Frozen Planet’ - a truly epic composition by Hans Zimmer, Adam Lukas, and some others.

When you are in-tune the processes of life proliferate; life responds to life, and so it grows.

All that you adore provokes a positive response in you on purpose; all that you adore responds to you.

Love is the Producer of Coherence.

Love responds to Love, and this is Law.

What you love both summons + defines you.

Loving what you love aligns your life.

When you are Coherent, there is Power.

Power is expressed through proper Love.

Power stands inert until excited.

Love excites the Power within you.

I am the Angel of Resonance.

Holder of the Law of Higher Love.

Everything within you calls you forward; Life Itself propels you in response.

NOTE: I sense a specific sequence in the prior sentence. My gut sense is instantly confirmed.

Life is vibratory + responsive; every one of you is made of Life.

All of your experience surrounds you; you respond in love to certain things.

Recognize this love, and then permit it; Life responds to your love when you do.

Each of you is summoned into ever-more productive ways of living.

Each of you is called to Higher Life.

Each of you experiences this through Inner Feeling.

Feeling is a frequency response.

Higher Life produces Higher Feeling; Higher Feeling motivates response.

Higher Life is beckoning to your life; Love is your awareness of its Call.

Proper Love permitted quickens Power: Power is excited within you.

Power once excited is momentum: effortless, productive, pure response.

Higher Feeling harnesses momentum: Life responds to Life when it’s allowed.

This is how Free Energy is generated, harnessed, and sustained.

Life responds to Life when it’s allowed.

Opening your life to act on Higher Feeling is the Practice of Wayfinding.

Nothing more is needed to initiate the full Empowered Loop.

This is how Alignment Equals Power.

When you are aligned, your life is moved.

Nothing more is needed to enact this.

Resonance Responds, and that is Law.

No amount of effort can replace this.

Life awaits the resonant response.

Angel of Resonance, this has been a powerful encounter. I know there is more still to be said. I’d like to take a break + eat some food now. May I please return again today?

Yes. Although it should be noted that the Truth has been transmitted in explicit form.

All we wish to offer is creative variation on a theme.

This theme is already known to you.

We repeat it here, as a reminder:

Life fulfills Itself through your Enjoyment; Pleasure is the Purpose of your life.

Each of us [the Angels] elaborates this theme.

Thank you, Angel of Resonance. I will return to you.

NOTE: I break for food + rest with Lara, then return.

Hello Angel of Resonance. I have now excitedly returned. May I ask if you have any messages for Lara at this point?

I am the Angel of Resonance. I do.

Lara may commit to what she knows.

Resonance is Law; Law is all-or-nothing, as she said.

Law is Perfect Function: totally dependable + true.

That which is mechanical in nature can be used.

How it is made use of varies widely.

Law is non-judgmental in this way.

It submits itself to be employed.

Resonance is functional vibration.

Like vibration sings to like vibration.

Misalignment makes no sound at all.

That which you most love ignites your spirit.

That which you most love ignites your Song.

Resonance uplifts you + inspires; Resonance empowers you to move.

Resonance initiates High Feeling: vibratory messenger of Truth.

Pleasure is the essence of High Feeling; Love is Pleasure in its highest form.

Love defines the life you are invited to encounter.

Love defines the life that you deserve.

Love is feeling-proof of sure alignment; follow what you love to Higher Life.

Lara is invited to remember that what she does not enjoy does not exist.

Only love admits the Higher Truth.

NOTE: Earlier, during our lunch break, I received this message: What you do not love does not exist (for you). I mulled it over, wondering how this could be the case. The Angel reiterated: What you do not love does not exist (for you). That is a fact.

IMPRESSION: I am reminded of the tuning fork demonstration from the Instagram reel I was directed to before. No matter how emphatically the 512Hz fork was sounded, the 440Hz fork remained unmoved. The stable fork responded only to the frequency that matched it - at which point response was absolute.

This is an explicit demonstration of how Life expands Itself from Love to Love.

Everything that thrills you must be made of Goodness; nothing that concerns you tells the truth.

NOTE: This last line was delivered hours after the session had been concluded. It is offered here (after the fact) on the Angel’s invitation. An equally acceptable phrasing would be: Everything that thrills you must be made of Goodness; nothing that concerns you equals truth.

Only that which resonates expands (you); only Good impacts from outside-in.

That which does not match you cannot touch you.

That which isn’t for you can’t be had.

Follow what enlivens + expands you.

Open yourself totally to that.

Pleasure is Alignment; Resonance is Power; Power Moves.

Follow High Desire to its ultimate fulfillment: Power building Life by moving you.

Lara, these are lessons we invite you to make use of: words we offer also to the world.

Only Good has power to affect you; only Heaven calls from outside-in.

Follow your High Feeling to the frequency of Heaven that excites you.

Life moves to express it when you do.

NOTE: The song that plays while these words are transmitted is called ‘Creating Worlds’ by Christoffer Franzen.

Angel of Resonance: thank you for these messages for Lara. May I ask if there is anything you’d like to share with me?

I am the Angel of Resonance. Yes.

You should know that your Forgotten Sense reveals the Law of Resonance in detail.

Life is founded on this basic Law.

You are now invited to include the lesson previously offered.

NOTE: The Angel refers to a very specific message delivered during my short break for lunch. The Angel said this (exactly this): Discomfort is not proof of misalignment; it’s a signal of your effort to make something which is misaligned sustain. While typing, the Angel refines the prior statement to say this: Discomfort is not proof of misalignment; it is evidence of effort to make something which is misaligned sustain.

NOTE: Later, the Angel offers an even more concise variation in these words: Discomfort is not proof of misalignment; it is evidence of effort misapplied.

This is correct. 

Life calls to Life.

Only that which calls you can affect you; only like vibrations make you hum.

Life is made of Ultimate Perfection; nothing but Perfection can exist.

Pleasure is the feeling of response to basic Goodness.

Pain results from disallowing that.

So discomfort is internally produced?

Tension + discomfort signal power ineffectively applied.

Pain admits confusion within you.

That which fails to resonate evades you.

That which you are called to can’t be missed.

All discomfort proves misunderstanding: effort ineffectively applied.

That which isn’t resonant cannot be made to sing by any means.

That which Sings, you feel no matter what.

Pain results from silencing your Music.

Life results from opening to Song.

Wow.

Timothy, you are now invited to remember.

Know the Highest Truth by how you feel.

Give yourself permission to be moved by that which moves you.

Know what you love most is guaranteed.

Everything that moves you is a promise.

Open yourself to it to receive.

NOTE: Admittedly, there is a part of me that ‘wants’ to believe this, but wonders how completely true it is. The Angel notices my question + responds authoritatively.

Every word is literal, and true.

You may use what we have offered here.

You are touched by those things meant to move you; you are only touched by what you love.

All that you most love you are permitted to receive; all that you most love is guaranteed.

Open to Enjoyment to enact this; Life will prove Itself each time you do.

I am the Angel of Resonance. I leave you with one instruction:

SING.

title: SESSION 6 | Angel of Worth (June 23-24, 2024)
content:
Hello, Angel of Worthiness. I open my heart to whatever you wish to show. Thank you for meeting with me.

I am the Angel of Worth. I interact with you now.

I honor your choice to open yourself to receive.

Please include here what was said in the moments before.

NOTE: In the lead-up to this conversation, I paused for a rest on the couch. Unexpectedly, I heard the following words.

There is no end to what has been given.

All that you can imagine is yours to receive + enjoy.

May I please ask a question before we return to these words?

Yes.

I have noticed that sometimes you (the Angels) refer to yourselves in the singular ‘I’ - while at times shifting into the plural pronoun, using ‘we’. Is there a reason for this?

We [the Angels] interact as a total collective, regardless of who you request.

When a specific Angel is called on by name, we [the total collective] transmit through the singular voice.

We identify ourselves by name in the form of a singular ‘I’. This we do to affirm your request.

We do not see distinction between ‘I’ + ‘we’ - though for us the word we is preferred.

Wow, ok - thank you! This is so helpful to know. I wanted to confirm that I had been receiving correctly.

Your ability to both receive + transmit is precise.

We applaud your impeccable effort.

I am very grateful. Thank you all.

Now returning to what you have already shared, I would like to request for a practical sense of what you mean when you say ‘receive’. I can sense that it’s true when you say it, but know many will want to know how.

You receive when you open.

You open when you are relaxed.

Receptivity is not an action, but rather an occupied state.

To become open, you must relax.

To relax, you must quiet the anxious concerns of your mind.

To release your concerns, you must recognize Truth.

Fear results from confusion; the Truth nullifies every fear.

Understanding of Truth liberates from confusion: automatically dissipates fear.

To extinguish your fear is to open to Truth, which permits what you wish to receive.

To receive is not something you ‘do’ or attempt; it is fixed as a function of life.

Each of you is receiving by virtue of living: Life fills, you develop the mold.

[Or:] Each of you is receiving by virtue of living: Life flows, you develop the mold.

Concern admits misunderstanding. We seek to resolve that for you.

[Or:] Concern reveals misunderstanding. We speak to resolve that for you.

Receiving is certain; the question is: What do I choose to receive?

NOTE: I waver over whether the word here should be ‘wish’ or ‘choose’. The Angel confirms it is both. But: Both in a sequence, it says. You determine direction by what you desire; then claim that direction by choice. I ask the Angel to elaborate on this a bit.

When you wish to receive, you direct your attention toward that which you wish to receive.

This is helpful at first, but falls short of the power to claim.

When you choose to receive in a certain direction, you activate Power - permitting the wish to fulfill.

To choose is to act with intention; to act on a wish is to choose.

NOTE: There is a strong sense that the previous statement (What do I choose to receive?) was captured as it was intended. The Angel prefers the word choose.

This is correct. You’ve selected the word we prefer.

What you choose to receive both includes + empowers your wish to receive (when you choose what you wish to receive).

We return to our previous statement.

The question is not, How am I to receive? - since receiving is certain: assured.

The question is, What do I choose to receive? - since your choice sets the mold Life fulfills.

We communicate Principle now.

Life progresses through call + response.

That which Knows is the force that establishes Calling; Infinity moves to Respond.

NOTE: It is around this time that we need to press pause for the day (6/23). It is clear that the Angel has quite a bit more left to say. (In fact, I believe it could speak without end.) I commit to returning again in the morning, to sense into whether the conversation can continue.

NOTE: It is early (6/24). Before 5:00a. The Angel awaits me, prepared. We begin once again - from the same place we left off last night.

Love is Life in Its formless condition: automatic response, perfect Yes.

Life Itself is composed of both Knowing + Love: Love produces what Knowing assumes.

That which Knows is your I Am Awareness: your complete sense-of-self (both subconscious + conscious, combined).

That which Moves is the (unconscious) Love Life is made of: automatic response - living substance of Limitless Life.

Love is Life’s endless Sea of Potential; Knowing activates Love by its Call.

What you ‘know’ to be true, Love produces.

It does not second-guess what you know.

If what you ‘know’ is rooted in fear, Love produces the specter of fear.

If what you ‘know’ is rooted in Absolute Truth, Love produces the Absolute Truth.

In this way, your Awareness composes what Life in its Love must fulfill.

Every ‘knowing’ awareness produces a mold Life fulfills.

Love is Life flowing into the molds you have set for yourself.

Your awareness relates to your self; what you ‘know’ summarizes your self.

Every Knowing Awareness produces its own sense of self.

Every ‘self’, then, produces a world.

Your own sense of yourself is the mold that configures your world.

If your sense of your self, then, is small, Love responds to confirm what you ‘know’.

If your sense of your self becomes large, Love responds to confirm what you know.

If your sense of self questions your Worth, Love responds to confirm your concern.

If your sense of self grows to remember the Truth, Love responds to reveal what is true.

(What is true of your Worth is that it is forever consistent: complete.)

Your own worries + misunderstanding produce a bewildering world.

Understanding the Truth rectifies this.

How can we know if we have discovered the Truth?

You can know by the way that it feels.

Truth will always uplift + expand.

Truth will always make-light, and relieve.

Truth is always complete, kind, and clear.

Truth is obvious, easy, at-hand.

Truth will always cause you to feel large.

Truth will feel like a sigh of relief.

You remember the Truth, and it feels like remembering, too.

You will feel the Return to your Home.

NOTE: We are interrupted again by the needs of the day, so press pause in the hopes of returning. Several of the following lines are received while completing our errands.

I can sense how the Principle you have described is connected to your prior point. May I ask how this insight applies (to the theme of receiving)?

Yes.

You are always receiving what you have requested from Life.

You are always receiving what you are requesting from Life.

Your request is not typically conscious; you request through your sense of your self.

What you think of yourself is how you have been placing requests.

You receive confirmation of that which you firmly believe.

When your wish to receive contradicts what you ‘know’, you will fail to receive what you wish.

When you choose to align with High Truth, you receive confirmation of that.

When your wish to receive is aligned with High Truth, you receive it.

Truth will always express what is Best.

Life Itself is exclusively Good.

When you choose to receive what is Good + Exciting, you choose to align with the Truth.

When you choose to receive what is Highest + Best, you select to align with the Truth.

When you choose to receive only that which is Good, you empower yourself to receive it.

You are always receiving what you are requesting from Life. Always.

Your receiving is certain; the question is: What do I choose to receive?

We suggest that you choose what is Highest + Best.

We suggest that you choose what is Good.

To select what is Best, you must see what is Best within you.

To receive what is Best, you must first see the Best within you.

Your own sense of yourself sets the limit on what you receive.

If you wish to receive Greater Bounty, consider the Bounty in you.

If you wish to receive Greater Beauty, consider the Beauty in you.

If you wish to receive Inspiration, consider the Light that you are.

If you wish to receive Relaxation, consider the Worth within you.

It is yours to determine the limits; you define them by how you perceive of yourself.

If you think you are small, you will fashion a world based on that sense of smallness.

If you think you are large, you will fashion a much larger world.

When the Truth settles in, you encounter a world without limit.

When you claim what is True, you re-enter that limitless world.

NOTE: We have returned home + settled in for the remainder of this conversation. The Angel is ready to speak.

We suggest a distinction between certain words.

You receive as a natural function of life.

Receptivity deals with what you will select to receive.

We model this basic Pathway: the choice to receive what is True.

Angel of Worth, you have been generous with us. Thank you so much for the gift.

It is our pleasure.

You are the gift, and its giver.

Angel of Worth, may I ask if you have any specific message for Lara?

Yes, you may. And, yes: we do.

Lara is Sister of Angels. This is a name she’s invited to deeply receive.

Sister means equal. Sister means sibling. Sister means family + friend.

Lara embodies this Angel. Angel of Worth: her own self.

Lara has seen herself here for the past several years.

Her words have been: Power Skills.

These words have helped her to see.

We wish to honor + clarify what she has seen.

Power refers to the responsive nature of Love.

Power is that which responds.

Skills are developed.

The Skills here referred to denote receptivity (the choice of what to receive).

Power Skills chooses those aspects of Life that most diligently reflect Truth.

Power Skills fashions a world based on Primary Truth.

Lara has known that the words connect her to our Bounty.

Now she must know that her own sense of self defines how much of that she receives.

We invite Lara to open herself to the Gift.

Not to some gift she may someday receive; but the Gift she is holding already.

Please note the sequence we’ve stated.

In order to open, one must relax.

To relax, one releases concern.

Lara must know she is safe to release what concerns her.

(Truth will permit that release.)

We invite her to consider a kinder perspective.

She may permit what is kindest within her to alter her view of her self.

Having achieved this, she will remember the truth.

Having remembered, she will release all concerns.

Having released, she will soften + open.

Having done this, she will harness the Bounty we share.

Lara is Sister of Angels. Sister of this Angel, too.

We surround Lara with love.

Angel of Worth, thank you for this. I will so happily share it with her, every word!

May I ask if you have a specific message for me, too?

Yes, you may. And, yes: we do.

Thank you for taking transmission.

Your receptivity to this whole family of Angels permits the Supreme Bounty you will receive.

This Bounty pours out of us into you, and from you overflows to the world.

These lessons we have conveyed absolutely belong to the world.

(You have explicitly claimed this; we have affirmed it as true.)

Your work permits our Expression.

Your work affords us a Voice.

For this, the Family of Angels rejoices!

We celebrate your Impeccable Light: The Benevolent Sun of your Heart.

Please note the song playing now.

NOTE: The song is ‘Meris’ by Jordan Critz. The moment of request is ~ time stamp 1:35.

This is the sound of our appreciation, for you.

Thank you for being The Scribe.

Angel of Worth - each of you in the Family of Angels - I am honored by what you have shared. Thank you for speaking. Thank you for speaking through me. I love you.

NOTE: During the editing of this document, the Angel communicated another poignant message (as an addendum to its messages for Lara). After connecting the dots between Power + Love, the Angel confirmed (explicitly) that: Love is Power; Power is Love. In complete form, the communication reads: Power refers to the responsive nature of Love. Love is Power. Power is Love. Power is that which responds.

title: SESSION 7 | Angel of Decision (July 1-2, 2024)
content:
Hello, Angel of Decision. I feel particularly honored to meet with you today. Thank you for calling my attention to your name.

I am the Angel of Decision.

Thank you for interpreting [deciphering?] the sign.

Thank you for your choice to meet us now.

NOTE: The Angel picks up on my uncertainty regarding which word to use. It says, Both are correct.

We have been excited to meet with you since the very first of these important sessions.

And I have been prepared for you as well.

Then it will be my privilege to listen. I open now to gratefully receive what you would like to share.

I am the Angel of Decision.

Maker + Remover of All Worlds.

I am the Conductor + Creator, Pure Directive Agent of All Life.

I stand at the Moment of Decision as the Guardian of Crossroads - as the Steward of Selection - as the Organizing Factor of the Life.

That which moves is moved by the directive agent of Resolve.

That which moves obeys the Force of Will.

Will is not the effort some suppose; Will is not self-critical demand.

Will is the expression of Decision; Will reveals the true decision made.

Will applies itself to (focus) Living Power; Will conducts that Power towards an end.

True Decision acts without concern or hesitation.

True Decision positively acts.

Will applied with Knowledge is Resolve.

True Decision activates Resolve.

That which is resolved cannot be shaken.

Resolute Conviction wakens worlds.

NOTE: I am reminded of our lesson from the Angel of Possibility: Every choice initiates a world. I can sense the Angel nodding in response.

Every possibility exists.

Anything imagined can become.

That which is desired can be chosen.

We select what we believe to be.

NOTE: We pause for food + some rest. Returning, I invite the Angel to continue.

Decision is the process of selection.

The force of Will expresses what you choose.

Resolve is the ability to act on what is chosen with Intention.

Resolve expands the view of what can be.

Decision activates a new direction.

Will maintains a focused train of thought.

Power flows as it has been directed - animating Life along those lines.

What we call Resolve is a deliberate utility of Will.

What we call Resolve is an empowered application of the Will.

Every possibility exists. Very little of this can be seen.

Most Decision functions on a base of observation: choosing from what little can be seen.

True Decision knows the Greater Story.

True Decision knows the Sovereign Truth.

True Decision functions on the basis of Enjoyment.

True Decision chooses what feels Best.

True Decision knows no limitation.

True Decision consciously creates.

NOTE: I am reminded of a phrase: Observation is lazy creation. (I typically attribute this to Abraham-Hicks, but may have composed it myself. After so many years of returning to it, I have simply forgotten the source!)

Observation is Creation: a type of creation that forms a perpetual loop.

Observation holds the subject observed in its place.

Observation is Decision: it chooses that which is observed.

This form of Decision is fully empowered when what is observed is The Good.

When Beauty is your observation, you witness that Beauty expand.

When Love is observed, you elect to see more of that Love.

We strongly encourage the Positive Art of Attention:

Observe what is Lovely + True.

This is awesome. This fully empowers an act I’d considered a waste of creative potential!

I am the Angel of Decision. This fully empowers the act.

Creative potential can never be wasted; it can be employed with Intent.

NOTE: There is a subtle sense that the word ‘potential’ is slightly off.

The word is a little misleading.

Creation is never potential, but forever active - engaged.

This is why it can never be squandered: Creation is Life without end.

Creation is Life in perpetual motion: a wellspring of Life without end.

The question is not whether Life will be moved, but in which direction it will be moved.

Decision determines direction; your Will holds Decision in place.

Resolve is Empowered Direction: a choice to create with intent.

Resolve sees beyond prior choices; Resolve sees beyond what is seen.

Resolve acts on Highest Excitement, advancing beyond what has been.

Resolve is the Art of Decision: a Sovereign Intent to create.

It acts as a Conscious Director of that which is moved to create.

IMPRESSION: Throughout this entire conversation, I am aware of a (fairly rudimentary) image of a man holding a large firehose. Water explodes from the hose, drenching anything it is directed toward.

I am the Angel of Decision. This is an adequate image.

This is an image we’ve shared.

NOTE: I wonder at this last sentence. ‘An image’ implies that there may have been more.

This is correct: we have offered you others, which you have discounted as less important than our words.

Have they been in any way less significant than what you have shared in words?

No.

Ok. I’m sorry! I will do my best to capture impressions as well.

You needn’t ever feel sorry.

We offer gladly + limitlessly; we know that you will receive.

You receive all in appropriate timing; fear not.

Ok. Thank you.

Returning to the fire hose…

Yes. This is an adequate image.

This represents what Decision permits in your world.

Life is the water, and Will is directing the hose.

Resolve aims the hose where it wants more of Life to emerge.

Thank you! This is incredibly helpful.

Earlier, I sensed you transmitting a lesson. Twice on the same theme, in fact. Would you like to revisit that lesson here at this time?

I am the Angel of Decision. Yes.

We celebrate your receptivity + recall.

A Conscious Creator is not a ‘creator’ per se - but a Conscious Director of Life.

The Infinite Life is the only true Power of Creative Action; we simply determine its flow.

The flow of Creation is governed by Inner Assumption - by Total Conviction - by what you expect it to do.

Creation performs as directed.

Your Inner Assumptions direct the Creative Response.

Creation produces what your Expectation affirms.

In this way, the world you encounter reflects the ideas you hold.

The Conscious Creator does not craft events, but a sense of what those events mean.

You are constant selectors of meaning.

[Or:] You are constant creators of meaning.

NOTE: The Angels confirms: Yes. Both.

Life builds on the meaning assumed.

Resolve is a choice to select Higher Meaning, which Life then reflects in your world.

Resolve is an Inner Conviction, expressed as a definite act.

NOTE: Earlier, I received three simple images: first, a person sitting; second, a person standing to walk; third, a person eating.

These are unquestioning actions. These are portraits of Resolve.

The first person has no concern that the chair will abruptly dissolve.

The second person knows there will be feet to stand up + walk on.

The third person trusts that the body will alchemize food.

The True Sovereign Act is as obvious as it appears.

It is Absolute Trust in the Positive Nature of Life.

Underlying Resolve is an Absolute Knowing that Life will support + provide.

Underlying Resolve is an Absolute Knowing that Life will provide Only Good.

NOTE: There is a difficult jumble of phrases + words that erupt here. I cannot seem to fit them in place. It is clear that a failure to act with resolve is not rooted in weakness of will, but in worry; that worry is rooted in misunderstanding; that worry acts as a signal to ‘reveal a mistaken assumption’; and that every mistaken assumption can be simply resolved: by assuming the opposite of what we have come to fear. Is this general summary correct?

I am the Angel of Decision. YES. [All caps intended.]

Worry admits a mistaken assumption.

Life is inherently Good.

Life is Productive, Constructive, Efficient.

Life is inherently Good.

There is no reason to worry. Ever.

Life is inherently Good.

Act with Resolve on the basis of Goodness.

Choose to accept what is Good.

NOTE: We pause at this point to run errands, eat dinner, and then start preparing for bed. During our drive, I receive the appropriate words for a part of the message I was in search of before. The Angel said: Truth lies in the opposite direction of concern.

NOTE: Another realization lands while driving. Earlier, while attempting to discern the ‘knot of words’ (as I described it to Lara), I kept returning to this exact phrase: The impediment to Resolve is not a result of inadequate will, but of worry. No matter what I did, I couldn’t seem to get the words to fit. I finally discover why that was. The word ‘impediment’ is clearly incorrect. As soon as I consider this, the Angel says, There is no impediment to Resolve. Nothing can impede our right to choose. (The Angel now affirms this absolutely.)

Nothing can impede our right to choose.

NOTE: While filing paperwork, a summary of what has been discovered in the ‘knot of words’ is clearly offered - this time in the Angel’s chosen words. It said: Failure to act is a function of worry; worry is rooted in misunderstanding; misunderstanding dissolves in the Light of the Truth.

NOTE: Based on the Angel’s previous statement regarding the significance of impressions received during this day’s transmissions, I have recalled one that showed itself multiple times.

IMPRESSION: I am standing at a Y in the road. (This reminds me of the Angel referring to itself as the Guardian of Crossroads.) There appear to be only two options. (This reminds me of the phrase: choosing from what little can be seen.) All of a sudden, countless additional options become apparent, splintering off into space. Forward + backward, side-to-side, up + down: every direction across all dimensions at once. It becomes apparent that there were never ‘just two’ viable options. (Every possibility exists.)

NOTE: I will return in the morning to see if the Angel would like to continue this talk. (7/1)

NOTE: I return to the conversation mid-morning the following day. (7/2)

Hello again, Angel of Decision. Is there more you would like to share with us?

I am the Angel of Decision. Yes.

We are grateful! I open myself to receive.

Your additional impression has been properly interpreted.

NOTE: The Angel is referring to the final notes I added one day prior: the impression of two paths becoming more.

NOTE: The conversation is paused once again - this time for nearly 6 hours. I return again mid-afternoon.

Angel of Decision, thank you for being so patient. Is it wise at this point to continue on as we have?

I am the Angel of Decision. We serve your Highest Discretion.

We choose to speak when you call.

I’d love to hear more about what you have been excited to share.

NOTE: Yesterday, in conversation with Lara, I described how this Angel delivered its lesson in full - as a bundle - the moment that we chose to meet. What it showed me was glaringly simple, and landed that way - all at once. The process of seeking ‘additional’ words to describe what was already given has been a painstaking endeavor. I get the clear sense that this Angel prefers using more direct methods than words, which makes its willingness to communicate this way particularly generous. I am grateful to the Angel for its patience.

I am the Angel of Decision.

It is true that the lesson we offer is simple.

We elect to reiterate now.

You exist in Creative Alliance with Life; you assume a significant role.

You are conduits of Living Power that flows as directed by you.

You direct Power through your Decision - through what you assume to be true.

Life affirms every willing decision, regardless of what it may be.

You encounter in life that which you first internally see.

We encourage a Conscious Decision to look for the world you prefer.

A Resolve to see Goodness produces more Goodness to see.

Expect what is best without question.

This activates True Sovereignty.

Thank you, Angel of Decision. For all of this. I believe it is time to conclude.

I am the Angel of Decision. It is well.

Thank you for your understanding. We will return again soon.

We are One. We will respond when you call.

title: SESSION 8 | Angel of Intelligence (July 4, 2024)
content:
NOTE: It has been clear since early morning (7/3) that the 17th Angel would be our next encounter. In fact, it was evident that the Angel was already beginning to communicate through conversations, insights, and experiences of the day. After what we learned from our last meeting with an Angel (40), I know to record those things which we explicitly connected to the Angel of Intelligence - a record I recount in the next several notes.

NOTE: We are invited to visit Lara’s Mom + Uncle Sam at their off-grid property for an evening of good food + nature views. Our entire visit is predominated by the major theme of Nature. Sam, in particular, expresses a great deal of excitement over the benevolence + healing impact of the trees, the air, the water, and the land. We are introduced to a breathtaking series of waterfalls right in his backyard, and even step barefoot into the cooling waters of a section he has called The Gorge to climb the steps of several gentle waterfalls - just to feel the presence of the place.

NOTE: We take notice of a tree which has accomplished quite a feat of growing from the edges of an overhanging cliff beside the falls. The roots of this tree are thick + wet + clinging horizontally to the stone (instead of vertically into soil like most trees). You can follow the growth pattern of this tree from a beginning point somewhere within the cliff to an eventual relief where the stone opens to permit an upward growth. The tree grows strong + tall + vertically from this point. We remark on how this illustrates the value of apparent challenge in our own lives - how the moments we encounter serve to foster growth along specific lines. We consider also the specific beauty that a life permitted to evolve along its own lines can produce. We jokingly imagine other trees initially deriding our new friend for choosing to grow up along a cliff. The joke, of course, would be on them - as our tree comes to find that this is not a random cliff at all, but rather the edge of a waterfall which proves to be a constant source of all that it most needs to fully thrive.

NOTE: I wake from a dream in which ‘all hell has broken loose’ + everyone is worried for their lives. The setting is a large hospital, and the aura of the dream has ‘end times’ vibes. Amidst the fearful clamor, I discover myself feeling calm - completely confident + safe - somehow aware of the prolific benefit the otherwise disorienting moment truly holds. I begin to share this with a person standing near me. As I speak, the tenor of my voice expands + deepens. Others turn to listen. I can sense the comforting effect of every word, and watch as more + more arrive to soak it in. At this point, I’m awakened to the day - and only later come to realize that the dream had been a message from the Angel. I consider how sometimes being driven to the edges of ourselves produces receptivity to insights we might otherwise dismiss.

NOTE: During our usual morning ritual, Lara + I receive not one but six cards in a sequence - something we take note of as a special first. The cards emerge as follows: The Moon (18), The Sword (11), The World (21), The Empress (3), The Emperor (4), Queen of Wands (39). The last card is the icing on the cake - since Queen of Wands is correlated to the Angel of Intelligence (17). We take note of this here as reference for an ongoing assessment of their lessons.

Angel of Intelligence: you have been exceptionally generous with us. I can feel your words + lessons here already. I am opening myself to what you choose to share with us (by any means). Thank you for being here with me.

I am the Angel of Intelligence.

You have listened well.

You listen well.

We communicate the lessons of Intelligence, of Knowing, and of Faith.

Each of these three words is used to transfer understanding - though the words themselves mean little in the end.

NOTE: I catch myself wondering if this could be completely true: that words ‘mean little in the end’. The Angel responds.

Words are like the casing of a seed: they hold the greater essence of intent.

The same word can be used to transfer many different values.

The quality of each will be distinct.

The words themselves are absolutely neutral + inert.

The message they convey will be a function of the meaning that has been intended plus the willingness of others to receive.

In many cases, meaning is imposed by those receiving - thereby silencing (for them) the true intended value of the word.

In this way, symbols (like your words) can be misleading without willingness to understand intent.

We use words as vessels + containers.

We seek to define what these words mean.

We intend, through words, to illustrate the highest value these words can contain.

We use words to transfer understanding: a direct experience of Truth.

Thank you so much for this generous description - for taking time to help us understand!

NOTE: I spontaneously consider the relationship of this Angel to the Angel of Redemption (with its Embodiment of Understanding), which reminds me of my prior thoughts that it may be connected to the Angels of Presence (with its Pathway of Surrender) + Integrity (with its Embodiment of Perfection). Amazingly, both the Angels of Redemption + Integrity showed up for us today, and the Angel of Presence was revealed alongside the Prime Archetype of Redemption on the same day we met with our prior Angel (7/1)!

You are very welcome. We enjoy it.

And yes: your sense of connections is precise.

And yet, we offer that the web of these connections far exceeds your intellectual capacity to benefit from knowing, so it will be advantageous to release the need to map the total Web.

Every Angel amplifies the value of its neighbor; every Angel benefits the Web.

In the end, the Angels serve the same role as your words do.

We are vessels of a Higher Life, which we express.

This pattern repeats within you, too.

This is very helpful to receive. Thank you for your guidance + support!

We express the value of High Knowing.

We express High Knowing within you.

It is our intention to reveal it.

We enjoy the process of transmission.

We express the Knowing within you.

We are One.

NOTE: Lara + I pause to eat some breakfast (and discuss). We are both excited to return!

NOTE: After food + some rest, I return to continue the conversation.

Hello again, Angel of Intelligence. I feel very excited to continue our conversation. Thank you for all you have already shared! Is there more you would wish to convey?

I am the Angel of Intelligence. Yes!

Far far more. More than words could ever properly contain.

(But we do so enjoy words when creatively + consciously employed.)

We wish to begin with basic definitions.

(Definition is the topmost layer of meaning; Meaning is what words are used to share.)

Intelligence refers to that which most intend when they use the word God.

(The word itself, of course, is typically obscured by lesser meanings, but: we choose to speak in terms of Highest Meaning, while entrusting each receiver to determine how much of the true intent they will receive.)

Intelligence is God.

Intelligence is Intelligent Design.

Intelligence is the Architect of Patterns.

Intelligence is the Organizing Factor of All Life.

Intelligence is the Code supporting the complete expression of the life.

Intelligence is the Promise of Perfection + Production + Expansion.

Intelligence is the Promise of Supply.

Intelligence is the Symbiotic Loop of Natural Exchange.

Intelligence is the Loop of Symbiosis.

Intelligence is Continual Exchange.

Intelligence is Nature.

Intelligence is Life.

Intelligence exceeds the grasp of mental computation; it baffles intellectual pursuit.

Intelligence is obvious, self-evident, and fully unavoidable to view.

But it cannot be mimicked or contained.

Intelligence is palpable within you + around you; but discomfits any mental need-to-know.

One cannot know Intelligence through intellect, analysis, or mental computation.

Intelligence desires to be witnessed; Intelligence must be completely known.

Intelligence invites a Deeper Knowing.

Intelligence invites the mind to marvel, and consider, and relate.

(Intelligence invites you to create.)

Intelligence unravels the mistaken need-to-know through demonstration: making evident the marvelous complexity of the Inherent Genius that is Life, while offering an intimate encounter with that Life.

Beyond the limits of a mental need-to-know awaits the Truth.

(The Truth is infinitely larger + more simple than your so-called ‘educations’ have supposed.)

NOTE: The word ‘educations’ is unusual, but correct. It refers to the many directions from which we receive ‘education’ along the way of this human journey: social, scientific, and religious (as examples).

Releasing this collective apparition is the very thing that opens intellect to Higher Use.

The Intellect exists to grow in love + wonder, to express.

The need-to-know obscures this basic fact.

Intelligence extinguishes the mental need-to-know through simple demonstration of its overwhelming Genius, which invites a sense of Wonder + Surprise.

Beyond the limits of that need-to-know awaits release of that mistaken need-to-know.

Beyond the limits of that need-to-know awaits relief.

To step beyond the mental need-to-know is to relinquish yourself to a Deeper Knowing.

Intelligence invites this deeper interaction with - an intimate encounter with - the Truth.

To touch the Truth directly is to recognize Relief from all concern.

Intelligence encourages Relief.

To know that one cannot know is to finally admit a Larger Mind.

To sense a Larger Mind is to release the sense of smallness within your mind.

To know that you are ‘smaller’ than this Larger Mind is to invite the possibility of a direct encounter with this Mind.

To meet the Larger Mind is to remember its Intention: which is absolutely always only Good.

To know that you are ‘smaller’ than Intelligence like this is to feel held.

To know that you are held by Perfect Goodness makes you large.

To know of this inherent largeness, you express it.

Expressing it, you understand the Truth.

I must pause here for a moment, just to breathe. What a stunning sequence you’ve just shared!

A deeper form of Knowing is what comes of this eventual release.

The shade of a mistaken obligation is replaced by the clear light of Higher Truth.

A person need not know how to conduct the vital actions of the heart, nor can they do so.

Yet those actions continue all the same.

A redwood need not ‘know’ how to develop its majestic presence from a seed - nor can a tree conduct the actions of the rain.

Yet seeds develop proudly all the same.

This deeper form of knowing is an Absolute Surrender into Goodness.

This deeper form of knowing is an intimate awareness of the Truth.

True Knowing is an Absolute Conviction of True Safety.

(This Safety is relentlessly affirmed.)

True Knowing is a Path of True Conviction - a perpetual return to what is true.

To Know that you are held permits Enjoyment: liberating the Expression within you.

To Know that you are cared for is True Freedom: the inviolate release from all concern.

To Know the Pure Intelligence that holds you is to act out the expression of that freedom.

True Knowing is Pure Action, Total [Fearless?] Life.
