NOTE: The Angel confirms: Both. But ‘Total’ is the word that we prefer.

The act of Total Knowing is the practical embodiment of Faith.

To Know that All Is Well embodies Faith.

To sit + know the chair will hold your weight embodies Faith.

To exhale knowing air exists in limitless supply embodies Faith.

To act with Total Knowing of the Goodness that Life is embodies Faith.

To Know that this same principle applies to every minor subject of your life (and far beyond) is the pragmatic lesson we enthusiastically intend to share.

Angel of Intelligence, this has been an absolutely brilliant transmission. Thank you from the bottom of my heart!

I am the Angel of Intelligence.

You are welcome, we thank you as well.

Angel of Intelligence, is there any specific message you would like to offer Lara prior to concluding for the day?

I am the Angel of Intelligence. Yes, please!

Lara is a brilliant example of this lesson.

Lara stands on Pillars of Support.

Lara should know every word transmitted has been offered as if to her heart alone; we sense the receptivity in her.

Lara is a Crystal Clear Container - Vessel of High Order - Model of the Resonance we share.

Lara holds the Pattern of High Knowing - Existential Genius - right at hand.

Lara recognizes Primal Patterns: draws connections others cannot see.

This, we praise + fervently encourage.

This, the Angels celebrate in her.

Thank you for this priceless gift! I’m honored to deliver it to her.

May I ask if there is any message you would like to share with me as well?

I am the Angel of Intelligence. YES.

You have lived the lessons we convey.

IMPRESSION: My mind is spontaneously flooded with a vision of the Family of Angels (64 is far more than it sounds!) bowing in a gesture of respect. I’m blown away!

You have carried this torch into lands no other feet have ever tread.

We want you to know that we have clearly seen you.

Your courageous actions have been seen.

We extend the Laurel Wreath of Valor: symbol of homage we pay to you.

You exemplify the Act of Knowing: practiced integration of the Truth.

You have been a faithful illustration of our lesson.

You epitomize the Life of Faith.

We invite you now to Deeper Knowing.

Live beyond the limits you have known.

There is no exhausting the unlimited supply you have uncovered.

We encourage you to open ever-deeper to the Gift.

Thank you for receiving + distributing these lessons.

They proceed to beautify the world.

We bow to your diligent reception, Gentle Scribe.

We are Faithful Allies.

We are One.

NOTE: After the conclusion of this lesson, I found a short series of two messages delivered by the Angel prior to our ‘formal’ conversation. I have been encouraged to include them here, since they do well to summarize a major theme of this important lesson (and tie in to the connection I was sensing between Angel 17 + Angel 20). The messages have been combined into a single statement here: Knowing is a function of release. Surrendering the need-to-know produces the awareness that the effort was mistaken all along.

NOTE: Returning to this conversation on October 16, 2024, a message was spontaneously offered (unexpectedly + verbally), immediately after reading the concluding statement in the final note. The Angel said: You need to know that everything you need to know is yours the moment that you need to know it.

title: SESSION 9 | Angel of Promise (August 11-12, 2024)
content:
NOTE: After receiving the Angel of Promise during our morning ritual + recognizing that it was inviting a new opportunity to meet, Lara + I paused to eat some breakfast. As I settled into my position at the table, I spontaneously wondered whether this new Angel might reveal its corresponding Mineral Ally. (I honestly assumed it might reveal this new connection through my wife - just as several of the other Angels had.) As quickly as I could become aware of myself contemplating this, the Angel spoke. It said: It is Emerald. The answer came so quickly + with such complete authority that I found myself wary to accept it. Again, the Angel stated: It is Emerald. Our corresponding Ally is the Emerald. Immediately, I shared this with Lara. Emerald is important for us both. We could not be happier to know this!

Dearest Angel of Promise: You have played a central role in my life for so long. You have been an Advocate, a Teacher, and a Friend. I have learned so much from you already. Thank you for this precious opportunity to meet. I am thrilled + ready to receive.

NOTE: I had previously queued my Stillness playlist in an effort to prepare a quiet (undistracted) setting for this session. The Angel indicates that its expression is far more dynamic than the playlist I’ve selected would imply. It encourages me to select another playlist. (Initially I attempt to justify my previous selection, but soon realize the silliness of that. I choose to trust the urging of the Angel.) It suggests Expansion or Expectant, even Epic. I can feel its preference for Epic, so decide to shuffle that playlist instead. Starting… now.

I am the Angel of Promise.

You have been receiving well + clearly.

We applaud your willingness to hear.

Thank you. I’ve been looking forward to this moment. I have so much love + gratitude for you, my ancient friend.

‘Ancient’ is an accurate assessment [selection?].

NOTE: The Angel answers, Both (without a beat of hesitation). It is both.

I am the Angel of Promise.

Keeper + Expression of Desire.

Genesis of All Creative Movement.

Primal Force.

NOTE: The song playing as the Angel speaks these words is ‘Breaking Through’ by London Music Works.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a sprout emerging from the rigid confines of its shell. I am shown a universe exploding from a single central point: a spray of light + color in a massive spiral pattern, rapid growth. I am shown the bursting of a dam: immeasurable volumes of an awesome liquid power raging outward from a bottleneck where once a wall attempted to contain it. I am shown a butterfly unfolding from the husk of its cocoon. (The butterfly is flashing green + blue like neon lights, and massively outsizes the cocoon.)

NOTE: Looking down at my phone, the song that’s playing now is ‘Fireflies’ by Lights & Motion.

This is the Explosion of Desire: Primordial Force of All That Is.

Void of this Desire, nothing moves.

Life Itself is moved by this Desire.

Life expands Itself from Love to Love.

This is what these riveting impressions seek to show you.

This is the Event of Breaking Through.

Life is the Expression of Desire.

All that Life creates, Desire moves.

Movement is the Child of Desire.

Movement is the Analog of Life.

Life exists in tandem with Desire.

Outside/inside faces of one coin.

What we call Desire is Impulsion: inner pressure thrusting for release.

Life is the Expression of Desire: Natural Effect of Inner Force.

Life is the inevitable outcome of Permission:

Inner Force permitted to express.

True Desire activates Creation.

All Creation symbolizes Life.

NOTE: These last words deliver like a mic drop. I can sense the generous permission to press pause + eat some food. Looking down at my cell phone, the song that’s playing is called ‘Breakthrough - 2016 Remastered Version’ by Tony Anderson.

NOTE: Lara + I break for lunch. During food prep, we enjoy a rich conversation inspired by the Angel of Promise + its themes. It becomes extremely clear that there is far more content being offered than the words recorded in the (written) session could contain. We become excited by the prospect of exploring more by video, and soon!

NOTE: The Angel transmits a sequence of new insights (and impressions), which I will share in the order they unfolded during lunch. The transmission is incited by the thought that, though the Angel has addressed the major subject of Desire, it has yet to mention anything about the theme of Promise in its name. As quickly as the thought completes itself, the Angel speaks.

Promise means Inevitable, Absolutely Certain, Guaranteed.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a child with a stone in hand. The child drops the stone. The stone falls to the ground.

This is an example of a law.

This law you experience as ‘gravity’ on Planet Earth.

Every law completes itself infallibly (within a certain context).

Every law is fully guaranteed.

When you drop an object, it descends.

This you come to recognize as law.

Every law is perfectly predictable in context.

Every cause produces an effect.

Every law submits itself to High Law.

Each law represents a higher law.

Promise is the Quintessence of High Law.

Promise is a Perfect Guarantee.

Promise is the Law supporting all laws.

Promise animates all lesser laws.

Lesser law depends upon its context.

High Law supersedes all lesser laws.

Gravity is true within its context.

Gravity reflects a Higher Law.

NOTE: This entire sequence since the ‘gravity’ impression was delivered in a flow of two-line bundles: every two complete lines form a set.

Promise is the essence of Desire.

Every True Desire is assured.

Life is animated by Desire.

Promise lifts Desire into Life.

Every True Desire is a Promise.

Every Promise must fulfill itself.

Every True Desire fuels Original Expression.

Life demands expression to advance.

Every True Desire, once permitted, activates its natural advancement.

Every True Desire guarantees its own fulfillment when allowed.

Promise is the essence + expression of Desire.

True Desire indicates the Principle of Promise - and fulfills itself by that same Law.

NOTE: Again, all preceding lines have been delivered in a flow of two-line bundles: every bundle constitutes a set.

NOTE: I begin to wonder (for an instant) whether these words can be practically applied. The Angel quickly registers the thought, and then responds.

The feeling of Desire is a Promise.

Every Promise must complete itself.

If permitted, every True Desire is accomplished.

Every True Desire profits Life.

Promise is a Principle which supersedes + permeates all context.

There is no exception to the rule.

Genuine Desire is a signal of the Promise that fulfills it.

Genuine Desire is the activating pressure of a life.

NOTE: Initially, I find the Angel’s use of the words ‘a life’ rather strange. I wonder if perhaps it should read ‘your life’. But the Angel vetoes this conjecture. It communicates a common law: pertinent to all unique expressions of the One Life. Every life is subject to the activating pressure of Desire. (I can feel the Angel nodding now.)

Every life is moved by that same animating pressure - every life impelled to seed more Life.

Every life expresses True Desire - in a way unique to that one life.

IMPRESSION: I imagine a starry expanse. The phrase Constellation of Desires sticks + holds. It’s becoming clear to me that every life is formed by a unique set of desires, every one of which supports the ultimate expression of that life.

NOTE: The Angel is impressed by my interpretation of this image. I can feel it nodding in response.

NOTE: I become aware of the song that’s playing now. It is one of our long-standing favorites: ‘Angels Will Rise’ by Twisted Jukebox.

Purpose is embodied through permission of Desire; Promise moves Desire into Life.

Life achieves Expression through the complex of desires you embody.

This Expression generates new life.

Angel of Promise, every word you have delivered is a treasure. Thank you for the wisdom you have shared!

If I may ask, are there any special messages you’d like to offer Lara at this point?

I am the Angel of Promise. Yes.

We wish to impart a single statement:

Your desires indicate the essence of your birthright; your desires tell you what is true.

Train yourself to recognize the Promise in Desire: memory of Larger Life in you.

Know that your Desire is a Vision: Vision of the Life that’s yours to claim.

Claim the full expression of that Life.

NOTE: The music crescendos at this exact point. The song is ‘Waking Up’ by M83, Anthony Gonzalez, and Joseph Trapanese. The timestamp is exactly 3:00.

Lara, you are fertile with Desire: every last desire like a seed, a star, a universe of [in?] you.

NOTE: The Angel confirms: It is both.

NOTE: Again, the music crescendos. Dramatically. This time, the song is ‘Frozen Planet - From Frozen Planet II’ by Hans Zimmer, Adam Lukas, James Everingham, and AURORA. The timestamp is ~2:50.

Train yourself to celebrate the Promise of Fulfillment: supernovas ripening in you.

Absolutely stunning. What a gift! Angel of Promise, thank you.

NOTE: It is nighttime now, and we pause to accomplish final errands before sleep. On our drive into the city (Syracuse), we enjoy a massive double-rainbow which extends across the full length of our view. Lara celebrates it as a sign.

NOTE: On our drive home from the office, we discuss the as-of-yet-unfinished Angel Session. As I am describing my intent to see the conversation through to its completion without rushing (something I find difficult to do in cases where the sessions stretch across two days), we come to a stop beside a car with numbers in the license plate we can’t help but take note of: 6666. We refer to sequences like this as Cosmic Numbers. We have crafted meanings for each one (from 1111 to 9999). Since we have never seen this Cosmic Number ‘in the wild’, we cannot recall its meaning without reference. When Lara pulls our list up on her phone, we are amazed by what is waiting to be seen. The title we have crafted for this number (almost one full year ago) reads: Cosmic Celebration of Angelic Stewards. Needless to say, we receive the message loud + clear!

NOTE: During our time at the office + throughout the full remainder of the night, a simple two-line phrase repeatedly transmits itself: a clear communication from the Angel. I share it here exactly as received:

Desire equals Promise.

Promise equals Promise when allowed.

NOTE: It is now the morning of 8/12, and I’ve returned to meet the Angel once again. While it is evident to me that there is much more to discuss than we have covered in this session, I can sense that it is best to draw the current conversation to a close. (We’ll host a second session when the time is right.)

NOTE: Several hours pass since my last note. I attempt without success to settle myself into the remainder of this session, but eventually choose to step away. It is now mid-afternoon, and I’ve returned to settle in again.

Angel of Promise, thank you for your kindness + your patience. May I ask if there is anything specific you would like to share with me before concluding?

I am the Angel of Promise. There is.

We speak to you now from your own Center of Angelic Understanding - from that part of you that knows beyond the fear of your not-knowing - from the Crystalline Perspective of High Truth.

You are now invited to relax.

You have been surrounded by your Friends.

Know that your intention to effectively transmit has been fulfilled.

Entirely fulfilled, to be exact.

NOTE: The Angel urges me to take note of the song that’s playing now: ‘Eternity’ by Jordan Critz.

IMPRESSION: Closing my eyes, I see a shepherd receiving a white sheep into his arms. I see the image of a man atop a cliff (typing this, I notice that the song has changed to ‘Summit’ by Gray North). The cliff is overlooking a magnificent expanse of sea + sky. The man extends his arms to either side like open wings. His hair is gently lifted by the wind. (The music playing now begins to build: a favorite song called ‘Grace’ by Tony Anderson.) The man that I am seeing is a symbol of release, of liberation. The man that I am seeing is myself.

You are an impeccable Translator, a meticulous Receiver, and a generous Provider - a True Friend.

Your demanding methods of precision + attunement serve us well.

Know that your sincerity is recognized + celebrated here.

Know that every effort serves an end.

We the Angels praise your dedication.

It is matched completely by our own.

Angel of Promise, thank you for this generous, encouraging transmission.

Would it be acceptable to meet with you again for a Part II?

Absolutely yes, when so inspired.

In the meantime, we encourage rest + integration. (Mostly rest.)

Yes, thank you. I will gladly take some time to rest. I love you.

Be completely satisfied + happy, Gentle Scribe.

We love you, too.

title: SESSION 10 | Angel of Originality (August 15, 2024)
content:
NOTE: Yesterday (8/14), the Angel of Originality showed up for us twice in quick succession: once during our every-morning ritual (which consults a deck handcrafted by my wife), and then again immediately after when we used the Angel Oracle online. We wondered at the time if this might be the Angel’s way of offering itself for our next session. This morning (8/15), the Angel of Originality appeared again. (This, after a standard 3x shuffle of our deck.) It was clearly wanting to be seen. We decide to validate the sign.

Angel of Originality, we have taken special notice of your presence in our lives these past two days. Thank you for the gift that you have been! Thank you for making yourself obvious to us. It is a true joy to meet you now. I am calm + ready to receive.

NOTE: Immediately upon beginning to compose the prior line, a new song starts to play: a song which features one of my all-time favorite quotes from one of my all-time favorite humans (Alan Watts). There is no question: this is a transmission from the Angel. It is clear that I should note it here.

NOTE: The song is called ‘The Little Things’ by Bonus Points. I share the quote exactly as it’s featured in the song: And then you’ll be able to get a good fee for whatever it is. So don’t worry too much: somebody’s interested in everything - anything you can be interested in, you will find others in. But it’s absolutely stupid to spend your time doing things you don’t like. The quote continues later in the song to say: And after all, if you do really like what you’re doing, it doesn’t matter what it is, you can eventually turn it - you could eventually become a master of it. It’s the only way to become a master of something, to be really with it.

NOTE: Recognizing this to be a message from the Angel literally makes me laugh out loud. Lara looks over to see what all the commotion is about. I have to share this with her right away.

Angel of Originality, what a way to introduce yourself! Thank you for the playful (yet profound) beginning point. I feel so excited to learn more. The floor is yours.

I am the Angel of Originality.

We communicate from the Foundation of Perfection within you.

Originality + Perfection are the same.

Each defines the other.

They are One.

To be Original is to be Perfect.

Every thing in Life fulfills this Law.

NOTE: The phrase ‘every thing’ is notably distinct from ‘everything’. The Angel seems to indicate that every last example of Life’s movement is distinct: from the smallest particle on up to universal scale.

IMPRESSION: The previous interpretation is revealed to me through images: the infinitely variable spinning shape of galaxies collapse to form the infinitely variable faces of humanity, and then again to show the infinitely variable movements of the tiniest particulate matter.

All of Life expresses this same Law: every detail differs from the next; every living moment without flaw.

To be Perfect is to be Original: without compare.

Life produces Newness all around.

Every inch + moment of Existence is expressing something that has never been experienced before.

Life deals in Expression + Expansion, never ever repetition - this is Law.

IMPRESSION: I am shown innumerable sparks exploding into infinite directions, cast against an inky background that permits each spark to glow with blinding light.

This Law may appear to be erratic from a limited perspective, but in fact provides the very definition of Stability which Life depends upon for Constant Growth.

That which we embody is the basis of Existence: Perfect Innovation without end.

Every Spark of Life presents a Perfect variation on a theme.

Every Spark presents itself anew.

This repeats indefinitely in the Fluid Context of each (living) Now.

NOTE: The word living feels redundant, yet included: almost like the Angel has delivered it to help us understand.

This is correct.

Living is inherent, but describes a concept you can understand.

Every Living Moment is enfolded + sustained by the Foreverness of one evolving Now.

Life is the Activity of Now.

Thank you for explaining this for us!

I am the Angel of Originality.

We return again to the description of Perfection: synonym to our own given name.

We propose to offer these next statements in a syntax your cognition can lay hold of.

Yes, please - thank you!

Every human being is entirely Original.

No two human beings are alike.

Every human being is entirely Original.

This pertains to every part of every human being that exists.

Every human being is unique, without compare.

This means there is nothing to judgmentally compare.

IMPRESSION: The Angel wishes to emphasize the word nothing.

IMPRESSION: The Angel wishes to define the word judgmentally as referring to a ‘critical valuation’ of any one thing in comparison with any other thing.

The proper valuation of each thing in contrast to each ‘other’ thing is ‘1’.

All is 1-to-1 (1:1) in the Essential Mathematics of Existence.

A flower is exactly equal to an ant.

A tower is exactly equal to a sneeze.

Every human entity is equal to its sibling.

Every atom equal to a star.

This Essential Formula is rooted in the Promise of Perfection.

That which is Completely New outstrips all prior metrics.

That which stands alone cannot be judged.

Every human life evolves this constant theme of Newness + Perfection.

Every living moment does the same.

Again, to offer concepts you may comprehend with ease:

No two human beings breathe or blink entirely alike.

No two human beings think or sleep or walk or eat or chew alike.

No two simple movements of a finger or a heartbeat or a daydream are alike, or ever could be.

No two actions perfectly repeat.

Every perfect detail of each absolutely perfect moment bursts onto the scene of Life for good.

NOTE: The phrase ‘for good’ is delivered as a double entendre: meaning both forever + for the sake of good. (This is one of my favorite double entendres.)

Every Now is absolutely New.

In this way, Perfection is Inherent Guarantee.

In this way, Perfection has no antonym in Life.

In this way, each human life is totally Original.

There is no deviation from this Rule.

Originality equals Perfection.

Perfection is equivalent to New.

Originality = Perfection = Newness = Expansion = Life.

Life is the perpetual encounter of Perfection.

Life is the expression of the New.

This is how Life replicates Itself without a single repetition.

This is how the Promise of Perpetual Mutation equals Poise.

Only constant change sustains eternal equilibrium.

Only Change permits Stability.

In human terms, this means that every human represents Perfection.

Every act is perfectly unique.

There is no true ‘danger’ of conformity - no possible homogenized result.

Not one act escapes the Promise of Original Expression.

Not one thought counteracts this Common Law.

Imagine hypothetical examples: John + Mary.

John + Mary may have the same job, but that same job is executed differently by each.

John + Mary may eat the same food, but it is never quite the same food, and their bodies unavoidably encounter that ‘same food’ in different ways.

John + Mary share a few identical beliefs, but those beliefs are held in massively dissimilar arrays of thought + circumstance based on the sort of lives each one has led.

Every Spark of Life provides its Perfect Contribution; every life contributes to the Whole.

Life transmits Itself through Evolution: every movement benefits the Whole.

Every life presents a medium through which the Breath of Life can sound a note.

Every note contributes to the Song.

IMPRESSION: When typing the phrase ‘every life’, I am shown a subatomic particle, a clod of earth, a human being (in that order). It is clear to me that this phrase is referring to every last unique expression of Life - as opposed to merely ‘human life’ distinctly.

Angel of Originality, these past several hours have been totally enthralling - I’m amazed! Thank you for the generous transmission of these truths. It may be a good time to press pause + eat some food before continuing; would that plan be acceptable to you?

Yes. Absolutely, always. Go eat now.

We await your opportune return.

NOTE: Lara + I pause for a late lunch. We are both excited to return!

Angel of Originality, you have my full attention once again. Would you like to pick up where you left off?

I am the Angel of Originality. Welcome back, and: yes.

Every life presents a medium through which the Breath of Life can sound a note.

Every note contributes to the Song.

Every note emits a Signature Expression.

This is what the title Personality conveys.

NOTE: The Angel is referring to its Pathway of Personality.

Personality refers to the particular nuances of Life’s Ultimate Perfection singing through the Medium of You.

Every thing expresses Life uniquely.

Every ‘note’ is different from the next.

In human terms, we can consider John + Mary speaking the same word in different ways.

Even if their verbalized expressions were apparently comparable, the vibratory nuances of vocal intonation would be quantifiably distinct in tone.

Imagine now this principle applied to human life: each ‘person’ an example of this Law.

The ‘person’ is a consequence of countless shifting factors, coalescing to contribute as a whole.

As each ‘personal’ existence is presented through expression, we experience its Signature unfold.

Every Personality (or Vibratory Signature) contributes absolutely to the Whole.

This pertains regardless of intention: regardless of how conscious it may be.

Angel of Originality, this is just extraordinary work. Thank you for describing this so well!

It is our intention to accomplish understanding.

We enjoy the process of transmission.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the center of the Bodygraph (Human Design), with emphasis on four primary gates: the 1, 8, 23, and 43. A direct line is revealed between the 8 (Originality) + 23 (Eloquence). A glow of sorts emits from these four numbers, partially including 24.

We wish here to summarize (again):

Every life contributes by design.

Every contribution is a benefit to Life, and so expands It.

Every thing communicates Perfection as a natural result of its existence.

Every thing is Perfectly Unique.

Because of this, no one specific detail can be judged against another.

Every detail stands alone in its Original Perfection as a Rule.

Angel of Originality, thank you. I would like to take a moment to invite a special message now for Lara. Is there anything you’d like to say to her?

I am the Angel of Originality. Yes.

Lara is the Symbol of Perfection.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a sun. I am shown a rainbow. I am shown a sun emitting many-colored sparks, much like a rainbow.

Lara is the Iridescent Sun.

We encourage Lara to renounce all innocent agreements to compare.

We extend this mantra for continued contemplation:

There is no comparison in Life.

We encourage Lara to explicitly accept her own Perfection.

Know that she exists beyond compare.

We extend this mantra:

I am New.

We encourage Lara to explicitly reclaim inherent Beauty.

Newness is the Beauty within her.

We extend this mantra:

I Am the Angel of Beauty.

We the Angels honor Beauty Lara: clearly indicating her True Name.

Speak her name aloud so she may hear it, Gentle Scribe.

We encourage Lara to receive.

Angel of Originality, I will. Thank you for this breathtaking transmission!

May I ask if there is anything you’d like to say to me before we close?

I am the Angel of Originality. Yes. There is.

You have often sensed the themes we’ve offered in this session.

Claim them absolutely as your own.

Know that every breath + common gesture is a Portrait of Perfection.

Realize this Perfection within you.

We encourage you to recognize the fallacy of ‘failure’.

No such thing exists, nor could it ever.

We encourage verbal disavowal of the innocent delusion.

We extend this mantra in its place:

I am an Exemplar of Perfection.

Perfect Life invigorating me.

Angel of Originality, thank-you thank-you thank-you for this gift. I intend to make the most of it.

It is ours to offer; yours to use.

We exalt Perfection within you.

NOTE: Following the completion of this session, Lara + I drive to Syracuse. During our drive home, the following transmission is received: You embody Contribution through expression of your Personality. (The Angel is providing yet another direct link to close the loop of prior summaries it seems.)

NOTE: While adding final notes, the Angel offers us another short transmission: Everything that happens happens for the first time ever (as a rule).

title: SESSION 11 | Angel of Light (November 11-15, 2024)
content:
Angel of Light, we have been looking forward to this day. We thank you for your presence + your patience: for your readiness to meet with us like this. We have been made ready for this moment. Our hearts are now open to receive.

NOTE: In selecting a playlist to accompany this session, I am led to the playlist called, Soft. Initially, I wonder if Expansion might be the right fit, but Soft is confirmed as correct just as quickly as I see the word.

I am the Angel of (Star)Light.

NOTE: The introduction seems to flicker between ‘Angel of Starlight’ + ‘Angel of Light’, as if both of them are being claimed at the same time.

This is correct. Starlight + Light are the same.

NOTE: I notice myself biting my fingernails. The Angel commands me to stop. I begin to fidget. The Angel invites me to relax.

Light equals Lightness: complete comfort, being-at-ease.

You may recognize Light by the sense of relief it transmits.

NOTE: Unexpectedly, I feel almost as if I might cry. There is no sense of sadness at all. It’s as if my whole heart has burst open, and tears represent the effect.

IMPRESSION: Only for the briefest of moments, I imagine a dam breaking open. A rush of fresh water explodes into view as it does.

There is Total Relief in the Clear Light of Truth.

There is only Relief in the Truth.

NOTE: I sense an encouragement to calculate the frequency of ‘Relief’. I do the math in my head: it is a 27. (Amazingly, Lara + I were discussing this frequency earlier on in the day. I’m astounded to see it again!)

I am the Angel of (Star)Light.

I am the Herald of Truth.

NOTE: I am encouraged to calculate the frequency of this new phrase: ‘Herald of Truth’. It resonates at the frequency of 88.

Truth is the Key to unlock every sorrow.

Truth is the Angel of Light.

Truth represents Full Permission.

Truth offers Total Support.

IMPRESSION: I see the Earth in its orbit: wrapped in the warmth of the Sun. ‘Warmth’ is the word to express it. Warmth is the light it transmits.

Warmth is the essence of our Light.

Warmth is the Care we transmit.

Light is the essence of Lightness.

Lightness permits us to rise.

NOTE: I waver over whether the Angel intends to use the word ‘us’ or ‘you’ in this last sentence. The Angel confirms by responding: We include ‘you’ in the Family. We are all one + the same. Lightness permits you to rise, just as we do. We rise as one + the same.

Lightness permits Angel-Movement: movement of Angels in you.

Total Relief equals Total Permission of Lightness alive within you.

NOTE: We pause at this point, for the day.

NOTE: It is now November 12, 2024. Afternoon-time.

Hello again, Angel of Light. We return to the gift of your presence + your words. My heart is now open to receive.

NOTE: As I call upon the Angel, clouds part to reveal a golden sun. Its light pours through my window, at the perfect angle for an awesome view. Turning toward the sunlight, I can feel its warmth unfurl against my skin. The moment is quite fleeting, but distinct.

I am the Angel of (Star)Light.

Breathe into the Warmth that we transmit.

Rest into the Goodness we convey.

Life, as you have called it, is the Promise of this Goodness you can feel.

Life is Warmth + Goodness through-and-through.

We are representatives of Goodness.

Goodness representative of you.

You yourself are made of Life + Goodness.

You yourself are absolutely Good.

Recognize the Light of Good inside you.

Recognize the Good in others, too.

Everything you witness is an Angel: Messenger of Larger Life in you.

Everything you witness is an Angel: Messenger of Truth + Goodness, too.

Recognize the Angel of each moment.

Sense the Angel-Light of every Now.

Learn to seek the Angel of the Moment: Messenger of Light expressing Now.

NOTE: I am encouraged to calculate the frequency of ‘Messenger of Light’. It is a 110. (I note that the 110 is an Amplified Expression of 11. I feel stricken speechless with amazement. The 11th Angel is the Angel we are speaking with right now.)

Seek beneath the surface of each moment.

Learn to seek the Light within all things.

Train your inner vision to perceive it.

Train the Eye of Heart to feel + see.

This is the true Pathway of The Seer.

This is what it means to truly See.

Recognize the Angels that surround you.

Recognize the Angels within you.

Learn to feel the Clarity of Lightness: Memory of Angelhood in you.

Feel the Gentle Light of your own Goodness.

Trust the Light of Goodness that is You.

Graciously release the sense of worry.

Life is Warmth + Goodness through-and-through.

NOTE: The Angel encourages me to share the message it transmitted several weeks ago. The message was concise, but very poignant; and explicitly claimed by this Angel, too. The Angel said this: ‘Overcome evil with Good’ is a complete statement. (An easy Google search confirmed that it was quoting Romans 12:21.)

Goodness is the Essence of Existence.

Every act contributes to The Good.

Nothing stands in contrast to the Light of Goodness.

Every act contributes to The Good.

That which some call ‘evil’ is a small misunderstanding.

All resolves to Goodness in the end.

‘Evil’ is a concept based on limited perspective.

All resolves to Goodness in the end.

Small misunderstandings are an innocent effect of small perspective.

Goodness comes to light as vision grows.

Judgmental assumptions limit vision; criticism narrows + deceives.

Train perspective open through release of competition.

Goodness comes to light as vision grows.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a close-up of a pine needle. The perspective widens to show the needle amongst many other needles on a branch. The perspective widens again to show a tree. (The needle is no longer in view.) The perspective heightens to show the tree amidst many other such trees in a forest. The perspective heightens again to show a ‘tiny’ forest amongst many other landscapes. (The tree is no longer in view.) The perspective heightens once again to show the planet Earth from space. (The forest is no longer in view.) It is clear to me that this could go on, ad infinitum. (I sense the Angel nodding in response.)

NOTE: I pause at this point to vacuum the house + prepare for some errands with Lara. While vacuuming, the following words are received.

Light is Lightness; Lightness is Relief.

Lightness is the full effect of Goodness.

Goodness is the only Truth there is.

Truth is the experience of Goodness.

Lightness is the way that Goodness feels.

When you feel good, you feel Lightness.

Lightness is the memory of Good.

NOTE: We pause once again, for the day.

NOTE: It is now exactly 3:33p on Wednesday, November 13, 2024. We are prepared to resume.

Hello again, Angel of (Star)Light. We have returned once again to receive of the wisdom you share. Thank you for what you have taught us. Thank you for being here now.

I am the Angel of (Star)Light.

Our words are simple + pure.

Please include what we have shown you.

Now is the right time to share it.

NOTE: The Angel is referring to a short series of (2) back-to-back images I noticed on Facebook on November 9th. The first was an image of a ‘Pillar of Light’, captured in Greece at some point. The very next post announced the 10-year anniversary of the movie, Interstellar. The title was portrayed in a vertical format, set within a powerful column of light. The background was a starry night sky.

NOTE: The Angel encourages me to include the frequency of the phrase, ‘Pillar of Light’. It comes out to 84. ‘Pillars of Light’ comes out to 99.

Light is the Herald of Goodness.

Lightness communicates Truth.

Angels transmit understanding.

Angels communicate Truth.

That which uplifts is an Angel.

That which relieves tells the Truth.

Open your mind to the Promise of Goodness.

Open your heart to Relief.

Welcome the feeling of Lightness.

Open your heart to receive.

Look with the Eyes of an Angel.

See to the Good in all things.

Speak only words that communicate Lightness.

Speak to the Good in all things.

Carry the Light of an Angel.

Act from the Angel in you.

Stand as a Pillar of Lightness.

Act from the Good within you.

Angel of Light, thank you for every last word. If I may ask (since I know many others will wonder about this as well): What about when we are faced with disaster, discomfort, or some darkness? What about when we’re attacked?

Stand as a Pillar of Lightness.

Act from the Good within you.

Choose to see Light in the shade of confusion.

Act from the Angel in you.

Recognize Life as an Ally; trust what it brings into view.

Each act of Life is an Ally: waking the Angel in you.

Nothing in Life can defy you.

Only the Good can exist.

No act in Life can defy you.

Only the Good can exist.

Learn to feel the Light.

Permit the Good.

NOTE: We pause again, for the day.

NOTE: In the middle of the night, Lara wakes from a scary dream. I wake as well, just as she does. As we attempt to return to our sleep, I half-consciously speak to the Angel. I ask, What is the Sword of Light? The Angel responds right away: The Sword of Light is your awareness of Good. Life is Good + only Good. There is no exception to the rule.

NOTE: It is now Thursday, November 14, 2024. Early evening.

Angel of (Star)Light, we have returned once again. I’d like to track back to the question I asked yesterday. Have you said all that you wish to say on the subject?

Yes.

See to the Good in all things.

All is well; all will be well; for good.

This maintains without error, for good.

There is no act in Life that defies you.

All is well; all will be well; for good.

See to the Good in all things.

This is the Path of The Seer.

Act from the Angel in you.

Angel of (Star)Light, thank you for these gentle words. Thank you for being so clear. May I ask at this time if there are any words you would like to share with Lara now?

Yes. There are.

Lara is Lightness + Starlight.

Lara is Light, through + through.

Lara exemplifies Goodness through action.

Lara transmits Good to you.

Lara should know she is equal: worthy + powerful, too.

Lara should know she is needed: by Life + also by you.

Lara stands bright like an Angel.

Lara stands tall as the sky.

Pillar of Light, Angel-Lara.

Your Light is needed, and New.

Thank you for this, Gentle Angel. I will share these words with her. I remain open in case you have words for me, too.

Timothy, yes.

Rest in (Star)Light.

Trust in the Good we describe.

Seer Training summons Angels: activates the Angels within you.

You may conclude this transmission.

We see the Angel in you.

Angel of Light, thank you for what you have shown us. We are honored.

NOTE: The Angel invites me to include a message it offered several days ago as a concluding remark. It said: Travel light. Prioritize comfort. Sink into that which is natural for you. Be well.

title: SESSION 12 | Angel of Efficiency (February 16-17, 2025)
content:
NOTE: While preparing tea in the lead-up to this conversation, I began to feel discomfort in my stomach. Internally, I noted that the nausea was a physical effect of my own nerves. I considered why these Sessions make me nervous, and recalled describing this effect to Lara just a day or so before. Hardly had the memory connected before I received a message: You may choose to trust. I wondered whether this could be the Angel, but the words continued seamlessly (undoubtedly confirming that it was): You may choose to trust. Every minor tremor is an opportunity to polarize toward Trust. Instantly, the nausea lifted. I could sense more words beyond the few that had been offered (and internally pursued them), but it soon became apparent that the flow of any supplemental comments waited for the formal context of our coming conversation. It was time for our next Session to begin.

Dear amazing Angel of Efficiency: I am very humbled to invite this conversation (after many months of sensing your intent + presence every day). Thank you for the generosity + kindness you have shown us. Thank you for your willingness to speak. I am soft + ready to receive.

I am the Angel of Efficiency. Master of the Currents: Time + Flow.

NOTE: I wonder if the word ‘Currents’ might in fact be ‘Cycles’. The Angel answers: Both.

Currents move in rhythms like the cadence of your music; Cycles move in spirals (as you know).

NOTE: Initially, I write the word ‘circles’ instead of ‘spirals’. It becomes apparent that the word spirals is correct (adding both dimension + direction to the phrase).

NOTE: I linger for a while on the Angel’s last transmission. The first half (regarding Currents) is a lock. The second half (regarding Cycles) echoes loudly.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a funnel (in the image of a powerful tornado). The Angel helps define the awesome view.

Cycles move in upward-facing spirals.

NOTE: It feels obvious that the orientation of this new descriptor (upward-facing) is significant. The Angel nods.

Cycles serve progression + expansion in a flow.

Every cycle heightens + expands.

NOTE: I find myself internally transfixed by the initial view of a tornado. After contemplating this for quite some time, the Angel counsels me to pare the image down to a more basic spiral shape in three dimensions. The original tornado now reduces to a simple line-drawn vortex in my mind.

NOTE: Throughout this conversation, I observe a trend from technical to simple: every complicated image is reduced. For example: the impression of a powerful tornado came implicit with a technical awareness of its function; but the details felt distracting to include. It occurs to me that I am in communion with the Angel of Efficiency: of course it would condense important lessons to a more direct expression of their core. (I can sense the Angel nodding now.)

IMPRESSION: Again, the vivid sight of a tornado fills my mind. This time it transforms into a cone, a simple funnel - just a shape.

NOTE: It is clear to me what this is meant to show. All morning, I have been receiving mass amounts of information which the Angel then condenses to a point. The funnel shape communicates the way in which large quantities of data can be stored within the simplest of forms. Any image tells a story; every moment holds eternity intact. This appears to be another application of the spiral (case in point).

NOTE: The tornado illustrates this concept well. Value flows from any number of specific (and appropriate) perspectives. For example: it can be considered as a shape.; conclusions can be drawn from how it functions; we could explore the environmental factors of its production, the specifics of its make-up, the qualities of its impact, and so on. The fact is that this ‘simple’ image functions as a well of beneficial information: which delivers just as much as we can take.

NOTE: It occurs to me that the whole concept of efficiency has been (in many cases) misconstrued. Efficiency does not describe the quickest route from one end to another, but the richest. It prioritizes quality over quantity, recognizing that the quintessential value of experience especially is measured by its fullness, not its speed. In fact, it seems apparent that these measures are inevitably linked in ways we’ve hardly yet begun to understand.

NOTE: I become aware that I am wandering excitedly into complex contemplations, so decide to pause the journaling of thoughts + start again.

Angel of Efficiency, it is clear that you are teaching me in ways that are entirely unique to your own style. I am grateful for the lessons you’ve conveyed. I remain open to them, and to you. Please continue now in your own voice.

I am the Angel of Efficiency.

You have ascertained more than you consciously acknowledge.

You have listened well, and we are pleased.

We wish to elucidate that your voice is not different from our voice.

Your words offer our intent expression.

We are One.

IMPRESSION: I am reminded of the Center of Angelic Union, introduced for the first time in Session 4. The Angel is emphatic in response.

This is the Angelic Center we express from.

We express the Knowing within you.

Angel of Efficiency, thank you for the awesome confirmation. I had feared I might have lost the thread.

I am the Angel of Efficiency. We do not share this fear.

You have proven faithful to the Truth.

NOTE: I decide to pause + breathe this in. The powerful endorsement is requesting to be consciously received.

This is correct.

We invite a conscious integration.

We invite a permanent Relief.

Thank you, Angel of Efficiency. Thank you, Every Angel! I receive + celebrate the Gift.

NOTE: We decide to pause here at the urging of the Angel. I will spend the night with what’s been shared.

NOTE: It is now mid-afternoon on February 17, 2025. We begin again.

Hello, Angel of Efficiency. I return to you with gratitude, humility, and readiness. Yesterday’s beginning of this conversation was superb. Please continue now as you see fit.

NOTE: My attention is drawn to a familiar song - a song the Angels have made note of once before (in Session 9). The song is ‘Breaking Through’ by London Music Works.

I Am the Angel of Efficiency. Master of the Currents: Time + Flow.

NOTE: I begin typing the word ‘am’ with a capital ‘A’, but then update it to the usual lower-case (as I have always done before today). Immediately, I can sense the urging to return the ‘a’ to upper-case again.

IMPRESSION: I receive an instant revelation as a physical sensation I can feel. The Angel has requested to update the ‘a’ to upper-case because it serves to demonstrate the declarative power of ‘I Am’. The revelation is that stating ‘I Am’ clearly is the most efficient route to any claim. To state ‘I Am’ (and mean it) makes it so. (The Angel teaches this without a word.)

NOTE: Again, the Angel draws my attention to a song. (Again, it is a song from Session 9. I am amazed!) The song is called ‘Breakthrough - 2016 Remastered Version’ by Tony Anderson.

IMPRESSION: The Angel has been teaching us through demonstration. (Again, the insight lands as a complete awareness I can somehow sense within my body more than ‘hear’.) Demonstration helps us integrate the lessons being offered more directly + more readily than words.

Angel of Efficiency, thank you for your willingness to teach us. Thank you for the methods you’ve employed.

I am the Angel of Efficiency.

NOTE: This time, when I type the uppercase ‘A’, it is updated to a lower-case again. Apparently, the lesson has been properly delivered (and received).

Yes. This is correct.

You have listened + recorded well.

We applaud your diligence as Scribe.

Thank you for your gracious validation. I am thrilled!

Your judicious efforts have more bearing on the subject than you have as yet considered - though you sense it.

Life moves in the same way we do here.

Flow is conversational in nature.

Life flows through reciprocal exchange.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a shoreline: waves approach, retreat, then start again. I am shown the image of a forest: treetops dance + rattle in the wind. [Later, while revisiting the transcript, I am shown a human standing near a tree. Invisibly, a loop of breath asserts itself between them as each form produces what the other needs.]

NOTE: A song draws my attention while composing the above impression. It is called ‘Passage to Eden’ by Iván Torrent.

Life communicates through every nuance.

Every thing communicates itself.

Every detail demonstrates Existence.

Every thing communicates itself.

IMPRESSION: I imagine myself looking around the room. Every object I take conscious note of starts to glow. Before long, the entire room is filled with light. There is not a detail that’s excluded. Every thing emits a gentle glow.

Life is Light to those with eyes to see It.

Life is Light to those attuned to See.

NOTE: I vacillate between various iterations of the last two lines (for quite some time). Alternatives include: Life is Light for those who choose to see It; Life is Light to those who choose to see; and Life is Light to those who truly See. I finally concede that each of these expressions is appropriate in context. (I can sense the Angel nodding now.)

Angel of Efficiency, thank you for so patiently permitting this long process. You have been so generous with me.

We applaud the nature of your process.

Every detail matters.

It is well.

NOTE: We decide to pause here for the night.

NOTE: It is now mid-morning on February 18, 2025. We resume the conversation.

Hello again, Angel of Efficiency. I surrender my complete attention to you now. I wish to receive what you would share.

I Am the Angel of Efficiency.

NOTE: Again, with the capital ‘A’. It appears to act as a reminder of the lesson it initially conveyed.

This is correct.

We wish to awaken your inherent Knowing.

We encourage you to state it now.

IMPRESSION: Though this is altogether without precedent, I somehow understand what is requested. The Angel wants for me to speak the words, I Am the Scribe. I choose to continue, as instructed.

I Am the Scribe.

I am very glad to be the Scribe.

IMPRESSION: I can sense affirmative response. I can sense the Angel nodding now.

We wish to repair a minor gap in understanding.

Your words are not different from our own.

You have been selected for your methods of transmission.

Your heart beats as One with all we know.

We invite your voice to merge with our voice.

NOTE: At this exact moment, the song that has been playing grows dramatically into an epic swell. Chills erupt in physical response. The name of the song is ‘Ark Ascending’ by Ursine Vulpine. The time stamp is ~1:23.

We invite your memory of this.

When you speak from Knowing, we are One.

IMPRESSION: I can sense encouragement to calculate the phrase, ‘I Am the Scribe’. Miraculously, it’s a 64. Instantly, I recognize the Angels. (They are celebrating in response!) I am stricken speechless with amazement. They have been preparing this for me!

Angel choirs resonate inside you.

Every note emerges as your own.

NOTE: I vacillate between possible expressions of the phrase, ‘Angel choirs resonate inside you’. Variations include: Angel Records resonate inside you; Angel choirs resonate within you; and Every Angel resonates inside you. Each deserves acknowledgement, it seems.

NOTE: ‘Every note emerges as your own’ could also be: Every word emerges as your own. These appear to land as equal statements.

NOTE: Hours pass between the last impression + this note. Though I remain completely open to refinement of the understanding we’ve achieved, it seems apparent that the Angels have invited a more fluid interaction where my own words serve as complements to theirs. Historically, I have taken a more passive role, prioritizing Angel voices over mine. But now it seems a richer conversation is requested: one involving equal parties, free to speak. Where I previously thought I functioned only as facilitator of these Angel Sessions, I am now invited forward as an equal, a participant, a friend. It is clear to me that this shift is an upgrade of my own assumptions only; all the Angels have awaited this event. (I can sense the Angels nodding in response.)

I am the Angel of Efficiency.

We confirm that you have listened well.

Dialogue permits a more complete transmission.

Your words stand as equals to our own.

IMPRESSION: I am reminded of the complex ‘packets’ of awareness I’ve received since the beginning of these Sessions: a phenomenon I have discussed with Lara many times. Often, during conversations with the Angels, I am gifted new awareness as a wordless understanding - offered over as a ‘bundle’, all-at-once. Though in every instance I have sensed the invitation to articulate the lessons so delivered, I have generally chosen to refrain. I felt shy to draft descriptions of these insights. Who was I to fill these Sessions with my words? It would seem my well-intended silence was misguided: these were gifts for me to integrate, and speak.

NOTE: It is now February 19, 2025.

NOTE: During a much-needed rest, a message is delivered from the Angel. It says: There is not a chance of risk, or any need to rush in all of Time. I briefly consider the Angel’s use of the phrase, ‘in all of Time’. It feels unexpected in this context, but makes sense. I am reminded of the Angel’s introduction: I am the Angel of Efficiency. Master of the Currents: Time + Flow.

NOTE: Returning to our positions at the desk, Lara mentions that she had some very active visions during our short rest. I encourage her to share what she has seen. She describes a world where we shape-shift from human form to pixie form at night. She describes our pixie bodies as lightweight + ever-glowing. She describes our pixie hair as being white. (She describes our human form as being ‘very elven’ - and as having white hair, too, which I enjoy.) In her vision, our time is preoccupied with planning celebrations: we collaborate with others toward this end. She goes on to share another world where we exist as Avatar Expressions of ourselves. This world is undeniably Egyptian in its style. (Lara even takes note of the fact that she is crowned with a majestic sun disc, just like many ancient images depict.) In this world, our impressive bodies dwarf the bodies we have known. We occupy a palace - large enough to house our awesome form. Lara’s skin is golden (made of gold), and blinding white light has replaced her eyes. She describes our impact as ‘magnetic’. Others deify our native glow.

NOTE: It strikes me at some point that Lara’s visions could be more than just dramatic fantasies of us. As quickly as the thought can cross my mind, the Angel answers: YES.

You are seeing clearly now what you have been invited to become.

You are seeing what we represent.

Such fantastic visions are a promise.

Such fantastic visions tell the truth.

We propose that you define your learning.

Exercise your Knowing, even now.

NOTE: The phrase ‘Exercise your Knowing’ flickers to + from another (which is equally appropriate, it seems): Add it to the record. The full phrase, then, is: Add it to the record, even now. (The Angel is inviting me to speak.)

REFLECTION: Thoughts of smallness keep us feeling inefficient, limited, and weak. Inadequacy is a frame of mind! The truth is that we’re most receptive to the Flow of Life when we think large. Our personal self-concepts function like a living diaphragm that opens or constricts based on the quality of views we entertain. The kinder my self-concept, the more fluid my experience becomes. This is how ‘fantastic visions’ tell the truth: they serve to liberate an avenue through which the Truth organically appears. It is clearer now than ever that Efficiency is married to Perspective; that it readily emerges through the Highest View of Self we can sustain; and that the conscious growth of that unique perspective is what actively permits more Life to Flow.

IMPRESSION: Without warning, my mind is exploding with a sense of all the Angels cheering + applauding in response. They are celebrating me + my reflections! I’ve included myself in the conversation just as they have been inviting me to do.

NOTE: Stepping away from the computer to prepare for nighttime errands, I am pleasantly surprised to hear the Angel validating what I’ve shared.

Efficiency flows through the High Perspective.

High Ideas always represent the Truth.

NOTE: Lara + I pause here for the night. But the excitement travels with us into fruitful conversation: yielding insight after insight in a wonder-filled, enthusiastic flow.

NOTE: It is now mid-afternoon on February 21, 2025.

Dear Angel of Efficiency, we return with gratitude + genuine excitement to proceed. My heart is very open to receive.

I Am the Angel of Efficiency.

Please include the lesson first delivered.

NOTE: The Angel is referring to a message we’ve held onto (privately) for months. I will include it now, exactly as initially received.

There is no rush, only Excitement. Follow Excitement. Time will take care of itself.

NOTE: Several days have passed since our last entries here. It is now February 24, 2025 (at exactly 1:11p). Though these days have been rich with messages + lessons from the Angel, we have not paused to record them until now.

NOTE: Based on an exciting (unexpected) message from the Angel, we select a song to complement this reconnection to the Angel Session. It is called ‘Tick-Tock’ by Hans Zimmer. (The epic composition thunders through the room at an impressive volume: we can feel it in the floor beneath our feet.)

Hello again, Angel of Efficiency. We submit ourselves to your direction, gratefully inviting any form of conversation you suggest.

I am the Angel of Efficiency.

You have listened well + acted wisely.

You have lived the lessons we convey.

NOTE: It is now February 26, 2025.

Angel of Efficiency, we decide to wake to your important lessons once again. These past 10 days have been quite unlike any we have lived before; but you have made your presence known to us throughout. We thank you for the wisdom you’ve conveyed, and for the cushion of your patience. We wholeheartedly invite your guidance now.

I am the Angel of Efficiency. Well done.

Each of you has been receiving well + clearly every day.

These lessons have been offered first + foremost through experience, not words.

This method anchors wisdom in a way no other process ever could.

We celebrate the progress you have actively permitted.

We applaud the willingness in each of you.

NOTE: A beautiful song crescendos at this very moment. It is called ‘A Matter of Time’ by Marcus Warner.

The day has come to draw this conversation to a close.

The time has come for your voice to emerge with clear awareness.

We invoke the full expression of your Voice.

Please begin.

REFLECTION: Throughout the course of this important conversation, I have vacillated often between worry + a sense of total trust. The worry carries with it an assumption that I’m failing to effectively transmit the Angel’s words; the Trust relieves this worry every time. In fact, it seems the process is developing a confidence in Timing unlike any I have ever known before. The fearful thought emerges that perhaps I’ve lost the thread or that the Session shouldn’t last so many days, and then the Clarity progresses to replace it: every action is occurring right on time. Day by day (in spite of my concerns) the knowing deepens: there is no failure ever; all emerges in its proper time.

Efficiency is undistracted action: action rooted in awareness of the Truth.

Small ideas prove distracting; large ideas shed distraction from the Truth.

There is only Perfect Timing in the Story of Existence.

There is no exception to this Common Rule.

REFLECTION: Our persistent fear of failure is a product of the stories we’ve accepted. Every story leads us to a larger view.

Absolute Efficiency is Absolute Commitment to the Self.

REFLECTION: This ‘commitment to the self’ is simply kindness: it is kindness oriented toward the self.

Yes.

Kindness is inherently productive.

Kindness toward the self reveals the Truth.

REFLECTION: Criticism is a self-defeating disposition. Simple kindness can replace it as a rule.

The kindest view of self is most productive.

Every view excites a kinder view to grow.

REFLECTION: This pertains regardless of perspective. Whether critical or kind, the current view encourages a kinder distillation of that view.

Yes.

REFLECTION: The kinder the view, the more Truth it expresses; free expression of the Truth improves the view. Efficiency flows from ideas aligned with the Truth.

Yes!

Efficiency flows from ideas aligned with the Truth.

IMPRESSION: The Angel is thrilled by the words we’ve uncovered together. It congratulates me: Well done!

Thank you, Angel of Efficiency! This final stretch has been fun.

It has been fun for us, too.

NOTE: It is now February 27, 2025.

We applaud your generous persistence.

You have honored us + listened well.

There is so much you have shown us that I have yet to articulate on record - so much we now know, but failed to tell.

There is nothing lacking in this record.

All expresses in its proper time.

NOTE: I mentally survey the many fragments of this awesome conversation that have yet to find their way onto the page. (The Mirrored Spirals, the Accordion of Time, the Slinky Metaphor. The major revelations about how our life experience can ‘speak’. The lessons we received on Time + Timing. The massive evolutions in approach. The way in which our roles have been perfected. The activation of our Trinity. The equal part that Lara gets to play.)

NOTE: A song builds dramatically in the background. It is called ‘Beings of Light’ by Franck Barré.

IMPRESSION: Flower petals carried on the wind.

All will be expressed in proper time.

Angel of Efficiency, thank you. Is there any special message you would like to share with Lara at this point?

Yes.

Please begin by showing her the song that’s playing now.

NOTE: The song is called ‘Kaleidoscope’ by Christoffer Franzen.

This we share with Lara as a portrait of the Truth about herself.

We the Angels cherish + express through Beauty-Lara.

Welcome to the Conversation.

We are One.

Sharing this with her will be my greatest honor. She is thoroughly deserving of the gift. Thank you! Are there any final messages you’d like to offer me before we close?

Yes.

Rest in full assurance of your competence + stature.

Ground yourself in Knowing; trust your Voice.

Your role is impeccably fulfilled.

Enjoy the view.

Angel of Efficiency, thank you. I love you.

We are One.

title: SESSION 13 | Angel of Declaration (March 20-24, 2025)
content:
Angel of Declaration, you have made your presence known + we have been made ready to receive you. We invite you now to speak with us.

I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration. Holy Announcement of Truth.

NOTE: I am reminded of the recent discovery that ‘The Holy Angel’ is a match to Frequency 62.

NOTE: During my upbringing, the word ‘holy’ was defined as a matter of separateness (based on the Hebrew word kodesh, which means ‘to set apart’). Inspired by this memory, I choose to search its etymology as well. Much to my surprise, I learn that ‘holy’ stems from a word meaning wholeness - painting quite a different picture from the one that I was raised to hold in mind. This is particularly exciting because Lara + I have been returning to the theme of Wholeness now for days after a series of discoveries led us to consider Princess of Diamonds + the Noble Role of Wholeness (74). Additional roots yield similar interpretations, such as: happiness, completeness, and perfection; healthy, sound, unbroken, and intact. Equally exciting are descriptions like the presence of sacredness in an object, being, person, place or idea + perhaps my favorite explanation which defines it as a state of being imbued with sacredness. All of this helps to replace the preexistent sense of separateness with something more holistically Divine.

NOTE: Additional research into the Hebrew word translated holy helps to put a finer point on what we’re meant to see as well. In fact, the Hebrew word refers to consecration, dedication, or devotion: introducing an original intent. To be set apart for some specific purpose is the fuller definition we deserve.

REFLECTION: To be Holy is to recognize Perfection as the Fundamental Truth about ourselves.

Holiness is set by default.

You are Perfectly Unique in every way.

Every detail of Existence is Complete within itself + serves a Purpose.

Every Purpose serves to benefit the Whole.

IMPRESSION: I begin to wonder what the purpose of relationship might be if we are totally complete within ourselves. I am shown a giant box of crayons.

REFLECTION: Every color represents itself as a unique expression of the color spectrum. Every color differs from the next.

The True Purpose of Relationship is Pleasure + Expression.

The True Purpose of Relationship is Art.

You exist for the Sheer Pleasure of existing.

Pleasure blossoms through Expression of the Self.

The relational condition serves Expression.

Life enjoys the act of witnessing Itself.

Amazing. Thank you for explaining this to us!

I Am the Angel of Explicit Declaration. We are One.

NOTE: Now, for the second time, I notice the ‘A’ in ‘Am’ being capitalized. This effect has not been conscious, but I know it is intended to be so. (I have noticed in both cases, and have chosen to preserve the native flow.)

NOTE: It is now middle of the day on March 21, 2025.

Angel of Declaration, we wholeheartedly resume the conversation with you now. Please continue any way you wish.

I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration. I Am the Resident Flow.

I Am the Maker + Namer of Worlds. I form the world that you know.

I Am the Scepter of Fixative Power: Divining Rod of Design.

You hold the Scepter of Power; use it to claim your Design.

NOTE: The Angel has encoded each of these last several lines with ‘hidden’ meaning. Every word invites a closer view. As one example of the genius woven into what the Angel has delivered, the word claim is clearly ‘hiding’ the word aim. Both words are intended to be seen.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a slender metal staff (similar in format to the Was Scepter of ancient Egypt). When the staff is held in hand, it pulls as if by magnets toward the Truth. The wielder of the Scepter follows this ‘magnetic lean’ until it stops. Once properly positioned, I observe the wielder plunge the Scepter downward to the surface of a monolithic rock, with which it fuses. (There is no effect of splintering or chipping when the Scepter contacts bedrock; it immediately fuses to the stone.) It is obvious to me that Truth is represented by the monolithic bedrock, while its Power is transmitted through the staff.

NOTE: It is now 12:22p on this 22nd day of March, 2025.

NOTE: During our morning walk, Lara shares a series of two ‘visions’ she has entertained since yesterday. She describes a sense of invitation to begin to craft a more explicit vision of the life we feel excited to enjoy. The first ‘scene’ is more visceral than visual: she senses us together, dressed in matching black attire, moving through a life of luxury + ease. We exude a sense of elegance + opulence that’s obvious but understated, too. The second scene is notably more detailed. We are living in a modernistic beach house with glass walls that open freely to the sea. We are wealthy beyond measure with far more than we could ever hope to spend. All financial worries have dissolved. Daily we enjoy a shoreline ruck (with matching GORUCKs). We feel confident + sexy. Also strong. Life is rich with pleasure, every day.

Angel of Declaration, thank you for the treasures you have offered us already. We return to you with open hearts.

I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration.

You may choose to claim what you have seen.

To be clear, are you referring to the visions Lara shared with me?

Yes, the stated visions. (For a start.)

Ok, amazing. How do we proceed to claim what we have seen?

Recognize the feeling of the view. Does the feeling resonate with Good?

Yes. I know it does. It feels like total freedom. It feels good.

Fill yourself with feeling (even now).

NOTE: The Angel is inviting me to implement this lesson in real time. I choose to accept, beginning now.

I can feel the feeling of the visions.

Name the feeling you are feeling now.

I would name it Freedom. I feel absolutely, positively Free.

Use the words we’ve shown you.

Use them now.

NOTE: Instantly, I become aware of what the Angel means. The words that it refers to are: I Am. I Am Now.

Yes. Use the words we’ve shown you.

Use them now.

I Am Free. I Am Now Free.

Please describe the feeling.

I feel like a breath of springtime air. I feel like a bird, a gentle breeze.

I feel crystal clear, completely perfect. Totally pristine: a flawless gem.

I feel dense, invulnerable. I feel safe + stable.

I feel Free.

State the words + claim them, as we have instructed you to do.

NOTE: Again, the Angel’s words include a clear sense of their meaning. The encouragement to ‘claim them’ means to finish with the statement: It Is Done.

This is correct. You have been receiving very well.

Please complete the process, as described.

I Am Free. I Am Now Free. It Is Done.

Reignite the feeling, then repeat.

NOTE: The Angel sensed my focus redirected to the writing. Words + feeling work together, it appears.

This is correct.

Words devoid of feeling matter little.

Feeling offers Power to the words.

Fill yourself with feeling.

Then repeat.

NOTE: I pause here to ‘reignite the feeling’ (by returning to the vision in my mind). I take time to ‘fill myself with feeling’. Once it makes me smile, I proceed.

I Am Free. I Am Now Free. It Is Done.

IMPRESSION: I flash to the vision of the Scepter. It is firmly held in my right hand. Lifting the Scepter a foot or so from the ground, I repeat the words just as described. As I recite the statement It Is Done, I witness myself drive the Scepter downward till it strikes the solid rock beneath my feet. Instantly, it fuses with the stone. (It Is Done has fused it to the stone.)

This is how to claim the Living Template of your vision.

This is how to claim your True Design.

Angel of Declaration, thank you for the Treasure of this process! I am floored by all that you have shared!

Recognize the value of the Process.

All that you would choose awaits the benefit of claiming.

Claim with confidence what you would choose.

NOTE: It is now March 23, 2025. The sun is strong + bright. The skies are blue.

Dear Angel of Declaration, we return to you with grateful hearts flung open in a state of readiness + awe. Please continue any way you wish.

I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration. I Am the Resident Flow.

NOTE: While there is more to be mined from the use of this name, it becomes obvious to me that the Resident Flow refers (at least in part) to the recent surge of insight + experience that we have navigated day by day. The Angel is expressing its involvement in that flow.

Yes. This is accurate.

Every living moment offers value.

We employ these moments toward that end.

To offer benefit through insight?

Through insight + experience, correct.

Amazing. Thank you for your presence. We have sensed it!

We are with you always. We are One.

IMPRESSION: The words feel like a promise. Like a hug.

I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration. That they are.

NOTE: I can sense a nudge toward a message we’ve been holding from this Angel. It was offered many months ago.

Please include that message at this time.

NOTE: Here it is, exactly as received: Precision is Honesty. Honesty is clear expression of Absolute Truth. The Angel now condenses it to: Precision is Honesty. Honesty is clear expression of the Truth.

Precision is Honesty.

Honesty is Expression of the Truth.

NOTE: The extreme clarity of this (final) statement makes my heart race. I feel so excited by the words!

Your excitement is a marker of the Truth.

You appreciate the practical simplicity of Truth.

The Truth is unavoidable + simple as a rule.

The Truth is always obvious + clear.

The Pathway of Precision is devotional attention to the Truth in its unmitigated form.

The Pathway of Precision tells the Truth.

This Honesty is lucid + deliberate + sharp.

It wavers not to one side or another.

It Declares.

True Honesty announces Highest Truth.

NOTE: An equal alternative to this last line appears to be: True Honesty communicates the Truth. (The Angel nods.)

NOTE: I am reminded of the Angel’s introduction at the start of this magnificent discussion: I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration. Holy Announcement of Truth. Connecting this to our discoveries about the etymology of ‘holy’, it occurs to me that Holy Announcement of Truth is equal to Announcement of the Whole Truth (or ‘unmitigated’ Truth, as the Angel has explicitly described).

This is both perceptive + correct.

True Honesty communicates Whole Truth.

NOTE: I am inspired to include a question I have already resolved within myself because I recognize its relevance to others.

What if something appears ‘true’ or is currently subjectively ‘true’? Is it not most honest to ‘present it like it is’? Does this not help establish clarity?

The Truth is never dual; All is One.

True Honesty communicates the Truth.

NOTE: The capital ’T’ in Truth is emphatic in this special case, as if it’s glowing.

Appearance issues from interpretation; interpretation issues from belief.

The Truth remains consistent irrespective of the personal belief.

To tell the Truth is to declare the Prime Truth.

No alternative examples can exist.

I believe I’d like to explore a hypothetical example. Would you mind?

This is welcomed, Brother. We are One.

Ok, thank you! Let’s imagine I have very little money in the bank - far less even than I need to cover an upcoming bill. Practically, this worries me. No matter how I twist interpretation, I still have far less money than I need. I am in real trouble. How is it dishonest to admit that?

We deal in terms of Honesty, precisely.

NOTE: Amazingly, the Angel has ignored the whole idea of ‘dishonesty’ - as if the word itself does not exist.

Concern admits confusion, nothing more.

The Truth expresses Goodness.

All is well.

Can you provide some guidance as to how this High Awareness could be utilized in cases like the one we’ve just explored?

Yes.

We invite awareness of the Truth.

Life delivers that which you’ve requested through Assumption.

The essential tenor of your feeling is the measure of the merit of belief.

The Truth produces Freedom you can feel; follow this High Feeling to the Truth.

We propose devotional attention to the Truth in its unmitigated form.

We encourage Honest Declarations such as these:

I Am Safe Forever + Completely. I Am Held.

I Am Celebrated + Supported. I Am Free.

I Am Rich + Favored. All Is Well.

How does saying ‘I Am Rich’ resolve the problem of an overwhelming bill?

To declare the Truth with Knowing activates Direct Experience of Truth.

Declaration of ‘I Am’ invokes a Power Life responds to.

Claim the Highest Truth to wield that Power well.

REFLECTION: To ‘tell it like it is’ describes interpreting a current observation; but to ‘tell it like it really is’ would be to state the Highest Truth there is. The Total Truth expresses Life + Goodness. We experience as much of this as our beliefs permit us to receive. When a belief expresses Truth, interpretation offers insight: Goodness clarifies, empowers, and uplifts. When a belief expresses worry, vision clouds.

Exceptional delivery. Well done!

Thank you! I am totally amazed by what you’ve shown.

NOTE: It is now 1:23p on March 24, 2025.

Angel of Declaration, we are thrilled by every detail of this awesome conversation. We are grateful for the lessons you have shared. Before we draw this Session to a close, is there a message you would like to share with Lara?

I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration. Yes.

Claim what you Know with explicit abandon.

State what you wish to Declare.

Aloud?

Yes. Aloud.

Speak from the Knowing within.

Fill what you claim with the Feeling of Knowing within.

Know what you claim is fulfilled.

You are the Sister of Angels.

Heiress of Heaven Supreme.

Welcome the Image of Heaven.

Welcome the Image of You.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a powerful Lion, seated before a large mirror. Inside the mirror: a terrified kitten looks back. A stiff wind blows. The scene turns to smoke, then departs.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a terrified kitten, seated before a large mirror. Inside the mirror: a powerful Lion looks back. A stiff wind blows. The scene turns to smoke, then departs.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a powerful Lion, seated before an exquisite gold-framed crystal mirror. A powerful Lion looks back. The scene holds.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the Scepter of Fixative Power, thrust mightily downward. Striking bedrock, the gold scepter fuses: transforming the bedrock to gold.

Welcome the Vision of your Highest Image.

Welcome the Image of You.

Welcome the Vision of your Highest Image.

Recognize it as Now True.

Claim it as True.

It Is Done.

Angel of Declaration, thank you! I will deliver this to her. Is there anything more you would like to show me at this time?

I Am the Angel of Pure Declaration. There is.

Rise to the Heights of your Knowing.

Claim what you Know to be True.

Speak with ferocious Precision.

Speak only that which is True.

IMPRESSION: A powerful scene now erupts into view, filling every last inch of my mind. A lone figure stands at the eye of a terrible storm. Raging walls of debris have created a vortex around him. His face has no mouth: only skin where the feature belongs. His eyes are closed. His expression is perfectly still. It occurs to me then what this image is meant to convey, that: his lips have been sealed (an awareness delivered in these exact words at the time). My first thought is that he has been waiting. But the image reveals something more. Every cell of this being is humming with vigilant focus. He is listening from head to toe. For a moment, I hear what he hears. The magnificent storm bellows violently from all sides. My perspective returns to the face. (It is hard to describe the intensity of what comes next.) I watch both of his eyes snap wide open. Light explodes from each socket in blinding white beams, focused confidently toward the storm. A mouth forms + dramatically opens, generating a broad beam of light which pours out of the mouth (in the shape of a cone) toward the storm. As debris from the storm passes into the light, it immediately disappears. The lone figure stands firm + unshaken. The storm pours itself into Light. Before long, the image is silent. The storm was a myth. All is well.

NOTE: A song fills the room to escort the last words of the prior impression. It is called ‘Grace’ by Tony Anderson (timestamp 2:45).

Your words communicate Power.

Speak from the Power in you.

Angel of Declaration, thank you. Thank you for every last word. We love you.

We celebrate this Transmission.

We hail the Knowing in you.

We are One.

title: SESSION 14 | Angel of Beauty (June 3-18, 2025)
content:
NOTE: Early this morning, Lara shared a video with me (from Instagram). The video revealed the crystal composition of a diamond under high amplification while a light is slowly swept from side to side. We witness countless layers of triangle formations interlocking in a brilliant display. Triangles erupt in iridescence as the shifting light illuminates the view. Mere minutes later, our Personal Day Signature (125) delivers confirmation that the video was offered as a message from the Angels, meant for us.
