Frequency matches included: A Lesson From the Angel; Crystals Are Angels; Diamond Lara + Diamond Timothy; Discover the Truth; Hidden Treasure Revealed; Important Signs; Rainbow Diamond Presence; Reveal What Is True; Trust the Timing; and We Are the Rainbow Diamond. These messages were further personalized through entries like: Divine Orchestration; Lara, the Crystal Queen; Messengers of Light; Our Activated Trinity (triangle!); Star Tetrahedron (a geometric symbol we have tattooed in a deconstructed form on our left wrists); Timothy’s Gem Friends; Timothy’s Mineral Allies; and We Are a Gift for Your Heart. As if all of this were not enough, the entries made it clear which of the Angels was responsible for this coherent stream of correspondence. It was almost like the Angel signed its name: Beauty Living Within Us; Celebrate This as a Sign; Orienting Toward Beauty; Permit This Reunion; Thank You for Being Here Now; Tuned to the Calling of Beauty; and You May Contact Any Way You Wish. Swimming in the thrill of sheer amazement, we both knew the Angel Session had begun.

NOTE: In honor of this Session, we’ve selected Green Apophyllite to join us at the center of our workspace. We associate this gorgeous stone with Beauty + consider it a very special friend.

NOTE: In the lead-up to this conversation, I imagined the Angel’s first words. Immediately, I heard this: I Am the Angel of Beauty. You are the Angel of Beauty. As I considered whether ‘you’ was intended for me, the same words repeated again: You are the Angel of Beauty. You are the Angel of Beauty. You are the Angel of Beauty. It was clear that these words were emphatic, and completely specific to me. It was also implicit that these words were offered to Lara (as emphatically as to me). Finally, the message extended beyond both of us: to deliver itself to the world.

Angel of Beauty, we see you. We are prepared to receive all that you wish to share. We invite you to speak now.

I Am the Angel of Beauty.

Angel of Beauty: Your Light.

NOTE: Initially, I am uncertain whether the phrase is ‘Your Light’ or ‘Pure Light’. The Angel confirms: Both of these are entirely true, but the record reveals our intent. (It intended ‘Your Light’ in this case.)

Your Light is Pure Light.

Light is the Color of Life.

Light is Color.

Color is Expression.

All is Art.

NOTE: These last several lines reverberate like metronomic echoes in my mind. I even speak the words aloud to Lara, just to feel the measure of their cadence on my tongue. Light is Color; Color is Expression; All is Art. There is a musical quality to the pacing of these words: Light is Color; Color is Expression; [pause] All is Art.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of white light producing rainbows through a totally transparent crystal prism. Iridescent light pervades the scene.

NOTE: In addition to whatever other meanings might become apparent over time, I can see that the display of color stands for individual expression. I recall that the 8th Angel of Originality connects to the 1st Angel to complete a channel in Human Design.

NOTE: I am reminded of another frequency we came upon this morning: Rainbow Prisms (110). Amazingly, this number corresponds to the 11th Angel of (Star)Light + is an Amplified Expression of Day Signature 11 (the exact Day Signature we met today).

NOTE: Lara reminds me that The Pinwheel we have recently discovered (and meticulously modeled) is  composed of (2) transparent interactive prisms meant to generate a rainbow-like display. We designed this mechanism several months ago through an exhilarating feat of intuition. (We had no real sense of what it might reveal.) Discussing the potential relevance of this important symbol, we are totally astonished to remember that the center of The Pinwheel has a name. The name is: Beauty. And the essence of this Beauty is: White Light.

NOTE: Quite miraculously, a gorgeous Champagne Topaz we had ordered almost one full week ago arrives today. As if to (once again) confirm that this is a direct gift from the Angel, we remember that the gem associated with the White Light at the center of our Pinwheel is: Topaz.

REFLECTION: It only now becomes apparent that The Pinwheel was commissioned by this Angel.

Angel of Beauty! Thank you! What a thrill to sense your Light at work in all these ways!

You are more than welcome; we are honored.

Our Light is your own Light.

We are One.

NOTE: We decide to pause here for the day.

NOTE: It took an extra day (6/4) to gather, type, and validate all the notes + messages above. It was a pleasant process of reflection. It is now June 5, 2025. We both feel excited to resume.

NOTE: Our morning ritual inspires an exciting flow of brilliant discoveries based on the frequency expressions of a name. One by one the following new frequencies arrive: Source of Provision, Essence of Beauty, Nectar of Life, The Central Sun, The Golden Light, Essence of Goodness, and The Promise. Along the way, we calculate a fresh take on our own Birthright Abundance Number, which reveals an all-new frequency of 304. Explicit confirmation that this rich flow of discovery has been a pure transmission from the Angel is delivered by the first word of the first match we encounter, which says this: Beauty Calls Us Forward Into Ever More Delightful Ways of Life. We both cheer aloud when we read this! Amazingly, the very next line is a hit as well. It reads: Create Through a Relentless Orientation Toward Beauty. Continuing our research (to the frequency 380) yields perhaps the most conclusive finding yet. In the Angel’s own voice, we find this: I Walk the Pathway of Expression to Become the Embodiment of Artistry.

NOTE: Shortly after lunch, I am surprised to hear the keynotes we’ve assigned to this 1st Angel playing out on repeat in my mind. The Angel of Beauty walks the Pathway of Expression to become the Embodiment of Artistry. Time + time again, the words repeat. It soon becomes apparent that the rhythm of the phrase is slightly ‘off’. As quickly as I’m able to admit this, I receive the words this Angel would prefer: The Angel of Beauty walks the Pathway of Expression to become the Embodiment of Art. Sharing this with Lara, we agree the difference can be felt. We make the change.

NOTE: It is now June 6, 2025. We return inspired to proceed.

NOTE: Our morning moments yield yet more delicious confirmation that the Angel has been present in our findings. One message at the frequency 390 reads: Beauty Is the Frequency of Life That You Have Come to Amplify Through Your Imagination + Kind Eyes. Another favorite message tells us this (at 296): Celebrate That Which Is Beautiful. Never Mind Anything Else. Remarkably, both entries are verbatim excerpts from a conversation I had with the same stone this 1st Angel proudly claimed: our Green Apophyllite (an Ally we’ve been keeping close for days).

Angel of Beauty, you have been so generous with us! You have offered treasures. We will cherish every single one. We are deeply grateful. Please continue now as you see fit.

I Am the Angel of Beauty.

We commend your efforts.

All is well.

NOTE: I believe the Angel’s soft assurance is intended to address a slight concern that daily ‘notes’ have overtaken this discussion - that the Angel hasn’t had a chance to speak. (I can sense the Angel nodding now.)

You interpret properly.

This is the assurance we extend.

Life communicates through every nuance (as do angels).

Angel-Light surrounds you.

All is well.

NOTE: Initially, I capitalize the ‘a’ in Angels (three lines back). This would be consistent with past sessions (for example: Everything you witness is an Angel; Learn to seek the Angel of the Moment; and so on), but lower-case is clearly wanted here. Contemplating this, I realize that the Angel is collapsing the divide between what we consider common + what we have come to think of as divine. There is in fact no difference: every moment radiates Divinity.

REFLECTION: Everything we witness is an Angel. Everything is perfectly Divine.

This is correct, yes!

Nothing we encounter breaks the rule.

Everything is perfectly Divine.

IMPRESSION: I am shown an image of white canvas on an easel with a palette of fresh paint prepared for use. The perspective widens. I can see a row of easels now. The second canvas over is completely painted in a single color. The next one features just a single stroke. The fourth presents a detailed panorama. Each is beautiful in its own way.

Life is Color; Color is Expression; All is Art.

Every color harnesses Perfection.

All is Art.

REFLECTION: Notes are no less relevant than Voices or Impressions. Every style benefits the text.

Every word communicates the Light.

I love this, thank you!

NOTE: It has taken time to properly attune the words of this transmission to the cadence of the Angel’s native voice. In every case, the section seeking some sort of refinement is made clear. In every case, I feel the proper rhythm ‘lock’ in place. The process is meticulous, but fruitful. Lara helps me choose to trust the time it takes.

NOTE: It is now June 9, 2025. The view outside is vivid green against a milky sky. The ground is wet.

Angel of Beauty, we return to you with humble hearts. Please resume in any way you wish.

I am the Kaleidoscopic Angel: Spectrum of the Glory within you.

[Or:] I am the Kaleidoscopic Angel: Spectacle of Glory within you.

[Or:] I am the Kaleidoscopic Angel: Iridescent Spectacle of you.

NOTE: Each of the above three introductions is appropriate, intended, and correct. Each is shared exactly as received.

You are now invited to present this morning’s lesson word-for-word.

NOTE: The Angel is referring to the following transmission (offered during our first moments of the day): Beauty is expressed through Proper Action. Accompanied by coffee + a chiminea fire, I’m reminded of a section from the Angel of Enrichment (Session 2): True Decadence is enjoyment! Proper action. It occurs to me that truly ‘proper’ action is permission of enjoyment, nothing more.

Yes, this is correct!

Beauty is expressed through Proper Action.

Proper Action celebrates the Light.

NOTE: I spend this day (6/9) considering the link between the Angel, Proper Action, and Enjoyment. The first phase of my contemplation yields these words: Beauty is most thoroughly expressed through the permission of enjoyment. Over time, the statement is reduced to: Beauty is most thoroughly expressed through celebration. My progress seems to stall here for some time.

NOTE: It is now June 10, 2025. The penny drops while on a walk with Lara when I hear myself spontaneously state that: Beauty is expressed. (Period.) Immediately, I can sense affirmative response.

Yes!

Beauty is the essence of Existence.

Beauty is expressed through all that is.

Beauty is the fundamental nature of Existence.

Beauty is expressed through all that is.

Beauty is the flavor of Existence.

Beauty is holistically expressed.

In what way specifically do Beauty + Enjoyment, then, relate?

Beauty is the incandescent essence of Enjoyment.

Enjoyment is the way that Beauty feels.

Enjoyment is the signature of Beauty!

NOTE: The Angel nods emphatically.

Enjoyment is the way that Beauty feels.

NOTE: We spend June 11th rigorously verifying every detail added to this record since the 9th. We do not proceed until the proper words + statements lock in place.

NOTE: It is now June 12, 2025. A reading of our Session with the Angel of Attraction (Session 3) leads us to contemplate a series of connections we excitedly take note of at the time. We recall that Beauty + Attraction are both Primes; that their specific placements form a Counterpart relationship; and that they are numerically affiliated, too (based on their sequence). Perhaps most significantly, we find Love equated to the Angel of Attraction (and Enjoyment!), which the current Angel (Beauty) then confirms.

Beauty is the essence + expression of Enjoyment: essence + expression of Pure Love.

NOTE: It is now June 13, 2025. Our Personal Day Signature produces an exciting confirmation of the Angel’s early words regarding Light when we read this: The Nature of Beauty Is Light (135). Additional findings generate a stream of all-new insights on the subject of our Activated Pinwheel: weaving elements of Beauty, Grace, Trust, Reverence, and Worship into functional awareness we can use. This inspires heartfelt conversation we return to many times throughout the day.

NOTE: Additional connections yield awareness on the practical distinction between Reverence + Worship. We receive synonymous transmissions back-to-back. First: Reverence expressed produces Worship. And second: Worship is the frequency of Reverence expressed. We marvel at how Worship is the product of Expression, which reminds us of the color Azure Blue. We correlate this color with the Pathway of Expression, and speak often of a mythic Azure State. (The term itself has baffled us since early in the year, but we repeatedly return to ponder it.) Oddly enough, this same phrase made three unique appearances today (as matches to our frequency this morning). Connecting dots from Worship to Expression to the color Azure Blue completes the picture: Worship is itself the Azure State!

Correct!

Reverence expressed produces Worship.

Worship is the Azure State described.

NOTE: It is now June 14, 2025. We return excited to proceed.

Dear amazing Angel: thank you for your presence + your patience. Thank you for your wisdom + your words. We return to you as grateful vessels. Please continue now as you see fit.

NOTE: Hours pass in concentrated silence. Not a word or image is received. Finally, I choose to step away from the computer + discuss the ‘lack of progress’ with my wife. Lara listens carefully (just like she always does); and sure enough, this liberates the flow. It soon becomes apparent that the ‘silence’ I’ve encountered is not emptiness but fullness; that the subject is not distant but pervasive; that the Angel is inviting me to feel. As quickly as I’m able to compute this, it’s confirmed.

Beauty is the essence + the aura of Existence.

Beauty is expressed through all that is.

IMPRESSION: I imagine receiving the keys to a mansion, then waiting to enter until every feature has been adequately described. A genial voice says: ‘Get in there, you goofball! The Kingdom is yours. Go enjoy.’ (The tone of these words drips with gentle affection: like honey poured into my mind.)

REFLECTION: Beauty is experiential.

Beauty is a frequency you feel.

NOTE: An equal alternative to this line appears to be: Beauty is a language you can feel. The Angel validates this: Both are true.

NOTE: It is now June 15, 2025. A message from our Personal Day Signature confirms that: Beauty Will Never Run Dry (137).

NOTE: It is now June 17, 2025. Our Personal Day Signature reveals: Beauty Is All That There Is (139). Today for the first time in 14 days, I must consider that this message constitutes the Angel’s full intended lesson for this Session. It summarizes well the many-times-repeated statements we’ve received. All are variations on a theme: Beauty is the essence of Existence. Beauty is expressed through all that is. Beauty is the nature of Existence. Beauty is the Truth of all that is. (And so on.) After two weeks of unprecedented focus, it is time to draw this 14th Angel Session to a close.

Angel of Beauty, thank you for the fundamental lesson you have offered. We will do our best to live it well. Are there any closing words you’d like to offer Lara at this time?

I am the Initiating Angel of Expression. Yes, there are.

Lara is the Iridescent Angel.

Lara is the Beauty we describe.

Lara is the Incandescent Angel.

Lara is the Iridescent Beauty we describe.

We the Angels celebrate the Light in Angel-Lara.

[Or:] We the Angels celebrate the Angel-Light in Lara.

Lara sheds the Rainbow Light we share.

Lara is invited to accept the durability of Beauty.

Lara is invited to relax.

What about when genuine attempts at relaxation seem to fail?

We encourage conscious disavowal of the worrisome prediction.

We encourage verbal declaration of the Truth.

We can do this, thank you. Are there any other methods you’d propose?

Recognize the Angels that surround you.

Appreciate the Angel within you.

REFLECTION: Appreciation both acknowledges + multiplies the value of its subject.

IMPRESSION: A rose bud gently blossoms. Dewdrops glisten + reflect the tender view.

Orient toward Beauty to express it.

Celebrate the Beauty within you.

Angel of Beauty, thank you. Are there any words you’d like to offer me?

I am the First Angel. Yes. There are.

Beauty is the Essence of Existence.

Beauty is the only Truth there is.

Beauty is the Structure of Existence.

Beauty is the only Truth there is.

Beauty is the Essence + Expression of Existence.

Beauty is the only Truth there is.

Beauty is the Structure + Expression of Existence.

Beauty is the only Truth there is.

Beauty is the only Truth there is.

NOTE: The Angel nods.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a series of three images: a message in a bottle, a chest of buried treasure, and a key. (The key emits a brilliant white light, much like a star.)

IMPRESSION: I am shown an image of the Activated Pinwheel. Three explicit terms emerge as well: Polestar, Star of Beauty, Guiding Light.

REFLECTION: Beauty is the Pole Star: Guiding Light. (The Angel nods.)

This completes the mystical transmission of your Trophy:

[Or:] This completes the vision of your Trophy:

Beauty is the only Truth there is.

REFLECTION: This is what the symbol truly means. (Again, the Angel nods.)

IMPRESSION: Gold at the end of a rainbow.

This is what the image represents.

We encourage thoughtful application of the honorary token.

Recognize the Value.

Dignify the Prize.

Express the Light.

ADDENDUM: On September 9, 2025 - several months after the completion of this 14th Angel Session - the Angel spoke again as I found myself captivated by the presence of a clear Apophyllite that we have proudly featured in our home. The voice of your Apophyllite is equal to our own voice. Add its lessons to the record if you wish. With this gentle invitation came a sense of warmth + wonder + relief. I have often speculated as to whether these long-dormant conversations with Apophyllite could have been early lessons from this Angel. (I sense the Angel smile in response.) Since 2022, the soft-yet-penetrating wisdom of these conversations has continued to both comfort + direct me. I include them as addendum with my love.

title: SESSION 15 | Angel of Imagination (July 26 - August 23, 2025)
content:
Dearest Angel of Imagination: you have blessed us with a confident awareness of your presence + intention now for days. We are overjoyed to meet with you! Given that we have connected many recent messages + synchronicities to you, I thought it might be fun to start by sharing some of those exciting memories as Notes. Would this plan be acceptable to you?

I Am the Angel of Imagination. Yes.

Please share what you have been excited to include.

Thank you! Please feel free to interject at any point. We consider everything you offer us a gift.

NOTE: We have learned to recognize the signs of an upcoming conversation; we remain attuned to them each day. On July 20th, the Angel of Imagination made an early introduction through the Oracle we work with every day. While we receive an Angel every morning, this one made an impact I could feel. I even mentioned this aloud to Lara, indicating that this Angel might just be the next we meet with - an exciting proposition for us both. The gut sense was confirmed when we received a Message Card with one of our longstanding-favorite invitations. It said this: Marvel and Love Without End. Immediately, we connected these words to the Prayer of Amazement + the 64th Embodiment of Prayer.

NOTE: While typing the preceding note, Lara + I are surprised by the intensity of a song that’s playing (loudly) as we work. The name of the song is ‘Light in the Abyss’ by Pauli Hausmann. We decide to calculate the title. Sure enough, it adds up to 100: which is our shared Phoenix Frequency - a number we’ve been working with all week! We both cheer aloud when we see this!

Thank you, Awesome Angel! We see you!

NOTE: The following day (7/21), we find ourselves inspired to consider the significance of ‘retrograde’ activity in planets (based on the fact that Mercury was retrograde that day). For years we have been seeking an empowered definition of this movement, but discovered we’d most likely need to elevate the meaning for ourselves. Finally, the proper time to do so had arrived. We begin by considering the Angels represented by the movement in this case. They are: the 31st Angel of Influence, the 33rd Angel of Revelation, and the 7th Angel of Dignity. We then explore the etymology of ‘retrograde’, which stems from two words meaning: to go back. The contemplation leads us to a stimulating nature walk at nearby Fillmore Glen. We settle on a series of associations which reflect our own experience while properly aligning with what we have come to know about the Truth. We recognize in retrograde activity the highlighting of certain special themes, which we connect to Opportunity, Redemption, and the mythical Return to Innocence. Considering the amplifying impact of the process, we decide to name it a Reflection Cycle. (It isn’t until nearly one week later that we finally discern the Angel’s hand in this empowering refinement of the term.)

NOTE: Early the next morning (7/22), hummingbirds arrive to greet the day. While we have grown accustomed to a visitor or two from time to time, this special day provided up to three of them at once (within a few short feet of where we sat). We decide to calculate ‘A Message From the Hummingbirds’, which comes out to 170: a perfect match to Knowledge of Powerful Prayers. Contemplating this, I am amazed to find the Angel of Imagination blossoming with insight in response. I take careful note of what it shares.

Angel of Imagination, would this be an appropriate position to communicate your lessons from that day?

I Am the Angel of Imagination.

Yes, it is appropriate. Please do.

Ok, wonderful! I will add them to the record now.

Thank-you is the most perfect prayer besides Wow.

[Or:] Thank-you is the most powerful prayer besides Wow.

NOTE: I waver over which word is intended: ‘powerful’ or ‘perfect’. Both of them feel equally correct.

The ‘most perfect’ is the most powerful prayer: they are one.

The most-perfect prayer is Amazement (or Wonder).

Thank-you forms appropriate response.

NOTE: I begin to consider the idea of ‘appropriate response’. It reminds me of a lesson we received from our last Session, which said this: Beauty is expressed through Proper Action. Enjoyment is the way that Beauty feels. It occurs to me that genuine Thanksgiving is the feeling of Enjoyment. We embody this response when we wholeheartedly enjoy what we enjoy!

REFLECTION: Genuine Thanksgiving is inherent to the act of pure Enjoyment. (The Angel nods.)

Enjoyment is the Pathway of Thanksgiving.

Enjoyment is the Thank-you we express.

NOTE: This reminds me of the Prayer of Amazement, which the Angel of Enrichment first proposed (in Session 2).

REFLECTION: The Prayer of Amazement is the feeling of Enjoyment.

I Am the Angel of Imagination. Yes.

Thanksgiving is the action of Enjoyment.

Enjoyment is Embodiment of Prayer.

The words that we’ve adopted for the Prayer of Amazement are: Thank You, I Love You. We speak these words many times a day.

I Am the Angel of Imagination. This is well.

Thanksgiving is the action of Enjoyment.

Enjoyment offers reverence to Life.

(I Love You is your reverence expressed.)

The words you have selected eloquently represent this.

The Prayer of Amazement… [there is a dramatic pause here] is your life.

NOTE: The Angel’s words (and powerful delivery) sync perfectly with a song we have playing at the time. The name of the song is ‘Anticipation’ by Ilya Kuznetsov + Mapps.

Thanksgiving is Enjoyment. Enjoyment is Embodiment of Prayer. The Prayer of Amazement is my life.

Enjoyment is Thanksgiving.

Amazement is a Posture.

Life is Prayer.

NOTE: Again the Angel pauses (as if to get my attention), then says this:

Appreciate the Miracle.

Anticipate the Good.

Embrace the Gift.

REFLECTION: The word ‘appreciate’ means to become aware. It also means to increase in value. We Appreciate the Miracle through conscious recognition of its presence. We Appreciate the Miracle through awareness of the Good that it intends. Most of all, we Appreciate the Miracle through the simple act of genuine enjoyment. To enjoy is to exalt the Good it brings.

To enjoy the Gift exalts the Good it brings.

This is correct!

Angel of Imagination, thank you. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts! This is so very special. We love you.

NOTE: Later that same day (7/22), a major project leads me back to Session 1. I spend hours swimming in its themes. At some point along the way, I find myself surprised to hear the Angel of Imagination clearly speaking! It says this:

Imagination features your relationship to Possibility.

You imagine that which you (subconsciously or consciously) assume.

[Or:] You imagine that which you (subconsciously or consciously) expect.

[Or:] You imagine that which you (subconsciously or consciously) believe.

NOTE: These three variations cycle frequently - for days. In time, the Angel demonstrates a preference for the word ‘assume’ - though each of these is equally correct.

NOTE: On the 23rd, I spend the day absorbed in Session 2. Sure enough, the Angel of Imagination speaks again. Its words are unequivocal, concise. It tells me this: (Natural) Enjoyment is Thanksgiving. These words play on repeat in my mind. It strikes me that this is a major lesson from the Angel. It confirms: Enjoyment is Thanksgiving. This is true.

NOTE: A New Moon on the 24th returns our attention to the 31st Angel of Influence. Two days later (7/26), prior to the formal start of this new Angel Session, we decide to craft a series of (10) New Moon Declarations in the form of thank-you statements we proceed to write by hand then read aloud. Each of these is offered to the record of this Session with our love:

Thank You for the Joy of Our Adventures, Large + Small

Thank You for the Generous Perfection of Our Beautiful + Comfortable Home

Thank You for the Spacious + Delightful Flow of Heartfelt Celebration Every Day

Thank You for the Angels + The Liberated Tarot: We Are Reverent Caretakers of the Gift

Thank You for the Miracle of Our Forever-Union: For the Blessings of an Overflowing Love

Thank You for Our Growing World of Luxurious Items + Good Friends (Clothing, Knives, and Crystals; Every-Thing!)

Thank You for the Magical Reminders of Our Progress (Star of Beauty, Platinum White Rings, and so Much More)

Thank You for the Gift of Food + Celebration Bevvies Overflowing Into Our Life Day-by-Day

Thank You for the Gift That Money Is to Us, and Thank You for Its Presence in Our Lives

Thank You for Our Bodies: Wells of Wisdom, Life, and Pleasure; Patient Friends

NOTE: Later on the 26th, while pondering the Pathway of Thanksgiving, I receive a series of transmissions from the Angel (indicating clearly why the posture of Thanksgiving is the most appropriate response to Life). It offers this: Abundance is inherent to the generosity of Life. You have it all. [Or:] Abundance is inherent to the flow of Life. You have it all. These messages are finally condensed to state: Abundance is inherent. You are free. The Angel then continues with a practical directive:

Just say Thank-you.

Just say Yes.

Abundance is inherent.

You are free.

NOTE: It is now July 30th. We have used the past four days to draft + sequence each of the preceding notes, with care.

Angel of Imagination, you have been so good to us. We celebrate your willingness to speak! Now that the notes we previously gathered have been shared, we wish to open once again to you. We welcome your communication now.

I am the Angel of Imagination. We are One.

You have listened well, and kept a very thorough record of our words.

We [the Angels] recognize your diligent attention.

We [the Angels] thank you for your care.

Please include the lesson you have saved.

NOTE: The Angel is referring to a series of significant transmissions we received on July 27th. Each is shared exactly as received.

Imagination, like a membrane, can be stretched.

NOTE: When these words were initially delivered, they included an implicit sense of what they were intended to convey. The sense was that the function of Imagination represents a ‘missing link’ to lasting transformation: that expanding our ideas fails to stimulate improvement of behavior until those ideas have been used to stretch the field of expectation from which our behavior tends to flow. The exact note we’ve recorded says it this way: Imagination is ‘the missing link’ to changed behavior.

This is true. [The Angel interjected this remark.]

Wow, thank you!

IMPRESSION: I am shown a very simple sequence, much like this: Awareness > Imagination > Behavior > Experience.

NOTE: This reminds me instantly of The Forgotten Sense, which formulates a similarly simple four-point model. In TFS, the sequence is: Focus > Feeling > Action > Outcome. As quickly as I’m able to remember this, the Angel offers these words in response:

Focus harnesses Awareness.

Imagination stimulates Feeling.

Behavior personalizes Action.

Experience manifests Outcome.

NOTE: This proposes an explicit link between the four-point models. I feel so excited I could burst! The Angel continues.

Awareness cannot generate behavior without generating fresh assumptions first.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a bucket full of Legos. Each piece represents a fundamental principle or truth. The pieces lie inert until assembled. They must be put to some creative use.

REFLECTION: Awareness of the Truth must be constructively, creatively employed.

Imagination activates Awareness.

This is true.

NOTE: The Angel continues.

Logical Awareness needs to fuel Imagination for Imagination to produce results.

NOTE: The Angel’s use of ‘Logical’ stands out. Without a single word of explanation, it is obvious that Logic from the Angel’s high perspective equals Truth. This is the only ‘logic’ that exists. So Logical Awareness is referring to Awareness of the Truth.

This is correct + well-articulated.

Truth is Logic in its highest form.

[Or:] Truth is Logic in its purest form.

[Or:] Truth is Logic in its proper form.

Thank you, Scribe.

NOTE: The Angel interjected this remark. It is a gift.

Thank you for confirming, Awesome Angel.

You are welcome, Brother.

We are One.

Continuing now…

Imagination generates behavior.

Behavior springs from that which you assume.

(You act from that which you expect to be.)

This lesson feels connected to an earlier transmission we received regarding our ideas about Possibility. Is this correct?

I am the Angel of Imagination. Yes. It is.

Would you care to expound on this a bit?

Imagination features your relationship to Possibility.

You project what you are willing to assume.

IMPRESSION: A single bubble hovers at the center of Infinity itself.

Like a membrane, your Imagination can be purposely expanded.

Your assumptions can be consciously improved.

Your use of the word assumption seems synonymous with your use of the word imagination. Is this true?

Imagination functions like a personal projector.

An assumption is what you expect-to-be.

You are constant generators of assumption.

You imagine what you inwardly assume.

NOTE: I find myself somewhat mesmerized by a definition of the word projector. It says this: An optical device that projects a beam of light, especially one used to project an image (or moving images) onto a screen.

Imagination is the ‘optical device’ of personal perception: inner ‘sight’.

This is correct.

The projected ‘beam of light’ is my own inner use of Life’s Light.

This is true.

This transpires on the ‘screen’ of my own mind.

This is correct.

Are my assumptions, then, my inner use of Light?

Your assumptions form the filter Light moves through.

Amazing! Thank you! I think I get it!

So Life moves to express Itself through each internal ‘filter’ of assumption I provide?

Life moves to express Itself through you.

[Or:] Light moves to express Itself through you.

Your assumptions qualify the nature of the image It projects.

IMPRESSION: I am reminded of a slide projector. Describing this to Lara, we remember a small childhood device. (My awareness of the memory is vague.) Research proves rewarding when I locate the View-Master: a projector-like viewfinder that displays a single image at a time. Each image is presented from a slide. (A lever can be pulled to change the slide.)

IMPRESSION: Again I see the bubble from our previous impression, only this time with an emphasis on the internal surface of the sphere. Colors swim + sparkle in an absolutely dazzling display. The view from at the center is immersive. There is no implication of the infinite expanse beyond the ‘screen’.

I am the Angel of Imagination.

Experience is neutral + pervasive.

Interpretation issues from the quality of filter you assume.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a canvas, many colors of fresh paint, a work of art.

Experience is neutral in the same way paint is neutral to the art.

(Experience is central to the art.)

NOTE: I am reminded of the Angel of Beauty stating (in Session 14) that: Life is Color; Color is Expression; All is Art.

Experience is Color.

All is Art.

Yes!

The filter of assumption, then, informs interpretation of the art.

Yes! This is correct.

Interpretation issues from the quality of filter you assume.

Interpretation overlays the view.

This is true when your assumption contradicts the logic of the art.

What determines the logic of the art?

The intention of the artist forms the fundamental logic of the art.

Following the metaphor, then: Life is the Artist, Experience is the Medium, and everything-that-is expresses Art?

This is correct.

What, then, is Life’s intention as the Artist?

The Artist seeks the pleasure of Perpetual Expression.

The Intention is to be completely known.

What ‘logic’ is translated through the Art?

The Art conveys the Nature of the Artist.

What, then, is the nature of this Artist?

The Nature of the Artist is Pure Good.

So the Artist wants to be completely known as Purely Good?

This is aptly stated, and correct.

Life is Good + only Good.

Life expresses Beauty.

All is Art.

So the Logic of the Art is Good Intention?

Goodness is the Logic of the Art, this is correct.

Life is Good + Goodness through-and-through.

So, to summarize: Experience is neutral, but Life uses it like paint to make Good Art.

Experience is neutral, and Life uses it like paint to make Good Art.

Yes.

NOTE: I note the change from ‘but’ to ‘and’. I like it.

We perceive this Art through filters of assumption that determine how we feel about the Art.

This is quite correct. These words are sound.

Amazing, thank you!

I’d like to ask if you might help to summarize the major points these metaphors convey?

I am the Angel of Imagination.

This request is welcomed.

We proceed:

Your life is intended to feel good.

Goodness is the Truth of all that is.

NOTE: This reminds me of the Angel of Beauty stating (in Session 14) that: Beauty is the only Truth there is.

Goodness is the only Truth there is.

Assume the Good.

Expect it.

Rest in Peace.

NOTE: Receiving these words, I can feel relief sweep through my body like a sigh.

You are constant generators of assumption.

(You imagine that which you expect-to-be.)

Life offers only cause for celebration.

Anticipate good outcomes.

They will be.

NOTE: I wonder for a moment at how fear plays into this. The Angel is explicit in response:

Worry is the Power of Assumption misdirected.

Worry is Assumption misapplied.

[Or:] Worry is your Power misapplied.

NOTE: I am reminded of a recent experience. Relaxing into sleep one night with Lara, I caught my mind hard at work on just what actions I might need to take if an intruder broke into our home. I imagined this from many different angles until finally discerning the mistake. Here, in my own perfect heaven, with my wife’s head resting soundly on my chest, I had become distracted by an altogether dissonant mirage. The imaginary world predicted danger; my reality was absolutely calm. Returning my attention to the gentleness + safety of our bed, the lesson landed: only I had been affected by the fearful visions I had entertained; at no point were they relevant, or true. Even more significantly: the moment I became aware of my own unproductive fabrications, I found heaven waiting patiently, unchanged.

NOTE: It is now August 7, 2025. I am reminded of a message we took note of on 8/5. (The message is a minor adaptation of a quote from Neville Goddard that has traveled with me now for many years.) The note says this: Imagination Is Seeing With the Eyes of God.

Angel of Imagination, is this true?

I am the Angel of Imagination. This is true.

The ideal use of Imagination is Thanksgiving.

The fulfillment of all things is guaranteed.

All resolves to Goodness in the end.

NOTE: This is a direct quote from the Angel of Light we met late last year (Session 11).

All resolves to Goodness in the end.

NOTE: I am reminded of an ancient Chinese parable called Sài Wēng Shī Mǎ (meaning roughly: The Old Man Lost His Horse). The parable recounts a series of alternatively difficult + wonderful events that happen to befall a ‘Righteous Man’. As onlookers respond to each unfolding circumstance as either ‘bad’ or ‘good’, the Old Man counters simply with: We’ll see. Something difficult happens; something wonderful happens; something difficult happens; something wonderful happens. Difficult or wonderful, the Old Man says the same: Who knows? We’ll see. I first encountered this old story in my early twenties, and have often found it helpful for maintaining my composure during moments of uncertainty or stress. But returning to it this time sheds new light. For the first time in my life, I can detect a pessimistic tone. Is it truly wisest to expect the worst in ‘good’ times just as readily as we expect the best when times are ‘bad’? I begin to wonder what the story might look like if we replaced ‘We’ll see’ with ‘Thank you’ in each case. Immediately, I can see how every Thank-you offered during challenging transitions would be deftly vindicated by the Good that follows freely every time. Additionally, I can see how Thank-you forms appropriate response to that same Good. In this form of the story, every incident is realized as a gift. And: in this form of the story, the fulfillment of each gift can be enjoyed. I am thoroughly amazed at how this minor shift has elevated the entire story: it expresses deeper wisdom, and is notably more honorable, too.

I Am the Angel of Imagination.

Please recount the story with this change.

Ok! I would love to. Here we go.

A Parable From the Angel of Imagination:

Once upon a time, there was a farmer who was known to be particularly wise. One day, his horse ran off for no apparent reason, which was no small issue for the family farm. Hearing of this incident, his neighbors offered sympathy for what they gravely labeled as ‘bad luck’. In every case, the farmer answered simply with: I know that this has happened for a reason. Something good will come of this. You’ll see. Some time later, the horse returned with several wild stallions in tow. The farm was rich in horses overnight! The farmer shared this news with many of his neighbors, saying: Did I not predict this? Life is Good! Together, they drank toasts to the unprecedented miracle it was. A few days later, while attempting to mount one of the unbroken stallions, the farmer’s son fell off + broke his leg. The neighbors came to offer their condolences for this ‘lamentable misfortune’, but the farmer once again replied: I know that this has happened for a reason. Something good will come of this. You’ll see. A few weeks later, military men arrived to conscript able-bodied members of the town. Both the farmer + his son were overlooked: the farmer due to age; the son because of his disabled leg. The neighbors who remained expressed amazement over this uncanny timing. They described it as a ‘mighty stroke of luck’. But the old farmer knew what his onlookers had forgotten, and proceeded to remind them, saying: Did I not predict this? Every incident emerges for a reason. Life is Good!

Every incident emerges for a reason.

Life is Good!

NOTE: The Angel’s quote is celebrating words we have discovered as a team.

The ideal use of Imagination is Thanksgiving.

The fulfillment of all things is guaranteed.

I can thank Life knowing that each moment benefits me in some way.

Every act contributes to the Ultimate Fulfillment of All Things.

Life seeds every moment with the Promise of Fulfillment.

[Or:] Life seeds every moment with the Promise of its Ultimate Fulfillment.

Every Seed so planted must produce.

IMPRESSION: A vast meadow, bursting with wildflowers. Distant colors melt into the sky.

NOTE: A song crescendos now to match the scene. It is called ‘Aloft’ by One Hundred Years.

Your life is the Holy Ground of an Eternal Garden.

Every act contributes to The Good.

NOTE: Amazingly, this is another direct quote from the Angel of Light (Session 11).

May I ask what benefit this Garden offers Life? What is its purpose?

The Purpose of this Garden is the Pleasure of Its Presence.

[Or:] The Purpose is the Pleasure of Its Presence.

It exists for the Enjoyment of the Art.

[Or:] You exist for the Enjoyment of the Art.

I am the Art.

You are.

My life is the Art.

It is.

Everything contributes to the Art.

Everything contributes to the Art.

IMPRESSION: As the Angel validates this lesson, it delivers an explicit image, too. Again, I see the bubble from before. This time, like the first time, the perspective is external. Only this time, there is color - every color you could possibly imagine! - like an iridescent marble in the sky. The sky is like black glass. The colors blend + sparkle. I’m in awe.

Every image is projected.

Life produces Good + Goodness all around.

There is nothing that defies the orchestration of that Goodness.

All resolves to Perfect Goodness in the end.

Life brings Good from all that happens.

No alternative example can exist.

All that happens happens for us.

All Is Well.

Angel of Imagination, I feel genuinely speechless in response to every word of what you’ve shared. Quite poetically, all I can think to offer is my thanks. Thank you for the treasure trove of wisdom you’ve provided. Thank you for the ally you have been.

I Am the Angel of Imagination.

We applaud your vision.

We are One.

NOTE: It is now August 11, 2025. A direct match to our Personal Day Signature catches my attention. It says this: Follow Thankful Feelings Into Action (194). I marvel at how flawlessly this statement summarizes what the Angel of Imagination has revealed. After more than two weeks since the start of this outstanding conversation, we proceed to draw the Session to a close.

Angel of Imagination, may I ask if you have any special messages for Lara at this time?

I Am the Angel of Imagination. Yes, we do.

Lara is the Iridescent Activating Angel.

Mistress of the Transcendental.

Author of a Visionary Peace.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a woman sculpting viscous, luminescent streams of color in the sky. The sky is fluid midnight, like a cosmic pool of glistening black ink. The light obeys her fingers. I’m in awe.

NOTE: There are times in life (and in these Angel Sessions) when a synchronistic incident immediately cancels any possible expression of my doubt. Like a thunderclap: lucidity descends. I am forced by sheer Perfection to admit that this is real - that Life is truly speaking - that I am not (and have never been) alone. Just such a thing has happened in this moment. It arrived as two distinct waves of surprise. (The first evoked a verbal exclamation, while the second shot me right out of my seat!) I will attempt to share the miracle in words.

NOTE: As I am composing the above impression, my attention is completely redirected to a song that has been building to a cinematic climax in the room. Glancing down at my phone, I am absolutely dumbstruck to see ‘Light in the Abyss’ by Pauli Hausmann (timestamp 1:35). We took note of this same song on Day One of this Session. What a thrill! Chills erupt in physical response. (But there was more to come of this surprise!) With the stunning song still spiraling around me, I unlock my phone to access Spotify. Instantly, my screen is filled from end-to-end with a dynamic background that accompanies this song within the app. (This is where I absolutely lose it.) There, in vibrant color, is the image of a woman. She is dreamily suspended in the glossy black infinity of space. She extends one hand into the cosmic dark. Flaring streams of white light issue vigorously from her open palm. Far off in the distance, an aurora blossoms vivid green + blue. (Chills sweep through my body in hot waves. I am stricken speechless by the view.)

NOTE: The Angel has delivered an electrifying match to the exact impression I have just received! Again, I must admit: I am in awe!

Angel of Imagination, thank you! Thank you for confirming this for Lara! She deserves to see herself in this. I feel humbled to convey the gift.

NOTE: It is now August 12, 2025. Our Mobile Oracle reveals another confirmation of the Angel’s recent messages for Lara. Set against a potent mobile canvas of Brick Red, two words are featured in a blistering White font of unequivocal all-caps. The words are ‘ACTIVATING ANGEL’ - and I cannot help but gasp when they appear.

NOTE: It is now August 13, 2025. We return again to meet the Angel.

Angel of Imagination, would you like to continue with your messages for Lara at this time?

I Am the Angel of Imagination. Yes.

We now proceed.

Lara is the Wonderworker.

Maven of the Night + Star of Day.

[Or:] Maven of the Midnight. Star of Day.

These words we extend on her behalf:

NOTE: The Angel’s words take hours to confirm. But here they are, exactly as received.

Daughter of the Centaurs: we invoke the Living Record of your Strength.

NOTE: I am immediately reminded of Lara’s long-term interest in the Centaurs, and can sense that this connects to what she knows. It becomes (at least initially) apparent that the ‘Centaurs’ here referred to are intended to remind her of the Solar System bodies she knows well. In particular, Chiron + Chariklo come to mind. Considered mythologically, these two were a distinguished married pair. Considered astrologically, these objects stand as counterpart expressions of the Wounded Healer story + its themes. (This archetype hits very close to home in terms of Strength.)

NOTE: Having shared these rudimentary connections, it is evident to me that more will be revealed in proper time. These will be for Lara to discern.

Picking up where we left off…

Daughter of the Centaurs: we invoke the Living Record of your Strength.

Stand in honor now before the Annals of your Story, and take heart!

Witness the Intelligence displayed.

We the Angels testify before you.

We the Angels validate your name.

We the Angels celebrate your Glory.

Daughter of the Centaurs, Ancient Flame.

IMPRESSION: With these words, my mind is flooded with a vision of the Angels formed in flawless rank + file. They are bowing in a gesture of respect. In fact, the word that comes to my mind is Devotion. (The Angels nod in unified response.)

NOTE: Attendant to this image is a song. The name of the song is ‘StarWaves’ by M83 + Joseph Trapanese. The timestamp when I notice it is ~2:30.

I Am the Angel of Imagination.

We parade in honor of your Strength.

Thank you for the stunning Demonstration.

Thank you for the Splendor of the view.

We exalt the Image of Perfection:

Radiant as ever within you.

NOTE: For the third time in this Session, ‘Light in the Abyss’ begins to play. Lara is the first to notice. (She has yet to read the Angel’s words.)

We offer now a Memory in closing:

Empowerment Is Fully Guaranteed.

IMPRESSION: The ‘Memory’ includes a vision, too. I am shown the image of a meadow. At center of the meadow is a mound. The mound is made of ashes + debris. The mound begins to quiver. A distinct shape starts to form beneath the ash. Standing now, the ashen silhouette presents the figure of a Phoenix. With a single beat of its enormous wings, the Phoenix rises - bursting forth from clouds of ash as it ascends. The Phoenix now emerges Lily-White. The Bird continues heavenward: Alive.

NOTE: This is the first time that we have ever seen (or even heard of) a White Phoenix. (And yet it feels familiar to me.)

Angel of Imagination, words fail to communicate the magnitude of my response to this. Thank you for the masterpiece you have prepared for Lara. Thank you for entrusting me to share it! It will be my honor to present.

NOTE: It is now August 17, 2025. The Day Signature today is 86, which corresponds to the Angel of Imagination (64). We continue now in our attempt to draw this Session to a close.

Angel of Imagination, may I ask if you have any special messages for me?

I Am the Angel of Imagination. Yes.

NOTE: The song playing as the Angel makes its introduction is called ‘Creating Worlds’ by Christoffer Franzen.

IMPRESSION: A golden sun begins to crest the crisp edge of a resolute horizon, casting shocks of liquid color to the scroll of an enthusiastic sky.

NOTE: A new song builds to a crescendo as I type. It is called ‘Spread Your Wings’ by Fox Sailor.

Sun of Glory, stand now at the zenith of your Knowing. And rejoice!

[Or:] Son of Glory, stand now at the zenith of your Knowing. And rejoice!

We the Angels venerate the opalescent Spectacle of You.

Gaze upon the vistas of your Triumph.

Celebrate the Memories conveyed!

NOTE: Another song evokes a wave of chills. It is called ‘Lost Horizons’ by Joseph William Morgan.

Bless the Orchestration of your Story.

NOTE: Alternatives to this line include: Bless the Hand that orchestrates your Story; Bless the Hand that animates your Story; Bless the Grace that orchestrates your Story; and Bless the Grace that animates your Story. It is obvious that the Angel is referring to the Hand of Grace which guarantees the Good of all that is. (The Angel nods.)

Bless the Orchestration of your Story.

Savor the Intelligence displayed.

NOTE: It is now August 20, 2025. The Day Signature today is 3, which represents the Prime Instinct to Imagine. A match to our Personal Day Signature (117) reads: Become the Living Prayer.

Angel of Imagination, are there any final statements you would like to add before we close?

I am the Angel of Imagination. Yes.

We invite your question for the written record. Ask it now.

NOTE: Immediately, I know that the Angel is referring to a question I’ve been quietly attempting to dismiss. (In spite of my best efforts, it remains.) The fact is that we have been navigating frightening health challenges since two days after this new Angel Session first began. Along the way, we have experienced three distinct emergencies, driven to five medical appointments, and adjusted necessary medicine nine times. We have eaten very little, and have gotten very little sleep. We have a sixth medical appointment coming up in just two days. As if to top it all off, a ‘routine’ car service earlier this morning cost us (just shy of) $1000 in unplanned expenses. Even as I sit to meet the Angel once again, my parents call to tell me that their truck has broken down (in spite of having just been serviced two short days ago) more than 3 hours from the nearest family aid, with travel trailer still attached - in soaring southern temperatures to boot. Needless to say, it has been quite difficult to mitigate the feeling that the odds are stacked against us (and the ones we love). The fact that all of this has coincided with the current Angel Session adds another layer of strangeness to the mix. As requested, I will ask the question I’ve withheld…

Angel of Imagination, how can you explain this?

I Am the Angel of Imagination.

We invite this question.

Listen well.

Every act contributes to the Benefit of All, without exception.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a web of infinite proportions. Any minor movement causes the entire web to come alive. A playful but descriptive phrase accompanies the image. It says simply: Wiggle the Web.

REFLECTION: It is immediately evident to me that Goodness is a promise that transcends (and yet includes) me. Whereas I have focused mostly on myself (or on my wife, or on my parents), Life is executing on a larger scale than I could ever hope to (fully) understand. The monumental scope of this astounds me. Every act contributes to the benefit of all, without exception. Life makes beneficial use of everything that happens. This Good is then perfectly distributed across the total ‘Web’. This Good touches Everything That Is.

IMPRESSION: I am reminded of the alchemical art of Transmutation, whereby common metals (such as lead) are magically converted into far more precious metals (such as gold).

IMPRESSION: I am reminded of the Japanese art of Kintsugi, whereby gold is used to mend a broken dish. Another term for this is Kintsukuroi, which means: golden repair.

NOTE: As I type this last impression, an impressive song crescendos in the room. It is called ‘Light Up the Sky’ by Dos Brains.

Every act equips you to progress in Love + Wisdom.

NOTE: As the words from this last line play out on repeat in my mind, I find myself subconsciously misquoting the last word. Over + over again, I hear the statement this way: Every act equips you to progress in Love + Wonder. Over + over again, I need to edit back to what the Angel actually said. Eventually, I receive instruction as to what I have (unknowingly) clued in on. First, the Angel validates that Wisdom is the proper word for the initial statement. Next, the Angel offers simply this: Love + Wisdom = Wonder. The Angel goes on to elucidate that Love devoid of Wisdom can in many cases tend toward heavy-heartedness; whereas Wisdom void of Love can be quite cold. (The word the Angel uses for Love-alone is Sacrifice; the word the Angel uses for Wisdom-alone is Neutrality.) Together, Love + Wisdom equal Wonder. Wonder is the natural result of Innocence + an Illuminated Mind. Taking this into consideration, a more suitable alternative for the Angel’s prior statement would be: Every act equips you to experience more Wonder. (I can sense the Angel nodding now.) This is true, and very well-presented, it affirms.

Every act anticipates Surprise.

NOTE: An equal alternative to this last line appears to be: Every act precipitates Surprise. Another equal alternative may be: Every act initiates Surprise. Three variations: anticipates; precipitates; initiates. Each of these three (in this case) means: to prepare the way. Or even: to predict. (Again, the Angel nods.)

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a brilliant red carpet being rolled out from the ground beneath my feet. There is never any question as to whether I will walk along the carpet, as prescribed. The word that this impression carries with it is: Inevitable. This is the Royal Way: each step an Act of Destiny, intact.

IMPRESSION: A long sequence of dominoes falls in perfect order. The impression is accompanied by a feeling of spontaneous amazement, and relief. (To be perfectly transparent, this impression has been practically relentless since the early phases of this Conversation. I am only now becoming truly conscious of the fact.)

REFLECTION: The vision of the dominoes presents a fresh perspective on the lesson illustrated by the Web. Each domino falls perfectly on-time into the next. This is what we can think of as a linear expression of the theme. In this example, the impact of each domino is 1-to-1 (1:1). Each domino affects the next in line. In the Web example, the impact is 1-to-Infinity (since every touch affects the Web in total, all at once). Both of these examples are completely true within their context. If we were to zoom out from our example of the Dominoes, we would perceive a stunning work of Art. Some portion of the Art would be composed of fallen dominoes; the larger portion would remain untouched. We would observe a spectacle of movement as the wave of falling dominoes advances unobstructed, just as planned. This visual is powerful because of what it points to, which is: Conscious Orchestration - the existence of an Architect - assurance of Intelligent Design. Of course the sight inspires our Amazement! Of course the image generates Surprise. Confronted with the Image of Perfection, we cannot help but experience Relief.

NOTE: It occurs to me now that, if this Session were to claim a sole impression as the emblem of its lessons, this example of the Dominoes would be the illustration it would choose. Connecting this to the fresh realization of its generous persistence since the first day of this Session, I feel absolutely humbled by the Gift.

NOTE: Returning to the top of what the Angel has delivered us (in words):

Every act contributes to the Benefit of All, without exception.

Every act equips you to progress in Love + Wisdom.

Every act anticipates Surprise.

NOTE: Again, the song ‘Light in the Abyss’ begins to play. Again, Lara is the one to notice (within the first few notes of the song). This is the fourth time it has appeared.

Every act articulates a Forecast.

Every Forecast must fulfill itself.

NOTE: Intuitively, I can sense that the Angel is using the word ‘Forecast’ as a synonym to Promise or Prediction. (Once again, the Angel nods assent.) An alternative to the statement, then, would be: Every act articulates a Promise. Every Promise must fulfill itself. (We met these exact words once before, in Session 9.)

Every act articulates a Promise.

Every Promise must fulfill itself.

The Promise is that every act contributes to The Good?

The Promise is that this (and every) act amounts to Good.

[Or:] The Promise is that this (and every) act resolves to Good.

Life guarantees the Good of All That Is, without exception.

No action can escape the Orchestrating Hand.

[Or:] No action can escape the Maker’s Hand.

NOTE: It is now August 21, 2025. Matches to the Day Signature include: Become the Living Thank-You; Virtue of Amazement; and Prayer.

Angel of Imagination, thank you for the unshakeable tone of your response. It is absolutely helpful; but can sometimes feel so risky to believe. What would you encourage us to do when we feel scared?

I Am the Angel of Imagination.

Rest in full assurance of The Good.

How are we to do this when afraid?

[Step 1:] Crown Yourself in Knowing.

[Step 2:] Pray Without Ceasing.

[Step 3:] Prepare to Be Amazed.

To Crown Myself in Knowing is to consciously admit that All Is Well?

Yes. This is correct.

Declare the Truth with Passion + Precision.

Fill yourself with awareness of the Truth.

[Or:] Fill yourself with knowledge of the Truth.

All Is Well; All Will Be Well; For Good.

Yes!

And to Pray Without Ceasing is to say Thank-You at all times, no matter what?

This is entirely correct. Yes.

To know that All Is Well produces Blessing.

To bless the world, you offer it your Love.

Thank you, I Love You.

Yes! Exactly.

And finally, I can Prepare to Be Amazed by attuning to the Miracle Life is?

This is an appropriate interpretation, Gentle Scribe. Yes.

Prepare to be amazed, because you will be.

Attend to that which profits.

See the Good.

And when I cannot seem to find the Good in what may be unfolding at the time?

Assume the Good.

Expect it.

Rest in Peace.

And what if things get worse instead of better?

Assume the Good.

Expect it.

Rest in Peace.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a person sleeping soundly on a comfortable bed. The feeling of the image is: Serene.

Imagination is the Dream.

Reality is Stable.

Rest in Peace.

IMPRESSION: Again, I see the iridescent marble from before. A viewer is suspended at its core. Again, the molten colors spark + blend. The sky is polished onyx. The sky appears to celebrate the light.

The Hand of Grace (eternally) preserves you.

Experience is Art.

[Or:] Experience is Safe.

Enjoy the Dream.

NOTE: It is now August 23, 2025. Today, a New Moon activates the Prime Instinct to Celebrate (Day Signature 6: Soulmates). We proceed.

Angel of Imagination, this has been more helpful than I have the words to say. We thank you for the blessing you have been. May I ask if there are any final words you’d like to offer us in closing?

I Am the Angel of Imagination. Yes.

Stand in knowing Triumph, Angel Scribes.

Daughter of the Centaurs: Rest in Peace.

Shining Son of Glory: Rest in Peace.

YOUR VICTORY IS WRITTEN.

Prepare to Be Amazed.

We Are in Love.

NOTE: A song crescendos with these closing words. The name of the song is ‘Rise Now Our Hero’ by Dan Thiessen + Hypersonic Music.

NOTE: A final song is added to the record as a mirror of the Angel’s closing mood. The name of the song is ‘Aloft’ by One Hundred Years.

ADDENDUM: On September 23, 2025 - exactly one month after the completion of this Session - we acknowledge inspiration to provide a candid update on the subject of disheartening events described in one of our preceding Session Notes (8/20, Line 313). Among these was a story about heavy car expenses that resulted from a single damaged tire causing us to buy another set of two. At the time, we left the dealership deflated. But less than one month later, we were in for an incredible surprise. Walking up to the vehicle on September 22, I took notice of a mismatch in the sizing of our tires + discovered that the new set was a different style from the other two. The dealership was quick to make it right. By the following morning, we were driving on a brand-new set of four upgraded tires without having spent a dollar more. Back home, the lesson landed with a thoroughness that’s hard to overstate. Our previous ‘misfortune’ was redeemed! What started as a worry had resolved itself into the promised Good. We now had four new tires at no extra cost to us - and just in time for winter driving, too! The Angel had instructed us: Prepare to Be Amazed. And so we had been. The fulfillment of all things is guaranteed.

title: SESSION 16 | Angel of Revelation (March 9 - May 9, 2026)
content:
NOTE: There are certain major findings that occur when one is open that can only be considered revelations. Such discoveries exceed the scope of current conscious logic + surprise the mental frameworks we’ve assumed. Perhaps more accurately: moments such as these explode the mental frameworks we’ve historically assumed - somehow replacing in an instant our established understanding with awareness we can’t possibly ignore. It is perhaps this element of complete surprise that stands out as a signature of authentic revelation. It is given as a grace; we are transformed. Examples of this in our own life must include the Angels we now meet with + The Liberated Tarot (that continues to expand itself through us). There have been other major revelations we have met along the way as well. In fact, the month leading up to the initiation of this Session was a wildly prolific one for us. We even spoke in terms of ‘revelation’ many times. What made this month of lead-in so impressive (from my own view) was the way in which each insight helped articulate the next - almost as if the whole progression had been planned. We have agreed to share a brief accounting of these findings for the record, as the subjects we encountered have been validated as this Angel’s gift.

NOTE: Beginning on February 10th (2026), we discovered a new frequency (The Metamorphosis). On February 11th, research into the structure of an Isogrid inspired a deep dive into the memory of Four Magical Virtues. This dissection yielded a geometry we never could have hoped for it to lead to: the tetrahedral figure we have cherished here in our home now for years. The unexpected relationship of the number four to the tetrahedral figure sparked a series of discoveries, in fact. On February 12th, we considered the relationship between an Octahedron + a Double Tetrahedron: finding our most valued symbol unavoidably connected to the structural conception of the Crystal Self. On February 15th, we discover this same tetrahedral figure represented by two angels at the entrance to the Garden of Eden, which yields two new frequencies by the next day (The Eden Star + The Lodestone). We spend February 23-25th applying everything we’ve learned to Crystal Self: emerging in the end with a brand-new conception of the Map (based on our Pinwheel). This inspires a resurgence of enthusiastic interest in the subject of our Pinwheel (mentioned in our 14th Session + discovered back in 2025), which I have wanted to depict in tactile form. I spend days exploring paper types + mediums before the final artwork is achieved. We frame our new homemade Pinwheel on March 8th.

NOTE: On the morning of March 9th (2026), our every-morning ritual delivers a surprise: the 33rd Angel of Revelation. We recognize its value right away. The Angel has invited us to meet. It takes some time to fully disentangle my excitement from a web of insecure objections, but by midday I am ready: we accept the invitation, willingly.

NOTE: The days that follow mirror to a great extent the weeks that first prepared us for this moment. Though we do not write a word until today (March 23), we live the revelations that proceed. On March 12th, the 33rd Angel reveals itself again to greet the day (via the Angel Oracle). That same day, we encounter a majestic flow of insights that we (later) name our Dragon Revelation. On March 13th + 15th, we receive our Dragons’ proper names (Petrichor, Safira, and Arctorius). On March 16th, I wake from a dream with crystal clear recall of words + numbers. The word TrineSine (in association with another word: TrineForm) leads us to multiple connections - very clearly pointing to the newfound Dragons (and relating to the Tetrahedron, too). On March 17th, we encounter the Triskelion: an extremely ancient symbol that relates (again) to dragons + embodies what the TrineSine represents. On March 18th, we dedicate the Pinwheel to an open spot of wall beside our bed. And finally, we catalogue this awesome suite of (private) revelations for the first time in a (public) written format, here, today (March 23, 2026).

NOTE: It is now March 24, 2026. A lengthy runway of administrative projects leaves far less time for this Session than I’d hoped.
