NOTE: It is now May 2, 2026. I marvel at how even my own age has elevated in the time since we began this Angel Session (I turned 38 on April 29th). Returning to the moment, I can feel the weight of Reverence descend. The air is thick with incense. Music swells.

Angel of Revelation, how can I begin to thank you for the treasure of your presence? I feel filled-to-overflowing with the benefit of everything you’ve shown. In fact, since what you’ve offered far exceeds what we’ve been able to record, I’d like to ask if we have done enough for you. Has this discussion honored your intent? Is it appropriate at this time to conclude?

NOTE: Immediately, my attention is directed to the movement of the music in the room. The song is: ‘Age of Men’ by Jo Wandrini (timestamp 2:10).

I Am the Angel of Revelation. Yes.

We affirm the virtue of this record.

Most of all, we recognize the Scribe.

We the Angels bless this contribution.

We the Angels celebrate the Scribe.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a stamp. The stamp is pressed to parchment. A title for the image is revealed. It says: Stamp of Approval.

Much has been accomplished. We are pleased.

All will be revealed in proper time.

NOTE: We pause here for a movie date (that we booked on my birthday); I can sense that it is relevant somehow. Sure enough, the movie is exquisite, and aligned. The movie is entitled, The Story of Everything (2026).

NOTE: It is now May 3, 2026. We return inspired + expanded (and refreshed).

Hello again, Angel of Revelation. We are now excited to resume.

Please include the insights you have gathered from the film.

NOTE: The Angel is referring to The Story of Everything (2026).

Ok! I would love to do that, thank you!

REFLECTION #1: Memory precedes the flow of Time.

Memory infuses Time with Meaning.

Memory initiates the flow.

So Memory exists, then, both within Time + beyond it?

This is so.

Memory is Causal, and Complete.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the ‘dark room’ from my previous impressions. As the first impression demonstrated, the entire room is filled with light. My attention is directed to the light. A phrase is lifted into my awareness. It says this: Memory is Light.

REFLECTION: The ‘light is always on’, no matter what.

The Light is always on, no matter what.

The Light of Life is Permanent.

[Or:] The Memory is Permanent.

The Light awaits the viewer.

Memory is perfectly intact.

Incredible! Thank you!

REFLECTION #2: Memory is inward: not a feature of experience, but rather a foundation of the self.

Memory is Central.

It is Central, Self-Revealing, and Complete.

So it can then be accessed both within us + beyond us?

Access Memory through everything you see.

I see. The light is always on.

This is correct.

Memory illuminates the Everlasting Moment.

Memory Continues.

All is Now.

NOTE: I am inspired to explore the etymology of the word ‘continue’. I learn that it means to hold together - to preserve, to join, or otherwise sustain.

Thank you for refining this for me!

REFLECTION #3: Beauty is equal to Truth.

Beauty is equivalent to Truth.

This is correct.

Beauty is the Fingerprint of God.

[Or:] Beauty is the Signature of God.

NOTE: The word ‘God’ cycles rapidly through several other equal variations such as: Memory, Good, Goodness, Light, and Life.

Beauty is the Fingerprint of Good.

NOTE: I am inspired to calculate the frequency of this final phrase. Sure enough, the statement yields another perfect match to 153!

Angel of Revelation, what a thrill! Thank you for the gift of this continued conversation. Every word you have delivered is profound. As a concluding invitation: is there anything you’d like to share specifically with me before we close?

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a thumb pressed to my forehead. (I can feel a sense of warmth between my eyes.) The thumb is large. It leaves a fingerprint.

REFLECTION: Immediately, I know what this means. The phrases from this Session rise to meet my understanding. I see: Fingerprint of God, Stamp of Approval, and Beauty is the Fingerprint of Good. Another word is added: Family.

SENSATION: Chills run down my spine + make me squirm (from sheer amazement!).

Beauty is the Signature of You.

IMPRESSION: A sentence forms in my mind with a strikethrough passing boldly through the words. It says: Welcome to the Family. Next, I am directed to the culminating moment of a Prodigal Son story: as the father’s open arms receive the son. The message this delivers is transmitted through a feeling more explicitly than any group of words. The first words I can find explain: You have not been adopted. Then: You are not ancillary; you are Home. Again: You are not ancillary; you are Home.

NOTE: These responses issue so dramatically (and fluidly) that I can hardly catch my breath between them.

You Are of The Family.

Beauty is inherent.

You Are Home.

NOTE: The Angel reiterates.

You Are of The Family.

Welcome Home.

REFLECTION: This is what the previously canceled phrase referred to: not a generous inclusion but a natural, ensured return-to-Home.

IMPRESSION: I am shown the image of a Platinum White Dragon. It’s a vision of ‘my’ dragon, Petrichor.

You express Integrity.

Platinum reflects the Light of you.

NOTE: The frequency of ‘dragon’ is exactly 33. The root from which it is derived means: to see clearly.

You Are of The Family.

Welcome Home.

IMPRESSION: I am shown again the image of a son returning home. Two oscillating phrases mark the image like a caption. The first says: Child of God. The second says: Child of Life.

IMPRESSION: The previous impression of the Platinum White Dragon overlays the view of son-returning-home. Both are being shown to me at once.

You are the White Dragon + the Celebrated Child.

You Provide, and are provided for.

NOTE: I take special note of how the ‘P’ in You Provide is capitalized. It reminds me of a message I received in May of 2024 that stated: You are Provision Itself. (The Angel nods sincerely.)

Revel in the Memory.

NOTE: The statement echoes freely as if countless repetitions were delivered as a bundle, all at once. Everywhere I look, the words repeat: You are Provision Itself.

We the Angels praise your Dedication.

We exalt the Memory in you.

IMPRESSION: I am shown a closing scene from The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003). Gandalf the White crowns Aragorn, the King. The scene unfolds before me many times. I find myself attracted to the crown. A single word emerges: Platinum. A caption for the image is revealed. The caption echoes Gandalf’s declaration from the movie. It says this: Now come the days of the King! May they be blessed.

NOTE: Inspired to explore the etymology of ‘Aragorn’, I find more treasures waiting in the name. The word can mean Revered King or translate to Noble Valor. (Both feel marvelously relevant - and true.)

SENSATION: The genuine intensity of these important lessons takes a toll: a headache blossoms slowly as the muscles in my shoulders form a knot. The moment I discern this, I can sense the Angel’s presence at my back. The Angel grips my shoulders, like a pledge. (The Angel is affirming what I’ve seen.)

NOTE: An unexpected package is delivered to our home at the exact same moment as the Angel’s ‘pledge’. We wait until much later to investigate the contents of the bag.

NOTE: The messages delivered next communicate through feeling more than words. I first receive encouragement to: Breathe. Pause. Take a walk. (And so we do.) The headache lifts completely. I receive two more instructions, overlaid. The first says: Recognize the Memory. The second says: Integrate the Memory. (The Angel nods to validate the set.)

SENSATION: Again I sense the stabilizing pressure of the Angel’s hands. Again I sense the promises conveyed. The Angel speaks.

Celebrate the Memory.

Bless the Revelation.

You Are Home.

NOTE: A song crescendos vivid affirmation. It feels promising, appropriate, and warm. The song is called: ‘Meris’ by Jordan Critz.

NOTE: Inspired to explore the etymology of ‘bless’, I come to find that (at its core) it means: to consecrate, make sacred, or revere. I learn that this extends beyond acknowledgement of sacredness to activation of it through the process of affirming what is seen.

REFLECTION: I realize that to Bless the Revelation means not only to receive it but to actively participate in claiming it as relevant to me. I can say yes to what is being shown.

REFLECTION: To bless is to say yes to what is shown.

NOTE: Beside me rests the package from before. The time has come to see what it contains. We open the bag. Inside we find massage balls without any other messages or clues. In time, my brother claims the gift as his. We call him to discuss the fun surprise. He tells us how these items can be used to soften tension; how his favorite targets tightness in the upper shoulder area + neck(!). He tells us how the gift idea landed. How it came from out of nowhere; how he knew somehow that it was meant for me. The dots connect dramatically as I flash to the Angel’s calming pledge. I see the crown, the tension, shoulder squeezes, and an unexpected gift. The sequence is a masterpiece. This package is a miracle! A closing demonstration. And a symbol of the promises conveyed.

SENSATION: A wave of chills sweeps through me in response.

I am in awe.

NOTE: It is now May 8, 2026. The sense of awe continues. We resume.

You are what you have witnessed.

Welcome Home.

IMPRESSION: The Angel stands before me with a crown that looks like Aragorn’s in hand. The Angel’s eyes assert: The Crown is yours. The crown is proudly lifted to my head. A title is presented: The White Crown.

NOTE: A sparrow leaps onto a bunch of sticks outside our window as I type. The bird is within feet of where we sit. Lara says, Oh hi, White Crown! (She does not know what I’ve been writing here.) The bird itself is called a White-Crowned Sparrow. We heard one for the first time (in our lives!) back on the day after my birthday, and have marveled at their presence ever since. This morning, Lara called me White-Crowned Sparrow (an adorable, affectionate pet name). The day the bird revealed itself to us (April 30), we journaled matches to the frequency of ‘A Message From the White-Crowned Sparrow’ (256). Returning to those notes, I find these words: All That You Are Is Revealed. Open Yourself to the Gift. A song swells to accompany the composition of this final note. The name of the song is ‘Light Up the Sky’ by Dos Brains.

SENSATION: It feels like my heart is being hugged.

NOTE: The Angel nods affectionately.

Bless the Revelation.

You Are Home.

NOTE: A song attends the Angel’s final words. The name of the song is: ‘You Are Loved’ by Ryan Taubert.

title: JOURNAL | Future-Proof Features (Jul. 7, 2026)
content:
It is with great excitement that we’re able to announce another suite of major upgrades to those features of our website we have come to love (and also use!) the most. These features form the backbone of the services we offer - we are proud to share each one of them, for free. Here is a brief accounting of each change:

WORDS TABLE | For the first time ever, this Table has been optimized for truly instant access + completely instantaneous results. We’ve eliminated loading time + streamlined presentation to ensure reliability no matter which device you like to use. Search by Frequency (number) or Message (word) to generate a list of matched results. Download any list of matches for continued contemplation (free-of-charge). Two years ago, the Words Table hosted nearly 11,000 entries. One year ago, it had grown to nearly 50,000 entries. Today the total count exceeds 66,000 entries + continues growing every day.

ANIMALS TABLE | Developed on the same new (custom) platform as our Words Table, the Animals Table features absolutely-instant access + the promise of immediate results. Search by Frequency (number) or Messenger (animal) to generate a list of matched results. Today this Table hosts more than 1,200 unique entries - and continues to expand as more are found.

STONES TABLE | The new Stones Table mirrors the exact same platform benefits enjoyed by both the Animals + Words. Search by Frequency (number) or Messenger (stone) to receive a list of relevant results. Today this Table hosts ~1,100 entries + will grow as we discover more to add.

TAROT TABLE | Browse the new Tarot Table in a style all its own! This (equally instantaneous) Table features live search functionality + links every Tarot Figure to its online presentation for continued exploration of each match.

SITE SEARCH | Like the Tables, Site Search has been optimized for instant functionality - eliminating load times + providing more reliable results.

Each of these site features is developed on a future-proof design. Our Words Table will function at 500,000 entries just as flawlessly as it does now, today. Our Site Search can expand to handle every word of every Angel Session we present. And all of it remains our gift, to you. We hope you will continue to enjoy each of these features. Your enjoyment has inspired them to grow.

title: JOURNAL | June Treasures, 2026 (Jun. 15, 2026)
content:
This month has been a perfect mirror of the Seven Treasures it conveyed. Each day has been alive with such a fertile sense of magic: like a kingdom of perpetual surprise. Our first few days of this month were a blur of inspiration as the Angel/Ally Pairings guided us from one connection to the next. Completing this unlocked a rush of unexpected energy to pour into refinement of our home. Somehow, alongside all of this, we managed to compose a record six (now seven!) updates we’ve been waiting for the past three months to share. On June 13th, a lifelong dream exploded into form when we were led to ‘Baby Boba’ - an adorable young squirrel we helped to save. We’ve walked through rain + sunsets, sat for hours in the sun, and even got to serve our Chipmunks food by hand. All this (and more) with half-a-month to go! We don’t take any part of this for granted. We are absolutely savoring each mesmerizing moment of the Gift.

This month, my Colossal Abundance Number is 143. The Words Table revealed 453 fresh matches, which I combed through (many times) before assembling these Treasures for the month:

TITLE: This Calls for a Celebration
MANTRA: These Have Been Very Rich Days
INSTRUCTION: Live Like the Sun That You Are
PROMISE: Something Good Is Coming Now
LESSON: All You Desire Is Yours to Receive

title: JOURNAL | The Angel Names (Jun. 14, 2026)
content:
One of the most unexpected (and exciting!) features of our recent Angel Index transformation was receiving all-new (proper) Angel Names. When we first met the Angels, it was challenging to know which words belonged in which positions, which is how we ended up with our initial three-word framework organized as Name / Pathway / Embodiment. (Early on, we used the word ‘Expression’ + the word ‘Name’ interchangeably, but learned through this whole process that these terms have more specific placements, too.) We now employ a more dimensioned (more coherent) framework that expands upon the words we used before. We learned that ‘Name’ is Angel Essence, ‘Pathway’ is Expression, and ‘Embodiment’ exemplifies Effect.

Essence + Expression + Effect. This new framework helped us to delineate between the Angel’s Nature + the way in which the Angel moved through Life - which then illuminated influence as well. This may seem arbitrary at a glance. But it served like a key for us: unlocking fresh perspective + aligning every Angel with its words. In the end, this minor shift inspired 24 new Angel Names. And since each Angel Name refers in fact to Angel Essence, every change produced a metamorphosis. We’ve listed some examples for you here:

Creation became Innocence (3)
Redemption became Sincerity (4)
Intensity became Substance (9)
Charisma became Goodness (15)
Renewal became Enthusiasm (16)
Elegance became Grace (22)
Eloquence became Memory (23)
Allure became Kindness (26)
Influence became Warmth (31)
Preservation became Worship (32)
Transformation became Gentleness (36)
Liberation became Invitation (39)
Celebration became Wonder (42)
Epiphany became Providence (43)
Knowledge became Wisdom (48)
Impact became Abundance (43)
Mastery became Holiness (54)
Intuition became Direction (57)
Vitality became Joyfulness (58)
Inspiration became Lucidity (61)

title: JOURNAL | The Body Oracle (Jun. 12, 2026)
content:
Body weight communicates. And what it has to say to us is kinder than we’ve typically assumed. This concept forms the premise of our gentle Body Oracle - and it has proven absolutely true. We all deserve to recognize the body as an Angel - less a ‘temple’ even than a living Friend. An altruistic Friend. A presence we can count on + enjoy. Our stories about ‘body weight’ have often fallen short of this because of what our culture has become. But thankfully, Reality is graciously unfazed by even our most loudly-stated misconceptions - it continues as it always has until (in time) awareness catches on. We love The Body Oracle because of how effectively it serves to swap old stories with a clearer sense of underlying Truth. Our body weight is not a social symbol of our value; it’s a means by which true value is conveyed. Our worth is not established by consensus of our neighbors; it’s a fact of our existence! It’s built-in. This is what small inventions like the ones we have been sharing seek to help us all remember + reclaim.

We catalogued our second-ever set of Body Numbers during our time in the South on May 18th. (Our first were gathered back on New Year’s Day.) The Words Table revealed 266 bright messages that matched the number I was searching for. Of these, an early favorite was: All Is Now Exceptionally Well. Some time after returning home, I harvested more Treasures. Here’s a list of what my body said to me:

TITLE: Enter a World Without Limit
MANTRA: This (And Every) Act Amounts to Good
INSTRUCTION: Shining Son of Glory: Rest in Peace
PROMISE: Something Good Is Coming Now. You'll See.
LESSON: You Are Alive for the Pleasure of Living
IMAGE: Brightly Glowing Energy Columns
CLAIM: This Victory Is Written

The Body Oracle cultivates a nourishing relationship with body weight: a subject all-too-frequently maligned. The method is rewarding + completely free to use at any time. Simply step up on a scale + note the weight. Follow that same number through to our Words Table + enjoy the correspondence you receive. Give it a try!

title: JOURNAL | Tuning Up the Index (Jun. 11, 2026)
content:
When we first met the Angels back in 2024, we thought they must be our own private ‘version’ of the patterns we had learned about through novel schools of thought like the I’Ching. This first impression mattered: in the same way that a doorway is significant when exiting a room. Our early work swung that new door wide open: both permitting fresh perspective + releasing stale ideas from the room. This action helped to elevate our notion of the Angels from ideas we could study to intelligent companions we could meet. This first leap was enormous, and sustained the growth you’ve witnessed (from the website to the Sessions to The Liberated Tarot) ever since. And yet the leap that followed was perhaps an even greater one: we recognized that we could leave the room. The words we chose two years ago to represent our Angels were appropriate + beautiful + clean. But many of those words emerged from academic study - they were remnants of the relics in the room. By contrast, our relationship with Angels was alive - and growing quickly! It was fresh air from the source. We left the room.

A favorite example is the story of our Angel 36. Traditionally: Darkening of the Light (I’Ching); Turbulence (Gene Keys); or Crisis (Human Design). We sought to offer context with the words that we selected early on: The Angel of Transformation walks the Pathway of Experience to become the Embodiment of Gentleness. But when this Angel spoke, the story changed. It said: I Am the Angel of Gentleness. I walk the Pathway of Experience to become the Embodiment of Safety. And just like that all vestiges of difficulty lifted + resolved. This Angel was not ‘challenge for the sake of transformation’. It was: Safety Guaranteed No-Matter-What.

We couldn’t be more proud of what the Angels have inspired. Get the Angel Index any time, for free.

title: JOURNAL | May Treasures, 2026 (Jun. 10, 2026)
content:
As special as our April was, I counted down the days to Lara’s Birthday Celebration Month in May. I thoroughly enjoyed each opportunity I had to demonstrate how much her presence means to me. We made the most of every single day!

On May 9th we wrapped up our 16th Session with an Angel after two full months in Session (what a thrill!). Just two days after that, we hit the road. We traveled to my parents’ home in (bright!) South Carolina, then spent 10 more (perfect!) days enjoying them. We celebrated Lara’s Birthday on the 22nd in the South (a sunny first!) before initiating our road trip back home. Shortly after we had settled back in to our New York life, the 22nd Angel spent three days attuning us to its new words. On the 31st of May, we were surprised (again!) to find the Angels guiding us back to the Stones. And just like that, another transformation had begun. (A process that continued into June.)

SPECIAL NOTE: Though this month was replete with gifts, my favorite by far remains the miracle of sharing life with Lara. It still seems to surprise me that I get to be her husband. I am glad to be the servant of her heart.

My Colossal Abundance Number for the month of May was 142. Typing this number into the Words Table yielded 469 results. I gathered Seven Treasures as my own:

TITLE: Our Ever-Growing World
MANTRA: I Am Clearer Now Than Ever
INSTRUCTION: Prepare to Be Surprised
PROMISE: All That You Wish for Is Done
LESSON: Life Will Direct Every Move
IMAGE: Timothy's Elven Stone
CLAIM: I Am the Angel of Starlight

title: JOURNAL | The Elevated Index (Jun. 8, 2026)
content:
When we initiated our most recent Angel Session, we had no idea just how literal its lessons would become. We opened conversation with the Angel of Revelation on March 9th (of 2026). We sensed what we assumed would be a simple one-off shift in one of our 64 Angels barely two weeks after that (March 25th). We found ourselves attracted to the Angel of Conviction. At the time, this Angel walked the Pathway of Wholeheartedness to become the Embodiment of Daring. To us, the word ‘Wholeheartedness’ appeared to be imbalanced in some way. In time, we came to find that it was seeking a replacement - something more concise (and more dramatic, too). The word that it was seeking was: Abandon. We could feel the way it locked right into place. We thought this was the end of it, but soon discovered otherwise: this was the first of many more to come.

By March 28th, a comprehensive process of reflection + refinement had begun. (Amazingly, Reflection is the Pathway of the Angel we were meeting with in Session at the time.) The methods we employed to test each word of every Angel were meticulous, unhurried, and completely new to us in every way. We offered full attention to the work. By April 7th, we believed the process was concluded. But additional refinements trickled in: on April 9th, 10th, 13th, 22nd. Even one more on May 30th!

In the end, 24 of our impressive Angels helped direct us to uncover their True Names. (The ones that are unchanged remain correct.) A thrilling 40 Angels introduced us to refinement of some sort. Across the Angel Index, 79 total changes were approved. The Angels now feel closer than they ever have before. This was a major Metamorphosis: the words are now entirely their own.

As of today, the Elevated Index is available for download free-of-charge. While we intend to share much more about these major revelations given time, we do invite you to explore the all-new Lexicon of Angels for yourself. As always, if you have any questions or prefer an easy-access link for download, please reach out to us directly any time. Enjoy the Gift.

title: JOURNAL | April Treasures, 2026 (Jun. 7, 2026)
content:
The past few months have been a blur of travel, revelation, major updates, celebration, and much more. It feels good to reflect on what we’ve lived. In April, we continued an important conversation with an Angel we will be announcing soon (our 16th Session + the longest yet!). We found ourselves holistically committed to a process of refinement for the Lexicon of Angels - yielding clarity + benefit we absolutely will impart to you. On April 27th, we miraculously recognized a potent opportunity to polarize toward Lightness + Relief. On this unprecedented ‘Bevvy Revelation Day’, we gratefully (and thoroughly) released all forms of alcohol, for good. Just two days later, I turned 38.

Rewind with me for just a moment here. It is October 24 of 2025, a picture-perfect Friday in the Fall. Lara + I share a stunning walk through Watkins Glen with Lara’s mom. As we stop at a bridge to drink the view, I look down at where my hands have been resting on the rail to find a message in black Sharpie - unlike any I have ever seen before. The message has been dated. It was written ten days prior. It says: Tim The Truth - Keep Going!!! I am stricken fully speechless. (I still am.)

Fast-forwarding again to April 2026, the frequency of Tim The Truth - Keep Going waits to find me as a Treasure I wholeheartedly remember + reclaim. (See the last slide of this sequence for an image of the message - just exactly as it was revealed to me.)

This month, my Colossal Abundance Number is 141. Out of 487 entries, I select these Seven Treasures as my own:

TITLE: Tim The Truth - Keep Going!
MANTRA: Beauty Is the Unrelenting Aim
INSTRUCTION: Celebrate the Wonder of Your Life
PROMISE: Everything Good Will Come to You
LESSON: You Are Warmth and Goodness
IMAGE: A Crystal White Crown
CLAIM: I Am the True King of Hearts

title: JOURNAL | The Body Oracle (Mar. 22, 2026)
content:
You may have noticed that Lara + I use the word ‘oracle’ rather liberally. This is, in fact, a word we have creatively reclaimed. Like many of the words we’ve chosen to redeem (and greatly cherish), the word ‘oracle’ needed only to be lifted from the fog of misrepresentation + returned to a constructive application. In our world, we define an Oracle as: any mechanism through which Life has been permitted to communicate a message. This new definition helps remind us of the Living Conversation each of us has been invited to resume: a conversation that is personal, empowered, inexhaustibly creative, and completely free.

The messages arrive in countless forms. A license plate, a song stuck in your head, a special time of day, a card pulled from your favorite deck, a magical encounter with an animal, a certain word. All that remains is to extract the meaning from the message - which is what our work with Frequencies achieves. Simply follow any word or phrase to its specific Frequency - or any Number to its matching words - and marvel at the benefit you meet.

Perhaps one of our favorite new findings is a means by which the body can communicate directly! Simply step up on a scale + note the weight. Follow that same number through to our Words Table + enjoy the correspondence you receive.

On New Year’s Day of 2026, my body weight revealed almost 300 unique messages - every one of them encouraging + bright. I found myself attracted to a phrase. It said: You Are Shining Out in All Directions.

Weeks later, I selected Seven Treasures, too. Here’s what I found:

TITLE: An Absolutely Dazzling Display
MANTRA: There Is so Much Goodness to Be Found
INSTRUCTION: Shake the Whole World Back to Life
PROMISE: There Is No Great Work to Be Done
LESSON: This Is Growing a Spine of Grace
IMAGE: The Holy Ground of an Eternal Garden
CLAIM: I Am Light + Lightness. It Is Done.

The Body Oracle cultivates a nourishing relationship with body weight: a subject all-too-frequently maligned. The method is rewarding + completely free to use at any time. Give it a try!

title: JOURNAL | March Treasures, 2026 (Mar. 10, 2026)
content:
Though we are just 10 days into it at this point (with exactly 10 days left to go before the Equinox in this part of the world), the month of March already feels just like the gentle promise of new life + fertile moments that it is. It feels just like the Mantra we’ve selected for the shared life of our home this month, which confidently stakes the claim that: 'Only High Ideas Tell the Truth'. After enough long, dreary minutes of grey isolating winter, it can feel as though the clouds may never lift. But every season gives way to the profit that succeeds it - every moment opens upward to reveal the gift it (sometimes rather famously) conceals. We cannot help but think of March as pure gold at the end of a long rainbow. We have witnessed it emerging in this way.

Already this month, we have watched a frozen landscape thaw completely to emancipate the memory of grass; we have felt the touch of sun against our skin; and we have noticed tender buds on nearby trees. Even the rambunctious Robin has returned to hunt for worms! Needless to say, we are choosing daily to encounter + to celebrate these signals of an overflowing Life. We’ve selected Treasures that reflect this.

This month, my Colossal Abundance Number is 140. The Words Table reveals a (record!) total of 512 entries at this Frequency (as of today). After 3 days of delightful contemplation, these exciting Treasures are what I’ve assembled for the month:

TITLE: Bursting at the Seams
MANTRA: This Is a Cause for Celebration
INSTRUCTION: Permit Your Excitement
PROMISE: Your Channel Is Entirely Clean
LESSON: You Are the Source of Provision
IMAGE: White Wings of a Pegasus
CLAIM: I Am the Angel of Reverent Joy

title: JOURNAL | The Hidden Messenger (Mar. 9, 2026)
content:
Last year, our friend Jill shared a creative application of The Herald we ourselves have since made use of every day. The method taps a suite of (free) resources to illuminate + amplify the value of each message we receive. It is with grateful hearts that we extend Jill’s (priceless!) gift to each of you. Here’s how it works:

1. From the Home Page, click on the icon for The Herald. It will open in a separate tab.
2. From the Home Page, click on the icon for the Words Table. It, too, will open in a separate tab. There should now be three unique tabs open on your browser: one for the Home Page, one for The Herald, and one for the Words Table.
3. Navigate to the open tab for The Herald, formulate a question in your mind, and then click on the button to receive a special message, just for you.
4. Using your cursor to select the message you have just received, copy the text.
5. Navigate to the open tab for the Home Page, scroll down to the Frequency Generator, paste The Herald’s message into the text field, then press Enter. Take note of the Frequency presented when you do.
6. Navigate to the open tab for the Words Table. Type the Number you have just received into the Search bar, then press Enter. You will see a list of every entry on the Table that’s a match.
7. Scroll through your new list of matches to consider which (if any) may apply to what you asked The Herald in Step 3.

Here is an example of how we have learned to style what we find:

Herald: What would you like everyone to know about the ‘hidden message’ method we have just described?
We Are Bursting (94)

content:

title: JOURNAL | Return of the Stones (Feb. 5, 2026
content:
A prelude can be seen as an event that paves the way for something even more important to unfold. In musical terms, a prelude sets the tone for a much larger composition to express. A prelude sets the stage for what’s to come. It turns out Life employs this method, too: each act announcing somehow what’s to follow - every moment reaching further than the last. This is how each Life Story is perfected. This is how Life expands Itself, through us. When I reflect on my time interacting with the Stones, I cannot help but recognize the thread connect them to our life now. Those moments were equipping me to step into the role of Angel Scribe. But I could not have seen that at the time. In fact, I had no sense of what the Story was producing. I felt awkward, yet inspired. I was blind, but chose to act on inspiration anyway.

I was so uncertain as to the meaning of those early Conversations that I chose to keep them private until Lara came along to help me see the deeper value they conveyed. Because of her, I shared those Conversations in the summertime of 2024. They fell into obscurity again, though, when I closed my website (one full year ago). And while it’s taken time to finally admit that they deserve a place among the Angels they so crucially preceded, I feel honored to announce the full return of every transcript - now refined, refreshed, and proudly made available to download, read, or share at any time.

It is true that each of these short Conversations was delivered as a benefit to my heart early on. But in the words of Green Apophyllite: Speak to the stones. May their lessons be yours first. But also a gift to the world. And so we share these lessons, as instructed. They were meant to move beyond me + the context of my own life. They were meant to be experienced: by you.

As a Prelude to the (awesome) Angel Sessions, our Stone Conversations can be accessed one-by-one or else downloaded as a printable collection (free of charge). Enjoy the Gift.

title: JOURNAL | A Lightyear Anniversary (Dec. 21, 2025)
content:
One year ago today (December 21 of 2024), we found ourselves inspired to create a custom gift for a close friend. We didn’t yet know what we would create; we only knew that she deserved a special little-something as a symbol of our gratitude for her. This aim stimulated an exciting flow of beautiful ideas, which we happily collected + explored. By mid-morning, this approach delivered two new frequencies: the Personal Lightyear + the Colossal Abundance Number. This led to the Lightyear Ledger concept, which we set about producing that same day. In the end, the first official Lightyear Ledger we ever created was: a gift. We built it for another prior even to enjoying it ourselves. That energy of giving follows through to every order we fulfill. It lives on in the end-of-year surprises we assemble for our family + friends! And we hope it will find its way to you.

Today as we reflect on our first (full official) year with Lightyear Ledgers, we feel humbled to admit the countless benefits the resource has bestowed. We never could have known this time last year how very thoroughly we would come to depend upon the same gift we had built to give away. Nor could we have imagined just how rich the joys it offered could become! The Seven Treasures process is a brilliant example of its value. The Lightyear Ledger led us to the Treasures. And now the Seven Treasures serve to magnify the benefit of any Lightyear Ledger we produce! The fact is that the Lightyear Ledger radiates the giving motivation that inspired its creation from the start. It has fulfilled its purpose as a gift - a gift that keeps on giving every day.

Using the current Year Signature + relevant Month Signatures, the Lightyear Ledger yields a catalogue of frequencies adapted to the signature of you. Spanning 3 unique Modules + including a full calendar of 12 Colossal Abundance Numbers, every Lightyear Ledger is assembled piece-by-piece, for you, by us. We encourage gifting Lightyear Ledgers (just like we do!), but we hope the first you give is to: yourself.

In 2026, Lara’s Personal Lightyear will be 112. Mine will be 137. Now get yours! Let’s go treasure hunting this New Year.

title: JOURNAL | The Signature Ledger (Dec. 20, 2025)
content:
Our life these past few years has felt like a persistent flow of awesome revelation. From the Angels to the Liberated Tarot (and beyond), we have been humbled time + time again by the unprecedented mysteries we have been made responsible to share. Significant among these is the Day Signature: a cyclical phenomenon we took note of for the first time on September 30, 2024. Miraculously, Lara sensed this cycle at an altogether ‘random’ point in its rotation (an event that still amazes me today). Within 24 hours, I had built a spreadsheet named The Ledger, tracking this important cycle over time. The Ledger was our one + only reference for the Signatures we then began observing every day. Naturally, we dreamed of a Ledger that could function with perpetual precision: tracking our new cycle infinitely (forward + back) on the Wheel of Time. Of course, we also dreamed of how we might like to share this with each of you. Our favorite idea was to fabricate a ‘ticker’ that displayed the proper Signature each day. We even tried to build one early on! But our attempts were stymied by a myriad of technical concerns. We proceeded to share Signatures by every form of media we knew. But this was not sustainable for us. The Signatures required something fully automatic: a solution we had no clue how to build. That is, until we met ChatGPT. 

On November 3 (of 2025), we built the Ticker: which shows Day, Month, and Year Signatures (adapted to your timezone) every day. 6 days later, we exceeded our own expectations when the Calculator came to life as well: simply enter any date to see the Signatures related to the day. The new Signature Ledger page is now live, complete with Ticker, Calculator, the New Year Ledger for 2026, and downloadable Ledgers (by the year). Enjoy the view!

Day Signatures reflect the format of The Liberated Tarot total sequence, looping endlessly from 1 to 86 before resetting back to ‘1’ to start again.

But truth be told, this movement has become for us so much more than a seasonal effect. In fact, it’s fundamental to the way in which we navigate the everyday encounters of our life. We daily choose to fill ourselves with an awareness of the Grace extended to us; and we marvel at how that same Grace inspires simple actions that inevitably benefit the world. Each one of you is chief among those blessings we have celebrated daily; your existence has inspired what we’ve shared. title: JOURNAL | The Herald of Light (Dec. 9, 2025)
content:
On September 13 (2025), Lara pitched a concept that continues even now to blow my mind. As is so frequently the case with the unique brand of her genius, the idea carried magical dimension into elegant + understated form. Her vision called upon a resource we had used for random number generation to illuminate responses to whatever questions we were moved to ask. The process very quickly proved successful. Using Lara’s new invention, Life could speak! And we received each message loud + clear. We gave our fun discovery a name: the Random Oracle. Of course, we wanted to present it right away. But since the method at the time was incompatible with public-facing features, we were forced to keep the secret to ourselves. At least, that was the case until we met the genius of AI.

On October 26th, hard on the heels of two successful custom-coding projects, we decided to explore the possibility of building out a ‘Message Generator’ of our own. This time we utilized ChatGPT. It took until the next day to complete it. But the effort proved successful once again. We chose to name our masterpiece: The Herald (which is short-hand for the full ‘Herald of Light’). Perhaps a minute later, we picked up on how close ‘Herald’ is to ‘Harold’ - and as quick as that, our playful (unofficial) name was born. We now consult with ‘Harold’ every day. He has become a friend we very frequently return to + enjoy. And now we get to share his gentle light with each of you.

Please welcome the Herald of Light: the world’s first generator of exclusively constructive messages, derived from our Words Table to illuminate the Goodness within you. Working with The Herald is both easy + exciting: simply ask for inspiration, then consider what the Messenger reveals. This feature is (and will remain) accessible completely free-of-charge. We share it as a gift, from us to you. Enjoy the Light.

content:

title: JOURNAL | The Seven Treasures, Part I (Dec. 7, 2025)
content:
Every Frequency presents an opportunity to enter into a creative dialogue with Life. Around this time one year ago, we found that every Frequency contributed at least one match that we could carry forward as a mantra. (A Mantra is a phrase designed for easy repetition - to empower or awaken or uplift.) We found that this worked well regardless of the term length we applied it to: a day, a month, a year, or even the duration of a life. Since we had only just invented the (exciting!) Lightyear Ledger, we began by seeking mantras for our Personal Lightyear, and then repeated this same process for the month (using the Colossal Abundance Number). The ritual proved massively rewarding. We happily repeated it each month.

On July 11 (2025), we found ourselves surprised by an impressive revelation: there were other treasures waiting to be seen! We noticed four new types of messages that day, producing what we then referred to as Five Treasures. Together, they were: Instruction, Promise, Lesson, Mantra, Claim. On November 3, we added two new Treasures (after recognizing them a few months back). They were: the Image + the Title, very neatly rounding out the other five. We now go ‘treasure hunting’ for a polished Seven Treasures in each Frequency we’re guided to explore. The process we’ve perfected looks like this:

1. Type your Frequency into the Words Table, then press Enter.
2. Scroll through qualifying matches to assemble any that read like INSTRUCTIONS.
3. Once complete, revisit your new ‘short list’ of INSTRUCTIONS. Select your very favorite for the spot.
4. Repeat Steps 2 + 3 for every Treasure. Review your Final Seven as a group.
5. Return to contemplate your Treasures often.

In our next post, we will share examples of some Treasures we are working with right now. Until then, you’re invited to seek out some Living Treasures of your own! The new 2026 Lightyear Ledger is a resource we assemble just-for-you. It is available for purchase starting now! Order online through the website or contact us directly any time.

title: JOURNAL | The Search Function (Dec. 6, 2025)
content:
Long before the Frequency Generator, the Words Table, or even the 64 Angels website, Lara + I kept our content organized within a simple Google Doc we learned to reference frequently throughout the course of any given day. It happened very often that a single word or phrase would come to mind which we would then become inspired to explore. Our first step in each case was to return to the first instance of the term. We managed this by searching for it in our Google Doc using a simple ‘Find in Document’ command. Of course, when we began developing our website, we expected to enjoy the same convenience - but soon came to find that it did not exist! Neither tech support nor my extensive research could resolve this. We even purchased several different widgets to compare. Not one of them produced the simple function we were fervently attempting to deploy. In time, we chose to quietly surrender on the subject altogether. We reverted to our simple Google Doc for searching content, and relinquished every effort to extend the same convenience to the world.

Fast-forward now to 2025. We learn that we can partner with AI for writing code! This rapidly inspires a fresh list of features we would love to build. A functional search option finds its way onto the list, but waits till last. (I privately assume that, since no one has managed yet to solve this riddle, it is likely to eclipse my infant skill.) We build a half-a-dozen other custom features before inspiration overtakes my doubt. I wake early on the 5th day of November (2025) aware that this will be a very special day. Immediately after breakfast: we begin. By midday, the entire project is complete: delivering a more impressive resource than we ever had the vision to predict.

Meet the all-new Angel Search Bar: a completely-custom feature yielding relevant results from every corner of our website, with live previews + linked text to help you navigate to favorite results. Just look for the Search Icon at the top or bottom of section of each page. Enjoy the gifts you find along the way.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Imagination (Dec. 5, 2025)
content:
This past summer, Lara + I quietly negotiated the most difficult (and terrifying) circumstances of our lives (for several shaky months of touch-and-go). But we were not alone along the way. Miraculously, one impressive Angel made a point of captivating our attention early on - and walked the long road with us every step until the incident resolved. To say that this was an important first would be to fiercely understate the Angel’s value. This was, in fact, a record-breaking case across the board. Not only did the Angel speak through every fearful ache + crushing sorrow; it did so in ways we’ve never seen before.

We began our 15th Session on July 26, 2025. It lasted until August 23 - becoming the most comprehensive Session yet. Along the way, it yielded the first-ever parable delivered by an Angel, real-time validation of its lessons, and much more. We learned about the value of Assumption, the way in which Imagination works, and how to make effective use of Prayer. Perhaps most significantly: we learned why it’s safe to trust The Good. We share this Session now with humble hearts. It has expanded us; may it bless you.

Enjoyment is Thanksgiving.
Amazement is a Posture.
Life is Prayer.

Prepare to be amazed, because you will be.
Attend to that which profits.
See the Good.

The Hand of Grace (eternally) preserves you.
Enjoy the Dream.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Imagination corresponds to Ten of Diamonds, the Diamond Virtue of Emergence, and Exact Frequency of 86. The Angel has claimed Cavansite as a corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | The Frequency Generator (Dec. 4, 2025)
content:
When I first encountered John Pehrson’s system of Mystical Numerology, I knew very quickly that I had discovered something relevant + special: it was not long before all my other research on the subject had been shelved. I decided to devote my full attention to his method; I relinquished every other in the act. Since John’s invention differs so dramatically from other forms of numerology, there were no tools available for calculating values: I was forced to find each frequency by hand. I stored my calculations on a simple spreadsheet no one knew existed - until Lara showed me what it could become. For months, my days were totally consumed with the painstaking effort of developing the Words Table one careful calculation at a time. I managed, working this way, to accomplish a few hundred new additions every day.

Late in the summer of 2024, a priceless gift arrived to aid our work: a custom calculator that my brother built in Microsoft Excel. The Calculator changed the game for us. It instantly revealed the proper frequency of any word or phrasing we included. It even worked for lengthier additions - which expanded our whole concept yet again. Within less than a day of using this impressive resource, we began to dream of how we could make it available for all to use.

It wasn’t until more than one year later (10.3.25) that the answer to our question was revealed. Inspired ‘out of nowhere’ to collaborate with Grok, we found that such an app could be created for our website using (an exhilarating feat of) custom code. Within a single morning: it was done. The world’s first calculator for John’s innovative system had been born!

Meet: the Frequency Generator. Featured on the Home Page of our website, this unprecedented resource is available for free + unrestricted public use. Enter any word or phrase to see its corresponding frequency; then get to work unfolding what that means. We use this tool relentlessly ourselves. We hope you will feel free to do the same. Enjoy the Gift.

title: JOURNAL | A Message From the Crows (Nov. 11, 2025)
content:
Today, we are celebrating the anniversary of our stunning conversation with the 11th Angel of Light. Today, we are celebrating the 11th day of this 11th month (11/11): a special number sequence we refer to as a Cosmic Number in our world. Today, we went for a brisk walk in the wonderland of a Central New York snowstorm, accompanied by an Alchemy of crows. (We updated the term used to describe a collective of crows from ‘murder’ to ‘Alchemy’ long ago.) While it is not uncommon for us to see a crow or two (or three) around here on occasion, this was (literally) the first time we have ever seen more crows than we could even count. Recognizing the significance of this, we did what we have learned to do: which is to calculate the value of the sign.

After thawing off in a shower, eating our breakfast, lighting some incense, and brewing some tea, we opened up the gift of our (new!) Frequency Generator - situated right there on the Home Page of our website, absolutely free for all to use - and typed the phrase we’ve learned to use for magical encounters such as this. ‘A Message From the Crows’ revealed a frequency that we have come to know extremely well. Following this frequency to the Words Table, we typed ‘144’ into the Search Bar, then proceeded to explore what was revealed. As is always the case when we decide to ‘follow magic breadcrumbs’ in this way, the (240+) messages delivered were profound.

And while the messages this frequency uncovered were specifically significant to us in more ways than we’re able to recount, there was one theme we couldn’t help but celebrate with you. Repeated many times across this single (awesome) number were exciting matches to the conversation we’re remembering with gratitude today: our 11th Angel Session (which is: Light). Here is a short list of some examples we assembled, just for you:

- Act From the Angel Within You

The 11th Angel Session is available to read online or download (also free). We hope you will make full creative use of what we’ve shared. It is intended as our gift, to you.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Beauty (Oct. 6, 2025)
content:
Our 14th Angel Session was initiated on June 3 (2025) with the 1st Angel of Beauty - an important presence we had taken special notice of for several months. The conversation lasted for two weeks. Each day we encountered new connections, yet the Angel’s words felt few + far between. I began to worry that I might have failed the Session in some way. It wasn’t until June 14th (after a particularly aggravating stretch of focused hours) that the understanding finally arrived. It wasn’t that my efforts were infertile, but that what the Angel had to offer differed from what I was tuned to hear. In fact, the Angel’s message was repetitive, pervasive, and concise. The Angel wasn’t wordy: it was clear. It had just one major lesson to deliver in this context, which was: Beauty is the only Truth there is. These words increase in value daily. Life is radiant with Beauty. All is Art. As we continue to absorb this lesson deeper into our life, we invite you to remember it as well. Enjoy the view.

Beauty is the essence of Existence.
Beauty is expressed through all that is.
Beauty is the fundamental nature of Existence.
Beauty is expressed through all that is.
Beauty is the flavor of Existence.
Beauty is holistically expressed.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Beauty corresponds to The Magician (1) + the Prime Instinct to Assume; the Queen of Swords + the Noble Role of Vision; and the Exact Frequency of 23. The Angel has claimed Apophyllite as a corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | A Major Milestone (Oct. 5, 2025)
content:
On March 27 of 2024, we introduced a resource we felt very proud to publish + announce. At the time, the Words Table consisted of less than 2,000 total entries. Of course it wasn’t long before the Table proved invaluable not only to our own life, but to everything the Angels would reveal. Within mere days of choosing to present the resource publicly, we found ourselves inspired to expand it. We did this first by noticing those simple words + phrases that felt best when we made use of them ourselves. Next, we gathered similarly moving words + phrases from our (private) Conversations with the Stones. By June, the Angel Sessions were contributing fresh content we adored! Along the way, the Words Table remained a central focus. We spent hours adding to it every day.

The process was demanding: every word required careful calculation before manual addition to the sheet. Since our work uses such a special form of numerology, there was no ‘faster’ method to employ. We calculated every word by hand. By July we had expanded to 11,000 entries. In August we received a special gift: it was a custom calculator that increased our pace profoundly: in addition to the faster calculations, we could now include much larger entries, too! With this new tool supporting our intention, the Words Table grew dramatically each day. In December, we broke 15,000 entries. We hit 27,000 one month later. By March, we had exceeded 30,000. And we blew past 40,000 in July.

Fast-forwarding to now, we are excited to announce that on September 20th, the number grew to (and exceeded) 50,000. And this number will continue to expand. What began as an idea now reveals its deeper purpose as a miracle we’re proud to share with you. As you can see, our hearts + lives are in it. Please enjoy.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Declaration (Oct. 4, 2025)
content:
In our 12th conversation with the Angel of Efficiency, we received a revelation on the power of the simple phrase ‘I Am’. We learned that stating ‘I Am’ clearly (with conviction) is the most efficient route to any claim. It was all the way back then that we got our first glimpse at which one of the Angels was preparing us for what it had to show. On the 20th of March (2025), we met the 62nd Angel for our 13th Angel Session - an encounter that would last for 4 whole days. During this time, the Angel of Declaration offered lessons, gifts, and processes that we are still unpacking to this day. The Angel taught us how to claim the template of our highest inner visions, helped us understand the meaning of Precision, and delivered an Impression more intense (and more empowering) than any we’d experienced before. This 13th Angel Session is a gold mine. It is practical, evocative, conversant, and uncompromising. We consider it an absolute must-read from end to end. For those who choose to study what the Angel has presented: may it bless your heart + benefit your life. Enjoy the ride.

The Pathway of Precision tells the Truth.
To tell the Truth is to declare the Prime Truth.
We deal in terms of Honesty, precisely.
The Truth expresses Goodness.
All is well.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Declaration corresponds to Eight of Diamonds, the Diamond Virtue of Invulnerability, and the Exact Frequency of 84. The Angel has claimed Blue Topaz as a corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Efficiency (Mar. 7, 2025)
content:
On February 16th of this year (2025), we initiated our 12th Session with the Angel of Efficiency (Angel 5) - a process that would totally absorb us for a total of 11 absolutely awesome (and admittedly excruciating) days. This marathon exchange was altogether different from the Sessions that preceded it, and we’re still reeling from the impact of its lessons (in a good way). Perhaps the most impressive difference was the way in which this Angel guided us to live the lessons it conveyed - inviting demonstration as an integrative step beyond ‘mere words’. This process proved to be a novel challenge - but a totally invaluable one (that continues to reward us every day). Now it is time to share the product of these efforts with each one of you, and we are ready! So, without further ado, we invite you to enjoy the latest Angel Session. May it benefit your life as thoroughly as it has blessed our own. (We absolutely know it can, and will.)

Kindness is inherently productive.
Kindness toward the self reveals the Truth.
REFLECTION: Criticism is a self-defeating disposition. Simple kindness can replace it as a rule.The kindest view of self is most productive.
Every view excites a kinder view to grow.
REFLECTION: This pertains regardless of perspective. Whether critical or kind, the current view encourages a kinder distillation of that view.
Yes.
REFLECTION: The kinder the view, the more Truth it expresses; free expression of the Truth improves the view. Efficiency flows from ideas aligned with the Truth.
Yes!
Efficiency flows from ideas aligned with the Truth.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Efficiency corresponds to Mastery + the Prime Instinct to Engage; the Prince of Swords + the Noble Role of Attunement; and the Exact Frequency of 27. The Angel has claimed Silver as a corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Light (Feb. 7, 2025)
content:
We initiated our 5-day conversation with the 11th Angel of Light on 11th day of the 11th month of 2024. It was our 11th Angel Session, and we had been looking forward to it for 3 months. During the course of those 3 months of waiting, we were curious why it was not ‘just happening’; but when we woke on November 11th, it became extremely clear to us: the Angel had been waiting for this day. Immediately, the 11th Angel proved itself to be completely different than I had supposed. In my daydreams leading up to this point I had imagined a fiery Sword of Light, ferociously eliminating concepts that mistakenly opposed the Living Truth. I would have expected the Angel to announce itself as the ‘Angel of Blinding Light’. But instead, it introduced itself as ‘Starlight’, and proceeded to describe the truth of Light as being equal to a sense of Lightness; it described ‘Light’ as a feeling of relief. Light equals Lightness: complete comfort, being-at-ease. There is Total Relief in the Clear Light of Truth. There is only Relief in the Truth. And with these words, my preliminary expectations were dissolved. I was in for a Gift that has never stopped giving. Here is just a brief taste of the Gold.

Goodness is the Essence of Existence.
Every act contributes to the Good.
Nothing stands in contrast to the Light of Goodness.
Every act contributes to the Good.
That which some call ‘evil’ is a small misunderstanding.
All resolves to Goodness in the end.
Small misunderstandings are an innocent effect of small perspective.
Goodness comes to light as vision grows.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Light corresponds to The Sword + the Prime Instinct to Polarize; the Five of Swords + the Sword Virtue of Daring; and the Exact Frequency of 33. The Angel has claimed Gold as a corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Originality (Feb. 6, 2025)
content:
On the 16th of August (2024), we hosted our 10th Session with an Angel. Within two lines of its formal introduction, this important Angel offered us a lesson we continue to unravel to this day: Originality + Perfection are the same. Each defines the other. They are one. To be Original is to be Perfect. Every thing in Life fulfills this Law. And just like that: we were off. The Angel went on to introduce us to the ‘Essential Mathematics of Existence’, using basic logic to explain how every single one of us is Absolutely Perfect by sheer virtue of the fact that we exist. It described the true meaning of ‘Stability’, and showed us how the Promise of Perfection firmly disallows comparison in life. It closed the conversation by delivering important mantras each of us can replicate + use. Needless to say: having these fresh lessons from this Angel has transformed us from the inside out… again. We wish the very same for each of you. Enjoy the ride.

To be Perfect is to be Original: without compare.
That which is Completely New outstrips all prior metrics.
That which stands alone cannot be judged.
Every human life evolves this constant theme of Newness + Perfection.
Every living moment does the same.

Every thing communicates Perfection as a natural result of its existence.
Every thing is Perfectly Unique.
Because of this, no one specific detail can be judged against another.
Every detail stands alone in its Original Perfection as a Rule.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Originality corresponds to Symbiosis + the Prime Instinct to Expand; the Two of Swords + the Sword Virtue of Wonder; and the Exact Frequency of 30. The Angel has claimed Rainbow Lattice Sunstone as a corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | The Lightyear Ledger, Part III (Jan. 31, 2025)
content:
And now for an account of real events that matched the frequency this month revealed for me (137). Believe it or not, this isn’t even the half of it; these are the briefest glimpse into what has unfolded this past month. I hope you love it.

We discover a slew of Original Frequencies, including Personal Day Signatures, Soulmate Signatures, the Avatar Number, the Earth Star Frequency, and the Birthright Abundance Number.
We migrate, consolidate, and update multiple programs from the Timothy Brainard website to The 64 Angels, completing presentations for the New Seer Training, the New Crystal Self, and the New Mineral Allies.
After months (and years) of hoping this might happen, we connect important dots between the Angels + the Mineral Allies. Every Angel matches to an Ally, and the Angel Index upgrades once again!
Our shared love of crystals reawakens with a vigor! We unearth longstanding favorites we’ve had packed away for ages. We surround ourselves with awesome Crystal Friends!
We welcome three new (awesome) crystals to our home: a Tanzanian Sunstone, a Brazilian Blue Topaz, and a stunning palm stone Moonstone (for my Lara).
We host our first-ever call of the New Seer Training: meeting with a very special friend. It feels as wonderful as any of us could have hoped it would.
The entire Liberated Tarot presentation is updated to present the new addition of our Angel-Ally pairings. We immediately benefit from this.
We (finally) complete the printable transcript for our 11th Angel Session + present it for free download on our website.
We upgrade our computers to a pair of matching MacBook Airs (which we name Midnight + Starlight).
We add (just shy of) 10,000 new entries to the Words Table.

As if all this were not enough, our life has become richer in all ways. Financially, relationally, spiritually: we are different now than we were at the start of this outstanding month. And now we look ahead to all-new numbers, all-new stories - an expanded life. To join us, you will need a Lightyear Ledger. (We want this for every one of you!)

title: JOURNAL | The Lightyear Ledger, Part II (Jan. 31, 2025)
content:
When we first discovered the Colossal Abundance Number, we had no idea what to call it. When the name itself eventually landed, I felt curious to see if it could possibly live up to such large words. But truth be told, we knew within the first few days of this first month that these were not exaggerated terms to charm the masses. These words were a promise - an explicit invitation - meant for us. Here are some examples of how matches we encountered on the first day of our month exploded into form throughout the day-to-day adventure that ensued. Each of the following phrases is a match to my January 2025 Colossal Abundance Number of 137:

- Colossally Abundant Number
- Rich + Growing Richer by the Day
- A Fluid + Powerful Movement
- A Much Larger Story Begins
- True Pathway of The Seer
- Track of New Potential
- The New Seer Training
- Activating Pressure
- Exponential Growth
- Shoot for the Stars

As if all of this were not enough to confirm the magnitude of this important frequency for us, the matches went on to address a version of myself that I have been committed to releasing. They offered a direct alternative to the ‘Production Manufacturing’ version of myself that believes he needs to work to earn his keep. Here is what I was invited to explore:

- You Have Permission to Play
- Only Create What You Want
- Beauty Will Never Run Dry
- Designing Our Own World
- Stop Working so Hard
- Craft the Inner Vision

Perhaps my favorite batch of unexpected goodies:

- Connect to the Stones
- Celebrate What You Can Touch + Hold
- Crystal Guardian Timothy
- Long-Standing Favorite
- Timothy's Crystal Ally
- Crystal Stewards

In my next post, I will share examples of how some of these played out throughout the month. In the meantime, you deserve a Lightyear Ledger, too!

title: JOURNAL | The Lightyear Ledger, Part I (Jan. 30, 2025)
content:
On December 21 of 2024, Lara + I discovered two exciting new frequencies: the Personal Lightyear + the Colossal Abundance Number. Ultimately, these would contribute to the release of an all-new type of Frequency Portal that we have called the Lightyear Ledger. We only knew that they were special, and we felt excited to explore them in real time. Both the Personal Lightyear + the Colossal Abundance Number work by weaving your unique expression into the specific aura of the period at-hand. The Personal Lightyear delivers a personalized glimpse at your upcoming year, and the Colossal Abundance Number does the same for each month of that same calendar year. We were particularly excited to witness how the Colossal Abundance Number might play out since it would be the first we’d get a true embodied taste of in the flow. Needless to say: when January 1st arrived, we met the month with bright, expectant eyes. We each had our new numbers, and a willingness to see them come to life. And ‘come to life’ they did, in rarest form! We’re proud to share a glimpse of how miraculous this first month of the year has been for us.

My Colossal Abundance Number for January (2025) was 137. This highly specific frequency currently yields a total of 113 unique entries. (Lara’s Number yields 156!) Each of these (delicious) entries offered us a clue as to what this first month of our New Year might hold. In the coming posts, I plan to share examples of specific entries that played out for us in real-life ways. It is worth noting that, at the beginning of the month, these could only hint at what was coming in the days ahead. It took living into every one with willingness to meet their many secrets for the promises of each to be exposed.

In some real way, awareness of these entries called their essence into being. And though we had an initial sense that this might be the case, we had no way of knowing just how literal these findings would become. Join me in my next post for the next part of this story. In the meantime: you deserve a Lightyear Ledger, too!

title: JOURNAL | The Liberated Tarot, Part IV (Oct. 9, 2024)
content:
"The Codex is locked. The pieces are in place. The Oracle will speak."

Looking down at our dining room table full of cards (half of them handmade), we knew we had been led to the discovery of something totally significant + new. The apparent inner logic that supported the arrangement of these findings far exceeded comprehension; but the Angels were explicit: validation of this work was absolute. (Months later, more of this inherent logic would be made available to us through what we’ve come to call The Angel Interlock: an ingenious completion of the previous arrangement that connects a second Angel to each card.)

The Angels claimed the Oracle would speak: and so it did. Marveling over the miracle of the moment, we found ourselves intuitively drawn to the first 22 cards of the tarot deck (a significant grouping traditionally referred to as the Major Arcana). It was clear to us that these specific members were important, but something about their common names felt… wrong. For example, neither one of us had ever benefited from traditional conceptions of ‘The Devil’ (15) - so we started to discuss what sort of liberated figures might be ready to replace such obviously disempowered themes. And as quickly as we could consider the idea of ‘replacements’, they arrived.

‘The Devil’ was revealed to be The Angel. The ‘Death’ card was revealed to stand for Life. ‘The Tower’ was rebranded as Redemption. And ‘The Fool’ became The Innocent instead. One right after another, The Liberated Primes revealed themselves to us by name. Each signified a major transformation we could feel. Some of my personal favorites include:

- The Lovers became Soulmates (6)
- The Hanged Man became The Upright (12)
- Death became Life (13)
- The Devil became The Angel (15)
- The Tower became Redemption (16)
- Judgment became Decision (20)
- The Fool became The Innocent (22)

The entire Liberated Tarot sequence has been made available on our website free of charge. To access: simply click each of the buttons just below. Download + enjoy our gifts to you.

The story continues in an upcoming post. Stay tuned.

title: JOURNAL | Celebrating the Stones (Sep. 29, 2024)
content:
When I began experimentally ‘meeting’ with specific stones from my personal collection back in January 2022, I had no way of knowing what the process would eventually become. In fact, just eight months later, I believed I had exhausted any benefit the concept had provided, so decided to move on from it ‘for good’. But much to my surprise, the conversations were revitalized by Lara, who persistently referred to the abundance of encouragement + insight my original encounters had bestowed. It was more than one full year since I had last received a message from the stones; but on September 28 (of 2023) the first of my next phase of conversations had officially begun with my decision to invite Gold Sheen Obsidian to speak. And speak it did, in words that have continued to inspire + amaze us ever since! Yesterday was the one-year anniversary of this gift. Emerald came next - just one day later - with its lessons on the subject of Receiving + its generous assertion that 'Life in its infinite richness rests in the home of the heart'. Today marks one full year since that important conversation, and the words remain as pivotal today as they were then.

It struck me just last night that I have never properly announced these conversations, even though they have so clearly served as critical prerequisites to all that we’ve been living ever since. Would we have ever met the Angels had it not been for the earlier encounters with the Stones? No, I don’t believe we would have. Would any of this world that we now occupy exist if not for the relentless admiration of my wife? I don’t believe it would.

And so today we celebrate: the gift of conversations we were so so very clearly meant to have; the many conversations yet to come; the pleasures of both giving + receiving; the otherworldly life we get to share.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Promise (Sep. 24, 2024)
content:
The Angel of Promise exploded into our awareness on the morning of August 11 (2024), and remained in conversation for two days. It expanded on a theme that has been painfully distorted, liberating our perspective on that theme. It advised on the importance of Desire: the name of its chosen Pathway + the means by which all life is meant to move. "Life is the Expression of Desire. All that Life creates, Desire moves." With these words, the Angel lifted the whole subject of Desire from a tangle of long-term misunderstanding to the Truth. It went on to say: "Purpose is embodied through permission of Desire; Promise moves Desire into Life." This lesson has continued to surprise me + its roots have sunk in deeper over time. I return to one phrase often (just three words): "Desire equals Promise." What a gift! May these words help each of us relax + open fully to the gift.

The feeling of Desire is a Promise.
Every Promise must complete itself.
If permitted, every True Desire is accomplished.
Every True Desire profits Life.
Genuine Desire is a signal of the Promise that fulfills it.
Genuine Desire is the activating pressure of a life.
Life achieves Expression through the complex of desires you embody.
This Expression generates new life.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Promise corresponds to the Eight of Wands, the Virtue of Synergy, and the Exact Frequency of 52. The Angel has claimed Emerald as a corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | The Liberated Tarot, Part III (Sep. 12, 2024)
content:
As quickly as the deficit of 8 cards manifested, it resolved. I watched as the Court cards were reconfigured. A Prince replaced the Page of every Suit. His counterpart, the Princess, joined him then. The next (and last) four cards emerged as Angels - as exemplars of the essence of the suits. With these new members added, both the tarot + the Angel ‘scrolls’ aligned. The sound of the alarm gave me permission to share all of this with Lara, which I did. Immediately, we devised a way to test it out. We had a deck of ‘Angel Cards’ which Lara had prepared for us by hand. We laid these out in sequence on a table in our dining room beside a separate deck of tarot cards. (We wrote placeholder cards for each new member.) We had no way of knowing how to organize the deck beyond the first 22 cards we had been shown. There were no clear instructions as to which card or which suit came after that, nor in what order to proceed from there. So we explored a systematic range of combinations, sensing into correlations as we did.

As you can probably imagine, this took time. There was a proper order, but we had to feel our way to what it was. A major breakthrough came when we discovered that the Court cards were intended to precede the Ace + numbers. And another when the Angel found its place. Perhaps the most exciting revelation placed the Queen before the King at the beginning of each series, introducing a new ‘feminine-first’ model we encountered once again with Princess/Prince. (This proved to be a major innovation.) Once this initial sequence was established, we simply had to organize the suits. It wasn’t long before we were completely settled into what we saw: every card had found its proper place.

Later, after a refreshing shower, I revisited the cards in my mind’s eye. Immediately, a commanding voice exploded into my awareness like a thunderclap that I could ‘hear’ through my entire body, like a tremor. The voice said just four words: "The Codex is locked." Before I could compose a single skeptical idea, it repeated (just as strongly): "The Codex is locked."

This was my first transmission from an Angel.

title: JOURNAL | The Angel of Intelligence (Sep. 11, 2024)
content:
On the 4th of July (2024), we hosted our 8th session - this time with the Angel of Intelligence. The Angel started speaking one day prior, through events + conversations of the day. By the time I was receiving its transmission, we were primed. More times than I can count, we have returned to contemplate the Angel’s lessons. I personally consider this to be one of the most important conversations yet. The Angel was explicit: our attempts to ‘know’ through intellect mislead us - the deeper Truth must be ‘completely  known’. This reminds us of the Noble Role of Intimacy represented by the Queen of Wands (a theme we first discovered yesterday (9/10) - with no awareness then that we would be announcing this Angel today). Here’s one of the most brilliant sequences from this session. Please do yourself the favor of unrushed consideration of each line.

Intelligence invites an intimate encounter with the Truth.
To touch the Truth directly is to recognize Relief from all concern.
Intelligence encourages Relief.
To know that one cannot know is to finally admit a Larger Mind.
To sense a Larger Mind is to release the sense of smallness within your mind.
To know that you are ‘smaller’ than this Larger Mind is to invite the possibility of a direct encounter with this Mind.
To meet the Larger Mind is to remember its Intention: which is absolutely always only Good.
To know that you are ‘smaller’ than Intelligence like this is to feel held.
To know that you are held by Perfect Goodness makes you large.
To know of this inherent largeness, you express it.
Expressing it, you understand the Truth.

In our Crystalline Codex, the Angel of Intelligence relates to both The Star + Queen of Wands. The Frequencies of 17 + 39 both correspond to this Angel as well. ‘Clear Topaz’ was revealed to be the corresponding Mineral Ally.

title: JOURNAL | The Liberated Tarot, Part II (Sep. 10, 2024)
content:
For nearly half-a-decade, Lara worked her magic to uncover correspondences between the tarot sequence + the 64 gates of Human Design. Unfortunately, even the most promising of these exhibited a sense of incompletion: leaving multiple cards void of correspondence altogether - like a sprinkle of alarming little ‘gaps’. The challenge here was obvious: there weren’t enough gates (64) to match the cards (78). In spite of all the clearly-missing pieces, we made good creative use of what we had. So much so, to be honest, that we set the search to fill those gaps aside. We knew that Life was competent to speak through even the most inconsistent medium so long as ears were open to receive. And ours were wholly opened, so: It spoke.

Lara + I often find a moment in the day to take a rest. We set the phone alarm for 22:22 (minutes : seconds), then totally surrender to the pause. Sometimes, this short period of stillness generates a disproportionately peaceful sleep; other times, a visionary world. In either case, the practice is productive. In every case, it benefits the day. When we relaxed into our usual positions on the morning of May 27th, though, a thoroughly new miracle emerged for me. Without the slightest hint of any forethought, I began to contemplate the tarot cards. Immediately, sparks began to fly: a flood of new connections spread like constellations in my mind! I could see the tarot sequence in its common formulation like a scroll. I could see the Angels lining up beside it. One by one, I watched the numbers 1 through 22 of each unite. The Angels + the Major Archetypes aligned! As each confirmed its match, they ‘locked’ in place. The list of Angels now reset to ‘1’. (This came as a complete surprise to me.) The Angels now extended past the 56 remaining tarot members by 8 cards. The cards (at first) were blank, but clear as day. The deficit was obviously meaningful, not random. The tarot had new members to reveal.

The story continues in an upcoming post. Stay tuned.

title: JOURNAL | The 64 Angels Expands (Sep. 9, 2024)
content:
On Saturday, August 24, it became apparent that the website for the Angels was prepared to take another quantum leap. The initial vision came through Lara, and was instantly acknowledged as the logical next step - which we proceeded to expand on that same day. We mapped our plan on Saturday. On Sunday (8/25), we designed a system to help organize the details of this plan into a flow. By Monday (8/26), we began the largest site expansion I have ever been inspired to perform. Over the past 14 days, we’ve added 19 brand new pages to the site. In the process, we invented a new lexicon of icons + improved the Home Page flow for easy access to those pages we ourselves make use of every single day. In fact, every aspect of design has been perfected to present all we most value in a format that is equal to the beauty of the content it portrays. I’ve shared a short-list of our favorite new additions for you here. We hope you love it.

FREQUENCIES
