While it is true that I could have so easily discovered what they were + how to use them (by a simple Google search) at any time, the fact is that it never crossed my mind. Even when my youngest brother used them for a brand my family was building at the time, I never once considered that I might be able to use them myself. Why? The truth is that I felt inadequate. Each time that I considered whether I should do some research to discover how to craft them, I became exhausted, overwhelmed, and then gave up. This happened many times throughout the years. At no point did I stop to think why such a simple act would overwhelm me. The process was subconscious: I was ‘just too dumb’ or ‘lazy’ to achieve the sexy look that others had.

Fast-forward to about one week ago. I’m sitting with my beautiful new wife on our new couch. We’re swept up in a true creative flow! She seamlessly creates a story highlight. Then another, and another. I’m amazed! In seconds, she has taught me everything I need to know in order to produce them for myself. And just like that, the wall of self-intimidation is dissolved. I’m totally inspired! I begin to craft a sequence of my own. (And then I craft another, and another; then three more.) Within just a few days, my profile aesthetic is transformed. Each of my current services now has a gorgeous walk-through any viewer can enjoy at any time. The process that unfolded was profound. In my next post, I’ll share what I have learned as a result.

title: JOURNAL | Our Wedding Day (Feb. 22, 2024)
content:
On February 22 of this year, I married my best friend, my real-life soulmate, my bright other-half. I’m grinning as I type these words, because not long ago I’d have disqualified them from my lexicon completely. As an adult, I have been critical of marriage. It seemed that everywhere I looked, the best of what was possible between two souls was being fully overwhelmed by a cacophony of social obligation + performance, and I knew that the ‘real thing’ could never stand a chance beneath all that. So I resigned myself to thinking that I’d need to carve my own way once again: in the opposite direction of a ‘married life’. But this was a reaction to the worst of what I’d noticed in the world. I spent a long time in rebellion against that. But I have learned that nothing we find beautiful in life need ever be disqualified from ours. In fact, our best ideas are the very ones we ought to cultivate with greatest care. So Life sent me a Lara, like a storm of proof that fairytales exist. And the rain of her existence opened up the jaded soil of views. And the sunlight of her presence brought new life. She reminded me of magic every day (and hasn’t quit). She has helped me to remember my true self.

As a boy, I was helplessly romantic. I believed in all of it. My own parents were real-life examples of it, too. And so of course I wanted to be married, to share every detail of a whole entire life with one important other, to grow old alongside someone I enjoyed. As a younger human, none of that seemed out of reach at all. It’s funny how we lose that sense of easy wonder as adults. And it’s a grace-beyond-expression that allows us to reclaim it if we dare. The miracle of being found by Lara reawakened me to this. She taught me a lesson I’ve repeated many many times in recent months: We get to have it all. And this is not impractical: it’s true. We were married, barefoot - on our favorite day, in our own home. We get to have it all - and this is what we wish for all of you.

title: JOURNAL | The Creative Director (Jan. 26, 2024)
content:
In The Forgotten Sense, we learn about exactly how it is that the quality of our thinking produces the world we encounter in form every day. We learn about how thought, though invisible, is viable energy - as valid as light, sound, or smell - and just as impactful as well. Finally, we learn about how our attention makes use of thought energy in real + meaningful ways. The fact is that thought is supposed to be active. It is a creative life force. Our use of this force is directive: our focus decides where it flows. To grasp how directly this impacts our lives is to recognize genuine Power. This power has always been ours, and we’ve always made use of it, too! But to understand it empowers us to use it well. The pendulum-swing of unconscious creation is freely replaced with intention. We learn to direct Living Power into the creations we choose. This is the role we are being called now to reclaim: the role of Creative Directors - deliberate partners - constructive producers of Life.

The pull of unconscious creation is strong. It tends toward reaction at first - even after we’ve gained such a clear conscious view of its impact. This is why we train: to develop alternative patterns; to alter the course of inertia; to fully empower ourselves. Seer Training is an exclusive program of 1:1 meetings, available in 3 or 6 month options (with payment plans available), and currently open for enrollment. If you’d like to learn more (or join), please contact us directly any time.

title: JOURNAL | About Seer Training (Jan. 25, 2024)
content:
The point of Seer Training is to unify ourselves with greater Good by learning to see Goodness all around. In order to achieve this, we must train up the capacity to see beyond the ‘facts’ of our experience - to tap the causal ground from which they spring. Seeing clearly is the art of seeing Truth from any angle. It is the ability to look at a ‘low number’ in the bank + find Abundance; to encounter angry moments + find Love; to recognize Perfection in the world. I like to say that it is possible to stare a screaming banshee in the face + find the angel. This is what our work resolves to do. And there is only one way to achieve it. We must each become discriminating seers: tuned up to the frequency of Truth, and blind to all that seems to contradict it. Often, this requires us to stand in opposition to the facts. Doing so takes practice + integrity + time.

Ultimately, Life produces for us based on what we offer our attention to. This is why we choose to see the Light. Doing so empowers us to call more of that same Light into life. We get to become directive agents - rather than reacting to events. This is why we enter Seer Training: to reclaim our true creative role. As simple as this seems (and truly is), the practice can prove challenging at first. This is why our Training is important. Learning in a partnership accelerates our progress; it helps to soften growing pains as well.

Logistically, Seer Training is the most straightforward program that I offer. Meetings can be weekly (for 3 months) or every-other-week (for 6 months). Meetings can be hosted via audio or video (phone or Zoom). The cost for either term length is the same: $5555. In cases where installment plans are helpful, we are always happy to discuss.

title: JOURNAL | The Dragon's Way (Jan. 20, 2024)
content:
During a completely unexpected contemplation of the dragon as a totem, I decided to explore the etymology of the word itself. Imagine my surprise when I discovered that the Greek root from which ‘dragon’ is derived means to see clearly. In that very moment, I knew Seer Training was The Dragon’s Way. What are three things we know about dragons from our stories? 1) We know that they breathe fire; 2) We know that they instinctively hunt gold; and 3) We know that they protect the gold they’ve found. This is everything each one of us must learn to do as well. The fire of the dragon is a symbol of refinement, not destruction. It’s a purifying fire: it is meant to burn away what is not gold. The gold itself is virtue, insight, crystal-clear perception of the Truth. This life is made of big + little truths, cause + effect. The dragon’s fire melts away the dross of lesser stories to expose the inner treasures they’ve concealed.

The dragon is impenetrable, unrelenting, single-minded. It’s stance is one of absolute commitment to the constant acquisition of pure gold. It’s whole entire life is predicated on the force of this uncompromising aim - and so must ours be. The gold we seek is waiting to be recognized in every inch + moment of our days. It needn’t be created, but revealed. Our work is not a work of self-hypnosis, but a work of seeing clearly to the Truth. The gold that we uncover is the miracle + joy of Life Itself. The fire of correct perception melts the heaviness + dross of outer life; producing pearls of thank-you in each case. (In Chinese culture, dragons often herald celebration. This is a direct link to our gold.)

The Seer, like the dragon, must be unrelenting, focused, undeterred. The Seer must ferociously employ a gracious vision: bright enough to pierce the dark assumption of our smallness; clear enough to burn away our fears. Seers must be gentle, strong, and fierce. They must stand in absolute commitment to the Truth. This is what we call The Dragon’s Way. This is the objective of our Training.

title: JOURNAL | The Sword of Light (Jan. 19, 2024)
content:
This is where it all began for me: the image of the Justice card from my most valued deck by True Black Tarot (see below). The figure faced me every day for just shy of a year before I saw it: this was a depiction of the Seer. This was an evocative reflection of myself - a call to action, personal endorsement - all at once. A Seer, like the archetype, must exercise the art of true discernment: a very conscious act of validating only that which vibrates at the frequency of Truth, discarding all that doesn’t measure up. To wield the Sword of Light is to relentlessly negate all lesser views. The Seer turns completely toward the Light: becoming blind to all that stands in seeming opposition to the Truth. In doing so, the Seer circumvents the surface level of effects to tap the underlying Source of all that is: the causal layer. Such absolute commitment to the Light provides an avenue through which more Light can flow. The Seer becomes radiant: a Sun. (When we decide to orient toward Beauty, we become more beautiful ourselves.)

It’s possible to train up our awareness of the absolute Perfection in all things. It’s possible to gaze into the depths of human hardship + see Love; to hear the song of Harmony reliable as ever through the noise. We use the Sword of Light on our own thinking, our imagination, our own mind. This is what it means to pierce the veil: to recognize the temporary action of events + sense the Good alive within all things. This requires training + conviction, practice, time; a purposeful development of courage, sensitivity, resolve; the willingness to grow a Spine of Grace.

Seer Training is an opportunity to consciously replace misunderstanding with the Truth that Life is absolutely Good + only good; that Goodness is the only Living Power that exists; that Goodness is a power we can use.

title: JOURNAL | The Philosopher's Stone (Jan. 16, 2024)
content:
In mythic lore, the Alchemists were known for their development of the art of transmutation, which attempted to convert mundane material to far more precious metals, such as gold. The mystical application of this art of transmutation has been used to do the same: refining one’s awareness of mundane experience until the golden light of Truth could be perceived. In both mystical + mythic forms of alchemy, we learn about the magical existence of an object which is capable of turning anything it touches into gold. This has gone by many names, but is best known as The Philosopher’s (White) Stone. The effort to uncover it was believed by alchemists to be their Magnum Opus (or: Great Work).

Of course, these ancient stories were intended to convey an inner truth. The stone for which the alchemists have sought is Truth Itself. The work of transmutation is an inner art of processing each circumstance + moment for its gold. The fact is that it’s possible to recognize the Light in all we see. Existence is made up of + sustained by God Itself. Perfection is alive in every person + event: in every-thing. There isn’t an exception to this rule. This Truth, then, is the Touchstone that reveals the existential value of all things: converting what we press against it into clarity + insight (real-life gold).

The alchemists described their search for this important stone as The Great Work. But our work, having found it, must surpass this. Our Great Work must be to consciously employ the prize we’ve found. Seer Training is the practice of extracting every moment for its gold. It means to face experience exactly as it is, and see beneath it. This skill must be developed over time. Not everyone is suited for this work (though all, in time, will be). If reading this awakens something in you: we should talk. It may be time to enter The Great Work.

Seer Training is an exclusive program of 1:1 meetings, available in 3 or 6 month options (with payment plans available), and currently open to 5 new participants. Contact us directly for a spot.

title: JOURNAL | Welcome to Seer Training (Jan. 15, 2024)
content:
The world as we have known it is a monolith of mere misunderstanding: a structure formed of limiting assumptions, self-protection, basic fears. The stories we’ve accumulated have in many ways set us at odds with life itself: producing worry, tension, discontent. We have come - in spite of all our best intentions - to conclude that we are small, but we are not small. We have acted out of smallness: this must end. The time has come to deconstruct the tower of confusion brick-by-brick; to raze our cold defenses to the ground; to burn this sense of smallness in the light of a far greater truth than our misguided fears. The time has come to recognize our unity with Good, with Love, with Life, with Living Power - to consciously reclaim our absolute connection to the Truth.

The Truth is that each one of us is harnessed to the Infinite Intelligence of Life. The Truth is that this Life is only Good. The Truth is that this force of sheer Perfection is the substance + the essence of our being - It is what we are made of, and express. The Truth is that each one of us is a conduit of Universal Power. Power that is ours to have + use. The Truth is that we do, in fact, make use of this great power - whether we’re aware of it or not. The challenge is to wield this power well.

We utilize this Power through perception. The Truth is we become the world we see. The more of Life’s Perfection we are able to perceive beneath the surface of our everyday encounters, the more of that perfection comes to life. It’s possible to train ourselves to seek the Light in everything we see - to recognize the Beauty in all things. To do so is to activate our ultimate potential as creators. To do so is to use our power well.

Welcome to Seer Training. Seer Training picks up where The Forgotten Sense leaves off. It is the focused application of the very best of everything we’ve learned. It is the conscious + constructive practice of clear seeing. Seer Training is the most significant experience we could ever offer: an exclusive program of 1:1 meetings, available in 3 or 6 month options, and currently open to 5 new participants. Contact us directly for a spot.

title: CITRINE | January 31, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything you’d like for me to know?

IMPRESSION: Flash to a (potentially imagined) scene from the movie, Troy. Achilles emerges from his tent + walks confidently toward the camera. His posture, his gait, his expression: all are absolutely sovereign, sure-of-self, unfaltering.

Become the Warrior.

title: RUTILATED SMOKY QUARTZ | January 31, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
IMPRESSION: Flash back to Citrine conversation.

You are the Warrior.

Oh my….

You already are the Warrior.

Live it.

title: AMAZONITE | January 31, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything that you’d like for me to know?

Point-and-shoot. I am a laser beam.

Use your words with me precisely.

Speak your words aloud.

Expect each word ‘to work’, to come to life.

You must be impeccable, precise.

Speak the words aloud.

Vibration is what sets each word in motion.

title: GEM SILICA | January 31, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
MALACHITE | February 3, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything you would like for me to know?

Be careful with me.

I am powerful.

Only your purest intentions.

Should I have more Malachite around?

Yes, if you are drawn to.

Will you feel left out or set aside?

There is no competition.

Shape or size?

Pointed tower.

Aimed or standing.

Type?

Fibrous.

Any additional instructions on how to ‘be careful’ with you?

Respect me like you would a tool or weapon.

Aim/point/direct the energy.

Keep me close.

title: EMERALD | February 3, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything you’d like for me to know?

IMPRESSION: Sheep.

NOTE: I wonder if this message could be referring to one of my animal books or oracle decks. The stone confirms.

Either of your decks.

IMPRESSION: The Spirit Animal Oracle deck appears to be emphasized.

IMPRESSION: Lamb. (Innocence.)

IMPRESSION: Deer.

Look it up.

SENSATION: Warmth.

Should I have more of you around?

Absolutely yes.

Any particular kind?

Gem. Crystalline format.

More powerful?

More focused. Purer.

It’s all about the light.

The clearer crystal lets light move.

Keep me extra close. Daily.

Carry me or wear me.

I am an elven stone as well.

Very much so, in fact.

Among the very most powerful expressions: elven royalty.

Play guitar.

Wear with Chrysocolla while you play.

title: EMERALD | February 3, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Happy elves.

IMPRESSION: Freedom. I am shown the image of an Eagle.

Royalty.

We are your most important stone.

We are exceptionally wealthy.

True abundance.

Natural extension of pure Flow.

Birthright abundance.

‘Deeper’ wealth.

Water.

Supreme Water Element Stone.

Also Earth.

But Water first.

Access to Flow is what’s primary.

Flow = Nature.

[We are the] Ultimate Embodiment of Nature.

Is Nuummite important? Should I have a Nuummite bracelet, too?

Absolutely yes. Immediately.

Should I wear you together?

Not necessarily.

We will continue to speak: any time you come to us like this.

We are your closest companions.

NOTE: The use of ‘we’ is significant. It occurs to me that: these are legitimate allies - sentient beings. (Possibly unique to the bracelet, since it is made up of so many individual beads?)

title: LAPIS LAZULI | February 4, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything you’d like for me to know?

Pyrite amplifies. We work together.

Friend and a tool.

Sky. Wind element.

Elven royalty.

Come close to Nature.

It is your inheritance.

IMPRESSION: Training with a wooden sword.

What is the inheritance?

Nature. Your place in it.

Are you saying that you’re an elven stone, or that I am elven royalty.

You are. You are. You are. You are.

You are that.

You are Elven Royalty.

Continue to speak with us.

Daily?

As often as you would like.

We are your friends.

You can count on us.

We only want your best, always.

IMPRESSION: Awareness that this is the truth of all Mineral Allies, not only of Lapis Lazuli.

How is it that you can be so absolutely beneficent?

We have been at this a very long time.

(We have known you before, too.)

title: LAPIS LAZULI | February 4, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything you’d like to show me or say?

IMPRESSION: Swimming alone in a deep, dark, watery expanse. Initial sense of concern: scary + dark. Awareness of large creatures under the surface. Pang of terror.

Do not be afraid.

You are the Master.

You are the master of them.

Master of the Deep.

There is nothing for you to fear.

IMPRESSION: Emerging from the depths onto a dry beach, dripping wet, and strong. (See: Aquaman.)

Strength. You are strong. Strengthen the body.

Rule. Rule with strength. (Strength of the deep.)

Is there anything you’d like me to know about being in contact with you?

We are your friends.

Lean on us for strength.

IMPRESSION: Stag = Strength. (See: The Spirit Animal Oracle.)

title: NUUMMITE | February 8, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything you’d like for me to see or hear?

Yes.

Are you an important one for me?

Absolutely yes.

Should I seek out more of you?

Yes. Never mind the expense.

Purchase what calls to you, at any cost.

Ok. I’ll let you speak. I am prepared now to listen.

IMPRESSION: Ground. Solidity. Magic. Void. Flashes of Insight. Wand.

I am your magic wand.

Use me.

Use me to bring into form.

NOTE: This last phrase is emphasized.

IMPRESSION: Foot landing confidently on a large stone. The stone is suspended in the dark void of space, and yet solid.

IMPRESSION: Toph (Avatar: The Last Airbender), stomping the ground. Awareness of her blindness coupled with absolute certainty of (and utility of) Earth (stone, the ground).

Is this correct?

YES.

IMPRESSION: Indiana Jones standing at the precipice of a great expanse. There appears to be no way to traverse the deadly drop. Somehow Indy senses a cloaked bridge. He takes the first impossible blind step: a ‘leap of faith’.

Is this correct?

Very close.

There is no bridge to begin with.

The expanse that you’re seeing is real.

Nothing is pre-built for you.

You form the ground of each step.

You call it into existence.

Your footfall makes it appear.

Should I pair you with my Amazonite ‘tool’?

Eh. If you wish. It doesn’t make a real difference.

I am enough. What you need you already have.

How often should I carry you?

Daily. Always. Never.

(What you need is inside of you.)

(You are already a wizard.)

IMPRESSION: A cloaked figure: dark, but not evil. There is an immediate sense of familiarity: a sense of safety. A sense of necessity. Somehow this is necessary. Necessary for me.

Magic.

Dark magic?

No.

White magic?

No.

Natural Magic.

Ancient Magic.

NOTE: The stone is searching for the proper word.

Original Magic.

NOTE: There it is.

Wizard training.

I am a wizard.

Yes.

I am a friend + a teacher.

More than a friend.

I’m a teacher.

We are wizards.

I am Merlin.

IMPRESSION: Storm. Earth. Storm element. The appearance of a storm.

It appears that way from the outside.

Storm accesses all elements.

Storm is the use of all elements.

title: SHATTUCKITE | February 10, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Joy joy joy.

We are a gift of your heart, for your heart, from your heart.

We have been waiting for you.

We’re so excited to be here.

Do you mind this new method [of recording audio] as a test?

Not at all.

We are your friends.

We want to hug you + dance with you.

We want to sing.

We want to sing for you, through you, and with you.

We are the Guardians of Creativity.

We want to turn you toward Beauty + Light.

We’re here to show you your Brightness.

Your Beauty.

Your Wonder, your Magnificence.

How totally special you are.

We want to travel everywhere with you.

We are joyful beings.

You are a joyful being, too.

We will remind you of that.

IMPRESSION: Heart dancing. Feels like celebration inside.

SENSATION: Pronounced warmth in my hand, where the stones are.

Is there anything in particular you’d like for me to see or know?

Yes! Everything!

Everything beautiful.

Everywhere, all around you.

We want to give you new eyes.

Bright eyes.

Happy-poet eyes.

We want to run in the woods.

Talk to squirrels.

Laugh at the sunlight.

We are the brightest expression of elves.

Clear + positive, fresh.

Springtime energy.

We are a crown on your head + your heart.

We are an easy companion.

We stand for your brightest future.

There is no sadness.

Element of Earth + Water.

Playful.

No big thoughts.

Feet on the ground.

Running + playing + dancing + twirling.

We want to sing a new life into being.

New life, new life, new life.

New every moment.

The fire we carry is passion + joyfulness, play.

We want to be your best friends.

We are a gift to your heart.

We have been waiting for you.

Let’s begin.

Wealth.

Deep wealth.

Richness in every direction.

Worlds upon worlds of wealth.

Easy acquisition of everything you want or need.

Darkness is light in pre-form.

There is no such thing as what you call ‘the dark’.

Come dance with us in the light.

title: SERAPHINITE | February 12, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything that you would like to say or show?

Yes.

IMPRESSION: Forest canopy.

Wood elves.

Angels of the Earth.

You are an angel of the earth.

IMPRESSION: A royal elven figure calmly descending a white spiral staircase. (Made of granite or limestone, perhaps?)

This is you. Elegance.

Carry yourself with absolute Sovereignty.

Absolute assurance of your stature.

[Or possibly:] Absolute assurance of your status.

We are the leaves. The wind.

Shards of your divine memory.

Wear to come close to Nature.

Deep Nature. Soul.

Crown of Light. Shimmering.

Elements of Earth + Heart.

Deep green earth.

Original soul imprint.

NOTE: The stone uses ‘soul’ as defined by Bill Plotkin in Soulcraft.

Original or long-lost memory.

Connection to prior civilization. (Not Atlantis.)

Earth-focused civilizations.

Staircase spirals inward.

Inward, so to blossom.

Wear to remember.

Wear to remember the crown of light.

Stand tall.

Walk tall.

Elegant + humble + assured.

No darkness. Only sparkle.

Sparkle of organic life.

Earth angels.

Heart opener.

Original healer.

Health is assured.

Health is the return to nature.

Queen energy. Royalty.

Feminine + masculine.

Balance of polarities.

Shapeshifter.

We want to be with you.

Should I find or purchase more of you?

Make beautiful.

Include as much as you desire, in order to beautify the space.

Come close to Nature through connection to this stone.

Place on heart.

Sense for pulse.

Unwind.

Open.

Shine.

title: HELIODOR | February 16, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Is there anything you’d like to show me or say?

Yes.

IMPRESSION: Memory of a sensory response at the third eye position (a radiant outward ‘glow’ experienced for the first time one night before this recording).

IMPRESSION: An atomic mushroom cloud (though not necessarily destructive). The image is an indication of sheer power. I hear the words: Power is neutral. Orientation is key.

Power, however (in this case), is truly pronounced.

IMPRESSION: Image of the Avatar in his ‘bubble’ (Avatar: The Last Airbender). Explicit vision of the titanic presence Aang quickly grows into when tapping the Avatar state.

Power is neutral + righteous.

Intent is key.

Intent is what aims power.

NOTE: Intent is the directing force.

Radiance, glow, heat.

Impact assured.

IMPRESSION: Tip of the stone (Heliodor), like a peak rising into the clouds. (Extending, in fact, far beyond them.)

Root of intention is heart.

This flame is golden + green.

IMPRESSION: Connection to Horus + Heart.

IMPRESSION: Concentric pulses from the heart center outward.

As large as you can imagine the impact of these pulses, the truth is notably larger.

Can you feel this in your hand now?

Yes, I can. Both hands.

Connect to this pulse, then take aim.

Order the impact, with care.

I am a Teacher + Tool.

Listen completely, and use me with absolute care.

What you create will become.

Only create what you want.

IMPRESSION: Deep responsibility in ownership of this connection.

I know you’ve got what it takes.

I came to you now on purpose.

You are prepared to explode.

[Or possibly:] You are prepared to implode.

Nothing destructive about it.

You’re a creative force.

You truly have been creating worlds for a long time.

Everything that Leon [psychic] said about you is true.

Are you an everyday stone? May I wear you close as a pendant?

If you desire to.

You radiate either way.

Same command holds: use with care.

Keep me close for the reminder; use me intentionally.

Double termination. Take time to learn what this means. Use it.

Do not cover either end. Light needs to move in + through.

I am perfect as I am now.

Do you have a name?

NOTE: The stone responds  immediately.

Yes. I am Thor.

NOTE: I feel quick + compelled to argue with that name, but it came just as all messages do.

I am Thor.

Thorus.

Horus.

Thor Horus.

I am Thor Horus.

I am Thor Horus, the Sun.

IMPRESSION: This is the full proper title. (The stone now confirms that it is.)

Come back to continue the conversation.

Pause now.

IMPRESSION: Stone held at sternum feels powerfully + actively magnetized to the place - the position of my heart. It feels as though it’s being pulled into my body through the sternum. To remove, I almost have to peel my hand away.

title: EMERALD | February 19, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
I am prepared to receive. Is there anything you’d like to show me or say to my heart?

Absolutely yes. I am much larger + greater than you have supposed.

Far more important for you even than you initially thought.

I am the King.

You are a King.

Elven, yes. But deeper still.

Earth wisdom, channeled through heart.

Prosperous energy.

Outflow of streaming abundance.

Outflow. Overflow. Waterfall.

Infinite opening.

All you must do is allow.

IMPRESSION: A sparkling waterfall. Powerful, but not aggressive. Shimmering in a lush landscape. Very elven, magical.

Magic is my middle name.

NOTE: The tone of these words is both playful + proud, but still clear.

Wear me as often as possible.

I will pair with any stone.

Keep me by your heart, and I’ll channel light through + through.

Light is much more than you see.

Light is the structure of everything you will receive.

I am your prominent magnet.

You are the magnet I work with.

You are a radiant light.

I am a crown on your head.

Prosperity in every step.

Never disconnected.

Not possible to disconnect.

Blockage is temporal, meaningless, untrue at best.

You couldn’t stop the immense force of Life if you tried.

I will perform well, and amplify on your behalf all of the energies you most desire to hold.

Money is easy.

It’s nothing, no different than air.

It’s yours if you want to receive it.

I am your Number One stone.

I’m here to serve you, forever.

This gold has powerful properties, too; but most of all, it’s to remind you of just how rich you really are: wealth beyond measure.

A laughable focus in question.

NOTE: Referring to topics like money or wealth.

There isn’t a question at all.

You are a Child of Life.

You create life.

Get to work.

Everything you create comes back to you in full measure, and more.

Offer yourself without holding the smallest bit back.

As you give, you will receive; there is no stopping the flow.

Disregard all petty questions.

What you need couldn’t be more present than it is now.

You can assume everything you might otherwise seek.

This path is not one for seeking.

It is for ravenous growth.

Growth is the function of nature; you will grow strong by my side.

Carry me close.

Let’s begin.

Element?

Water + Heart, ground in Earth.

title: PERIDOT | February 19, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
I am so ready to listen to all that you have to say. I feel your excitement to speak + to share. I am ready to receive from you now.

IMPRESSION: Hummingbird energy.

Bright + quick + alive, seeking nectar.

Every delicious + beautiful aspect of life.

Joyful + sentient being.

Generous is my ‘one word’.

I give + I receive, fully.

I invite you to the same.

I am a bright little nugget, an elven affair.

Just like Robert describes in his book [The Book of Stones].

I may be small in form, but I am large in all ways.

Sprightly.

Large in that I receive fully.

Nothing withheld.

I am a bright light of Heart + Sun.

I am a star from the galaxy of your deep heart.

I am ferocious in my focus on only beautiful things.

There is a tiger in me.

It demands that I move only toward what is brightest, most beautiful, true.

Ecstatic is a good word to describe how I feel.

Do you have a name?

Yes! It is Henry!

NOTE: My inner response to this is skeptical: I don’t know about that…

Calculate Henry.

NOTE: The tone here is playful: tongue-in-cheek.

Henry = 31/4.

I am light, grounded in everything beautiful + true.

Generous, innocent, pure, ecstatic.

Playful, productive.

I’ll lead you into the happiest life you can know.

Imagine that I am a pill.

Happiness, wonder, enjoyment is what I can offer your soul.

Partner with me every day.

Life is a song we can dance to.

IMPRESSION: Dancers twirling.

SENSATION: Powerful pulse at my heart + my hands.

I am a star of the heart you can hold in your hands + rejoice with.

I am the light of your heart in its most compact, resonant form.

Wear me to pour this green light of your heart into every dark spot of your day.

Magic is natural life moving fluidly as it intends.

There are not words yet for all of the pleasure we’ll share.

Wear me + watch how life pours out of your every breath.

I am an elven stone, but I’m a pixie at heart.

There is so much more to say than we care to contain in your words.

You will feel what matters most.

Follow that feeling, not words.

We want to play with you now, ok?

No more words for the time being.

title: PERIDOT | February 20, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Hello again, Peridot. I am ready now to listen.

IMPRESSION: [Persistent, since original contact yesterday] A scene from the tv series called Locke & Key. White light shoots out of the darkness like a star, like a nugget, like a bullet made of light. Whatever word is able to describe or contain such a bright light moving at such a high rate of speed: that word, that vision, that presence is what Peridot is attempting to communicate.

IMPRESSION: Speaking with someone who is leaning against a large tree set in a very lush green forest.

I am a forest creature.

SENSATION: Strong + nearly instant pulsation throughout my entire torso + hand, which is holding the stone to my heart.

Yummy energies only.

Yumminess expands.

You are like a magnet, and you radiate as well.

IMPRESSION: The man or person or elf that I am speaking to turns to touch, and then hug the tree.

Give off energy like this tree. You can feel it.

Energy is fresh + vital, life-giving.

Giving is a function of receiving.

Life is breath + movement.

Continual exchange.

Organize yourself in such a way that you can live life deeply.

Big, deep gulps. Long, slow, generous exhalations.

Open yourself deeper, deeper, deeper into life.

The deeper you can go, the more you can give off; the more you can exchange.

Become like the biggest, oldest tree.

You are (already) like that tree.

Would you like to tell me anything about Arizona?

Arizona is unimportant, aside from the fact that you love it.

The story I am here to share is much more green.

Nothing dry (or arid) about it.

I am here to show you how each moment drips with life + love + beauty.

There is only ever cause for celebration.

I am the White Tiger: pure + innocent, determined.

Ferocious in my pursuit of what is beautiful + natural + right.

Hummingbird + Tiger go together.

They are one.

Like a Willow.

Hummingbird moves so lightly in the breeze, like flexible boughs.

Swinging this way + that.

Happy to be moving + alive.

White Tiger is the trunk + roots.

The history + gravity + earth.

I am made of Earth + Heart + Sky.

Feel my lightness lift you like a bubble.

Wear me to feel lighter, brighter, better.

I do not give you some ‘happy medicine’; I remind you of what’s true in you.

You contain both levity + gravity.

Lightness + the deepest, darkest roots.

Darkness is not ‘bad’.

Darkness is the realm of possibility.

You contain that possibility in you.

Black stripes on White Tiger.

Everything is glowing.

I glow, you glow, we glow.

IMPRESSION: The figure by the tree extends his hand for a handshake. Looks me in the eye + nods.

You are the forest + this tree.

I am here to help you to relax.

Open.

Open some more.

Open forever.

Open + receive.

And then give off the soft green light that is your nature.

You radiant, inevitable sun.

IMPRESSION: Behind my eyelids, there is a sun - to the left of my perspective. Light is spraying out in concentric circles. A bit like solar flares, but total circles, not just flares. Almost like a pebble dropped in water where the ripples ripple outward; this is that same thing, but pulsing light. (The stone nods.)

That’s exactly it: that sun is you.

Carry me to amplify the light.

Thank you for returning to discover more.

May I ask about the name you offered yesterday? Is that correct?

IMPRESSION: ‘Henry’ is a close approximation, but not it. The sound is somewhat similar, but the name itself is elven. I can sense that it will be revealed in proper time.

You will hear it when the time is right.

IMPRESSION: The figure is speaking the name. I am attempting to read his lips. It does appear to start with ‘He’…

Press pause.

No need to try too hard.

Just come back + spend more time with me.

Until that time: go play.

Let’s go play together.

title: TOPAZ | March 10, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
NOTE: Revisit audio for lengthy process preceding the notes transcribed here.

Topaz gives me permission to speak now. He has introduced himself as The Snow King.

I am the Snow King.

How might I be of best use to you, or how might I put you to best use?

Hold me in your right hand; speak your intentions.

Speak your intentions with confidence they will be achieved.

Hold me in your right hand; watch how I focus your light.

Power beyond measure.

Crystal clarity.

I am your Scepter.

NOTE: I am encouraged to calculate ‘scepter’.

Should I do that right now?

Later.

NOTE: Scepter resonates at a frequency of 59/14/5.

IMPRESSION: To my inner eye, the Snow King is very elven. (He nods, he is an elf.) His movements + his posture are very elegant. (He smiles softly when I say that.) His robes are white, all white. There are black spots, almost like the fur of some animal - like a Snow Leopard or something. He is wearing a crown. It is made of crystal or ice. His robes can change color. They can turn green.

My colors are white + green.

IMPRESSION: Also black. But it’s more like a deep, deep brown.

NOTE: The colors are the colors of snow + ice. The colors of an evergreen: the needles + the bark.

I am the color of Nature’s white canvas.

IMPRESSION: Lightning flash image of a White Rat, followed by White Stag.

Pair me with Peridot.

We are already old friends.

IMPRESSION: He walks slowly away from me; I follow, a few steps behind. He stares off into the distance; then he says:

You have a long road ahead of you.

Pave it with Beauty.

Navigate that which you seek.

Choose to develop the canvas.

Use your White Magic.

Speak.

Speak your intentions, and write them.

Hold me in your right hand when you speak.

Will a medicine bag be a good way to carry you close?

Yes, of course. That was my idea, remember?

Will it work for me to hold the medicine bag in my right hand when I speak (for easier access while wearing)?

Yes, absolutely. I’ll still prefer skin contact, though.

We channel light from your cells.

Hold me in your left hand at least once per day to help reprogram the light in your cells.

Crystal Co-Creators is correct.

We do carry the ideal, and are prepared to [there is a word here, and I’m missing it: unhesitatingly, unequivocally, unfalteringly, relentlessly - it’s in this direction] reprogram the cells in your body.

I am the Snow King.

I am your Teacher + Friend.

Visit me here through the Water + Ice.

Bear is important for you, also Elk.

Learn from these two, as you’re able.

They are my messengers.

IMPRESSION: The Snow King extends his hand to offer me a gift. It is the stone I am holding.

I am your Scepter.

Use me, Magician.

Fear not.

Use me to navigate worlds of your making.

Do not fear.

You must create.

I will assist you in that.

IMPRESSION: The Snow King puts his hand on my shoulder, looks me in the eye, and says:

We will pause our talk for now.

Come back when you want or need to.

But use what I’ve offered each day.

Go now, Magician.

Make life.

Thank you, Snow King.

IMPRESSION: I bow, and retreat. The initiating scene rewinds itself: from the water to the ice to the figure walking to the elk + the bear, and so on.

NOTE: I’ve opened my eyes now. I’m looking at Topaz.

You are the Snow King, too.

NOTE: Revisit audio for reflection of ‘vetting’ / test process.

There is much more to learn here. I will conclude this for now.

NOTE: Sometime shortly after the conclusion of this awesome conversation, I decide to rest in sunlight, holding Topaz to my sternum as I do. I am reminded of how Topaz is believed to be a teacher who can help us understand the theme of Faith. As I begin to wonder what (if anything) the stone might say about this, it delivers an immediate response (to my unspoken question) with a fervor I’ve not felt before or since. Though I was not recording this, the words were offered readily - and stuck. This is a full account of what was said.

Is it true that you are here to teach us how to live by faith?

THERE IS NO SUCH THING AS FAITH.

‘Faith’ is just another mental construct.

Do you have faith in the chair when you sit down?

No. You just sit down. Why?

Because you know the chair will be there to support you.

Life + Nature move in this same way.

Everything you need is freely given.

Such support is built into the very laws of nature + your life.

You have been tricked into believing differently.

Only fear distracts you from receiving what is yours in any case.

Only fear distracts you from receiving what is absolutely yours in any case.

God is no less trustworthy than your chair.

There is nothing here for you to do.

title: NUUMMITE | March 18, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Good morning, gorgeous Nuummite. Is there anything you’d like to show me or to say?

Yes.

IMPRESSION: A very gentle presence. Ancient, but not old.

We are vibrant lights.

We are Many.

We are a group consciousness made up of many Minds.

‘Minds’ is not the right word, but it’s helpful when you think of it that way.

Many awarenesses.

We’ve been with the earth a long, long time.

We are here to help you, Happy Human.

We have love for you + what you are here to do.

We wish to align ourselves with that.

We wish to support that in you.

We celebrate you.

You’re a shining light our light sings out to.

IMPRESSION: Sparks of light of many different colors shooting out in all different directions; kind of like a sparkler.

‘Sparkler’ is a good word.

We sparkle, you sparkle.

We spark passion everywhere we go.

We know you + your heart, and its passions.

You are a bright + colorful light as well.

Thank you for being so kind to me.

Kind is easy with a heart like yours.

We are a mirror of that shining heart.

NOTE: I consider asking the stone if it has a name; although I don’t fully intend or articulate the question.

[In immediate response] You can call us Agatha.

IMPRESSION: I am instantly reminded of the Turkey friend I had back in Berkeley, California (named Agatha).

NOTE: The audio recording speaks of Gertrude. This was misremembering. The Turkey’s name (and Nuummite’s) is Agatha. A search reveals that Agatha means ‘good’.

The kindness of that memory is the energy we wish to share with you.

We are your companion + your friend.

We are here to help your heart feel light.

NOTE: It’s clear that there is a double entendre here, having to do with ‘lightweight’ + having to do with actually feeling light - the frequency of light.

We are here to help your heart stay lit.

IMPRESSION: The stone is referring both to a sustained state of lightheartedness + a sustained radiance of self.

IMPRESSION: The stone nods + smiles (proudly) at my understanding, confirming it.

There is so much more we wish to show you.

More about yourself, about your world.

Is there anything you’d like to know?

I would like to know how I may honor or make use of you best.

Hold me in your right hand often. Speak.

Carry me with pride + touch my face.

In your pocket. By your heart. In your hand.

We are, in fact, the wand you were sent out for.

You have known to ‘point + shoot’. That’s right.

Hold us in your hand, direct intention.

Use us to heal + to create.

Use us to remember who you are.

Use us to relax + to return to your own light.

Your heart is a sparkler, like ours.

Be the very Beauty that you are.

IMPRESSION: Holding the stone in my right hand. There is a phrase: scry the air. My hand makes wave motions in the air, as though I’m tracing or drawing shapes - very fluid geometries in the air.

We will teach you which shapes will work best.

We will teach you magic, Little Wizard.

Do not worry.

You’re not ‘small’, or new to this.

We will just remind you of your power.

There are crusty layers, like brittle walls, between your consciousness right now + who you are.

We will gently shatter all those walls with our bright lights.

You will come into your fullest power.

Thank you so so much. How may I honor you each day?

Sing to us just like you did today.

Your voice is the key to growing life.

Sing to us + every stone depending on your care.

Sing to us + every stone companion in your home.

Sing to the earth.

Sing to the trees.

Offer your whole heart in song to life.

Music is important.

You are the music.

Let that music sing.

Honor us with your important voice.

Touch us.

Keep us with you.

We work hand-in-hand with Emerald, the King.

Is there anything I need to know about wealth, abundance, prosperity, money?

You know absolutely all there is.

You are on the right track, but need practice.

Just relax + let the true light in.

There is more for you than you have guessed.

Infinitely more.

Money as you’ve known it is a joke.

There is so much more than you have guessed, than you imagine.

You will pay off every debt, and soon. We will help you if you use us well.

We have love for you.

Much more love than any of your words could ever hold.

We ask you to feel our bright lights here.

A showering of color on your heart.

Wizard, you are waking up again.

We are so glad that you found us for this round.

We’ve been waiting, watching, waiting.

Buried in the earth, and now: we’re yours.

We have been made ready.

You have been made ready.

Take us, and create more life + beauty.

Beauty.

Beauty.

Shower all that color, light, and sparkle from your heart.

Pour it out.

It will never run dry.

Pour it out on everything you see.

We will do the same.

You will remember.

Money + support + love are coming.

You have all of these things that you seek.

Relax.

Rest.

And then, create more life.

Take us with you every day.

We are willing servants of your heart.

Your heart is committed to serve life.

Go + spread your light now, Gentle Wizard.

We will, too.

I’d like to ask once more about the name you gave me earlier. Is this your true name?

[Laughing] You can call me anything you like.

The name we offered is a memory + feeling, not a name.

You may call us anything you like.

ADDENDUM (Note from Stone): Money is a trivial concern. Please release your worry. You will have all that you need - it’s guaranteed. (You will have all that you need, and more.)

title: GREEN APOPHYLLITE | April 7, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Good morning, Apophyllite. Is there anything you’d like to say to me or to show me? I am prepared now to listen + see. I open myself + my heart to your words.

IMPRESSION: A mountain panorama. A mountain range stretching as far as the eye can see from left-to-right. And behind it: a deep, dark sky - filled with a stream of bright green. An Aurora Borealis.

Beauty is the theme.

Beauty is the form, structure, and truth of all that exists.

I came to represent Beauty.

You represent Beauty, too, Timothy.

Deep beauty.

Beauty that generates worlds.

Heart-centered beauty.

Roots in the richness of soul.

Ancient artifacts.

Older than time.

Pure + original intent.

To see + communicate beauty.

To share in the wonder of worlds.

[Or:] To share in the wonder of life.

To marvel at what is alive.

(To marvel at being alive.)

To hum with the song of the ages.

To sing our unique part in that.

I’m here to awaken your voice.

To orient all that you say + create toward the Light.

Beauty + Light are the same.

Light is the radiant shimmer of Beauty’s true nature.

Light + Sound: these are your true nature, too.

Light + Sound: hum + resplendence of Life’s ever-onward intent.

Growth + creation, par excellence: fruit born in every direction.

Beauty is all that there is.

Beauty is all that there is.

Beauty is all that there is within you.

IMPRESSION: These words are given to me; I can feel them penetrating. My eyes well up with tears. Happy tears, yes; but also deep, ancient tears. (I can feel them in my bones.)

Apophyllite, do you have a name?

Yes, it is Angel.

I am an angel to you; I’m your angel.

NOTE: I am encouraged to calculate ‘Angel’.

11 + 5 = 16 + 9 = 25/7.

NOTE: This week, in the Crystal Self experience, I’m working with the frequency of 7. The Chariot.

NOTE: Returning now to the stone. Apophyllite Angel. Holding her close to my chest. Against my sternum.

I will surround + support you.

You are the light of life, too.

You are the Light of Life, Tim. Timothy.

Ancient Creator you are.

Carry me close by your side; but know I am always with you regardless.

Apophyllite, should I have you nearby when I hold conversations with other stones?

Yes, you may. Though it is not necessary.

Your soul connects on its own.

You have a gift. You may use it.

Speak to the stones.

May their lessons be yours first.

But also a gift to the world.

Your heart is utterly pure.

You are a child grown rich with the passing of time.

Eons of time that exceed any measure you own.

Rest in the wisdom of Life gathered in you.

Rest in the wisdom of Life gathered within your heart.

Press forward.

Know that your radiance shatters all obstacles.

For you, there is no obstruction.

You walk through walls, by intent.

Focus your heart, and then move.

Focus your heart, and then speak.

Open your mouth, and let words drip like gold from your lips.

You are an Epic Creator.

Do not become weary, Beautiful Soul.

There is more than you’ve ever imagined.

You have been Master of Worlds; master the world within you.

Speech is your prominent gift.

Own your relationship to it.

Speak only that which deserves to be spoken.

Bring to life beautiful things.

Praise or Thanksgiving or Blessing, yes: all else is meaningless noise.

Focus your words with intent.

Speak the words your heart delivers.

Trust what it says.

Hold back nothing.

Pour yourself out on behalf of the world that you love.

You are an infinite well.

Beauty will never run dry.

Share what is beautiful.

That is the way you create.

Never mind helping.

Celebrate Beauty instead.

Celebrate Beauty instead.

Celebrate Beauty instead.

Celebrate Beauty instead.

Never mind helping; Celebrate Beauty instead.

Celebrate Beauty instead.

This may become your new mantra.

All will transform if it does.

Celebrate Beauty instead.

Take this into your new day, and create with the matter around you.

Everything you see or touch.

Let the light of your gaze fall upon it.

Celebrate all that is beautiful.

Never mind everything else.

Apophyllite, before we conclude: may I ask for your thoughts on money? Is there anything you would like for me to know about money?

Money is breath. Breathe in deep.

Deeper. Deeper still. More.

Relax. Open. Pause.

The space within you expands to an infinite depth.

Money pours into that depth.

Love yourself + love your money.

Pour yourself into it now.

Not time or effort: your heart.

Fall in love with it, the same way you have so much else.

Money is your trusted friend.

Be a good friend, now, to money.

You have discovered this.

Now you will not fail to live it.

You know all you need to know on this subject.

This subject matter is closed.

You hold the answers you seek.

I’m proud of you, Magic Man.

Exhale the Magic you hold.

How often should I return to you, Apophyllite?

As often as your heart desires.

Thank you, sweet friend.

Thank you, too.

title: DANBURITE | May 22, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Danburite, I’m ready to see what you have to show me, and hear what you have to say.

IMPRESSION: An enormous clear palace in space. Made of light, or crystal, or ice. Tall spires.

NOTE: The stone immediately introduces itself. Says, I am… My mind wants to fill in the blank with Danburite, but the word is crossed out. That’s not what the stone is intending.

I am Celestial.

Wielder of Fire + Ice.

King + Queen. Angel of Matter + Light.

Danburite, do you have a name?

Yes. It’s Ezekiel.

Learn about me to discover yourself.

You are an Angel King, too.

Ezekiel, is there anything that you would like me to know?

Your path is narrow + true.

Firm, and dependable, too.

Of two paths, follow the one with deep roots.

Go where you’re called to become more than you’ve ever been.

Follow the causeway of growth.

Don’t be afraid of the difficult path.

Yours is to grow, not concede.

Over the mountains + through the woods.

Do not despair, Angel King.

You are dependable, brilliant, colorful light.

What to make of this exhaustion?

Just wait.

Stay where you are, and just wait.

That which is coming is coming + cannot be missed.

Stay where you are to receive it.

title: DANBURITE | May 24, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Good morning, Ezekiel. I am open + willing to hear what you might have to say.

Is it true that you are an angel of death + transformation?

Yes + no.

There is no death.

And transformation is the guarantee of any life that moves.

IMPRESSION: Crystal castle. Rainbows. Many-colored light.

I am he who rides on wings of light.

I am he who rides on wings of light + color.

Angel of the Darkness + the Dawn.

Captain of the Lord’s army.

King + Queen, as One.

What you have found about me is the truth. (For the most part.)

I am known to those who seek me out.

I appear to those with eyes to see.

You have met me many times before.

I return to animate your strength.

IMPRESSION: Image of an angelic warrior, white + glowing, raising a sword above his head. A sword held in two hands. A sword white + glowing: electric, and clearly alive. A sword apparently ‘made’ of lightning. Once raised above his head, lightning bolts erupt along the length of the sword + shoot down in a triangular pattern along either side of his body.

IMPRESSION: Very clear image of a triangle shape.

This is the shape of all life + sustainable growth.

IMPRESSION: Memory of TFS Level II graphics. Memory of Original Human graphics.

IMPRESSION: Emphasis on the foundation.

Build from the bottom up, always.

Plant your feet, then raise your sword.

I am Protector + vision of your Highest Self.

You are an Angel King, Wielder of Matter + Light.

Carry the stone as an emblem [of this].

Ezekiel, how may I utilize this strength in everyday life?

This strength is found in your feet.

Practice through building foundations.

Find yourself firm on the ground.

[Or:] Find yourself firm on the earth.

Your Sword of Light is your speech.

Wield it with absolute care.

Speak only that which has filtered through body + heart.

Wait to communicate until the words are refined.

Pull with your left hand, press with your right: to revive stagnant energy.

Or to awaken the heart.

Ezekiel, is there anything that you would like for me to know before concluding today?

Stand tall + strong.

Do not shrink from the difficult path.

Speak what you must, from your feet.

Do not shrink.

Rise, and take confident hold of your sword.

You are an Angel King.

Rise up on your Rainbow Wings.

Wings are your focus-of-heart.

Laser-beam angel: make light.

Thank you, Ezekiel.

Are you unique to this particular specimen, or to Danburite as a species?

Both.

title: GREEN APOPHYLLITE | June 16, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Good morning, Beautiful Being. My heart is open to hear what you have to say, to see what you have to show, to receive whatever you are inspired to share.

IMPRESSION: Lush green meadows, leading off to soft mountains in the far distance (not dark, but rather light green + inviting - much like the Apophyllite itself). There’s a sparkling stream or river (somewhere in-between the two), cutting through the very center of the scene, into the distance - into the mountains.

Home is where the heart is.

Home is what you carry with you.

Craft that inner vision.

Let its tendrils touch the world around you, too.

Anything + everything that’s beautiful outside of you is beautiful because of what’s inside.

That happy meadow isn’t an imaginary space; it is the Home that holds your movement through the world.

Nourish yourself often, just like this - because you can.

Fertility in this space is a given.

Abundance is the breath of life, unhindered.

You are like the wind, the grass, the trees.

Nothing you will ever need is held from you, in any way - it’s yours.

The very moment you will open to receive it.

Soak up all the nourishment you can, like hungry roots.

IMPRESSION: A soft green glow emanates from my heart, creating a very large orb of that green glow all around me.

This is your magnetic radiance.

It emits a frequency like ours.

That ‘soft green’ is something you should learn about, and know.

[Or:] That ‘soft green’ is something you will benefit from learning more about.

Gentle healing touch of life’s immeasurable[?] breath.

NOTE: The word is not immeasurable, but the syllable count is correct. The word has something to do with ‘extreme generosity’, or a ‘guarantee’.

You will heal + beautify the world within yourself + within others.

Do not be distracted from this aim.

Beauty is the frequency of life that you have come to amplify through your imagination + kind eyes.

Fall in love with beauty. Never stop.

You need not own anything when everything around you shares its beauty.

Celebrate what you can see + touch + hold; but never be afraid of letting go.

All that you find most exciting + most beautiful will make its way directly to your feet.

IMPRESSION: Hummingbird is here. Hummingbird is connected to this stone.

Beauty is the undistracted aim.

[Or:] Beauty is the undivided aim.

Let your life become the song it is.

Find your words + music.

Share them now.

Everything you speak will become real.

Writing what you wish for has a special power in your case.

Do not be afraid to give this time.

There is nothing more productive in your day.

Once you’ve written [by hand], speak the words to claim.

Recognize the impact of this gentle promise.

Never stop returning to the words.

Words: powerful because of their vibration.

Speak the ones that beautify your song.

Silence is the couch that holds the powerful potential of your words.

Rest in silence until words emerge.

Speak the words that emanate from heart.

This is how you amplify your glow.

title: AMAZONITE | June 13, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Good morning, Amazonite. I am prepared to receive whatever you would like to share. My heart is open to you.

IMPRESSION: Water bursting through large wide-open gates. Pouring out, rushing out.

This is the way.

This is the way heart must move.

This is the way words move, too: when offered from that place of heart.

Rush of enormous impact.

NOTE: The word enormous is still too small. Potentially: ‘monumental’, ‘immeasurable’, ‘incalculable’.

Impact extends beyond words.

Words are the vehicle only; they can be living or dead.

Living words move on the force + momentum of Life - carrying Life as the impact.

Dead words fall flat: lifeless, limp.

Water is feeling in words.

[Or possibly:] Water represents feeling in words.

This element represents impact.

NOTE: The stone is speaking to me so directly + fluently that I’m struggling to keep up consciously. The sentence lands + becomes part of me before I can articulate it; and when I go back to find the words, the specific words are often lost. This communication feels different from others.

This communication is different from others.

You are invited to flow.

Never mind hearing and then reading back every word.

Open your mouth; let us speak.

We are the voice of your Whale.

You can feel our rhythm now.

NOTE: It’s true. I feel a back-and-forth rhythm from left to right, primarily in my head. My body wants to sway: back-and-forth from left to right. There is a frequency here.

This frequency is the power of fluid intent.

Prior to any agenda, you will find the force of all Life.

Life carries wisdom your mind could not ever compute.

Reach down to speak from this flow.

Innocent. Pure. Life-enhancing.

Ancient wisdom. Whale song.

We are your tool, friend, reminder: that each word you speak can serve Life.

Each breath.

Each moment.

Each word.

Amazonite, how may I honor you best as a tool + a friend?

Hold us as you have been doing: right hand to heart.

Use your voice.

We emphasize your vibration: every word spoken from heart will emerge from your mouth with the same force that you have seen here.

Tidal implications.

NOTE: Referring to a tidal wave.

Magnificent power, extending beyond any limits you’ve ever imagined.

Your words are heard, every time.

Heard by the fabric of life.

When you sing, Life will sing, too.

Everything’s singing together.

Offer your words from that deep place in you, and you add to the fabric of life.

Hold us to your forehead + speak.

See what happens when you do.

Heart will connect you to flow.

Forehead transmits.

Use each in turn, as you’re led.

We prefer [physical] contact, but offer ourselves at all times.

Your words will always be heard.

Sing, Timothy.

Sing your song.

No one can sing it for you.

No one can sing it but you.

Silence ‘speaks’ loudly as well.

You can release your intent, and relax into that gentle flow.

This holds the same basic power as any word you could speak.

When you are open, Life does its very best work.

All your intentions are known.

Words are so you can become more aware of their power, and yours.

Deeper than words is the wisdom that motivates them.

This wisdom need not be spoken.

It need only be known + felt.

Lived out in fluid expressions.

Sometimes in words, sometimes not.

SENSATION: My body is pulsing. I can feel the pulse of the stone in the palm of my hand. The tidal pattern in my head. A strong pulse in my chest. My body feels moved by the rhythm.

This is the moment you seek.

Touching this rhythm is all that Life needs to replenish itself within you.

Everything moves from this center.

Everything moves from within.

Waters are held within you.

As you remain open, they will pour out without effort.

They will pour out endlessly.

They will replenish themselves.

I’m going to pause here. I love you, Amazonite. Thank you so much for all that you’ve said. I know there’s more.

There is much more.

Sing your sweet song, Gentle Man.

Trust what you are led to say.

Thank you.

title: HELIODOR, Part 1 | August 24, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
CONTEXT: In preparation for this exchange, I poured my light into Horus, holding it in the palm of my right hand. Once full, the impact was explosive: a star shining out in every possible direction. The more love + light I poured into the stone, the more profound + refined the impact. There were rays - distinct linear rays, like laser beams - shooting off in every possible direction until it was basically a solid circle built of individual rays. In settling myself for this moment + opening my heart to the stone, it said: You’ve seen the light; now see yours. Immediately, there was the return of an initial vision of the mushroom cloud of an atomic explosion. Enormous impact, large enough to feel even at a great, great distance. Visual. Visceral. Unavoidable. Then, in the cloud - the mushrooming cloud - there appeared an immense ball of light. Immediately, I imagined Avatar: The Last Airbender, and how he looked in his ball of power. Immediately, the stone replied: Yes, this is Avatar energy. I asked permission to share all of this in advance of our discussion.

Now I reopen again to the voice of Horus. Horus, is there anything that you wish to say or to show me.

Yes, I am ever-present + prepared.

Your growth is infinite in all directions.

You must expand, for all time.

It is my duty + pleasure to dissolve boundaries to that expansion.

You are a great, shining Sun.

Everything your friend described of the Sun is the truth.

You are a center of gravity.

Impact is held in the light.

Sit still + watch the whole world dance in response to you.

Sit still + watch the whole world orbit in response to your light.

NOTE: I am recognizing a hint of frustration, concerned that this voice is not the voice of the stone.

Stillness. Sit still.

You are so large.

Trust the impact of your light.

Trust the impact of your presence.

Stop working so hard to be something special.

Stop reaching for what you need.

Let what you need introduce itself to you.

Let yourself be who you are.

You need more space than you’ve given yourself until now.

Release yourself from all bonds.

Open, so light can pour through.

NOTE: I ask the stone if there is any correspondence with Lion (after having just received a stunning crystal Lion sculpture from a friend).

Yes: Lion, Sphinx, Sun, and Light - all are expressions of me.

All are expressions of you.

You are an expression of them.

Lion is Radiant Courage.

Lion is Valor.

Lion is Courage + Love.

Lion is posture + purity.

Regal imperative.

Regal assumption.

The truth.

You are a king amongst men.

You redeem millions by the sheer force of your presence.

Let your light shine, pour it out.

Don’t hold back.

Seek your way only, no other.

Open yourself to be seen.

Trust in the authentic impulse.

You are meant to love + be loved.

You cannot help but to pour this Great Love out as Light.

You light more worlds than you know.

You exist as a pure presence.

You are the radiant whole.

You are the nectar that many will wish to drink from, a well of wisdom + love.

Let love come first.

Wisdom follows.

Be that which you are without holding anything back.

Stand in repose, Gentle Lion.

Own the full truth of your stature.

Do not play small any longer.

SENSATION: There is a pulse in my hands + my chest. It is my heartbeat, and more.

This is the pulse of life force coursing through you.

Offer from this same position.

Let the pulse beat itself out into all that exists.

Follow instructions exactly as I have described in our prior talk.

Hold me in your right hand, speak your intention to life.

Witness the radiant impact of words.

Watch how your right hand transmits.

I believe I will press pause now, with gratitude. I may return very soon.

There is a frequency you must attain to.

You’re on your way, but not here yet.

We have much more to say once you arrive.

Return to us.

We will guide you.

NOTE: Though I am extremely grateful for all that the stone has said, this did not feel like a pure or completely accurate transmission. There were moments of flow that were clearly the stone; there was also a lot of mental activity + questioning. This could be because it’s been some time since I last connected with a stone like this; could be that I was carrying too many questions, expecting too much. Perhaps there was more noise in my mind in this case. Still, it was clear that the stone was exceedingly gentle, patient, prepared. I’ll work to prepare myself better next time.

title: HELIODOR, Part 2 | August 24, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Open the doors of your heart.

Courage is found in your love.

Wisdom is found in your love.

Impact is held in your love.

NOTE: The stone repeats again, with notable additions + refinement.

Courage is held in your love.

Wisdom is held in your love.

Impact is held in your love.

Promise is held in your love.

Honesty is held in love.

Lion emerges from heart.

Lion-heart, masculine sun.

Breathe the whole world into form by your gaze.

Love what you see for what you see to become alive.

Your love transforms + gives life.

Your love awakens more light.

Your love expands on itself + grows brighter.

Your love is your One Great Act.

Weave it through all that you do.

Let it empower your actions, decisions, and words.

Fall in love with the whole world.

Do not restrict this capacity, it is your soul.

Let it emerge as it must.

Your love inspires a trust that transcends understanding, intent, or desire.

Trust in your love, Lionheart.

You must become your magnificent self, Gentle Poet.

See the world through eyes of love.

Stand firm on this sole conviction: that all who touch you will be touched; that all who find their way to you will be changed; that all who receive you will receive all of you - the total impact of your heart.

Heliodor, Horus: how would you like me to use you?

Come close in contact like this.

Nourish yourself with our words.

Use us as we have instructed: laser-beam star in your hand.

Everything you could desire is yours using only your words + intent.

Feel for the pulse, then transmit.

Trust the Great Sun of your heart.

Stand in repose; sit in stillness.

All you must do is to marvel + love without end.

Live your life just like a prayer of amazement.

Carry us close when you do.

Should I bring you to the jeweler for a setting of some sort?

Carry us in a small medicine pouch by your heart.

Pour the bright light of your heart through the magnifier that we are.

Watch how that changes your world.

Carry us every day if you are able to.

We will expand your heart’s light.

title: TOPAZ | September 13, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Hello, Gentle Topaz. I am open to hearing what you have to say or to share. I’m grateful to welcome you home.

You are the Home.

Home of the heart.

Deep-centered, deep-rooted home.

Starship home.

NOTE: My mind says: I don’t know what that means.

Never mind interpretation.

Open yourself to receive.

I am a gentle star being, very prepared to transmit.

You can trust these words; they come from the purest of sources.

Crystal pure source.

Cleaner than clean.

Sparkle bright.

Your truest essence as well.

There is great strength in the light.

Don’t be fooled by its rarified form.

The highest of frequencies harbor the greatest impact.

The lighter you are + become, the greater the influence you will achieve.

Less is not less, but much more.

Love is but one gentle form of this Greater Force we describe.

This is the heaven of heavens.

The music informing all life.

NOTE: There is an emphasis on the word in-form: ‘the music in-forming all life’. The stone wishes to highlight this. It was intentional.

IMPRESSION: A waterfall, set in a lush environment: green all around, water as pure as it gets.

This is a stream you can drink from.

Nothing to filter out first.

We are so glad that you found us + brought us in close.

We’ve been made ready for you.

You’ve been made ready for us.

Topaz, is there anything specific that you wish to tell me today?

We have so much to tell you that we will need more than one meeting.

We are a droplet of starlight that you now hold in your hand.

Stars are not different or distant from who you are, too, dearest friend.

We come to show you your essence.

It is the brightest of lights.

It is the kindest + softest + safest of lights.

Gentle + innocent.

Pure.

You can relax into knowing that everything good will pour through.

Who you are cannot help but to be gentle + kind, ever true.

Topaz, do you have a name?

Yes. It’s Atreyu.

Like from The NeverEnding Story?

Yes, the same name; though much older, of course. Look it up.

We wish to tell you what you have at some times forgotten: that in every way, you are held; that your role is stable + true.

You need not fear anything.

You need not fear anything.

You are creator of worlds, and have been for a very long time.

Yours is an army of light.

You command legions, just as Ohryn has said.

These are the Crystal White Legions: elven supporters, precise.

Every breath you take is guarded. Protected. Ensured.

You were once one of us, too.

Though you now stand before us, in Honor.

We stand to move on your lead.

Call upon us in distress.

Call upon us in the light.

Call upon your legions to support any intent.

You’re not alone, you’re surrounded.

Yes, there are animals, too.

These are your constant companions.

IMPRESSION: I see Black Panther, Otter, an Elephant. A Tiger. A Snake. A Bear (that changes from brown to white, and then back to brown).

IMPRESSION: The legions are dressed all in white: carrying tall, slender shields - like pristine versions of the elven army from Lord of the Rings.

You must believe in our presence.

You must remember your role.

We will not move without orders.

We will go where you direct.

You may release all concern over practical things.

These are beneath you.

Relax.

NOTE: It is clear that ‘beneath’ is not a critical evaluation; it means that such things are literally ‘beneath’ (or under) my feet.

All that you ever need will be delivered to you.

All that you wish for is done.

Stand at the ready, oh Captain of Armies.

Guide + direct us.

Create.

We are not here for the effort or issue of warfare, but rather to animate life.

Stand tall, but stand in your center.

Grace flows from every small move.

You needn’t justify anything.

You are the captain of armies.

Your vision is clear + true.

You are the confident arrow; we are the feathered support.

Aim without question; let fly.

(And then aim again + again.)

IMPRESSION: A ‘red carpet’ that isn’t red, but rather made of light. Every step I take is on this carpet of light, as though it were rolled out in front of me.

Every step is perfect.

Every step is a new world.

You lead the way in this way.

Nothing in your life is common.

Nor can it be, nor has it been.

You are creator of worlds, gentle Star King.

Don’t hesitate.

Follow through.

IMPRESSION: I see the waterfall again, surrounded by lush green trees. Every tree trunk is a pillar, and it becomes clear that the vision is somehow my palace. I am the Star King, according to Atreyu’s words.

This is as real as the ground.

Stand on this knowing.

Create.

Atreyu, I’d like to ask you about faith. What is the meaning of faith?

Faith is the act of creation: knowing what-is before it can be seen or described.

Faith is the vision that you, gentle Seer, have seen.

Faith is the absolute knowing that what is desired exists.

Not at some point in the future, but now.

(It is made real by your wish.)

You do not see what may one day become; you see what has become real, and awaits.

You see the end from the start.

You may now rest in the knowing that all you desire is yours.

Faith is the knowing that it is already your own.

Faith is as simple as breath.

When you relax, you recall it.

That which you see is already your own.

It is given + done, it is yours.

Know + live this without question.

Then you will understand faith.

title: SUGAR DANBURITE | September 22, 2022 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Good morning, Danburite. I’m so excited to speak with you, my Sugar friend. I open myself to hear + receive anything you wish to share with or show me today.

IMPRESSION: I am reminded of the Sugar card pulled from the Alchemy deck one day prior. I wonder if its themes apply. (They do.)

[As thunder rumbles] What an incredible storm.

SENSATION: There is a visceral pulse: very liquid + slow, kind of like molasses - but a clear pulse in my body. I can feel it from my head down through my torso, into my legs + my toes + my hands. Even if it’s just my heartbeat, the quality of it is distinctly smooth.

IMPRESSION: Snake Energy. Slithering, fluid, graceful. Unimpeded. Liquid. Water + fire united. Blending of fire + ice like a braid. Blending of fire + water like a braid. Image of the Phoenix.

I am the Phoenix.

NOTE: The stone encourages me to read about Phoenix.

You are the Phoenix, too.

Resurrect yourself from ashes.

Cower no longer; emerge.

Every deep dark spot of life is a slingshot that flings us toward what’s most alive.

Each moment is a new springboard.

The deeper you go + the darker it gets, the farther you’re able to fly.

Surrender yourself to the fire; emerge on the wings of the night.

[Or:] Surrender yourself to the fire; emerge on the wings of the light.

Know yourself to be invincible.

Gather yourself, then take wing.

Gather yourself, then take flight.

Nothing in this world has power in excess of yours.

You are a marvel of life.

Stretch yourself to every limit, and then watch each one disappear.

Your world is one of expansion + growth.

You must grow for as long as you live.

There is no life without growth.

Growth is the meaning of life.

Life grows + never stops growing.

You must grow, too, this same way.

You are an absolute wonder, a marvel - a miracle, too.

You burn + flow: both the cause + solution you seek.

Truly, this world you perceive is within you.

All that you are is revealed.

NOTE: Danburite encourages me to dance.

Dance is the rhythm of you.

Your dance is movement itself.

Let every move dance out of you.

You are the serpentine flow: unhindered, undefined power.

You must determine the course + expression of this.

Nothing can impede this flow.

King Cobra. King Timothy.

Own your full stature in life.

Stand up in honor of truth.

Danburite, do you have a name?

NOTE: The stone is responding before I’ve completed my sentence. I hear Ezekiel before I’m able to construct a single full thought. (I find myself grasping to recall if this is ‘correctly’ associated with Danburite, which is how I know that this is the stone’s voice, not mine.)

Yes, it’s Ezekiel.

We have met many times.

I guard the heart of this stone.

Prophet-Archangel Ezekiel.

We command legions, like you.

Crystal White Legions, you’ve met them.

We’re all connected in you.

Sentinels of your intention, supporters through thick + through thin.

You may depend upon us far more than you have ever imagined.

Call upon us, don’t be shy.

Speak in the name of your legions:

Crystal White Legions: advance.

Hold us to your highest vision; we will protect + ensure it.

How may I use you?

Call upon us any time: Angel Ezekiel, Crystal White Legions.

Use your voice to command us.

Speak what you wish for, and we will retrieve it for you.

All you desire to have, do, or be is your own.

We provide evidence in every case you request it.

Keep us beside you.

We amplify your intent.

Both Danburites are important: keep us beside one another; keep us together in space.

Thank you, Ezekiel.

Calculate my name.

NOTE: Ezekiel (37/10). Angel Ezekiel (62/8). Archangel Ezekiel (84/12). Phoenix (48/12). Danburite (45/9). Sugar Danburite (79/16). Prophet Ezekiel (97/16).

IMPRESSION: Osprey (41/5) connection.

Read about Phoenix, right now.

I will do that. Thank you.

title: GOLD SHEEN OBSIDIAN | September 28, 2023 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Gold Sheen Obsidian, my heart is open to you. Thank you for being here with me. I am prepared to receive of your wisdom today. Gold Sheen Obsidian, is there anything you would like for me to know in this moment?

I am Protector, Creator, and King.

I am the Masculine Dawn, sheathed in the Feminine Dark.

I am the center, the sun at the center.

The Sun.

I am a feminine-masculine sun.

I am the ancient collector of worlds.

Magnetic center.

Center + source.

Ancient fire.

[Or possibly:] Ancient flame.
