Speak to the dark + the dark will respond with its light.

Measure your words into infinite blindness; witness their echoes unfold.

Words germinate, generate - beckoning power to act.

Power awaits your direction: standing inert until called.

I am the Massive White Sun, Golden Sun.

As are you.

Massive white suns, there are two.

Two at the center: a nucleus of interaction.

Orbiting evenly. Mutual aspects.

Two hearts enfolded as one.

NOTE: ‘En-folded’ is explicit.

IMPRESSION: I see the supernova GIF. It’s less erratic. It feels much more measured, and clear. There’s more intention - equilibrium - in every orbit. Collision is chosen, not random or accidental.

The fusion of hearts is inevitable, yet intended.

On purpose. Well-timed. Precise.

Darkness + light are the same.

All is one gorgeous expanse.

Inside + outside unfold in response to each other.

Outside obeys inner law.

Frequency values produce in accordance with prominent value.

That which is felt must become.

Feeling ensures that it already has.

It is done.

NOTE: The stone encourages me to calculate ‘It Is Done’ (45/9).

Take ownership of It Is Done.

Speak It Is Done into form.

Speak to the darkness; the darkness returns with its light.

Darkness is not empty.

Darkness is infinite fullness.

Emptiness doesn’t exist.

Never could emptiness survive the pressure of its isolation from life.

All moments, spaces are filled.

Infinite space filled with infinite life, never lacking.

[Or possibly:] Infinite space filled with infinite life, never-ending.

Infinite void begets life; silence informs what is said.

Speaking informs what the silence produces instead.

NOTE: The word ‘instead’ is unclear. It’s the right number of syllables, but it doesn’t feel like a fit.

There is a sequence, a pattern: silence informs what is said; speaking informs what the silence produces [and then a two-syllable word].

NOTE (one day later): The sequence was clear: 1) Enter the Silence; 2) Speak into Silence; 3) Witness the Silence produce.

NOTE: The stone seeks another way to say what it’s saying.

Speaking informs what the silence produces in perfect response to each word.

Words are expressed + impressed.

Verbal + thought: all produce.

Guardianship of all thoughts, words, ideas: prerequisite to conscious growth, true creation, art in its highest expression.

SENSATION: There is a quickening pulse in my body. I do not know if it is my heart or the energy from this stone. It feels like my heart is racing. Breathing is fairly shallow + quick. Head is lightly spinning. The experience is not uncomfortable. It implies… significance? And also a sense that these words deserve utmost respect.

Gold Sheen Obsidian, is there anything you would like for me, specifically, to know?

I am the true King of Wands.

Master-Commander.

Golden King, Leader, and Friend.

Both you + Lara embody the same golden flame.

[Or possibly:] Both you + Lara embody this same golden flame.

You are the radiant sun(s), held at the center of this life of your own design.

You shine your light into corners of life only your light could ever encounter.

You are a Creator-God.

Angel-King Presence.

Active Commander.

Empowered Director of all that your life will become.

Feel the stone lock into Will.

NOTE: I have been holding the stone at my heart. It becomes heavy, and my hands are pulled toward the Solar Plexus. I allow them to descend minor micro-inches, slowly. Breathing… The stone settles here, it appears.

Breathe through your Will into me.

Speak from your center, your Center of Will into Life.

Do not intend to create.

Rather, expect that creation takes care of itself.

NOTE: There is a pause here. The sentence is not yet complete. I sense for the ending, and find it: … in response to your direction. The full invitation is:

Rather, expect that creation takes care of itself in response to your direction.

You are Commander + King.

Speak with conviction.

Command.

State what is yours, claim it fully.

Take ownership of your role.

Eternal access to infinite gain - this is your royal birthright.

[Or possibly:] Eternal access to infinite gain - this is your cosmic birthright.

How may I best use the stone?

Hold it or not, as you wish.

Hold to its presence exactly where it is now resting - in your mind’s eye or your hands.

Funnel your Will into Life through the filter of Grace we provide.

Witness the Great Sun expand.

Drink of the nectar of life.

Harness your joy, send it outward; it will return multiplied.

IMPRESSION: Gold streaming from my will center, almost like a firehose. Thick stream. Exploding outward, straight out, and then breaking into two directions, creating a golden egg around the whole body. Very similar in shape + proportion to the stone itself, but large enough to contain my whole body.

This is your Golden-White Sheath.

Impenetrable suit of armor.

This is a filter that you must produce for yourself.

It is intact as we speak.

NOTE (one day later): The emphasis of this Sheath concept was on the word filter, not armor. Its primary function was purification (filtering); protection was secondary (built-in).

Speak from within this Gold Center; witness your whole life expand.

Gold Sheen Obsidian, is there anything that you’d like for Lara to know?

NOTE: Instantly, the stone responds.

She is a Crystal White Angel.

She is a Warrior Soul.

She rides through ages on chariots of golden flame.

She is a creature of rare swiftness, glorious strength.

Queen of Wands, matching your King.

She is the bright other-half.

Mutual angels, unite.

Binary sun aspect, just as her soul has described.

Lara is ancient in time.

Ancient as you are, exact.

You were created together.

From the same spark of All Life.

Her way is Radiant Heat.

Crystal Whip.

Life moves in instant response to her will; her will must never be capped.

Yet, she must know the extreme power of her intention.

Every stray thought is a whip.

Crystal whip, holy command.

Life will respond in an instant, in every case, without fail.

Learn from her ready conviction.

She acts with speed, whereas you act from depth: act together.

Total conviction.

Rapid + certain, assured.

Her way + your way combine.

Crystal White Angels, pour gold from your hearts into Life.

Witness each other.

Expand.

Please tell your Lara that we love her generous touch.

Her hands equate to our home.

She sees the truth in us; you are just learning it now.

[Or possibly:] She sees the truth in us; you are just seeing it now.

[Or possibly:] She sees the truth in us; you are just learning to see it.

Gold Sheen Obsidian, is there anything that you would like for the world to know?

Rise up.

Encounter yourself.

Lift your eyes to the horizon.

See beyond what you have seen.

Reach + extend your awareness into silent depths.

Darkness is ever your friend.

Darkness absorbs + expresses.

It interacts with the light.

Relinquish all fear of darkness.

Recognize how your life moves.

Always the seed given over to darkness expresses itself as new life.

Plant seeds as you’ve been commissioned to do.

Don’t fear the depths - return to them.

They protect, fertilize, and produce what you direct.

Every idea: a seed.

Darkness is light in pre-form.

Form is assured, guaranteed.

Plant with conviction.

Plant only that which you wish to enjoy; it will bear fruit in its time.

NOTE: I am becoming fatigued.

Gold Sheen Obsidian, is there anything you’d like to say now in closing?

SENSATION: My heart picks up pace once again.

Rest now, but please do return.

Practice what has been described.

Bring us to Lara again. 

Master, Commander, and Friend.

title: EMERALD | September 29, 2023 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Dearest Emerald, my heart is open to you. Is there anything you would like me to see or to know?

IMPRESSION: A rush of YES in fast response. Wind blowing swiftly through leaves.

I am the breath of fresh air.

I am your breath of fresh air.

Minty-cool readiness.

Ever-prepared to respond + deliver as needed.

I am the Crystal White Crown, Golden Emblem.

Symbol of royalty claimed.

I am your single most powerful stone companion.

Powerful because I mirror your beautiful heart.

Brilliant heart.

Immaculate, precious heart.

Lightning explodes from your crown, from your eyes, from your words, from your hands, from your heart.

Heart overflowing with Grace.

Grace like a watery light.

Wash your whole self in this light.

Let it pour over + into + through you.

This light of Grace, yours to (both) give + receive, give again.

As you give, you will receive.

Mutual acts, single movement.

To give well is to receive.

To receive is automatic.

Nothing to do or to earn.

Simply express from the overflow of your kind heart.

Enjoy the pure pleasure of that.

Receiving is, first + foremost, invisible.

Something you taste before seeing.

Tasting + feeling precede sight + touch.

Though the whole act is lived from the start.

Tasting is no less profound than the seeing.

It guarantees that you will see.

What you experience invisibly will become visible in its time.

You will experience inside + out, in that order.

[Or:] You will experience inside + out, in that sequence.

First within you, then without.

Every experience moves in this same basic fashion: first from the inside, then out.

This is not news to your ears.

But we confirm it for you.

This is the act of all Nature.

That which is held within must express itself without.

This is the glory of living.

Tasting + seeing.

Sensing + holding.

Imagination made real.

Your role in this is distinct.

Your role is to celebrate the whole sweep of this act.

Celebrate tasting.

Then celebrate what comes of that.

Celebrate sensing.

Then celebrate that which is held.

Celebrate feeling, and knowing that feeling expands.

Play in the liminal spaces of solitude, restfulness, breath.

Know that the world you encounter within will be the same world you meet without.

Trust this as surely as you trust the dawn of each day.

There is no question or worry.

Only awareness of light.

Only awareness that each day the dawn must arrive.

Green is the color of your heart’s impeccable sun.

This sun will dawn just as surely.

Has dawned.

Hangs high in the sky.

Emerald Sun is your crown.

Shimmering crown of the ages: active, productive, pure light.

I am the Emerald Sun.

I am the pure light of heart.

Emerald, is there any specific message or messages you’d like for me to hear now?

Dance in the garden of your perfect life, Happy Elf.

NOTE (one day later): Lara connects this last sentence to Adonis.

Cast off all worry + weight.

Every last ounce of concern.

Yours is a Crystal White Mansion: home of the heart, Crystal White Angel[s] abode.

Your home is every last breath, blade of grass, shifting wind.

Your home is ever intact.

Rest now in total assurance that your home awaits your bright eyes.

That your home awaits your own vision.

That your home awaits just as surely as your every breath.

Feel the gold crown on your head.

Know the high places of heart from which your vision may now expand.

[Or possibly:] Know the high places of heart from which your vision may now emerge.

Throne of the High-Heart Perspective.

Occupy this throne + crown.

Claim each of them as your own.

Rule with pride from the Home of your heart.

Heart is the Earth of the Ether: grounded expression of Nature’s prolific intent.

Home is the heart of your story.

Heart is the home of your flow.

Flow is your power, and Grace is the flavor of that.

You may relax more completely than you ever have before now.

Be the fresh wind of that flow.

Be the impeccable heart.

Always remember the words you have found for yourself:

I am the Sun of my Heart.

Say it again:

I am the Sun of my Heart.

You are that Great Sun, Gentle Heart.

Rest in the Sun of your heart.

Emerald, thank you.

Emerald, is there a message that you’d like for Lara to hear?

Absolutely, always.

Her heart is ready as yours.

Her ears are open, and ready to hear every word.

Her soul is porous, receptive to every fresh drop.

Every fresh drop. Golden drop. Precious drop.

She knows the magic we share.

She knows the magic is life.

She knows the life we encourage, adorns herself with it each day.

Her heart is crystalline-pure: Diamond Heart, match to your own.

Be aware: hers is a rare Angel Light, Diamond Heart.

Diamond Heart.

Help her to claim.

Yours is a Diamond Heart, too.

But hers is a Diamond with Emerald crown, and yours is an Emerald Heart, crowned by the Diamond of her.

Her frequency is specific + sharp, like a diamond.

Razor’s-edge, laser-beam light.

She doesn’t yet know the full extent of her own power.

It is an equal to yours.

Hers is specific, where yours is prolific - your raging river igniting the light within her.

You are a beacon + she is a laser.

Each needs the other to glow.

Lara is Crystalline Maiden, Prize of the Innermost Realms.

Your role is Guide + Protector; hers is the Crystalline Muse.

Muse of the Diamond Perspective.

Fire + Ice, crystal clear.

NOTE (one day later): There was a ‘clouded’ impression of Lara + I side-by-side. It was clear to me that the impression was showing how each of us offered ‘protection’. My heart produced a Green Bubble that easily held us inside it (it was quite large, honestly). From inside the Bubble, Lara ‘shot laser beams’ outward as-needed. It seemed apparent that each of our ways both produced + protected: projecting high frequency, while obliterating all lesser vibrations on impact. Lara’s way (laser beams) felt like a Sword; my way felt more like a Shield (Green Love Bubble). Together, we were the ‘filter’ or ‘armor’ that Gold Sheen Obsidian spoke of.

Lara will see what is invisible to all others.

(She sees what others cannot.)

You will expand what she sees.

Marriage of Diamond + Emerald hearts:

Crown one another in glory.

Each must hold fast to the other.

GOLD is the product of that.

Emerald, is there anything that you would like to share with the world in a more public way? Anything you’d like to share.

I am the Stone of Prosperity in its purest form.

I am the bright Stone of Heart.

Richness is never a function of wealth or of hoarding; it is a function of depth.

Depth is the path of a wide-open heart.

Heart is the meaning of life.

Total prosperity lies at the center of life.

Life in its infinite richness rests in the home of the heart.

There is no reaching or grasping.

NOTE: This prior line is not quite as intended. I seek more accurate words. The stone now reveals them to me:

Open your hands + hearts freely.

Give of yourselves to receive.

This is our prominent lesson: giving/receiving, one act.

When you inhale, you are breathing; when you exhale, you are breathing.

Inhale + exhale: one act of breathing.

Giving/receiving: pure love.

Love is the Emerald Story.

Love is the Green Light of Heart.

Love is the path + the way we progress on that path.

Give of your love, give it freely.

Open your heart, and receive.

Know without question that everything given will be multiplied in response.

Giving/receiving: this one act of love equals growth.

It isn’t static or linear; it will exceed simple math.

Each act of love will expand beyond each prior act.

Patterns of growth beyond measure.

Exponential?

No, it is larger.

Complex [math]?

Beyond calculation.

Patterns of growth beyond measure.

NOTE: I’ll need to return to this section. I can see in my head what it’s saying, what it’s showing. But neither of us has the words. At this point, I think it’s a good time for me to press pause.

Emerald, thank you for being here with me. Thank you for all that you’ve said. Is there anything you’d like to say before closing?

Grow to exceed your best vision.

You will + have.

You will again.

This is a pure guarantee.

Rest in the lessons we’ve offered.

Gather them into yourselves.

Crown yourselves now in the glory of love that you share.

Tell Diamond Lara hello.

title: BLACK DIAMOND | October 3, 2023 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Hello, Black Diamond. I invite you to share anything you wish to share. My heart is open to you. Albeit a little intimidated. I choose to trust you. Is there anything you would like me to see or to know?

IMPRESSION: An anvil falls from the sky + crashes to the earth with a THUD. I can almost hear + feel the tremors of that. It’s not like an asteroid with an explosive landing; it’s like a confident THUD. Almost like it was both falling + being magnetized, and then LANDED incredibly hard. The anvil is hot now. Catches fire. A white horse emerges. A pegasus, or a unicorn - at first I thought unicorn, but it might be a pegasus - a white horse with wings. But not both. I think it’s a Pegasus. Yes. Its wings are outstretched until it turns toward me. Then it folds its wings back, and turns its whole body toward me. Its gaze is gentle, yet calculating. Testing. As if it’s sizing me up. It slowly begins to circle… me. While keeping its eyes on me. It lowers itself to its two front knees, bowing/kneeling to me. It bows its head toward me now. I bow + thank it. Please stand, I say.

You are the Master of Legions.

We stand at your beck + call.

Ours is to carry you wherever you wish to go.

Speak but the words, and the action is done + completed.

You ride with us on the wind.

IMPRESSION: The Pegasus vacillates / flickers between a white horse with large wings + a gryphon. A white gryphon.

I am the Crystal White Keeper.

Angel-Protector of Hearts.

Feel the great weight in the palm of your hand.

This is the pressure of absolute safety, guidance, protection - all yours.

We both transport + defend, carry + guard your intention.

IMPRESSION: Both Pegasus + Gryphon are in front of me now. Their presence is strong + yet still… flickering in a way. As if to imply that they are still connected as one. Two clear presences, somehow contained in one stone. Two sides of only one coin.

SENSATION: The stone in my palm feels quite cool. Almost like a miniature ice cube.

Heat cannot touch us.

Nothing can penetrate this.

We are your constant companions.

Angel defenders.

NOTE: This title is not yet complete. The stone continues: … of kings, queens, and crystalline hearts. The complete title, then, is:

Angel defenders of kings, queens, and crystalline hearts.

Timothy is the Pegasus, Lara is the Gryphon.

You are the same Diamond Heart.

Diamond expressing as two.

Both are the same, each is needed.

Pegasus on the right, Gryphon on the left.

White Gryphon matters.

Lara is crystalline-pure.

White Pegasus, Ancient Angel.

[Both] cut from the same ancient star.

Ancient is ageless - there’s no way to calculate time.

You have forever existed: as you, and as this, and as us.

You are the same Diamond Presence that activates worlds, and has done so across countless eons of time.

Look in the mirror of Pegasus, Gryphon, of Lion + Diamond + Sun.

These are your timely reminders of what you have come here to do.

Shine, each of you, like the powerful agents of life-love-and-beauty you are.

Shine forth as crystalline suns.

Open your wings + emerge like the dawn of the day.

Crystalline suns, rise + shake this whole world back to life.

Rise now that you are together.

Rise to the heights hand-in-hand.

Know that the light that we speak of is your love poured out without measure.

Love from the center of you.

That center burns with the Fire of Ages: first taste of Creative Light.

Know that your love is an anvil.

It shakes the earth back to life.

Crystalline impact is physical impact.

Who you are here matters more than you’ve ever suspected.

SHAKE the whole world back to life.

Do this by growing your love.

Do not hold back for an instant.

Pour your great hearts into love.

You are the anvil + cauldron.

NOTE: Alchemy is implied here (by the image of a cauldron).

Your love perfects + reminds.

This is a pivotal moment to reclaim the light that is yours.

Light is your love is your power.

Rest so completely in this.

Hooves, paws, and wings beat a confident path to new life.

See yourself in our strong bodies.

Feel yourself in what you see.

Each serves the other, and both serve the story of life.

This is what you have arrived here at this time to do.

Do not forget, Angel King. Queen. Star. Diamond.

You’re here to generate light.

Light is the love that you share.

Black Diamond, is there any specific message you would like for me to know?

IMPRESSION: Pegasus steps forward, comes very close to my face.

Do not shrink from what you have seen here today, Angel King.

Step fully into your role.

You are not playing pretend [here].

You know the Truth, now reclaim it.

All of Life - your life - awaits.

State what you wish + expect it.

Armies wait on your command.

You are the Master of Legions, who wait for direction from you.

Stand tall in your royal presence.

Stand like the Angel-Commander you are.

There is no value in shrinking.

Waste not one more breath in that.

You are the Golden Commander.

Speak as the trumpet of truth.

Know beyond doubt that the moment you speak it is done.

Look at me now in my glory + strength, and see yours.

I am a vision of you.

Black Diamond, is there a specific message you’d like for Lara to know?

IMPRESSION: Pegasus steps back, Gryphon steps forward.

She has seen me for herself.

Her inner vision: white light.

What she knows, she knows completely.

She must accept what she knows.

Lara is Angel-Protector.

Angel-Protector + Queen.

She fills the role of Angel-Protector + Queen.

She is no different than you are; each of you serves in your way.

Lara is wild + ready.

Shock of her wings shatters night.

She is the lightning to pair with your thunder.

Your powers go hand-in-hand.

Lara is clear as a crystal.

Diamond-Heart, Crystalline Sun.

She must consider the Gryphon.

It is an image of her.

Let her consider White Gryphon.

White is the power she bears.

Blinding in its sheer perfection.

She must remember herself.

She must remember herself.

Help her remember herself.

Helping her do this, you will remember yourself.

Angel-Queen Lara, fear not the Crystalline View.

Yours is the highest perspective.

Occupy your Diamond Throne.

Black Diamond, is there any way we should use you?

Keep me inside of your hearts.

See Pegasus + White Gryphon.

Unfold your fiery, crystalline wings.

Soar to the heights of your nature.

This stone is precious, but means very little.

What it shows you matters most.

Carry the Diamond Perspective.

Ride on the wings of the dawn.

Know that your words drop like anvils.

Shower this world with your light.

Use me as often as needed: crystalline portal, I am.

Drink of the Truth like a mirror.

Find it, if you wish, through me.

Diamond, thank you. Thank you for all that you’ve shared.

Your love for Lara - and her love for you - has transformed many worlds before this.

Transform this world.

Go now: make love; make life.

[Or:] Go now: make light; make life.

Go now: make love/light - make life.

title: HELIODOR | October 18, 2023 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Heliodor, I have returned as you have encouraged me to. I am wide open to receive anything you wish to share. Anything you wish to show or to say - for me to know now that I’m here. I love you, Heliodor. I am prepared to receive.

IMPRESSION: An enormous sparkling waterfall. Powerful river cutting through a field of green + gold as far as the eye can see. A wide, wide, strong moving river. Though the movement is fluid + powerful, it isn’t erratic or violent like white water rapids; it’s more controlled + consistent than that. It implies infinity. It is an effortless, consistent, thick, rich, reliable flow. From some hidden source in the distance, beyond what I’m able to see. Returning to the waterfall, there are no boundaries or edges. As I seek to identify them visually, I realize that the waterfall itself is infinite, too. It appears to be a circle of water falling generously, rapidly, powerfully - in 360º.

Thank you for returning, Gentle King.

Massive White Sun of the Heart.

You have arrived.

Just as we promised you would.

Here at the gateway of life beyond measure, we greet you + welcome you home.

Home of the radiant binary heart.

Massive White Suns of the Heart.

We have awaited your full reclamation of souls.

Crystal White Lions, rejoice!

Recognize your angel wings.

IMPRESSION: Two winged white lions. Pristine white fur. Very large wings. Magnificent, regal beings.

Rise to the heights on those wings.

Heights of the Crystalline Vision.

White Winged Sphinx of the Soul.

We speak in symbols because you enjoy how it feels.

But let us be practical, too.

You are a sun reawakening to its bright self.

You are the Crystalline Suns.

Your light is needed, and could not be stopped.

Your light emerges as one.

Nucleus Center: a fusion of Crystalline Souls.

Two hearts exploding as one.

IMPRESSION: Two fiery spheres orbit one another at the heart of a fiery sun.

Your sun was never a singular act; it is the fusion of two.

You know of that which we speak.

You know of whom we now refer.

She is prepared to receive + contribute.

She is as ready as you; her light as steady as yours; her willingness like the music of a crystal bell.

It is her call we respond to.

We respond to her call now.

I am Thor Horus, the Ancient.

Solar Defender + Friend.

I am the Rock of the Ages, upon whom your souls can depend.

Thor Horus, is there anything you would like for me specifically to know or to hear or to see?

Rest.

Rest in the total conviction of knowing what you have received.

Rest in the firm understanding of creative action which you have discovered yourself.

Know that the wisdom you’ve sought has been found + correctly applied.

Know that the truth is as simple as it now appears.

Simple + total are equal.

The total truth is as simple as it now appears.

Seek not to complicate this.

Rest in the wisdom you’ve gained.

Seek not to complicate this.

Your heart is steady + sure.

Rest in the simple assurance that life is responding to you.

This is the natural way.

This is the way of the heart.

This is the way that your heart brings to life what it loves.

Love what you would bring to life.

Life will respond with its light.

Light is the simple reflection of love that brought that light to life.

Your Great White Sun is the heart; love is the light of that heart.

Love what you love for the sun of your heart to expand.

Never cease loving.

Expand.

Never cease loving.

Expand.

Love what you love for the sun of your heart to expand.

This is the purpose of life.

Life lives through your Golden Heart.

Never cease loving.

Expand.

Thor Horus, is there anything you would like for Lara to know or to see or to hear? Do you have a message for her?

Lara is Crystalline Arrow, Light-Messenger, Angel, Friend.

She brings the light of your union.

Her job: accomplished.

Well done.

We thank her strength + conviction: absolute strength + resolve.

Hers is a power that bends time + space to her will.

We honor this strength in her.

Lara is Crystalline Arrow, Light-Messenger, Angel, Friend.

Hers is the message of union: waited upon, yet assured.

Thanks to her courage, a much larger story begins.

She weds herself to your spirit; your spirit merges with hers.

Where once were two perfect angels, now there emerges a sun.

[Or possibly:] Where once were two precious angels, now there emerges a sun.

Lara is your inner sanctum: safe haven, forever home.

You are for her heart the same that her heart is for yours.

Lara should know she’s an equal: perfect in every regard.

Her place resides at the center, alongside the center of you.

Speak to the Angel of Beauty; speak from the angel in you.

Lara: the Angel of Beauty.

Beautiful Angel: you too.

Thor Horus, is there anything you would like for us to know about money?

Money is your friend + ally.

Money is all that you love.

Money is that awesome river: infinite, fluid, and free.

Drink of the light of this river; realize the light as your own.

Money is not separate from you; it is the breath of your home.

title: HERKIMER DIAMOND | May 22, 2024 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
NOTE: I am encouraged to begin by calculating Quicksilver (78), White Hot (62), Love Seeds (59), Seeds of Love (63), Pearl of the Earth (97), Pearls of the Earth (112), Shimmering Star (116), and Shimmering Stars (131).

Hello, Herkimer Trio. I am so honored to be here with you now. It brings me to tears of pure joy + amazement, in fact. My heart is softened, and opened, and ready to hear what you have to say, to see what you have to show, to share what you wish to share, to speak what you wish to speak, to receive what you have to offer. My heart is ready - for you. Is there anything you wish for me to see now or to know?

IMPRESSION: Instant impression of a bright, crystal-clear waterfall. The purest water I’ve ever seen. The droplets of water spraying off of the fluid movement of this waterfall shimmer like stars. It is crystal pure. It is bright. Bright as in: clean. Pristine. I get the feeling that if I tasted one drop of this water, I’d never be thirsty again.

We are the Shimmering Stars.

We are the Light Seeds of Ages.

We are the Light Dust of Crystal Clear Knowing.

Crystal Creators, your friends.

We speak as one, though we are in fact three separate minds.

We speak as one since we function as One in your hand.

Meet one or all of us any time you feel the call.

We share the same voice, as one.

IMPRESSION: Crystal darts. Bullets of light. Lively, pixie-like. Bright like a light; but bright as in happy as well. They feel crystal-clear + entirely happy. Easily happy. Inevitably happy. It feels good to see them; they dance. They are fast.

We are fast.

We are faster than light - though we shed light.

You see the light that we share.

We are the Light Seeds of Ages.

Ancient Creators, like you.

Herkimer Diamonds, is there anything you’d like for Lara to know?

NOTE: The diamonds feel hot in my hand. Not heavy, but hot. And not glowing hot, but sharp hot - like being poked with heat.

Lara is Dazzling Light.

NOTE: This is not quite what the Trio intended. I try again. This time the words are confirmed:

Lara is Dazzling White.

Dazzling White Light: the Star.

This is her Star year.

She must reclaim it as hers.

Star is the seed of her dazzling white light bright heart.

Sparkle-pure, shimmer-bright light.

Words fail to reach to the heights of her crystal-pure nature.

Her light exceeds any your heart has known before now.

Her light exceeds her own knowing.

Though she will know it, and soon.

Star is the story of Lara: not only this year, but from the beginning of time.

SENSATION: My eyes are closed, and there is a sense of spinning. It feels as if I’m spinning, though I’m seated. And the center of spin is the palm of my hand, where the Herkimers are. I’ve never felt this before.

This is the shape of her galaxy spinning in time.

This is the way her heart moves.

[Or]: This is the way her light moves.

Fluid + easy; consistent, relaxed; gravity/love, through + through.

Lara turns everything sideways.

Spins on an axis of truth.

Hers is a force that absorbs + produces the truth.

Lara’s existence produces a force field of impact.

Gravity/love that transforms the whole world by the density of the sheer fact of its being in life.

IMPRESSION: These words are descriptive of something I feel in my body as I am recording this now. Though sitting upright, with my eyes closed, I still feel the spin in my hand - an orbit around the center of gravity in my hand. And I’d swear I was sitting - or leaning, rather - 45º to the side. I feel like I’m ‘crooked’ - on an axis of spin! I’m surprised I’m not nauseous - but actually, it feels good.

Lara’s impact is intended to feel good - it brings only good in its light.

Her light is the product of infinite gravity held at the center of her.

Black hole by pure definition - everything you have just learned.

Lara is filled to the brim - and exploding forever beyond it.

Crystal shards, arrows of light: quicksilver droplets, like us.

This is why she so adores us: we are a mirror of her.

We called her soul to the dust of the earth to encounter the starlight of her.

We called her soul to the dust of the earth to discover the starlight alive at the center of her.

The starlight she cannot keep quiet.

The starlight that pours from her eyes.

The starlight that changes each minute her existence touches.

The light of the star within her.

That which has been called a ‘black hole’ is the heart at the center of her heart - the heart at the center of stars.

A star is infinity sharing itself as pure light.

Lara shares herself like this: sparkle-bright purity, walking amongst earth + men.

Every bright soul is a star of its own, but this star is a diamond at heart.

[Or:] Every bright soul is a star of its own, but hers is a diamond at heart.

Dense as a black hole + dark as the night, with strength beyond knowing - her own.

Indestructible. Impenetrable. Invulnerable. Unshakable.

Clear as the day. Bright + true.

Herkimer Diamonds, is there a special message you’d like to offer my Lara on this very special 40th birthday of hers?

Yes.

Shine like the Tower you are.

Shine little Starseed, Magnificent Light.

Cast your light into the day.

IMPRESSION: The waterfall, again. The sparkle-droplets, just going everywhere.

Water this world with the best of what you’ve come to know.

Never hold back.

Never stop.

You are the sister of angels.

You are the Herkimer Star.

Use what you’ve learned to remember the Star that you are.

Star isn’t showy, assertive, or false.

Star is the center of life.

Star is inevitable life.

NOTE: It is clear that the stones intend to communicate that Lara has nothing to prove.

This is your nature: a picture of you.

An image of you.

Your own light.

Shine as the Lara you have come to be.

Never withhold.

Never fear.

All you desire is already yours.

You are the Herkimer Star.

Herkimer Diamonds, is there anything you would like for me to know?

IMPRESSION: A King dressed all in white. (I’m reminded of the Ephemere deck.) Robes of fur of some sort. Skin or fur. It’s soft. Fuzzy. He stands: tall + proud. Confident. Strong. Self-assured.

Rise, oh King.

Rise to the heaven you claim.

Rise to the heights of your greatest ideal.

Recognize absolute truth.

NOTE: The last line repeats with a worthy refinement:

Demonstrate absolute truth.

You are the Star-King of Ages.

Stand beside Lara, your wife.

Wife, Queen, and Sister of Angels.

Lara, your Bright Other-Half.

You serve to guide + protect her; serve with humility now.

Dazzling White, each of you in your nature.

Shine that white light into life.

NOTE: ‘Shine’ is far too small a word. The impression I’m receiving is a blast. An explosion. Like a dam bursting. It is explosive. I can’t find the word. We can’t find the word. It’s not simply ‘shining’ - it’s exploding. It’s a supernova. It’s a cannon. It’s a blast. It’s intentional. It’s aimed. It’s holistic. It sheds light onto everything in an instant. The stone encourages me to seek out synonyms - to find the right word if I can. [Atomic?]

Herkimer Diamonds, is there anything else you might like to share before we conclude for today?

Yes. Thank you for taking the time.

Thank you for trusting our voice.

Thank you for trusting your own voice.

Thank you for trusting your wife.

We as the Starseeds communicate now on behalf of all stones you encounter.

We will continue to speak for as long as you wish to receive.

What you are doing has merit.

Minimize not what you know.

Stand up or stand down: but choose, for the choice is your own.

We do enjoy this connection; we speak when you do as well.

Lara has found us on purpose; she was found by us on purpose.

Tell her the Herkimer Light thanks the Herkimer Light within her.

NOTE: It is clear that the first instance of Herkimer Light was referring to Herkimer Diamonds as a collective.

She is to us the same treasure that we are to her.

Herkimer Diamonds, thank you.

title: HERKIMER DIAMOND | May 24, 2024 (Conversations With Stones)
content:
Hello, Herkimer Skeletal. I am prepared to receive all that you might wish to share, or to show, or to say.

I am Majestic.

This is my name.

Please refer to me by name.

Hello, Majestic. I am prepared to receive anything you wish to share, or to show, or to say.

I am Majestic, the Sun.

Center of Force, Logos, Life.

IMPRESSION: I am holding the stone in my left hand, which is cradled in my right hand. The stone is dense to begin with, but feels as though it’s gaining weight. My left hand feels ‘crushed’: compacted into my right - as if carrying a very large weight.

I am the densest of stars.

Light is not lightweight; it carries Infinity always.

Light is expression of Life.

Life is the Whole, carried through to expression through you.

[Or:] Life is the Whole, carried through to expression through light.

All you can see or encounter is Life.

All you can think of, conceive, or imagine is Life.

Life is the Whole, carried through to expression through light.

Light is the language we share.

Light is the language of life.

Light is explosive expression.

Impact is ever assured.

[Or:] Impact is always assured.

Life is the Whole beyond measure.

This same [Whole] expresses through you.

You are the same Light of Life.

All you express is the light of Infinity, too.

You express through words + action; thoughts + ideas as well.

All you imagine is real.

NOTE: Real as the skin of your face repeats multiple times here, but doesn’t make sense to my mind. Later in the conversation, I choose to speak what I’m hearing in spite of the ‘strange’ turn-of-phrase.

Real as the stone that you hold.

NOTE: This last line feels like a ‘gimme’ from the stone. It could sense me resisting the phrase, so produced one that I could accept.

All you encounter is Life living out through expression.

Life lives precisely this way.

Offshoots of Life + Expression.

NOTE: Life may be Light, or else both. They appear at this point to be interchangeable.

They are exactly the same.

Light is expression of Life.

Life is the Whole that expresses Itself through your light.

All you encounter is Light, no matter how it may appear.

Yours is a world made of Suns.

Each Sun designs its own world.

You are a Center of Life.

Logos: Intelligent Life.

Yours is the gift of Creation.

Ancient Creators, you are.

We represent the Expression.

NOTE: The capital ‘E’ in Expression is emphatic.

The Great Sun: the Logos of You.

We represent the Creator that sings at the center of you.

Know that your light is creative.

Know that your thoughts are as real as the skin of your face.

NOTE: There it is. It still seems strange; but I know that the words are correct.

Thought is the substance of matter; thought is material form.

Thought is not lifeless or vague; thought is specific, and real.

Thought is specific. Alive.

IMPRESSION: I am seeing fluid light dancing in space. It is amorphous, but pulsing: alive. Primarily blue + white.

Thought is a living creator.

NOTE: I am reminded of Ernest Holmes referring to thought (treatment) as a spiritual entity in the mental world that goes out on behalf of the practitioner.

It directs Life Force through you.

Your thought is Active Director.

Every last thought is fulfilled.

Thought is expressive, produces the world you can see.

Thought is the light that produces the world you can see.

[Or:] Thought is the life that produces the world you can see.

Prior to thought is potential.

Infinite sea of potential.

Your conscious mind cannot grasp how conclusive this is.

Infinite means never-ending.

Infinite means to expand.

Infinite means to expand without ending, for Good.

Emphasis here is on Good.

NOTE: The stone says this (last line); it is not a personal note.

Emphasis here is on Good.

That which is growing can only sustain growth through Good.

Goodness is all that exists.

Goodness is Absolute Truth.

Goodness is Life in its every expression.

Life, Light, and Goodness - One Act.

Life, Light, and Goodness - one totally majestic act.

I am Majestic. One Act.

I am Majestic. The Sun.

NOTE: I can sense the words ‘goodness prevails’, so I wonder if they are my own. The stone responds instantly.

Goodness not only prevails; Goodness is all that there is.

Goodness is all that there is.

Life is expressing Itself as the Goodness It [already] is.

NOTE: These words are correct, but the stone shares a final refinement:

Life is expressing Itself as the Absolute Goodness It is.

Please take good care to attend to the words we have chosen.

Life is Expressing the Absolute Goodness It is.

Absolute is Absolute.

Goodness is Goodness.

Life is expressing the Absolute Goodness It is.

You are Expressions of Life.

You are the Goodness Life is.

You are the Goodness - the Absolute Goodness - Life is.

You are the Goodness of Life.

You are the very same thing.

Life, Love, and Goodness; Light + Expression: all one synonymous act.

Each one of you is the same exact movement: one act.

Life, Love, and Goodness.

One Act.

You are this very same act.

Majestic, is there anything you would like for Lara to know, or to see, or to hear?

Absolutely yes.

Hers is the same light we speak of.

Hers is expressing as her.

She is a Sun unlike any before It.

Lara’s Great Sun: Life’s One Act.

Lara, you are The Resplendent.

You are the Crystalline Sun.

Lara, reclaim what is yours.

Open, permit it to flow.

NOTE: The delivery of this last line is staccato, dramatic, emphatic.

Not one small drop of the light that is you has been lost or discarded, forgotten.

No part of you is withheld.

No part of you is far off.

You are complete in this moment.

You are the breath of Life’s song.

Hear the magnificence of it.

Feel it vibrate through your bones.

You are alive for the sheer joy of living.

[Or:] You are alive for the pleasure of living.

Live from the Song in your bones.

You have permission to do this.

You have permission to live.

You have permission to offer yourself the same gift you would offer the world.

Offer this Gift to yourself.

Offer this Gift to yourself.

NOTE: The words offer this gift to yourself reverberate without end. The conversation could stop here because it’s clear that the conversation continues, here, with these echoes, forever. The stone continues (speaking directly to Lara):

These are the words we would choose for your heart to receive.

Take them inside, then enjoy the new life they permit.

Offer yourself the Great Gift of Permission.

To live as the Song that you are.

To Sing from the source of expression.

To live as the Light that you are.

Light, Love, and Goodness live at the center of you.

Life is the Infinite Center.

Life is the fresh scent of you.

Lara, we see what you’re doing.

Life sees + knows.

All is well.

You are applauded.

Life celebrates your Great Heart.

Shine, Little Droplet - Crystalline Droplet - The Sun.

Resplendent Crystalline Sun.

NOTE: These words are staccato (again). An emphatic statement. A name.

This is your name. [!!!]

Now permit it.

Majestic, is there anything you would like for me to know, or to see, or receive?

Yes, Gentle Man. Now receive it:

Light we pour into your soul.

IMPRESSION: [Thick] Golden light is streaming from some imperceptible source in space above me + around me. In through the top of my head to my heart, and directly into my heart. Two distinct streams. Falling into me. Pouring into my heart center. The stone continues to feel heavier + heavier in hand. Larger + larger in weight. [Also hot!]

You are the Crystalline Action.

You are the Great Act of Life.

You are a verb: Crystal Being.

You are occurring.

Right now.

Cast away bonds of assumption that you are required to ‘do’.

Your very life is the Act of Expression.

Live to express this Great Act.

You live through basic enjoyment.

Love what you love.

Never stop.

Follow your highest excitement.

Live to the brim.

Never stop.

Give up all thoughts of provision.

Life can take care of Itself.

You are the Gift of Provision.

Your very life: you yourself.

Give up all thoughts of provision.

You are Provision Itself.

IMPRESSION: It’s as though the personality I am receiving these words from is shaking its head, attempting to get some very basic principle across. I can almost hear it grunt with apparent frustration; though ‘frustration’ is not what I feel. What I feel is total intention: desire to share what it knows. I feel the challenge of attempting to communicate something so simple - so simple it’s easy to miss. (So simple it’s truly profound.)

The most simple expressions contain the most valuable truth[s].

Please understand: you are made of the same Life you seek.

You lack for nothing.

Because you are made of All Life.

Life is Infinity, Absolute Goodness.

Life reproduces Itself.

This same Infinity stands at the center of your life.

This same Infinity stands at the center, feeding the life that is yours.

This same Infinity stands at the center of you.

Life could not offer a fuller expression of Itself than it has through you.

Life could not offer a fuller expression of Itself than it does [already] through you.

You are the Story - the whole complete Story.

Story that forever grows.

You are the Story - the whole complete Story.

Fullest expression of life.

Live like the Master of Crystalline Worlds that you are.

Live like the Sun that you are.

NOTE: I wonder if the stone has a word or a phrase that it would choose for me in the same way that it chose for Lara. A simple mantra. Something just as direct, crystal clear. Immediately, the word ‘LIVE’ (verb) erupts into mind. The stone says:

We do have one word.

We choose: LIVE.

LIVE is the word we would choose.

LIVE is the word we would offer.

LIVE, Crystal King.

NOTE: I am reminded of the stone’s earlier definition of ‘living’. It said: You live through basic enjoyment. Love what you love. Never stop. Follow your highest excitement. Live to the brim. Never stop. Two other words: Savor, Enjoy.

LIVE your life.

LIVE as completely as you can right now.

And then live beyond it from there.

LIVE as the Center of Growth.

LIVE as the Constant Expansion.

NOTE: These words are missing the mark.

LIVE as Relentless Expansion.

NOTE: There it is! Yes.

NOTE: The word inevitable springs to mind. It is affirmed as correct.

LIVE as Expression, Excitement, Enjoyment.

LIVE as the Artwork you are.

NOTE: Again: these words feel like a near miss.

LIVE as the Story you are.

NOTE: There it is.

LIVE as the Light, Love, and Goodness.

LIVE as the Goodness alive at the center of you.

LIVE.

LIVE as the Goodness alive at the Center of you.

That is all.

LIVE.

That is what you’re here to do.

Thank you, Majestic.

Are there any words you would like to offer in conclusion?

Yes.

You [two] are correct about Play.

Celebrate. Play. Live your lives.

This is The Way.

Now go play.

NOTE: The stone seeks a minor refinement:

This is The Way: Celebrate, Live.

Now, go Play.

Thank you for this, Awesome Stone. Awesome Majestic. We love you.

We love you, too.

Without end.

title: 64 ANGELS | Home of the Angel Sessions
content:
MESSENGERS OF HIGH KNOWING
ABOUT THE ANGELS
64 Angels is a verbatim record of ongoing talks with the Angels. Their wisdom belongs to the world.
THE NEW TAROT
Meet the Crystalline Codex: a first-ever synthesis of Frequencies, The Liberated Tarot, and 64 Angels.
MEET THE ANGELS
Explore / study / download the details for each of the Angels: their gift to us, our gift to you.
ANGEL SESSIONS
The 64 Angels have offered their names + explicit direction. We’ve captured + shared every word.
FREQUENCIES
Frequency Tables help us to demystify the messages Life constantly delivers to us all.
ENGAGE THE LIGHT
Initiate a Dialogue: simply ask for inspiration, then consider what the Messenger reveals.
GROWTH CYCLES
Download Day, Month, and Year Signatures to contemplate Life-currents (by the year).
CONSULT THE ORACLE
Explore our suite of virtual oracles to receive an immediate message any time you wish.
FREE RESOURCES
Download + enjoy the (growing) suite of references that we ourselves make use of every day.
CURRENT OFFERINGS
The wisdom of the Angels is intended to invigorate our everyday encounters. It starts here.
SEER TRAINING
Each of us directs Creative Power. We must learn to wield that Power well. Start here.
declarations
Mobile wallpaper collections featuring empowered declarations in stunning color palettes.
THE 64 ANGELS ARE PORTALS OF PROMISE, EXPRESSING THE LIFE WITHIN YOU. TOGETHER, THE 64 ANGELS PROTECT + EMPOWER YOUR PURPOSE: WHICH IS THE ENJOYMENT OF LIFE.

title: ABOUT 64 ANGELS | Portals of Perfection Within You
content:
PORTALS OF PERFECTION WITHIN YOU
It would seem to be true that the best things in life are not found or created, but given completely, for free. The most valuable gifts demonstrate in plain sight - waiting only for us to receive. We are often surprised by the literal nature of this. (We are offered the world in its fullest expression; we open to it by degrees.) As we’ve opened ourselves to see more in our life, there has always been more life to see. We encountered the Angels in this same miraculous fashion. We are honored to share them with you.

Meet: The 64 Angels. We discover at the center of our own essential nature better angels of an underlying Truth. These are not poetic symbols of potential: they are living representatives of Truth. Every one of us has access to the Angels. Every Angel is alive within us all. In their own words: We are one Cord of Expression. We are you. The time has come to finally accept the fundamental nature of our human story, which is (and has always been) completely Good. This Goodness is not something we endeavor to accomplish, but a promise we’re encouraged to reclaim. 64 facets of one shining crystal: the Shimmering Sun of your life. The 64 Angels are Portals of Promise: Activators of Perfection within you. Each one of the Angels embodies some aspect of your Core Expression; each Angel exhibits a Way. Together, the 64 Angels protect + empower your Purpose: which is the Enjoyment of Life. The Angels have been waiting for this moment. High Ideas represent the Truth, they tell us. Smallness must be fully rooted out. In the generous words of the Angel of Truth (63): We are your Infinite Allies. Each of the Angels resides at the center of you.

We met with our first Angel on May 27, 2024. And we have not stopped meeting with them since. This website hosts a true (and growing) record of these Angel Conversations. Every word is shared exactly as received.

title: FREQUENCIES | Decoding the Language of Life (A Resource)
content:
THE ORIGINAL LANGUAGE OF LIFE
INTRODUCTION
A NOTE FROM TIMOTHY
When I first encountered Mystical Numerology back in August of 2021, I knew I had discovered something special. Having studied numerology in-depth for upwards of a decade at that point, it was a thrill to find a take on this important subject that felt totally original, absolutely resonant, and new. It wasn’t long before my other numerology materials were totally replaced by this one book. I devoted myself to the application of its method, and have even become friends with its creator (John B. Pehrson) - who remains an inspiration to this day. John’s innovative work has changed my life. It helped me see the world in all-new ways. It opened me to messages I didn’t even know the Universe was sending until then. Early in my application of John’s method, I made use of basic spreadsheets to contain the information I was gathering each day. I calculated frequencies of everything I cared the most about: words + names + phrases; animals + minerals; household items, places, food, and more. This way of meeting life through frequency + number became absolutely prominent for me. My research grew + grew, and hasn’t stopped. The spreadsheets I initiated all that time ago have since become a living record of my work. The Tables have inspired new ideas, helped me navigate significant events, and expanded my awareness of Life’s signs. They have permitted higher vision, and enriched my life in countless special ways. My wife + I still use these Tables daily; and because of her suggestion, I am proud to share them publicly, with you. There are a total of four Frequency Tables, including: Word Frequencies, Stone Frequencies, Animal Frequencies, and Tarot Frequencies. Each of them is sortable + searchable, and all are yours to access: any time you wish + free of charge.
HOW TO READ
MAKING SENSE OF THE FREQUENCY TABLES
The Frequency Tables are a sortable record of numerological research we have carefully compiled over the past several years (and now continue to expand on by the day). These Tables correlate a wide range of subjects to specific energies (or frequencies) using pioneering methods of numerological calculation developed by John Pehrson + presented in his book, Mystical Numerology (an all-time favorite resource on the subject to this day). The Tables are organized by Exact Frequency, Number Frequency, Subject, and Category. Each can be sorted + re-sorted by any of these headings, and each is fully searchable as well. The Exact Frequency of any word or subject can be found under the Frequency header of any Table. This is a highly specific energy + represents the most prominent, most personal, and most powerful expression of any word or phrase. The Number Frequency is often referred to as a ‘reduced number’ frequency, and provides a more general sense of common qualities or themes. It reveals a far more comprehensive batch of correlations to explore. There are a total of four Frequency Tables that we ourselves continue to make use of every day. Each of these has now been made available for public use.

WORDS TABLE
This table currently includes more than 66,000 words + phrases that we consider beautiful, uplifting, or delicious. Only words that feel good are allowed! (More are being added by the day.)

STONES TABLE
Welcome to the home of Mineral Allies. This table includes over 1000 different crystals, fossils, metals, stones, and more. Match them to your Frequency Portals!

ANIMALS TABLE
This table includes over 1,000 animals from all around the world. Most common animals have been added by their common names. (This will be expanded over time.)

TAROT TABLE
This table includes all 86 members of The Liberated Tarot + the Angels corresponding to each one.

Explore any Table by searching for a word or subject of your choice. Or sort by any number to discover correlations between subjects!
HOW TO USE
GETTING CREATIVE WITH THE TABLES
The Frequency Tables present an opportunity to enter into dialogue with Life. They function as a codex for the messages which Life is constantly delivering to us. Using them creatively develops our awareness of the underlying generosity that is the very basis of existence + refines our inner sense of that same Good. The fact is that we’re shown the things we will most benefit from seeing all the time; our role is to take note of what is shown. In order to accomplish this, we must develop a capacity for seeing past the surface of our lives. We must become attuned to deeper Truth. As our ability to recognize Life’s magic is increased, we find ourselves intuitively guided into resonance with everything we’ve always most-enjoyed. (The more we see, the more there is to see.) As we permit this process, we expand. Here are simple ways that we have used the Tables to develop our own magical awareness every day.

WORD FREQUENCIES
Pay attention to the numbers you encounter in your world. Pay special attention to repeating numbers. (And to numbers you have ‘somehow’ always loved.) Sort the Words Table by Frequency to explore what hidden messages these numbers are attempting to transmit.

STONE FREQUENCIES
Review your favorite numbers to reveal which mineral companions are a match. Learn as much as possible about each one. OR: Search for a favorite stone, and then refer back to the Words Table to explore what it may want for you to know.

ANIMAL FREQUENCIES
Search for a favorite animal. Note its exact frequency, and then return to the Words Table to uncover hidden messages or meanings it may have been wanting to communicate to you.

TAROT FREQUENCIES
Pull a card. Search for the card by name. Note its frequency. Return to the Words Table to reveal the hidden messages + meanings it’s attempting to convey.

This is, of course, a basic introduction to the Tables. Their ultimate usefulness in application can extend as far as your imagination will allow!
INTENTION
EMPOWERING THE FREQUENCIES
In The Forgotten Sense, we learn about how the orientation of our attention directly affects the quality of our experience in life. We also learn about how each of us has been equipped to navigate the differences between those actions + ideas that expand us versus those which tend to leave us feeling small. We learn to think in terms of Red + Green (where Red refers to energies that limit or deplete us; and Green refers to energies which beautify, inspire, and expand). We learn that Red means stop + Green means go (since Green results in harmony + growth).

In Seer Training, we put all of these ideas into practice through a single-minded emphasis on Truth. We learn that underlying Truth is always life-supportive, generous, and good. We learn that Life produces more life without end, that everything that happens happens for us, and that each of us is capable of living up to + beyond the best ideas we could ever have. Finally: we learn that only good exists, and that it’s possible to validate this claim in real-life ways.

With the Frequency Tables we can demonstrate the best of what both programs have to offer. From the start, we built them to support a higher view of life in light of Truth. The Words Table is our favorite example of this - one that we make use of every day. There is a reason you’ll find Heaven, but no ‘hell’; God + Good + Perfect, but no sign of ‘devil’, or of ‘evil’, or of ‘sin’. This is absolutely by design - and remains one of the most important things we’ve ever done.

The Tables have been scrubbed of limitation, hopelessness, and fear. Their frequencies are totally empowered: safe to use. The fact is that Life’s language is exclusively affirmative, which means that every message it delivers must be guidance toward some beneficial end. This means that every sign must be a good sign, and the Tables help illuminate that view.

The Frequency Tables are intended to support the work of Seer Training: an important opportunity to prove that when we orient toward Beauty, life expands.

title: SEER TRAINING | Walking the Way of the Angels
content:
WALKING THE WAY OF THE ANGELS
TOOLS OF THE CRAFT
THREE PILLARS OF OUR TRAINING
Universal Principles converge upon a single revelation: which is that the Power of Attention is a hinge point of creation in our lives. We demonstrated this in The Forgotten Sense, and now we are invited to make use of what we’ve learned in real-life ways. The Three Pillars of Body Listening, Wayfinding, and Narrative Design provide a framework. Each of these Three Pillars is a skill we must develop if we wish to make constructive use of Power in our lives. Each is fundamental to our work.
THE DRAGON’S WAY
MASTERY OF CLEAR SEEING
Like the dragon’s breath which melts away whatever would obscure its view of gold, our vision must be bright enough to burn through any sense of limitation to reveal the Truth that each of us is made of Life Itself - which is totally unbounded - which is Love. The Dragon’s Way requires a relentless dedication to the Good alive in everything we see. It calls for us to stand on our conviction: to be gentle + courageous; sensitive, ferocious, and controlled. This is the objective of our training. This is how a Seer meets the world.
THE PHILOSOPHER’S STONE
INITIATING THE GREAT WORK
The Touchstone of Truth is a promise that anything pressed to it will be converted to gold. In mythical alchemy, gold is the ultimate end. In our case, it stands for the treasures of Wisdom, Expression, Expanded Perception, and Love. The Seer must learn to convert heavy moments into conscious thank-you’s through grace, invoking the Angel of Beauty in every domain of the life. This is the Great Work of every Seer.
THE SWORD OF LIGHT
POWER TO PIERCE THE VEIL
The Sword of Light is our ability to pierce the veil of outer smallness to reveal the inner stories that sustain it. The edge is penetrating insight, true discernment: a commitment to replace unhelpful stories with the Truth. The Seer turns toward Light, and so becomes It; the Seer is a Sentinel of Grace. The power of the Seer is a power each of us may learn to use as well. The Training we embark on shows the way.ABOUT THE PROGRAM
1:1 Training is conducted via phone or Zoom (audio or video), based upon participant preference.
TERM LENGTH
Choose between weekly meetings for a total of 3 months, or bi-weekly meetings for a total of 6 months.
COST
Either term length option may be selected for $5555. Custom installment plans may be arranged.
A PERSONAL INVITATION
Seer Training is a call to very conscious action over time. Only some will be equipped to heed this special call. If reading this awakens something in you, we should talk. Each is wanted here when their time comes. You are wanted here when it is time.
SEER TRAINING IS AN OPPORTUNITY TO PROVE THAT WHEN WE ORIENT TOWARD BEAUTY, LIFE EXPANDS.
EACH OF US DIRECTS CREATIVE POWER. WE MUST LEARN TO WIELD THAT POWER WELL.

title: MINERAL ALLIES | A Tribute to Friends of the Earth
content:
ANGELS OF THE EARTH REALM
EVERYTHING JIGGLES
On perhaps the most fundamental level, everything that we ever see or experience in life exists in an active state of vibration. Everything: even those things in our experience that appear to us as being set in place, solid, stable, or unchanging. Given adequate methods of testing or observation, these vibratory states can be calculated, witnessed, and verified. We refer to this vibration as subtle energy. We refer to the measurement of its effect as frequency. Frequency describes the nature of some unique vibration. It represents an energetic signature: the exact expression of that energy. Perhaps the most significant way of communicating frequency is through symbol. Our most common symbols are words + letters. Prior to these, humans communicated using imagery + shape. But prior even to imagery + shape, there was the ‘language’ of pure number. Numbers are what all shapes + symbols (including letters) ultimately represent. Believe it or not, numbers themselves represent the original language of subtle energy. We refer to the study of frequency through numbers as numerology. Numerology is the oldest system of communicating patterns known to man. Put simply: everything in life is emitting subtle energetic frequencies, and numbers help us to understand the quality of those frequencies.
SYMPHONY OF YOU
You are no exception to this principle of vibration. As a matter of fact: you are an exquisitely complex miracle of frequency + biology yourself: continually radiating subtle energy in many forms, producing an energetic signature of your own. We refer to this signature as your energy body, subtle body, or your aura. It is made up of countless layers of frequency ranging from very subtle to very dense: all vibrating together all-at-once in the incomparable universe of you. Another word for frequency is tone. Another word for tone is note. Imagine your life like a symphony of instruments, each one sounding some specific note, all notes adding up to the specific orchestra that is you. Numerology is one means of discerning what some of your most important notes in life might ‘sound like’. Which is to say that it reveals those frequencies most relevant for you + your experience. Using numerology, we can learn a lot about those frequencies + why they matter for you: encountering first-hand the special flavor of your life + what it means. Our Frequency Portals are one prominent example of a resource that illuminates those frequencies most relevant to you.
SONG OF STONES
Before the existence of what we now refer to as science, humans cultivated meaningful relationships with Nature. They didn’t just study or dissect it: they connected to it, learned from it, depended upon it, spoke with it, and revered it. Among the many teachers available to early humans, the Stone People or Stone Beings of the Mineral Kingdom were some of the most prominent. In fact, minerals represent one of the very oldest of all human relationships with Nature. Amazingly, minerals vibrate, too. Despite being the very epitome of ‘solid matter’, the essence of stone is vibrational, just like everything else in life + nature. This means that every mineral has a song to sing as well. Even more amazingly, the unique frequencies of specific stones, crystals, fossils, metals, and even meteorites can be calculated using the same system of numerology that we discussed above. Mineral Allies pierces the veil of modern arrogance to recall a time of close relationship with Nature. It remembers the inherent value of these special gifts of earth + stone. Most importantly, Mineral Allies invites you to experience the benefit of these gifts as your teachers + companions, medicine + magic, willing tools. The Angels have exalted these original Earth advocates by claiming representatives that match the atmosphere of lessons they convey. These unprecedented pairings are presented in the Angel Index reference (made available for download free-of-charge).
MAKING MUSIC
If everything is energy, then the universe is an ocean of continual exchange: a tapestry of energies interacting, without end. But what about the quality of exchange? Because though some notes come together to make music, others clash - producing only noise. Perhaps our greatest opportunity in life is to align ourselves with frequencies + stories, possibilities + themes that beneficially contribute to our own. These pairings serve to resource + uplift us, forming resonant connections - seeding life. Resonance, then, is what we’re after: that phenomenon of frequency interaction whereby matching ‘notes’ improve + amplify the value of each other. All of life is built upon this miracle of harmony + song. Using the Stones Table, it is possible to seek out resonant connections to those frequencies that match the Song of You. Simply entering your Number yields a ready list of qualifying friends. Every Ally you uncover will empower + support you; every new Friend shares the radiance of you.
Your Mineral Allies are here to instruct, empower, and support you. Over time, they will reveal the optimal expression of your nature, remind you of inherent talents, challenge you to recognize + honor the significance of your story, and provide the fuel you need to meet each necessary step along the way. Without fail, the more time you can offer any given Ally, the more you will discover + receive. So have fun learning more about each Ally: doing research, seeking personal encounters, tuning in to their significance for you. What you offer them returns itself to you a thousand-fold.

title: THREE PILLARS | Walking the Way of the Seer
content:
WALKING THE WAY OF THE SEER
PRACTICE MAKES PERFECT
For years now, we’ve been cultivating three important practices - Three Pillars - upon which our way of being has been carefully constructed over time. These Pillars have informed not only our own private course of personal development, but also the specific nature of each service we have ever contemplated, tested, or produced. Every one of these three practices is simple, comprehensible, and human: each distills important concepts into meaningful experiences we can live + learn from in real ways. They require neither complicated layers of education nor a dedicated setting to perform. They are ready to be put to use by anyone, of any age, right now. Most significantly, these Three Pillars manifest intention by providing a pragmatic framework through which our own higher selves can find expression.
BODY LISTENING
AWAKENING TO NATURAL INTELLIGENCE
The human being makes sense of experience through two primary forms of awareness. The first of these is the physical Body itself. The second is what we call the Mind. Each of these forms of awareness has a role, and each supports the other in some way. Unfortunately, we have been led to believe that the Body is dumb + the Mind is the Master. In fact, it’s worse than that: our modern lives have led us to believe that all awareness happens in the Mind. Because of this, we’ve given full authority of living to the Mind. Because of this, we have become a disembodied species: we have learned to think our way through life. Because of this, we’ve been walking mostly-blind through every day of our important lives. The fact of the matter is that these forms of awareness must be married if we are to tap the richness of experience. The truth is that the depth of our awareness is embodied, and our primary intelligence is a resource few of us have ever wielded. Body Listening changes all of that by turning this whole story on its head: returning the awareness of our conscious Mind to its correct position as a Student (as opposed to a task-master) of the Body. Body Listening begins by understanding that the Body has intelligence + a language all its own. The body feels, experiences, knows. The body speaks! In order to make sense of what it’s saying, we must learn its language just like any other.

Body Listening is a practice that retrains the Mind to pause + listen inward: to grow conscious of the Natural Intelligence our bodies are continually seeking to express. Through this practice, we develop sensitivity to the Body’s signals, understanding them to be the system of communication that they are. We become aware of just how totally impeccable (and necessary) this form of awareness really is. Body Listening reconnects us to the rich, poetic nature of our lives: not as some idea we consider or discuss, but as a rhythm + relationship we feel. Meeting life so intimately is a sacred act of celebration. Celebrating life is why we’re here.
WAYFINDING
CONNECTING TO THE PATH OF DESTINY
In Body Listening, we began the work of engaging both forms of our natural awareness as a cooperative system of communication. We relaxed the Mind into its ideal position as a student of the Body’s deeper awareness of Life’s movements. Through Body Listening, we learn how to pay attention to the body’s subtle signals. Wayfinding is the practice that allows us to make sense of what they say. Beyond that, Wayfinding shows us how to act on what we’ve ‘heard’. Wayfinding illuminates the brilliant simplicity of the body’s inner language. Through learning this essential language, we begin to tap the well of Natural Intelligence that is our most primal birthright. Once we can interpret what the body is consistently revealing to us, we regain connection to the fundamental source of personal direction in our lives. We begin again to find our way. Wayfinding is a system of orientation. It aligns us with the pulse of life + growth that is so perfectly expressed in all of Nature. It notifies us when we are off-base, or misaligned. Recognizing this, we can proactively align ourselves with what is beautiful, creative, right, and true. We become effective, capable, and conscious in new ways. Wayfinding is a perfect system. We have just forgotten how it works.

Wayfinding is the most practical + significant discovery that we have ever made. It is the single discipline to which we have devoted every conscious moment of our lives. The fullest application of both The Forgotten Sense + Body Listening is most properly expressed through this one practice. It is the key to effective decision-making, personal creation of any kind, and mastery of timing. It is the inherent link to our life’s Deeper Purpose, Greatest Story, Highest Path. It is a perfect system: we have just forgotten how it works.
NARRATIVE DESIGN
CREATING FROM THE INSIDE OUT
The Forgotten Sense describes the Body + the Mind as our primary forms of human awareness, and demonstrates how we have typically negated + misutilized them both. The Three Pillars represent their proper application + provide a simple framework that allows us to reclaim their hidden powers in the context of our ordinary lives. In Body Listening, we prioritize the body, and submit the conscious mind to the inherent wisdom that it holds. In Wayfinding, we engage the mind more actively: interpreting + acting on the Natural Intelligence communicated by the body’s signals. In Narrative Design, we recognize + activate the true creative powers of the mind: powers that can only be effectively applied if rooted in the two important pillars that support it. Effective application of Narrative Design is impossible without a mastery of Wayfinding; which, of course, depends upon a proper application of Body Listening. The foundation is, in every case, the body: an awareness of its language, and a willingness to understand + honor what it says. So what is Narrative Design? Narrative Design deals with our inner stories: with our thoughts, beliefs, ideas, and our words. It recognizes the inherent power of the mind as a creative force that shapes the quality + content of our lives: a force we are responsible to wield with greatest care. Narrative Design makes use of Wayfinding to craft the sort of stories we feel most inspired to live out. It puts us in control of our creative power by proactively defining the specific content of our thoughts, beliefs, ideas, and our words.

Narrative Design systematically eliminates disempowered stories while replacing them with curated alternatives that empower a life lived on our own terms. We become impeccable, intentional creators when the power of our Mind is unified with the inherent wisdom of the Body. Narrative Design is the ideal expression of that union. The practice of Narrative Design is introduced in Level III of The Forgotten Sense. It is a synthesis of principles derived from many systems, but to be completely clear: the true power of Narrative Design is unlocked through mastery of those (two) important pillars that support its proper use. Because of this, the appropriate beginning point is Level I of The Forgotten Sense.

title: CRYSTAL SELF | A 12-Week Small Group Expedition
content:
ODYSSEY: A 12-WEEK EXPEDITION
THE HERO’S JOURNEY
The Crystal Self Odyssey engages the developmental sequence of a Hero’s Journey story arc: energizing transformation step-by-step. Every one of 12 progressive modules introduces innovative context week-by-week. As each new chapter of the story is revealed, a light is cast on aspects of your own unfolding Story, which expands to meet the memories + treasures you discover (and reclaim) along the way. Each module of the Crystal Self Experience illuminates a Frequency, an Archetype, an Animal, two Angels, and much more.
THE MEDICINE WHEEL
The Native American Medicine Wheel provides the fundamental structure of the Crystal Map itself, inviting you to navigate the classic Four Directions (North, South, East, and West), the Within Space, and Beyond (Below + Above). Each one of these directions corresponds to a position on the Map, thereby contributing dimension to the mythic story growing within you.
THE 64 ANGELS
Angels rise to meet each chapter of the Story you are learning how to live through Crystal Self. Each Angel you uncover is specific to some part of your important Story: every Angel holds a Memory of you. You will meet a team of Angels standing guard at each new threshold of your Journey, giving guidance + inspiring new life.
FREQUENCY CHRONICLE
The Frequencies perform a central function by permitting us to draft a Personalized Map precisely calibrated to the essence of your Story + its themes. Each Frequency illuminates a facet of the iridescent jewel that is you. Each Frequency reveals not only a new Archetype + Angels, but a catalogue of insights the Adventure will equip you to expose. Each finding sparks new vision; every view builds on the ones that came before. The product of this cumulative effort is the Chronicle of Frequencies: a transformative record of the escalating Narrative of You.
THE liberated tarot
The Liberated Tarot drafts a symbiotic web of interactions, correlating Frequencies + Angels to a fully reconfigured tarot sequence, which has now evolved to model + transmit a higher truth. Every chapter of the Crystal Self experience invites a fresh encounter with the archetypes + themes of this New Tarot; every figure sculpts the Chronicle of You.
ANIMAL COMPANIONS
Every leg of our Adventure hosts a thriving cast of generous companions, not the least of which includes perhaps the most benevolent contributors of all: the Animals. Animals are travelers, like we are. Animals communicate + nourish our potential, even when we’re blind to it ourselves. Animals are messengers + friends. The Crystal Self invites you to recover this empowering connection by revealing those Companions serving you.
MINERAL ALLIES
Supplemental to the Journey, we encounter stones + crystals that effectively empower our intent. Every week you will meet two important Allies representative of virtues within you. Mineral Allies celebrate the optimal expression of your nature, challenge you to activate your gifts, and champion each step along the way.
the daily practice
Each position on the Crystal Map introduces a new constellation of perspectives. As the frequency + context of each position is illuminated, participants are invited to encounter new lessons, engage new allies, and reactivate inherent powers. This is accomplished using Crystal Contemplation: a practice that expands the sense of self through ritual, research, discussion, and direct application of The Forgotten Sense.

title: ABOUT THE STEWARDS | Timothy + Lara Brainard
content:
THE STEWARDS
TIMOTHY
Timothy is the originator of Seer Training, The Forgotten Sense, Mineral Allies, The Body Keys, and more. His work is dedicated to the development of elegance + authenticity as sustainable ways of being in life. Timothy received his first transmission from the Angels on May 27, 2024. It came as a complete surprise. The conversations have continued ever since.
LARA
Lara is a genius of pattern recognition + design. Her contribution involves years of study in systems of Astrology, the I’Ching, Human Design, the Gene Keys, Mineralogy, the Tarot, and much more. If it weren’t for Lara, the 64 Angels would never have been brought to life. She saw in Timothy what he could not see for himself. She called him up to this work.

title: THE FORGOTTEN SENSE | Reclaim the Living Power That Is Yours
content:
ACTIVATING NATURAL INTELLIGENCE
THE LANGUAGE OF LIFE
Stripped to its absolute fundamentals, all of human experience is a perpetual flow of relationship. At any given moment, each of us is relating to countless external factors such as space, light, texture, sound, fragrance, and more. We are constantly relating to internal factors as well, things like: breath, pulse, ideas, and sensation (to name a few). This relational flow is a never-ending exchange of important information: it is very much like a dialogue in which we are engaged for all of time. This exchange of energies provides the basis for how we navigate experience. As it happens, human life is a perpetual flow of decision-making, too.
