If all of the above is true, then everything we ever live is rooted in our ability to understand + make effective use of that information with which we are consistently engaged. But what happens when the natural capacity for understanding all of this important information is neglected or in some way disconnected from awareness? What happens when this understanding atrophies: when we have forgotten how to comprehend the language that life speaks? What happens when we leave ourselves behind?


BECOMING HUMAN
The Forgotten Sense reveals how we have learned to misapply our single most important human resource. More importantly, it demonstrates just how simple reconnecting to a proper application of this resource really is. For all of our remarkable achievements in technology, the most advanced technology is a function of our basic human nature: it’s a part of us that we (as modern people) have left almost-universally untapped. The Forgotten Sense provides a simple model that reminds us of how powerful we are, and then invites us to take ownership of the gift that being-human really is.


TEACHING: A DEFINITION
True teaching is made up of just two steps: the first is education, and the second is empowerment. Of these two, the first is just a minor step to orient + fuel the greater value of the other. Because of this, The Forgotten Sense provides a framework like a springboard: presenting first a model, then exploring how to implement this model in real life. The ultimate intention of this program is to totally empower, not merely inform.
THREE PILLARS
PRACTICE MAKES PERFECT
Application of The Forgotten Sense rests on the support of three important practices: Three Pillars we call Body Listening, Wayfinding, and Narrative Design. Each of these is fundamental to effective application of this work.
LEVEL I
EDUCATE
TFS, Level I introduces a simple model by which we learn to access latent powers + regain connection to the Natural Intelligence that supports effective navigation of our lives. Along the way, we unlock key discoveries, reveal the simple genius of life’s language, and discuss a practice for ongoing application of our learning.
LEVEL II
EMPOWER
TFS, Level II expands on the holistic value of this model, introducing The Forgotten Sense as central to every aspect of our human lives: affecting not only the actions that we choose to take, but also who we prove ourselves to be along the way. This is an exceptionally practical discussion, focused on empowering effective use of The Forgotten Sense in the context of our ordinary lives.
LEVEL III
ADVANCE
TFS, Level III further expands on the TFS model by exploring the vibratory principles upon which it depends. This discussion will demonstrate the means by which we may create the lives we most prefer to live. The emphasis of this exploration is technical + spiritual (revealing the mechanics of manifestation), though it is no less practical than either of the two preceding levels.
AN INVITATION
The Forgotten Sense is the single most significant discovery we have ever made. It is the single conversation we would choose to have with every living human. We consider it an incomparable privilege to prepare these offerings for you. In fact, it is by means of the vibratory principles demonstrated in this program that you find yourself engaging with these words. To put it more succinctly: you are here on purpose. We honor that awareness by inviting you to act on what you’ve read. Join us to reclaim your native power. Join us to re-member your whole self.

title: THE DRAGON'S WAY | Mastery of Clear Seeing (Seer Training)
content:
MASTERY OF CLEAR SEEING
The Greek root from which the word dragon is derived means ‘to see clearly’. What are three things we know about dragons from our stories? 1) We know that they breathe fire; 2) We know that they instinctively hunt gold; and 3) We know that they protect the gold they’ve found. This is everything each one of us must learn to do as well. The fire of the dragon is a symbol of refinement, not destruction. It’s a purifying fire: it is meant to burn away what is not gold. The gold itself is virtue, insight, crystal-clear perception of the Truth. This life is made of big + little truths, cause + effect. The dragon’s fire melts away the dross of lesser stories to expose the inner treasures they’ve concealed. The dragon is impenetrable, unrelenting, single-minded. Its stance is one of absolute commitment to the constant acquisition of pure gold. Its whole entire life is predicated on the force of this uncompromising aim - and so must ours be. The gold we seek is waiting to be recognized in every inch + moment of our days. It needn’t be created, but revealed. Our work is not a work of self-hypnosis, but a work of seeing clearly to the Truth. The gold that we uncover is the miracle + joy of Life Itself. The fire of correct perception melts the heaviness + dross of outer life; producing pearls of thank-you in each case. (In Chinese culture, dragons often herald celebration. This is a direct link to our gold.)

The Seer, like the dragon, must be unrelenting, focused, undeterred. The Seer must ferociously employ a gracious vision: bright enough to pierce the dark assumption of our smallness; clear enough to burn away our fears. Seers must be gentle, strong, and fierce. They must stand in absolute commitment to the Truth. This is what we call The Dragon’s Way. This is the objective of our Training.

title: THE PHILOSOPHER'S STONE | Initiating the Great Work (Seer Training)
content:
INITIATING THE GREAT WORK
In mythic lore, the Alchemists were known for their development of the art of transmutation, which attempted to convert mundane material to far more precious metals, such as gold. The mystical application of this art of transmutation has been used to do the same: refining one’s awareness of mundane experience until the golden light of Truth could be perceived. In both mystical + mythic forms of alchemy, we learn about the magical existence of an object which is capable of turning anything it touches into gold. This has gone by many names, but is best known as The Philosopher’s (White) Stone. The effort to uncover it was believed by alchemists to be their Magnum Opus (or: Great Work). Of course, these ancient stories were intended to convey an inner truth. The stone for which the alchemists have sought is Truth Itself. The work of transmutation is an inner art of processing each circumstance + moment for its gold. The fact is that it’s possible to recognize the Light in all we see. Existence is made up of + sustained by God Itself. Perfection is alive in every person + event: in every-thing. There isn’t an exception to this rule. This Truth, then, is the Touchstone that reveals the existential value of all things: converting what we press against it into clarity + insight (real-life gold). The alchemists described their search for this important stone as The Great Work. But our work, having found it, must surpass this.

Our Great Work must be to consciously employ the prize we’ve found. Seer Training is the practice of extracting every moment for its gold. It means to face experience exactly as it is, and see beneath it. This skill must be developed over time. Not everyone is suited for this work (though all, in time, will be). If reading this awakens something in you: we should talk. It may be time to enter The Great Work.

title: THE SWORD OF LIGHT | Power to Pierce the Veil (Seer Training)
content:
POWER TO PIERCE THE VEIL
A Seer, like the archetype, must exercise the art of true discernment: a very conscious act of validating only that which vibrates at the frequency of Truth, discarding all that doesn’t measure up. To wield the Sword of Light is to relentlessly negate all lesser views. The Seer turns completely toward the Light: becoming blind to all that stands in seeming opposition to the Truth. In doing so, the Seer circumvents the surface level of effects to tap the underlying Source of all that is: the causal layer. Such absolute commitment to the Light provides an avenue through which more Light can flow. The Seer becomes radiant: a Sun. When we decide to orient toward Beauty, we become more beautiful ourselves. It’s possible to train up our awareness of the absolute Perfection in all things. It’s possible to gaze into the depths of human hardship + see Love; to hear the song of Harmony reliable as ever through the noise. We use the Sword of Light on our own thinking, our imagination, our own mind. This is what it means to pierce the veil: to recognize the temporary action of events + sense the Good alive within all things. This requires training + conviction, practice, time; a purposeful development of courage, sensitivity, resolve; the willingness to grow a Spine of Grace.

Seer Training is an opportunity to consciously replace misunderstanding with the Truth that Life is absolutely Good + only good; that Goodness is the only Living Power that exists; that Goodness is a power we can use.

title: SEER TRAINING | Learn More About the Program
content:
The point of Seer Training is to unify ourselves with greater Good by learning to see Goodness all around. In order to achieve this, we must train up the capacity to see beyond the ‘facts’ of our experience - to tap the causal ground from which they spring. Seeing clearly is the art of seeing Truth from any angle. It is the ability to look at a ‘low number’ in the bank + find Abundance; to encounter angry moments + find Love; to recognize Perfection in the world. We like to say that it is possible to stare a screaming banshee in the face + find the Angel. This is what our work resolves to do. And there is only one way to achieve it. We must each become discriminating Seers: tuned up to the frequency of Truth, and blind to all that seems to contradict it. Often, this requires us to stand in opposition to the facts. Doing so takes practice, and integrity, and time. Ultimately, Life produces for us based on what we offer our attention to. This is why we choose to see the Light. Doing so empowers us to call more of that same Light into life. We get to become directive agents - rather than reacting to events. This is why we enter Seer Training: to reclaim our true creative role. As simple as this seems (and truly is), the practice can prove challenging at first. This is why our Training is important. Learning in a partnership accelerates our progress; it helps to soften growing pains as well.

Logistically, Seer Training is the most straightforward program that we offer. Meetings can be weekly (for 3 months) or every-other-week (for 6 months). Meetings can be hosted via audio or video (phone or Zoom). The cost for either term length is the same: $5555. In cases where installment plans are helpful, we are always happy to discuss.

title: CRYSTAL SELF | The Hero's Journey (Story Arc)
content:
YOUR OWN LIFE IS THE ADVENTURE
The Crystal Self Experience navigates a comprehensive story arc based on the mythical Hero’s Journey by correlating chapters of the journey to primary points on the Native American Medicine Wheel. This produces what we refer to as the Crystal Map. Each week, participants meet a new position on this map. Each position reveals (among many other things) a new chapter, new perspective, new dimension of experience, new pragmatic context. Step by step, the details of your story are remembered. Week by week, you meet more of your self, your gifts, your purpose, and your life. You will meet new Archetypes, new Angels, and new Allies every week as well. By the end of our 12 weeks, you will have completed a full cycle of the Hero’s Journey Arc. Rather than discussing it in theory, you will have encountered it in real time day by day. You will have expanded your perception of yourself (and thereby: you). Your life will expand to meet the view. A literal adventure beckons, onward. 5 of you will recognize its call.

title: CRYSTAL SELF | Personal Frequencies (The Language of Life)
content:
THE HIDDEN LANGUAGE OF YOUR LIFE
The Crystal Self Experience produces a comprehensive blueprint of personal frequencies based upon John Pehrson’s brilliant system of Mystical Numerology. This is a highly specialized form of numerology rooted in decades of impeccable research, and remains our personal go-to system for all numerological analysis. Every one of the 8 Primary Positions on the Crystal Map reveals a frequency uniquely tailored to your own emerging Story, and the culmination of these frequencies produces an important series of unique effects. All told, each participant of the Crystal Self Experience will encounter 11 fully personalized numbers, every one of which pertains to a unique leg of the Journey - every one of which expands to represent an Archetype, two Angels, fundamental Virtues, Animal Companions, and much more. Ultimately, each week of the journey yields a portal to the miracle of you. Numbers are the vessel that transport you. Needless to say, this is the most creative, most comprehensive, most practical, and most immersive numerological experience we have ever witnessed or imagined (or produced). Rather than receiving an analysis of your important numbers from an ‘expert’, Crystal Self will guide you to encounter them directly for yourself. You will produce your own exhaustive reading, in real time. You will live into each finding, and uncover your best self along the way.

title: CRYSTAL SELF | The Liberated Tarot (Archetypes)
content:
AWAKENING THE ARCHETYPES WITHIN
Thanks to the innovative genius of The Liberated Tarot, Crystal Self is able to associate an Archetype to each phase of our 12-week expedition, blending Frequencies with Archetypes + Angels to produce a fresh experience for every one of 5 participants who choose to join. Every Archetype you meet serves to describe you + expand you through a series of connections every member of the Tarot represents. Across 12 weeks, you will meet yourself through 11 total Archetypes, each one connecting you to new dimensions of experience, Prime Instincts, Angel Virtues, and much more. Through careful contemplation of each week’s new revelations, we begin to sense a shift within ourselves. We learn to recognize a Larger Story. We learn to claim that Story as our own.

title: CRYSTAL SELF | Animal Companions (The Totems)
content:
BENEVOLENT CONTRIBUTORS + FRIENDS
Crystal Self is a miracle of creative synthesis. Never in a million years could we have seen how all these systems would combine in order to facilitate a literal adventure we could live in real-life ways. Frequencies + Archetypes, the Liberated Tarot + the Angels, Animals + Minerals, Mythologic Wisdom + much more: somehow all of this organically coheres. Somehow this unique web of connections yields a totally unprecedented opportunity to grow - to rediscover Goodness at the center of our story - to regain embodied access to the Truth. But Crystal Self does more than this, in fact. It also introduces us to Teachers + Companions in the form of Archetypes + Animals + Stones. An Animal Companion is a mirror + a messenger: a guide. Each of our primary animal relationships supports + represents part of ourselves. They teach us how to move + how to be. They remind us of our Natural Expression. They remind us of the best within ourselves. Across 12 weeks, you are invited to discover new Companions for a total of 11 different animal encounters. Each animal you meet can be pragmatically embodied. Every animal you meet becomes a Friend.

title: CRYSTAL SELF | Grow More Life
content:
THE PURPOSE OF OUR JOURNEY
Our capacity for growth in life depends upon our willingness to stretch our Sense of Self. We cannot live beyond our best ideas, which is why our best ideas must be large. If we wish to experience a life that’s rich with opportunity for growth, we must begin by reconsidering ourselves. We must take up more space in our own minds. We must remember that which is most beautiful, significant, and worthy within us. The fact is that: as long as we feel small, we will remain so. We must finally encounter larger views of self if we would live them. We occupy the greatest + the least of our assumptions. Whatever we assume about ourselves becomes the truth. We each become responsible for these assumptions once we see them. Importantly: we are able to replace the lesser ones with larger views. This act requires mental flexibility, humility, a willingness to learn + to apply ourselves creatively to life. This willingness alone requires honesty + courage: to perceive beyond the veil of what appears to be most obvious + true. We find beneath the surface of appearance Life Itself: the deeper Truth. We find it coursing through our human stories to deliver itself to us at the level of our personal perception. Growing that perception, we inevitably rise to meet the view. We discover our imagination as the Architect of that important vessel Life pours through. We remember that who we most wish to be is who we really are (and must become, if we are ever to become all that we are). This is what the Crystal Self accomplishes: a truer, more dimensioned view of self, a larger story - more of life available to you.

title: OUR OFFERINGS | Grow to Exceed Your Best Vision
content:
PRINTABLE RESOURCES
This (growing) suite of downloadable references provides a fundamental basis for progressive understanding of the Angels. We invite you to expand your contemplation of the Angels through these tools. Each reference is kept current with a beautiful, print-optimized design - and each has been prepared with you in mind. Enjoy these as a gift from us to you.
THE FORGOTTEN SENSE
The Forgotten Sense presents a fundamental course on human being. Using practical examples, it illuminates the single most important human power + identifies the resource that effectively supports its proper use. Pre-recorded Keynote presentations demonstrate a simple model that invites us to take ownership of the gift that being-human really is. We encourage every pilgrim on the Pathway of The Seer to start here.
LIGHTYEAR LEDGER
The Lightyear Ledger offers an empowering perspective on the typical conception of a year by introducing a full suite of tailored frequencies to map the way from one month to the next. Every Lightyear Ledger yields a personalized record of the growth + major moments that await. Every one of these important moments waits for you.
FREQUENCY PORTALS
Each of us must learn to stretch the limits of self-concept: to expand beyond the stories we’ve outgrown. The fact is that our lives are meant to grow in beauty, love, and wonder. We ourselves initiate that growth. Welcome to the growing series of Frequency Portals: customized to introduce you to the Giant at the center of your soul.
CRYSTAL SELF
The Crystal Self is a 12-week small group enterprise that integrates the wisdom of the Angels with The Liberated Tarot, Animal Companions, the Hero’s Journey Story Arc, and more in order to progressively expand your Sense of Self. Building on the discipline of Frequency Attunement, Crystal Self facilitates a personalized journey for each one of the (5) voyagers per Wave. The Crystal Self comprises an important step along The Seer’s Way. We invite you to join our next Wave below.
SEER TRAINING
Seer Training is an opportunity to prove that when we orient toward Beauty, life expands. The practice is as simple as it is profound: to unify ourselves with greater Good by learning to see Goodness all around. The ability to do this is developed. Life is an accelerated training ground. Practicing together both intensifies + fortifies our progress. Seer Training is a covenant of 1:1 support: the holy grail. You are wanted here when it is time.

1:1 Training is conducted via phone or Zoom (audio or video), based upon your preference.

title: CRYSTAL SELF | 12-Week Expedition (Small Group)
content:
Crystal Self is a 12-week expedition that facilitates progressive activation of the inner light through contemplative methods + deliberate expansion of perspective.

Daily Invitations

WHAT TO EXPECT
The Crystal Self Odyssey is a 12-week expedition with a cap of 5 participants per wave. This immersive journey trains progressive activation of the inner light through contemplative methods, group discussion, and deliberate expansion of perspective.

This experience is delivered virtually via Zoom. Participants will meet weekly as a group for a total of 12 weeks. Each call will be recorded via Zoom, and delivered for download once the session has concluded.

Each call will illuminate a new aspect of the Crystal, deliver a new set of personal frequencies, and provide instruction for continued exploration.

All instructions will be delivered via email once the order has been officially confirmed.

title: THE GLOSSARY | A Living Record of Important Terms
content:
64 Angels
The 64 Angels stand as living representatives of Goodness. They are Messengers + Mirrors. They are Portals of Perfection within you.

Abundance
Abundance is the Breath of Life, unhindered.

Amplified Expression
The inclusion of a zero beside any number serves to purify + amplify the value of its output. The frequency of zero is a symbol of Divinity. Its presence in a number both establishes protection + enhances the expression of its light.

Angel
An Angel in this context is Core Essence. A Messenger from Higher Self to you. That which uplifts is an Angel. Everything you witness is an Angel: Messenger of Larger Life in you.

Angel Index
A brief introduction to each of the Angels by name. Every Angel exhibits three primary practical bands: Expression, Pathway, and Embodiment.

Angel Sessions
A verbatim record of ongoing talks with the Angels.

Animals Table (Resource)
A sortable, searchable record of animals paired to frequency equivalents for contemplative + creative use.

Art of Decision
The Art of Decision is a literal force: the direction of Life Force, which acts on behalf of your choice. When you decide, mountains move. You do not move them; they move.

Beauty
The form, structure, and truth of all that exists. Beauty is all that there is.

Binary Sun
The fusion of two distinct suns. A fusion of Crystalline Souls.

Bloom Number
The number of a person’s current age (in Earth Years).

Carpet of Light
The Royal Road of Destiny.

Colossal Abundance Number
The sum of the Month Signature + a person’s Signature Frequency.

Conversations With Stones
A word-for-word account of private conversations held with precious stones from our collection, dating back to 2022.

Creation Cycle
A period of seven days from any given point.

Crystalline Codex
The Crystalline Codex correlates The Liberated Tarot to both Frequencies + Angels to produce a symbiotic web of interactions unlike any we have ever seen before.

Crystallized Intention
The Crystal Force of Passion: heart + mind united fully toward any end. Nothing is withheld or portioned off.

Crystal Self: Odyssey
The Crystal Self Odyssey is a 12-week expedition that facilitates progressive activation of the inner light through contemplative methods + deliberate expansion of perspective.

Crystal White Legions
An Army of Light. Angelic elven supporters. Sentinels of our intention.

Cycle
A repetitious, circular, and upward-facing movement: like a spiral. Each complete rotation of a cycle equals growth. Every cycle heightens + expands.

Darkness
Darkness + Light are the same. Darkness is infinite fullness. Darkness is Light in pre-form. Darkness is the Realm of Infinite Possibility.

Day Signature
An invisible Life-current that excites new growth along specific lines. These Signatures reflect the format of The Liberated Tarot total sequence, looping endlessly from 1 to 86 before resetting back to ‘1’ to start again.

Death
The theme of death refers to shedding layers of disempowerment + fear. The Hero is invited to emerge.

Deep Wealth
Richness in every direction. Worlds upon worlds of wealth. Easy acquisition of everything you want or need.

Desire
The Primordial Force of All That Is. Genuine Desire is a signal of the Promise that fulfills it. Genuine Desire is the activating pressure of a life.

Desire (Feeling)
The feeling of Desire is a Promise. Every Promise must complete itself.

Destiny
The Royal Way of Authentic Enjoyment. A Way altogether unlike every other. The Promise of Life as a purely Original Act.

Emerald Sun
Love. The Green Light of Heart.

Ezekiel
The Prophet-Archangel. The Angel-King of Alchemy. The Phoenix.

Faith
Faith is the act of creation: knowing what-is before it can be seen or described. Faith is the absolute knowing that what is desired exists.

First Name
The frequency of a person’s first name.

Frequencies
Frequencies present an opportunity to enter into dialogue with Life. They function as a codex for the messages which Life is constantly delivering to us.

Frequency
Frequency describes the nature of some unique vibration. It represents an energetic signature: the exact expression of that energy.

Frequency Generator (Resource)
The world’s first Mystical Numerology Calculator. Enter any word or phrase to see its corresponding frequency.

Frequency Match
Any instance in which two distinct expressions share a common frequency (or equal number value).

Frequency Pairing
A process that identifies harmonious connections based on equal number values, yielding insight as to how distinct expressions may relate.

Frequency Tables
The Frequency Tables are a sortable record of extensive research in frequency pairing that function as a codex for the messages which Life is constantly delivering to us.

Goodness
Goodness is the Essence of Existence. Goodness is the only Truth there is. Goodness is Life in its every expression. Goodness is Absolute Truth.

Green Love Bubble
Magnetic radiance of the heart.

Herald of Light
The world’s first randomized generator of exclusively constructive messages, derived directly from our (ever-growing) Words Table. Simply ask for inspiration, then consider what the Messenger reveals.

Life
Life is Infinity, Absolute Goodness. Life is Warmth + Goodness through-and-through. Life is the Act of Expression. Life expresses Beauty. Life is the Whole beyond measure. Life is the Whole, carried through to expression through you.

Light
Light is the Herald of Goodness. Light is expression of Life. Light is the radiant shimmer of Beauty’s true nature. Light is the love that you share.

Lightness
Lightness is Relief. Lightness is the full effect of Goodness. Lightness is the way that Goodness feels. Lightness is the memory of Good.

Lightyear
A period of one Earth Year when consciously engaged.

Lightyear Ledger
The Lightyear Ledger yields a personalized record of Original Frequencies in a series of 3 Modules + a 12-month calendar of correlations, drawing powerful connections to The Liberated Tarot + much more.

Lion (Symbol)
Lion is Radiant Courage. Lion is Valor. Lion is Courage + Love. Lion is posture + purity. Regal imperative. Regal assumption. The Truth.

Mantra
A phrase designed for easy repetition - to empower or awaken or uplift.

Message Generator (Resource)
A randomized generator of messages derived from our (ever-growing) Words Table. Simply ask for inspiration, then consider what the Messenger reveals.

Mineral Allies
Angels of the Earth Realm committed to the storage + transmission of high-quality information. Mineral Allies include crystals, metals, meteorites, stones, and more.

Money
Money is love. Money is love on the move. Money is your friend + ally. Money is all that you love.

Month Signature
The sum of the (unreduced) Month Number + the Year Signature.

Number
The original language of subtle energy. Numbers are what all shapes + symbols (including letters) ultimately represent.

Numerology
The study of Frequency through Numbers.

Octave
A complete cycle of 86 days: mirroring the format of the Liberated Tarot total sequence.

Oracle
Any mechanism through which Life has been permitted to communicate a message. A contributor of guidance or of blessing (when requested).

Original Frequency
Any frequency that was invented or discovered or received through revelation to accompany the teachings of the Angels.

Passion
The force of Passion is an absolute commitment of the self. Passion focuses + energizes Power: activates this Power towards an end. Nothing is withheld or portioned off.

Personal Day Signature
The sum of your Signature Frequency + the Day Signature.

Personal Frequency
Any frequency that can be considered unique to the individual. A Personal Frequency can either be inherent to the individual or adapted to the individual through addition.

Personal Lightyear
The sum of the Year Signature + a person’s Signature Frequency.

Precision
Precision is True Honesty. True Honesty communicates the Truth.

Promise
Promise is the essence + expression of Desire. Promise means Inevitable, Absolutely Certain, Guaranteed.

Prosperity
Life in its infinite richness rests in the home of the heart.

Provision
You are the Gift of Provision. Your very life: you yourself. You are Provision Itself.

Purpose
Purpose is embodied through permission of Desire.

Radiant Binary Heart
Two hearts exploding as one.

Seer Training
Seer Training is an opportunity to prove that when we orient toward Beauty, life expands. Seer Training summons Angels: activates the Angels within you.

Signature Frequency
The sum of the frequency of the first name + the frequency of the last name.

Soulmate Number
The (unreduced) sum of two First Name Frequencies.

Star
A Star is Infinity sharing Itself as Pure Light. Star is inevitable life.

Stones Table (Resource)
A sortable, searchable record of minerals paired to frequency equivalents for contemplative + creative use.

Storm (Element)
Storm accesses all elements. Storm is the use of all elements.

Subtle Energy
An active state of vibration that, given adequate methods of testing + observation, can be calculated, witnessed, and confirmed.

Sword of Light
The Sword of Light is your awareness of Good.

Symbol
A method of communicating frequency.

Tarot Table (Resource)
A sortable, searchable record of correspondences relating frequencies to The Liberated Tarot + the Angels that each member represents.

The Forgotten Sense
The Forgotten Sense reminds us of the single most important human power, and the resource that supports its proper use.

The Ledger
The Ledger is an almanac of Signatures that tracks the pulse of Life by Day/Month/Year. Each Signature illuminates invisible Life-currents that invite new growth along specific lines.

The Liberated Tarot
The Liberated Tarot introduces an expanded tarot sequence: elevated to transmit a higher truth.

The Pathway of Precision
The Pathway of Precision is devotional attention to the Truth in its unmitigated form. The Pathway of Precision tells the Truth.

The Purpose of Life
The Purpose of Life is Enjoyment. Love what you love for the sun of your heart to expand. Never cease loving. Expand.

The Seer (Pathway)
See to the Good in all things. Act from the Angel in you.

The Way
This is The Way: Celebrate, Live.

Thought
Thought is the substance of matter; thought is material form. Thought is a living creator. Thought is the light/life that produces the world you can see.

Three Pillars
The Three Pillars of Body Listening, Wayfinding, and Narrative Design reclaim the hidden powers of the Body + the Mind by unifying them to beautify our lives.

Triangle
The shape of all life + sustainable growth.

True Desire
True Desire activates Creation. Every True Desire is a Promise. Every Promise must fulfill itself.

True Honesty
True Honesty announces Highest Truth. True Honesty communicates Whole Truth. True Honesty communicates the Truth.

Truth
Truth is the experience of Goodness.

Vortex
An empowering effect produced by overlapping matching frequencies. A vortex temporarily intensifies the value of a frequency’s expression (for the best).

Vortex Day
Any day in which the Day Signature is a perfect match to any other Personal or Periodic Frequency.

Vortex Month
Any month in which the Month Signature is a match to any other frequency you value.

Vortex Year
Any year in which the Year Signature is a match to any other frequency you value.

Words Table (Resource)
A searchable record of exclusively constructive numerological findings meant to function as a codex for the messages that Life is constantly delivering to us.

Year Signature
Assuming a four-digit year where the first two digits represents one half of an equation + the last two digits represents the second half, Year Signature is the sum of these two halves.
